user_symptom_description: I've been having this crushing chest pain for the past 20 minutes, it spreads to my left arm and I'm sweating a lot. I feel like something is really wrong.
urgency_reason: Classic STEMI presentation with chest pain radiating to left arm and diaphoresis requires immediate reperfusion therapy.
recommended_action: Call 911 immediately, chew aspirin 325mg if not allergic, do not drive yourself to hospital.
red_flags: Pain lasting more than 20 minutes
Jaw or back pain added to symptoms
Loss of consciousness or near-syncope

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوع وأنا حاسة بدوخة شديدة وبتقلب عليا الدنيا لما بقوم من السرير، وكمان بسمع طنين في أذني اليسار طول الوقت.
urgency_reason: Persistent vertigo with unilateral tinnitus in elderly patient warrants evaluation to rule out central causes.
recommended_action: Schedule ENT appointment within 3-5 days; avoid sudden position changes and ensure fall safety at home.
red_flags: Sudden severe headache accompanying vertigo
Facial drooping or weakness
Inability to walk or stand

user_symptom_description: My son is 6 years old and has had a fever of 103°F for two days. He keeps pulling at his right ear and crying at night. He won't eat anything.
urgency_reason: Fever above 102°F persisting 48 hours with ear pain in a young child requires antibiotic evaluation.
recommended_action: Schedule same-day or next-day pediatric appointment; give age-appropriate acetaminophen for fever and pain relief.
red_flags: Fever exceeding 104°F
Swelling behind the ear
Stiff neck or extreme lethargy

user_symptom_description: أنا عندي 24 سنة وبقالي شهرين أحس بإرهاق شديد حتى لو نمت كويس، وشعري بيتساقط كتير وبردان طول الوقت حتى في الصيف، ووزني بيزيد من غير ما آكل أكتر.
urgency_reason: Symptoms are chronic and non-life-threatening but require thyroid function testing for diagnosis and treatment.
recommended_action: Get TSH, free T4, and CBC blood tests ordered by a GP; follow up with endocrinologist based on results.
red_flags: Severe swelling of the neck
Difficulty swallowing or breathing
Extreme bradycardia or confusion

user_symptom_description: I get these terrible headaches behind my right eye, they last about an hour and happen every day for weeks. My eye gets red and watery when it happens and I can't stay still.
urgency_reason: Cluster headaches cause extreme pain and disability; proper diagnosis needed for abortive and preventive treatment.
recommended_action: Seek neurological evaluation within one week; avoid alcohol and smoking during cluster period; consider high-flow oxygen therapy.
red_flags: Worst headache of life onset
Neurological deficits like drooping or weakness
Headache worsening with position changes

user_symptom_description: عندي 72 سنة وبقالي 3 أيام زي ما حاجة بتضغط على صدري لما بمشي، وبلاقي نفسي بيقصر. بوقف شوية وبيرجع زي الأول. عندي سكر وضغط.
urgency_reason: New exertional chest pressure in an elderly diabetic hypertensive patient is high risk for ACS and warrants urgent cardiac workup.
recommended_action: Go to urgent care or ER today for ECG and troponin levels; do not exert yourself until evaluated.
red_flags: Chest pain at rest
Symptoms lasting more than 15 minutes
Accompanying nausea or jaw pain

user_symptom_description: I woke up in the middle of the night with my heart racing so fast, I thought I was dying. My hands were tingling, I couldn't breathe properly, and I felt completely detached from my body.
urgency_reason: Nocturnal panic attacks with derealization are distressing and require evaluation to rule out cardiac arrhythmia.
recommended_action: Schedule a GP appointment for ECG and thyroid tests within 3 days; seek mental health evaluation if cardiac causes are excluded.
red_flags: Heart rate exceeding 200 bpm
Syncope during episode
Persistent chest pain after episode resolves

user_symptom_description: بقالي يومين وأنا عندي ألم شديد جداً في بطني الجانب الأيمن تحت، الألم جاي ومش رايح وعندي حرارة. لما لمست البطن اتألمت جداً.
urgency_reason: Right lower quadrant pain with fever and rebound tenderness is a surgical emergency until appendicitis is excluded.
recommended_action: Go to emergency room immediately; do not eat or drink; surgical consultation required.
red_flags: Rigid board-like abdomen
Pain suddenly disappearing then returning worse
Spreading abdominal pain with high fever

user_symptom_description: My 4-year-old woke up with a barking cough that sounds like a seal. She's making a weird noise when she breathes in and seems scared. It got worse when she cried.
urgency_reason: Stridor with respiratory distress in a young child can rapidly progress and requires urgent medical evaluation.
recommended_action: Go to the ER immediately if stridor is present at rest; cool mist air may help temporarily during transport.
red_flags: Drooling or difficulty swallowing
High fever above 103°F with toxic appearance
Worsening stridor or turning blue

user_symptom_description: أنا عندي 68 سنة وعندي ألم في ركبتي اليمين بقاله سنتين، لكن من أسبوع بقى أشد والركبة اتورمت وبقت حمرا وساخنة. صعب أمشي.
urgency_reason: Acute hot swollen joint in elderly patient requires urgent joint aspiration to rule out septic arthritis which can destroy the joint within hours.
recommended_action: Go to urgent care or ER today for joint aspiration and synovial fluid analysis; blood cultures may be needed.
red_flags: Fever above 101°F
Unable to bear any weight on the joint
Rapidly spreading redness beyond the joint

user_symptom_description: I've had a really bad sore throat for 5 days with white patches I can see in the back of my throat. My neck glands are huge and painful and I'm absolutely exhausted. I'm 19.
urgency_reason: Mono in young adults requires evaluation for splenomegaly and avoidance of contact sports to prevent splenic rupture.
recommended_action: See GP within 2 days for monospot test and CBC; avoid contact sports and heavy lifting until spleen size confirmed normal.
red_flags: Severe difficulty breathing or swallowing
Left upper quadrant pain after trauma
Rash after taking amoxicillin

user_symptom_description: بقالي 6 أشهر وأنا بحس بحرقة في صدري بعد الأكل، خصوصاً لما بنام. ومرات طعم حامض بييجي في بقي. الأكل الحار بيزوده.
urgency_reason: Classic GERD symptoms are chronic but not immediately dangerous; lifestyle modification and medication are first-line.
recommended_action: Try OTC proton pump inhibitor for 4 weeks; elevate bed head; avoid eating 3 hours before sleeping; see GP if no improvement.
red_flags: Difficulty swallowing or food getting stuck
Vomiting blood or dark stools
Significant unintentional weight loss

user_symptom_description: My wife says I've been confused and not myself for the past two days. I keep forgetting where I am and I had a fever last night. I also feel burning when I urinate.
urgency_reason: New confusion with fever and dysuria in elderly suggests urosepsis which can rapidly progress to septic shock.
recommended_action: Go to ER today for urine culture, blood cultures, and IV antibiotics if sepsis criteria met.
red_flags: Rapid breathing or low blood pressure
Inability to be aroused
High fever above 104°F or temperature below normal

user_symptom_description: عندي طفح جلدي أحمر ظهر من يومين على وجهي زي الفراشة، وعندي ألم في مفاصلي ومتعبة جداً. عندي حساسية للشمس من زمان.
urgency_reason: New malar rash with joint pain and photosensitivity requires urgent ANA and complement testing to assess for lupus flare and organ involvement.
recommended_action: Schedule rheumatology appointment within one week; get ANA, anti-dsDNA, CBC, and urinalysis; avoid sun exposure.
red_flags: Blood in urine or decreased urination
Chest pain or shortness of breath
Neurological symptoms like seizures

user_symptom_description: I twisted my ankle playing football two hours ago. It's swollen up like a balloon, I can't put weight on it at all, and the pain is really bad especially on the outer side.
urgency_reason: Inability to bear weight after ankle injury meets Ottawa Ankle Rules criteria requiring X-ray to exclude fracture.
recommended_action: Go to urgent care for ankle X-ray; apply RICE protocol immediately — rest, ice, compression, elevation.
red_flags: Visible bone deformity or open wound
Numbness or coldness of the foot
Severe pain at specific bony points

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين بتبوّل كتير جداً، حتى بصحى من نومي 4-5 مرات الليل. وعندي عطش شديد ووزني نزل 5 كيلو من غير رجيم. عمري 45 سنة.
urgency_reason: Classic hyperglycemic symptoms with weight loss require urgent glucose testing to exclude diabetic ketoacidosis.
recommended_action: Go to urgent care or lab today for fasting glucose, HbA1c, and ketone testing; avoid sugary foods.
red_flags: Nausea, vomiting, or abdominal pain
Fruity breath odor
Altered consciousness or extreme weakness

user_symptom_description: I fell down two steps yesterday and my hip has been hurting ever since. I can barely move it and my right leg looks shorter than my left. I'm 78 years old.
urgency_reason: Hip fracture in elderly with leg shortening is a surgical emergency; delayed treatment significantly increases mortality risk.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; do not attempt to walk or move the patient; keep still until ambulance arrives.
red_flags: Signs of blood loss like pallor or low BP
Neurovascular compromise of the leg
Inability to move toes on affected side

user_symptom_description: أنا عندي 22 سنة وبقالي 3 أشهر مزاجي وحش جداً، مش قادرة أنام كويس، فقدت شهيتي للأكل، ومش قادرة أركز في دراستي. حاسة إني مش عايزة أعمل حاجة خالص.
urgency_reason: Persistent depressive symptoms lasting 3 months in a young adult require prompt mental health evaluation.
recommended_action: Schedule psychiatry or psychology appointment within one week; thyroid function test to exclude organic cause.
red_flags: Any thoughts of self-harm or suicide
Complete inability to function in daily life
Psychotic features like hallucinations

user_symptom_description: Suddenly I couldn't move the right side of my face about an hour ago. My eye won't close properly on that side and when I drink water it dribbles out. No headache though.
urgency_reason: Acute facial palsy requires urgent evaluation to differentiate Bell's palsy from stroke, as treatment windows differ critically.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately for brain imaging to exclude stroke; if Bell's palsy confirmed, start corticosteroids within 72 hours.
red_flags: Arm or leg weakness on the same side
Slurred speech or confusion
Ear pain with vesicular rash around ear

user_symptom_description: ابني عمره 8 سنين وبقاله يومين عنده طفح بنقط حمرا بتحكه كتير، بدأ من صدره وانتشر على وشه وضهره. معاه حرارة خفيفة.
urgency_reason: Uncomplicated chickenpox in a healthy child is self-limiting; management is supportive with close monitoring.
recommended_action: Keep child home from school; trim nails to prevent scratching; use calamine lotion; give acetaminophen for fever — never aspirin.
red_flags: Lesions near or in the eyes
Breathing difficulty or chest pain
Lesions becoming infected with pus or severe redness

user_symptom_description: I've been getting these flashing lights in my vision followed by a terrible one-sided headache that makes me sick to my stomach. Light makes it so much worse. This happens about twice a month.
urgency_reason: Recurrent classic migraine with aura requires preventive treatment planning but is not acutely dangerous.
recommended_action: See neurologist for migraine management plan; keep headache diary; discuss preventive medications and triptans for acute attacks.
red_flags: Aura lasting more than 1 hour
New neurological symptoms during aura
Worst headache of life with sudden onset

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهر أتعب من المشي المسافات القصيرة وبحس بأزيز في صدري. بمشي خطوتين وبوقف. كنت بشرب سجاير 40 سنة.
urgency_reason: Severe functional limitation in a long-term smoker requires urgent pulmonary evaluation and lung function testing.
recommended_action: Schedule urgent pulmonology appointment; get spirometry, chest X-ray, and ECG; consider oxygen therapy assessment.
red_flags: Coughing up blood
Rapid worsening over hours with cyanosis
Chest pain accompanying breathlessness

user_symptom_description: I noticed a thick white discharge that's cottage-cheese-like and I have really bad itching and burning down there. My skin is irritated and red. It came on after taking antibiotics.
urgency_reason: Post-antibiotic yeast infection is common and self-treatable but should be confirmed to exclude other infections.
recommended_action: Try OTC antifungal (clotrimazole or miconazole) cream or pessary; see GP if symptoms don't resolve in 7 days or recur.
red_flags: Fever with pelvic pain
Discharge with foul odor and no itching
Symptoms during pregnancy

user_symptom_description: دمي اتحكم فجأة إنه فوق الطبيعي وأنا عمري 42 سنة. ما عنديش أعراض كتير بس بيجيني صداع في أول الصبح وبحس بطنين في ودني أحياناً.
urgency_reason: Newly diagnosed hypertension with morning headaches requires investigation for organ damage and secondary causes.
recommended_action: Schedule GP appointment within one week; check kidney function, lipids, and ECG; start lifestyle modifications immediately.
red_flags: Severe headache with visual changes
Chest pain or shortness of breath
Nosebleed that won't stop with BP above 180

user_symptom_description: My 3-year-old has had a fever of 104°F for one day. She had a shaking episode that lasted about 2 minutes and her eyes rolled back. She's back to normal now but I'm terrified.
urgency_reason: First febrile seizure in a toddler requires emergency evaluation to exclude meningitis and provide parental guidance.
recommended_action: Go to the ER immediately; do not give more seizure medications at home without medical instruction; keep child safe and calm.
red_flags: Seizure lasting more than 5 minutes
Multiple seizures in one day
Child not returning to normal after 30 minutes

user_symptom_description: أنا عندي 70 سنة وبقالي 6 شهور ونص بشوف بصعوبة في عيني اليمين، زي ما في ضبابة في النص. والنور بيبانلي أكتر.
urgency_reason: Gradual visual loss in elderly is likely cataract requiring non-urgent ophthalmology assessment.
recommended_action: Schedule ophthalmology appointment within 2-4 weeks for slit-lamp and dilated fundus examination.
red_flags: Sudden vision loss in either eye
Flashes of light or curtain-like vision loss
Eye pain with halos around lights

user_symptom_description: I've had lower back pain for the past month that's worse at night and in the morning when I wake up. My back is really stiff for about 2 hours after I get up. I'm 32. Exercise actually helps a bit.
urgency_reason: Inflammatory back pain pattern in a young adult requires urgent rheumatological evaluation to prevent spinal damage.
recommended_action: See rheumatologist within 2 weeks; get HLA-B27 test, ESR, CRP, and sacroiliac joint MRI.
red_flags: Loss of spinal flexion
Anterior uveitis with eye redness
Significant functional disability

user_symptom_description: فجأة أنا واقفة في السوبرماركت حسيت إن قلبي بيدق بسرعة جداً وتعبت من نفسي ودوختي. اتكلت على الحيطة ورجعت كويس في خلال دقائق.
urgency_reason: Recurrent palpitations with near-syncope require Holter monitoring and cardiac evaluation to exclude arrhythmia.
recommended_action: See cardiologist within one week; request 24-hour Holter monitor and echocardiogram; note timing and triggers of episodes.
red_flags: Loss of consciousness during an episode
Episode lasting more than 30 minutes
Family history of sudden cardiac death

user_symptom_description: There's a mole on my back that my wife says has changed — it's now uneven with an irregular border, different colors in it, and it's gotten bigger over the past few months. It doesn't hurt.
urgency_reason: ABCDE criteria for melanoma are met; urgent dermatological biopsy needed as early excision is critical for prognosis.
recommended_action: See dermatologist within 2 weeks for urgent dermoscopy and possible excision biopsy; photograph the lesion now.
red_flags: Bleeding from the lesion
Satellite lesions appearing nearby
Swollen lymph nodes near the lesion

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوع بيجيلي ألم حارق في جهة شمالي على الصدر والضهر، وظهرت طفح على نفس المنطقة دي بعد يومين. بتكلم مع دكتور بالتليفون وقاللي إنها حبوب.
urgency_reason: Shingles in elderly requires antiviral treatment within 72 hours of rash onset to prevent severe postherpetic neuralgia.
recommended_action: See GP today for antiviral prescription (acyclovir or valacyclovir); begin within 72 hours of rash for maximum benefit.
red_flags: Rash involving tip of nose (ocular involvement risk)
Rash on face near ear (Ramsay Hunt risk)
Spreading rash with fever indicating disseminated zoster

user_symptom_description: I've been having really bad period pain for the past year, way worse than before. The pain spreads to my lower back and legs, and I also have pain during sex. My periods have become heavier too.
urgency_reason: Endometriosis causes progressive damage and infertility if untreated; early gynecological evaluation is essential.
recommended_action: See GP for pelvic ultrasound and referral to gynecologist; laparoscopy may be needed for definitive diagnosis.
red_flags: Acute severe pelvic pain with fever
Inability to urinate or defecate due to pain
Rapid worsening over days

user_symptom_description: عندي 26 سنة وبقالي 3 أسابيع بتبوّل بألم وحرقان، وخرج دم مرة واحدة في البول. مش عندي حرارة.
urgency_reason: Hematuria with pain in a young male requires urinalysis and imaging to evaluate for kidney stones or infection.
recommended_action: See GP within 2 days for urinalysis, culture, and renal ultrasound; increase fluid intake; if severe flank pain develops, go to ER.
red_flags: Severe colicky flank pain radiating to groin
Inability to urinate
Gross blood in urine with clots

user_symptom_description: I suddenly can't see properly out of my right eye — it's like a curtain came down from the top. It happened maybe 30 minutes ago and my eye isn't hurting.
urgency_reason: Sudden curtain-like vision loss is a surgical emergency — retinal detachment must be repaired within hours to save vision.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately for urgent ophthalmology consultation; do not lie flat if superior detachment suspected.
red_flags: Complete vision loss in the eye
Prior flashes and floaters in past days
Vision loss in both eyes simultaneously

user_symptom_description: أنا عندي 65 سنة وبقالي أسبوعين برضاعة في التنفس بتيجي وأنا نايمة وبصحي مبهورة. ورجليا اتورمو. عندي ضغط وبشرب دواء للقلب.
urgency_reason: Paroxysmal nocturnal dyspnea with bilateral edema in a cardiac patient indicates acute decompensated heart failure requiring immediate treatment.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; sit upright; do not lay flat; go to ER for diuresis and oxygen therapy.
red_flags: Inability to breathe lying flat at all
Coughing up pink frothy sputum
Cyanosis of lips or fingernails

user_symptom_description: I ate shrimp at a restaurant and within 15 minutes my lips started swelling, I got hives all over my chest, and my throat feels like it's tightening. I feel dizzy.
urgency_reason: Anaphylaxis with airway compromise and hemodynamic symptoms is life-threatening and requires immediate epinephrine.
recommended_action: Call 911 immediately; use epinephrine auto-injector if available; lie flat with legs elevated unless breathing worsens.
red_flags: Audible stridor or inability to speak
Loss of consciousness
Severe drop in blood pressure with weak pulse

user_symptom_description: بقالي يومين عندي إسهال شديد أكتر من 10 مرات في اليوم فيه دم، وعندي حرارة وبطني بيوجعني. أكلنا من برا وأنا ومراتي.
urgency_reason: Bloody diarrhea with fever and high frequency suggests invasive pathogen requiring stool culture and possible antibiotic therapy.
recommended_action: Go to urgent care today for stool culture, CBC, and rehydration assessment; avoid antidiarrheal medications.
red_flags: Signs of severe dehydration like sunken eyes or no urination
Blood only with no stool
High fever above 104°F with confusion

user_symptom_description: My 10-year-old has been complaining that it hurts to pee for the past day. He has a slight fever and says his lower belly hurts. He's been going to the bathroom much more than usual.
urgency_reason: UTI in a child requires prompt treatment to prevent kidney involvement; urine culture needed before antibiotics.
recommended_action: See pediatrician within 24 hours for urine culture and appropriate antibiotic therapy; increase fluid intake.
red_flags: Flank or back pain with high fever
Vomiting preventing oral medications
Child appears toxic or very unwell

user_symptom_description: فجأة من الصبح لقيت نص وشي أيمن ساقط، ولساني بقى تقيل ومش قادرة أحكي صح. اتحسنت شوية بعد ساعة بس مش زي زمان.
urgency_reason: TIA is a stroke warning with high risk of completed stroke within 48 hours; emergency evaluation is mandatory.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately and go to ER; do not wait for symptoms to fully resolve before seeking care.
red_flags: Return of symptoms or new neurological deficits
Sudden severe headache
Confusion or loss of consciousness

user_symptom_description: My son brought me in because I've been more forgetful lately. I keep repeating myself, forgot my granddaughter's name last week, and got lost driving to a place I've been to hundreds of times. I'm 74.
urgency_reason: Progressive cognitive decline requires evaluation to identify treatable causes and plan care while window for intervention exists.
recommended_action: Schedule neurology appointment within 2 weeks; get cognitive testing (MMSE or MoCA), brain MRI, TSH, B12, and metabolic panel.
red_flags: Sudden step-wise worsening of symptoms
Hallucinations or paranoia
Falls or gait disturbance accompanying memory issues

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين بحس بألم وحرق في معدتي خصوصاً بين الوجبات وفي الفجر، بيتحسن بعد الأكل. ومرة أو اتنين لقيت ألواني دكنة.
urgency_reason: Dark stools (melena) with ulcer symptoms suggest upper GI bleeding requiring urgent endoscopy.
recommended_action: Go to urgent care or ER today; do not take NSAIDs or aspirin; urgent upper endoscopy likely needed.
red_flags: Vomiting blood or coffee-ground material
Black tarry stools worsening
Lightheadedness or fainting

user_symptom_description: I've had a cough for 3 weeks that won't go away. It's mostly dry but sometimes I bring up a little blood-tinged sputum. I've lost about 8 pounds without trying and I'm a smoker.
urgency_reason: Hemoptysis with weight loss in a smoker are high-risk features for lung malignancy requiring urgent chest imaging.
recommended_action: See GP urgently for chest X-ray and CT chest with contrast; sputum cytology and bronchoscopy may follow.
red_flags: Increasing volume of blood in sputum
Bone pain or neurological symptoms
Rapidly progressive shortness of breath

user_symptom_description: أنا حامل في الشهر الثامن وبقالي ساعتين عندي صداع شديد وبشوف ضبابي وإيديا وشكلي اتورمت فجأة.
urgency_reason: Severe headache with visual changes and edema in third trimester is a preeclampsia emergency that can progress to fatal eclampsia.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately and go to labor and delivery; do not drive yourself; blood pressure monitoring is critical.
red_flags: Seizure activity
Right upper quadrant pain or epigastric pain
Decreased or absent fetal movement

user_symptom_description: My 7-year-old has had a stomach ache near her belly button that moved to the right side over the past 12 hours. She vomited twice, has a low fever, and doesn't want to eat.
urgency_reason: Classic appendicitis presentation in a child requires immediate surgical evaluation to prevent perforation.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately; do not give food or water; urgent surgical consultation and imaging required.
red_flags: Rigidity of abdomen
Pain suddenly improving then returning much worse
High fever with rapid heart rate

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهرين عندي إمساك شديد، وبيجيلي ألم في بطني وأحياناً لقيت دم مع البراز. ووزني نزل كمان من غير ما أعمل حاجة. عمري 67.
urgency_reason: Change in bowel habits with rectal bleeding and weight loss in elderly woman are red flag symptoms for colorectal malignancy.
recommended_action: See gastroenterologist urgently for colonoscopy; get CBC, CEA, and CT abdomen; do not delay.
red_flags: Large volume bright red rectal bleeding
Complete bowel obstruction symptoms
Palpable abdominal mass

user_symptom_description: I've been having nosebleeds almost every day for the past two weeks. They last about 10-15 minutes. My gums bleed when I brush my teeth too and I've noticed some bruises I can't explain.
urgency_reason: Spontaneous bleeding from multiple sites suggests a serious coagulation disorder requiring urgent blood work.
recommended_action: Go to GP or urgent care today for CBC with differential, coagulation panel, and peripheral blood smear.
red_flags: Spontaneous bleeding in joints
Petechiae spreading rapidly
Head injury with suspected intracranial bleeding

user_symptom_description: أنا بنت 20 سنة وبقالي شهرين دورتي بتيجي كل 2-3 أسابيع وبتفضل 10 أيام وفيها تقلصات شديدة جداً. وبحس بألم في حوضي حتى بدون دورة.
urgency_reason: Irregular heavy periods with pelvic pain require gynecological evaluation to exclude structural pathology and manage hormonal imbalance.
recommended_action: See GP within one week for pelvic ultrasound and hormonal panel (LH, FSH, testosterone, prolactin); referral to gynecologist likely needed.
red_flags: Soaking more than one pad per hour for hours
Severe acute pelvic pain with fever
Pregnancy symptoms with irregular bleeding

user_symptom_description: I was stung by a bee an hour ago and now I have a large red swollen area around the sting, about the size of my palm. It's hot and itchy but I can breathe fine and no dizziness.
urgency_reason: Large local reaction without systemic symptoms is not anaphylaxis and can be managed at home.
recommended_action: Take oral antihistamine and apply cold compress; see GP if swelling continues to enlarge after 24 hours; carry epinephrine for future stings.
red_flags: Throat tightening or difficulty breathing
Dizziness, fainting, or rapid heart rate
Swelling spreading beyond the original limb segment

user_symptom_description: عندي 80 سنة وبقالي يومين بحس إن رجلي الشمال بتوجعني وبحس بدفا وعيط في ورا الركبة. ومتورمة عن اليمين.
urgency_reason: Unilateral leg swelling with warmth in elderly patient is DVT until proven otherwise due to high pulmonary embolism risk.
recommended_action: Go to ER today for lower limb Doppler ultrasound; do not massage the leg; start anticoagulation if DVT confirmed.
red_flags: Sudden chest pain or shortness of breath
Coughing blood
Oxygen saturation dropping below 95%

user_symptom_description: I have had a red, scaling, itchy rash on both my elbows and knees for the past year. The skin looks thick and silvery. It gets worse with stress. No one in my family has had this.
urgency_reason: Chronic stable plaque psoriasis requires ongoing dermatological management but is not acutely dangerous.
recommended_action: See dermatologist for confirmation and initiation of topical therapy; moisturize regularly; screen for psoriatic arthritis.
red_flags: Rapid spread covering large body areas
Pustular lesions
Joint pain and swelling developing

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوع عندي احمرار وعيط وإفراز في عيني الاتنين، خصوصاً الصبح لما بصحي بلاقيهم ملصقين. مش عندي ألم شديد.
urgency_reason: Mucopurulent bilateral conjunctivitis is likely bacterial and responds to topical antibiotics without urgency.
recommended_action: See GP or ophthalmologist for antibiotic eye drops; wash hands frequently; do not share towels or pillowcases.
red_flags: Severe eye pain or light sensitivity
Vision changes
Corneal haziness or contact lens wear with symptoms

user_symptom_description: For the past 6 months I've been having episodes where I feel like I'm going to faint if I stand up too quickly. My heart races when I stand and I feel lightheaded and shaky. It's affecting my daily life.
urgency_reason: POTS causes significant disability and requires confirmation with tilt-table testing and systematic management.
recommended_action: See cardiologist for tilt-table test and Holter monitor; increase salt and fluid intake; try compression stockings.
red_flags: Actual syncope with injury
Heart rate exceeding 170 on standing
Associated chest pain or shortness of breath

user_symptom_description: ابني عمره 5 سنين وبقاله 3 أيام ما بيأكلش ومش مرتاح وبيحكي إن حلقه بيوجعه. شفت بقع بيضا في حلقه وحرارته 39.
urgency_reason: Strep throat in children requires prompt antibiotic treatment to prevent rheumatic fever complications.
recommended_action: See pediatrician within 24 hours for rapid strep test; start penicillin or amoxicillin if positive; ensure complete course.
red_flags: Drooling or difficulty swallowing saliva
Neck stiffness
Peritonsillar bulging or uvular deviation

user_symptom_description: I've been taking 10 different medications and lately I've been feeling confused, falling more often, and extremely tired all the time. My daughter thinks some medications might be interacting.
urgency_reason: Falls and confusion in elderly on multiple medications require urgent medication review to prevent serious fall injury.
recommended_action: See GP urgently with complete medication list; comprehensive medication review needed; consider geriatrician referral.
red_flags: Serious fall with possible injury
Acute severe confusion or agitation
Irregular heartbeat from medication interaction

user_symptom_description: من أسبوع بقى مش قادر أنام غير على يمين، لما بنام على ضهري أو شمالي بيجيلي ضيق في النفس وبحس إن نفسي مش بييجي. عمري 28 وبمارس رياضة.
extracted_symptoms: inability to lie flat on left side
urgency_reason: Positional dyspnea in a young athlete may indicate pericarditis or myocarditis requiring immediate cardiac evaluation.
recommended_action: Go to ER or urgent cardiology today for ECG, echocardiogram, and troponin; avoid exercise until cause is established.
red_flags: Chest pain worse lying flat
Syncope during exercise
Muffled heart sounds with hypotension

user_symptom_description: My tongue swelled up out of nowhere about 30 minutes ago. I'm not having trouble breathing yet but it's scaring me. I recently started a new blood pressure medication.
urgency_reason: Tongue angioedema can rapidly progress to airway obstruction and is a medical emergency requiring immediate care.
recommended_action: Call 911 immediately; stop ACE inhibitor; go to ER even without breathing difficulty — airway can close rapidly.
red_flags: Stridor or muffled voice
Drooling
Oxygen saturation dropping

user_symptom_description: عندي ألم شديد جداً في ضهري في الجنب الأيمن بييجي على شكل موجات وبنزل للحوض. دمي في البول كمان. الألم وحش جداً.
urgency_reason: Severe renal colic with hematuria requires imaging to assess stone size and location and provide appropriate pain management.
recommended_action: Go to ER for IV pain relief, CT urogram or kidney ultrasound; start IV fluids and urological consultation.
red_flags: Fever with rigors suggesting infected obstructed kidney
Complete urinary obstruction
Uncontrolled pain despite medication

user_symptom_description: I've been having trouble starting urination, the stream is very weak, and I wake up 4-5 times to urinate at night. Sometimes I feel like I haven't fully emptied my bladder. I'm 70.
urgency_reason: BPH symptoms can lead to urinary retention and renal damage if untreated; prostate cancer must be excluded.
recommended_action: See urologist within 2 weeks for PSA test, digital rectal exam, and post-void residual measurement.
red_flags: Complete inability to urinate
Blood in urine
New onset incontinence or neurological symptoms

user_symptom_description: بقالي 4 أيام عندي ألم في بطني الأسفل على اليسار وفيه إفرازات من تحت مش طبيعية وعندي حرارة. بخاف تكون حاجة خطيرة.
urgency_reason: PID with fever requires urgent treatment to prevent infertility and sepsis; ectopic pregnancy must be excluded.
recommended_action: Go to ER or urgent gynecology today; get pregnancy test, pelvic ultrasound, cervical swabs; start IV antibiotics if PID confirmed.
red_flags: Positive pregnancy test
Peritoneal signs like rebound tenderness
Septic shock signs like hypotension

user_symptom_description: I've had a stiff neck for 2 days, a really bad headache, and sensitivity to light. I feel sick to my stomach. I have a fever of 102°F.
urgency_reason: The triad of neck stiffness, headache, and fever with photophobia is bacterial meningitis until proven otherwise — death can occur within hours without treatment.
recommended_action: Call 911 immediately; this is a life-threatening emergency requiring IV antibiotics and lumbar puncture; do not delay.
red_flags: Non-blanching petechial rash
Rapid deterioration of consciousness
Seizure activity

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهر بحس بحرارة في صدري وبيجيلي كحة بالليل تفصعني من نومي. أحياناً بطلع مخاط. ما عنديش زكام. دخانة أوضتي في المطبخ كتير.
urgency_reason: Nocturnal cough with chest tightness and environmental trigger suggests asthma requiring lung function testing.
recommended_action: See GP within one week for spirometry and peak flow measurement; identify and reduce environmental triggers.
red_flags: Severe wheezing with inability to speak in full sentences
Oxygen saturation below 92%
Rapid breathing rate with exhaustion

user_symptom_description: My vision has been getting blurry for months but this morning I woke up with severe pain in my right eye and my vision is very cloudy. I can see halos around the light.
urgency_reason: Acute angle-closure glaucoma with severe pain and halos is an ophthalmic emergency that causes permanent vision loss within hours.
recommended_action: Go to ER or ophthalmology emergency immediately; intraocular pressure must be reduced urgently with medications and laser treatment.
red_flags: Nausea and vomiting with eye pain
Fixed mid-dilated pupil
Progressive vision loss within hours

user_symptom_description: لما بصحى الصبح بيجيلي تنميل وخدران في إيدي الاتنين، خصوصاً الأصابع الأوليين والإبهام. بيتحسن خلال ساعة. أشتغل على كمبيوتر 10 ساعات في اليوم.
urgency_reason: Classic carpal tunnel presentation with occupational risk factor requires non-urgent nerve conduction testing.
recommended_action: See orthopedist for nerve conduction study; use wrist splints at night; modify workstation ergonomics; consider physiotherapy.
red_flags: Persistent numbness not resolving during day
Hand muscle wasting
Weakness in grip or pinch

user_symptom_description: My daughter is 2 years old and has had high fever for 5 days. No cold symptoms at all. She's been very irritable. Today I noticed a rash all over her body and her eyes are red.
urgency_reason: Kawasaki disease can cause coronary artery aneurysms if untreated; fever lasting 5 days with rash and conjunctivitis in a toddler requires urgent evaluation.
recommended_action: Go to ER or pediatric emergency immediately; IVIG and aspirin treatment within 10 days of fever onset prevents cardiac complications.
red_flags: Swollen red hands and feet
Cracked red lips or strawberry tongue
Swollen lymph node in neck over 1.5cm

user_symptom_description: بقالي يومين مش قادرة أتنفس صح ورجليا تقيلة جداً وورمانة، وعندي ألم في صدري لما بتنفس عميق. مسافرتش من برا مؤخراً.
urgency_reason: Pleuritic chest pain with dyspnea and leg swelling is a pulmonary embolism until proven otherwise — it can be fatal without immediate anticoagulation.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; go to ER for CT pulmonary angiogram and D-dimer; anticoagulation may be started empirically.
red_flags: Oxygen saturation below 90%
Syncope or altered consciousness
Coughing blood

user_symptom_description: After lifting heavy weights at the gym this morning, I noticed my urine turned very dark brown, almost black. My muscles are super sore, way more than usual.
urgency_reason: Rhabdomyolysis from exertion can cause acute kidney failure; dark urine requires urgent creatine kinase and renal function testing.
recommended_action: Go to ER today for CK, BMP, and urine myoglobin; aggressive IV fluid hydration is the cornerstone of treatment.
red_flags: Decreased or absent urine output
Severe muscle weakness
Abnormal heart rhythm

user_symptom_description: عندي 76 سنة وابني لاحظ إني باقى فاقد التوازن وبمشي ببطء وعندي رعشة في إيديا وهي مرتاحة. قايلين إن وشي بقى من غير تعبير.
urgency_reason: Classic parkinsonian triad requires neurological evaluation for diagnosis and initiation of dopaminergic therapy.
recommended_action: Schedule neurology appointment within 2 weeks; review all medications for dopamine-blocking agents; get brain MRI.
red_flags: Rapid cognitive decline
Frequent falls with injury
Sudden severe worsening of symptoms

user_symptom_description: I've been incredibly thirsty lately, drinking about 6 liters a day, and passing huge amounts of very clear urine. I've had some headaches but my blood sugar was checked and is normal.
urgency_reason: Extreme polydipsia with dilute urine and normal glucose requires investigation for hormonal or renal cause.
recommended_action: See endocrinologist within 2 weeks for water deprivation test, urine osmolality, ADH levels, and brain MRI.
red_flags: Severe headache with visual field loss
Recent head injury
Electrolyte abnormalities causing confusion

user_symptom_description: بقالي 3 أيام عندي ألم شديد في ضهري وبطني وحرارة 39، والجو برد مش ساخن. بحس بألم لما بتبوّل وبول لونه غلط شوية.
urgency_reason: Pyelonephritis with high fever can progress to urosepsis; IV antibiotics and hospitalization may be required.
recommended_action: Go to ER today for urine culture, CBC, and renal imaging; IV antibiotics likely needed; admission may be required.
red_flags: Rigors and temperature above 39.5°C
Low blood pressure
Confusion or altered mental status

user_symptom_description: My right eye has been red and painful for 2 days. It's very sensitive to light and my vision looks a bit hazy. I wear contact lenses every day.
urgency_reason: Contact-lens-related keratitis can cause permanent corneal scarring and vision loss if untreated within 24 hours.
recommended_action: Stop wearing contacts immediately and go to ophthalmology emergency today; do not apply steroid drops; corneal scraping for culture needed.
red_flags: Visible white spot on the cornea
Rapid worsening of vision
Purulent discharge from the eye

user_symptom_description: أنا 71 سنة وعندي سكر وضغط. من إمبارح صحيتي على الصبح لقيت إيدي اليمين تعبانة وشبه مش شايلة حاجة، وفيه تنميل في رجلي اليمين كمان. دلوقتي أحسن بس مش 100%.
urgency_reason: New focal neurological deficit in an elderly diabetic hypertensive patient is stroke until proven otherwise — thrombolysis window is 4.5 hours.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately — use FAST (Face, Arms, Speech, Time); thrombolysis or thrombectomy may still be possible.
red_flags: Worsening weakness or new deficits
Loss of consciousness
Seizure activity

user_symptom_description: I've been losing weight rapidly — about 15 pounds in two months — my heart is always racing, I sweat constantly even in air conditioning, and I feel very anxious and jittery all the time.
urgency_reason: Symptomatic hyperthyroidism risks thyroid storm, arrhythmia, and heart failure; urgent evaluation needed.
recommended_action: See GP within 3 days for TSH, free T3, free T4, and ECG; avoid iodine-containing supplements and contrast dyes.
red_flags: Very high fever with extreme agitation (thyroid storm)
Irregular heart rhythm or palpitations
Exophthalmos or vision changes

user_symptom_description: ابني عمره 12 سنة وبقاله أسبوعين بيشكي من ألم في ركبته اليسار لما بيلعب كرة، وبحكيلي إن في ورم في أعلى الساق تحت الركبة بيوجعه لما بلمسه.
urgency_reason: Osgood-Schlatter disease is a common self-limiting apophysitis in active adolescents that responds to activity modification.
recommended_action: See orthopedist for confirmation; reduce impact sports temporarily; ice after activity; physiotherapy for quadriceps stretching.
red_flags: Inability to bear weight
Fever with joint swelling
Night pain waking child from sleep

user_symptom_description: Over the past month I've been getting sudden episodes where I smell something burning that nobody else can smell, then my right hand starts shaking uncontrollably for about 2 minutes. I don't lose consciousness.
urgency_reason: New focal seizures with olfactory aura in an adult require urgent MRI to exclude structural brain lesion.
recommended_action: See neurologist urgently within one week; get brain MRI with contrast and EEG; do not drive until seizure-free.
red_flags: Generalization to full convulsion
Post-ictal confusion lasting hours
New headache or papilledema signs

user_symptom_description: عندي 73 سنة وبقالي شهر عندي صعوبة في البلع خصوصاً الأكل الصلب، وأحياناً بيرجعلي الأكل. ووزني نزل بدون سبب.
urgency_reason: Progressive solid food dysphagia with weight loss in elderly man is esophageal malignancy until proven otherwise.
recommended_action: See gastroenterologist urgently for upper endoscopy with biopsy; CT chest and abdomen for staging.
red_flags: Complete inability to swallow liquids
Choking on swallowing
Rapid 10+ kg weight loss

user_symptom_description: I noticed a hard, painless lump in my left breast two weeks ago. It doesn't move much when I press it. I'm 29, no family history of breast cancer.
urgency_reason: Any new hard breast lump requires triple assessment regardless of age to exclude malignancy.
recommended_action: See GP within one week for referral to breast clinic; ultrasound and possible fine needle aspiration or core biopsy needed.
red_flags: Skin dimpling or nipple retraction
Axillary lymph node enlargement
Skin becoming orange-peel texture

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوع عندي ألم في صدري لما بتنفس عميق أو بسعل، وبقيت حرارتي معايا. كنت مريض بزكام من أسبوعين.
urgency_reason: Post-viral pleuritic chest pain with fever suggests bacterial pneumonia or empyema requiring urgent assessment.
recommended_action: Go to urgent care or ER for chest X-ray, CBC, and CRP; start antibiotics if pneumonia confirmed; assess for hospitalization.
red_flags: Oxygen saturation below 94%
Coughing blood
Signs of sepsis like high heart rate and confusion

user_symptom_description: My 9-year-old has been complaining of headaches and blurry vision for the past month. She's been doing poorly at school and her teacher says she squints all the time to see the board.
urgency_reason: Squinting and headaches in a school-age child are typically uncorrected refractive error requiring optometry assessment.
recommended_action: Schedule optometry or ophthalmology appointment for full refraction test; glasses prescription likely needed.
red_flags: Papilledema on eye exam
Vomiting with morning headaches
Double vision or abnormal eye movements

user_symptom_description: عندي حساسية جلدية على وجهي بقالها 3 أسابيع، واحمرار وحرقان بعد ما بدأت أستخدم كريم جديد. المنطقة المتأثرة بالظبط نفس المنطقة اللي بضع عليها الكريم.
urgency_reason: Contact dermatitis localized to cream application area is non-urgent; allergen identification and avoidance is key.
recommended_action: Stop using the new cream immediately; apply mild hydrocortisone cream; see dermatologist for patch testing if needed.
red_flags: Swelling spreading to lips or eyes
Difficulty breathing with skin reaction
Blistering or skin peeling extensively

user_symptom_description: I've been feeling really anxious every day for the past 6 months. My mind races constantly, I can't relax, I tense up my muscles without realizing it, and I worry about everything even when there's no reason to.
urgency_reason: GAD is a chronic condition impacting quality of life but is not acutely dangerous; outpatient mental health treatment is appropriate.
recommended_action: See psychiatrist or psychologist for CBT therapy; consider TSH test to exclude thyroid cause; lifestyle modifications helpful.
red_flags: Suicidal ideation
Panic attacks with physical symptoms
Inability to function at work or school

user_symptom_description: عندي 69 سنة وبحس من شهرين بوجع وتصلب في كتافي وردفيا الصبح، لدرجة ما بقدرش أرفع إيديا. وعندي إرهاق وحمى خفيفة.
urgency_reason: PMR is associated with giant cell arteritis which can cause sudden blindness; urgent ESR and CRP needed.
recommended_action: See rheumatologist urgently; get ESR, CRP, CK, and temporal artery assessment; steroids dramatically relieve PMR.
red_flags: Jaw pain when chewing
Sudden vision loss or double vision
New severe temporal headache

user_symptom_description: I've had a loud snoring problem for years, but my wife says I stop breathing multiple times at night. I wake up tired every morning no matter how much I sleep and I've fallen asleep at the wheel twice.
urgency_reason: Witnessed apneas with drowsy driving represent serious safety risk and cardiovascular risk requiring urgent sleep study.
recommended_action: Arrange overnight polysomnography urgently; avoid driving until treated; weight loss and positional therapy may help while awaiting study.
red_flags: Falling asleep while driving
Severe oxygen desaturation episodes witnessed
New cardiac arrhythmia

user_symptom_description: بقالي ساعة ووجعي في بطني الجانب الأيسر تحت شديد جداً جاي فجأة، وعندي غثيان وبحس بدوار. دورتي اشتأخرت شهر.
extracted_symptoms: acute severe left lower quadrant pain
urgency_reason: Acute pelvic pain with missed period is ectopic pregnancy until proven otherwise — rupture is life-threatening with rapid blood loss.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; this is a surgical emergency; do not eat or drink; urgent blood transfusion may be needed.
red_flags: Shoulder tip pain from diaphragmatic irritation
Signs of hemorrhagic shock
Falling blood pressure with rapid pulse

user_symptom_description: My foot has been incredibly painful at the base of my big toe since I woke up. The joint is red, swollen, and even the bedsheet touching it is unbearable. I had a big steak and beer last night.
urgency_reason: Classic podagra presentation requires diagnosis confirmation and initiation of anti-inflammatory therapy.
recommended_action: See GP within 24 hours for uric acid level and possible joint aspiration; start NSAIDs or colchicine; avoid alcohol and red meat.
red_flags: High fever suggesting septic arthritis
Rapid spread of redness beyond the joint
Multiple joints affected simultaneously

user_symptom_description: أنا 74 سنة وبقالي أسبوع نفسي بيضيق بسرعة لما بمشي حتى في البيت، وبسعل سعال جاف مستمر. معاي ضغط وسكر. من أسبوعين بدأت دواء جديد للضغط.
urgency_reason: Dry cough starting with new antihypertensive may be ACE inhibitor side effect, but cardiac causes must be excluded in elderly diabetic.
recommended_action: See GP within 3 days to review blood pressure medication; switch to ARB if ACE inhibitor cough confirmed; get chest X-ray and BNP.
red_flags: Orthopnea or paroxysmal nocturnal dyspnea
Leg swelling worsening
Hemoptysis

user_symptom_description: I've had painful sores in my mouth that keep coming back. They're on my inner cheeks and tongue, and they make eating really painful. They heal in about 2 weeks then new ones come.
urgency_reason: Recurrent aphthous ulcers are common and not immediately dangerous but should be assessed if associated with systemic symptoms.
recommended_action: Try topical corticosteroid gel or chlorhexidine mouthwash; see GP if ulcers are very large, very frequent, or associated with genital ulcers.
red_flags: Non-healing ulcer over 3 weeks
Genital ulcers or eye inflammation (Behcet's)
Significant weight loss or bowel symptoms

user_symptom_description: بقالي 6 شهور بحس بحرارة في وسط صدري بعد الأكل بساعة وبيجيلي سعال ليلاً. جربت الأكل قبل نومي وكان أسوأ. عندي زيادة في الوزن.
urgency_reason: Typical GERD symptoms are chronic but manageable; lifestyle changes and PPI trial appropriate as first step.
recommended_action: Start PPI (omeprazole 20mg) for 4-8 weeks; avoid late meals; elevate bed head 15cm; reduce weight for long-term relief.
red_flags: Difficulty swallowing
Vomiting blood
Unintentional weight loss

user_symptom_description: I was involved in a car accident 3 hours ago, I was the driver. I have neck pain and my arms feel numb and tingly since the crash. I went to the hospital but left before being seen.
urgency_reason: Post-MVA neck pain with bilateral arm numbness requires immobilization and imaging to exclude cervical spine fracture and cord compression.
recommended_action: Return to ER immediately; do not move neck; cervical CT and possible MRI required; incomplete cord injury can be worsened by movement.
red_flags: Progressive arm or leg weakness
Loss of bladder or bowel control
Severe worsening of pain with movement

user_symptom_description: ابني عمره 4 سنين ومن الصبح بيبكي وماسك أذنه اليمين ومش مرتاح. ليه حرارة 38.5 ومش بياكل. كنت مريض بزكام الأسبوع اللي فات.
urgency_reason: Post-viral AOM with fever in a toddler requires assessment for antibiotic therapy to prevent complications.
recommended_action: See pediatrician today; age-appropriate acetaminophen or ibuprofen for pain and fever; antibiotics if severe AOM criteria met.
red_flags: Swelling and redness behind the ear
Ear discharge
Extreme toxicity with very high fever

user_symptom_description: I've been coughing up yellow-green sputum for the past week, I'm short of breath just walking to the bathroom, and my ankles are twice their normal size. I have COPD and heart disease.
possible_conditions: COPD Exacerbation with Heart Failure Overlap
primary_condition: COPD Exacerbation with Heart Failure Overlap
urgency_reason: Acute dyspnea with purulent sputum and worsening edema in a patient with both COPD and cardiac disease is a high-risk emergency.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; this patient needs hospital admission with IV diuretics, bronchodilators, and antibiotics.
red_flags: Cyanosis of lips or fingers
Oxygen saturation below 88%
Altered mental status

user_symptom_description: بقالي سنة بحس بألم وتورم في مفاصل إيديا الاتنين خصوصاً الصبح، وبيصعب عليا أفتح جرة أو أمسك كوباية. المفاصل بانت متورمة.
urgency_reason: Symmetrical small joint inflammation with morning stiffness is classic RA; early aggressive treatment prevents joint destruction.
recommended_action: See rheumatologist within 2 weeks; get RF, anti-CCP, ESR, CRP, and hand X-rays; early DMARD therapy is essential.
red_flags: Joint deformity already developing
Systemic symptoms like weight loss or pleuritis
Extra-articular manifestations like eye or lung involvement

user_symptom_description: I've been having really loose stools with mucus for about 2 months. I get crampy lower abdominal pain before going to the toilet, and I've noticed blood mixed in with the stool lately. I'm 23.
urgency_reason: Bloody diarrhea with mucus for 2 months in a young adult suggests IBD requiring urgent colonoscopy and treatment initiation.
recommended_action: See gastroenterologist urgently for colonoscopy; get stool cultures, CRP, and CBC; avoid NSAIDs until diagnosis confirmed.
red_flags: More than 10 bloody stools per day
Fever with signs of systemic toxicity
Abdominal distension suggesting toxic megacolon

user_symptom_description: عندي 78 سنة وكنت ماشي وصحيت لقيت نفسي على الأرض. مش فاكر أنا وقعت ولا ايه اللي حصل. إيدي الشمال اتكسرت وفيه جرح في وشي.
urgency_reason: Unexplained loss of consciousness with fall and injury in elderly patient requires urgent evaluation for serious cardiac arrhythmia.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately for ECG, cardiac monitoring, CT head, and orthopedic assessment for wrist fracture.
red_flags: Chest pain or palpitations before fall
Tongue bite or post-ictal state suggesting seizure
New neurological deficits after fall

user_symptom_description: I have these really embarrassing bursts of diarrhea after almost every meal and a lot of bloating and gas. Sometimes I also go days without being able to go at all. Stress definitely makes it worse.
urgency_reason: Classic IBS symptoms in a young adult are a functional disorder; management through diet and stress reduction is appropriate.
recommended_action: See GP or gastroenterologist for celiac serology, food diary; trial low-FODMAP diet; manage stress; gut-directed CBT helpful.
red_flags: Blood in stool
Significant unexplained weight loss
Symptoms waking from sleep

user_symptom_description: بنتي عمرها 6 سنين وبقالها 3 أيام عندها نفس في صدرها وبتسمع صوت أزيز منها، وبتتعب لما بتلعب. كان عندها زكام الأسبوع اللي فات.
urgency_reason: Post-viral wheezing with dyspnea in a child requires urgent assessment to exclude asthma exacerbation needing bronchodilator therapy.
recommended_action: Go to pediatric urgent care or ER today for oxygen saturation, chest assessment, and bronchodilator therapy if needed.
red_flags: Oxygen saturation below 93%
Nasal flaring or intercostal recession
Child too breathless to speak or eat

user_symptom_description: I've been getting intense heartburn and acid taste, then I developed a hoarse voice and feel like something is stuck in my throat. I clear my throat all the time and it's been 3 months.
urgency_reason: Hoarseness lasting 3 months with reflux symptoms requires ENT evaluation to exclude laryngeal pathology.
recommended_action: See ENT for laryngoscopy; start PPI twice daily; elevate head of bed; avoid caffeine and spicy food.
red_flags: Difficulty swallowing solids or liquids
Lump in neck
Hemoptysis or painful swallowing

user_symptom_description: عندي 71 سنة وبقالي ربع ساعة ما بشوفش في عيني الشمال خالص، وبحس بتنميل في وشي وإيدي الشمال. ده بدأ فجأة وأنا جالسة.
urgency_reason: Sudden visual loss with contralateral hemisensory symptoms is an acute stroke requiring immediate thrombolysis assessment.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; time is brain — thrombolysis window is 4.5 hours from onset; urgent CT and MRI needed.
red_flags: Arm or leg weakness developing
Confusion or loss of consciousness
Symptoms spreading to other limbs

user_symptom_description: I got a cut on my right foot from a rusty nail three days ago. Now it's really swollen, red, and there's pus coming out. I can see red lines spreading up my leg. I feel feverish.
urgency_reason: Red streaking lymphangitis with infected wound indicates bacteremia risk and possible early necrotizing fasciitis — IV antibiotics urgently needed.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately for IV antibiotics; assess tetanus vaccination status; wound exploration may be needed; mark borders of erythema.
red_flags: Rapid spread of red streaking toward groin
Skin turning dark or developing blisters
Severe disproportionate pain

user_symptom_description: بقالي 4 أشهر في كتل في رقبتي على الجانبين، مش بتوجعني بس بتكبر ببطء. وعندي تعب وعرق بالليل وحرارة خفيفة بتجيلي مساءً.
urgency_reason: B symptoms with progressive bilateral lymphadenopathy in a young adult are classic Hodgkin lymphoma features requiring urgent biopsy.
recommended_action: See GP urgently for CBC, LDH, ESR, CT chest/abdomen/pelvis, and urgent lymph node biopsy referral.
red_flags: Rapidly enlarging nodes within days
Airway compromise from neck mass
Spinal cord compression symptoms

user_symptom_description: I accidentally cut my hand badly with a kitchen knife about 45 minutes ago. The bleeding hasn't stopped, and I can see something yellowish inside the wound. My fingers feel numb.
possible_conditions: Deep Hand Laceration with Tendon Injury
primary_condition: Deep Hand Laceration with Tendon Injury
urgency_reason: Deep hand laceration with exposed tissue and finger numbness requires urgent surgical exploration for tendon and nerve repair.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately; apply firm pressure with clean cloth; do not remove the cloth; keep hand elevated; hand surgery team needed.
red_flags: Inability to move any fingers
Pulsating bright red bleeding
Complete loss of sensation in hand

user_symptom_description: عندي 69 سنة وبقالي شهرين عندي إعياء شديد وبشوف بصفرة في عنيا وجلدي، وبولي بقى دكن وبرازي فاتح اللون. مش عندي ألم.
urgency_reason: Painless obstructive jaundice with dark urine and pale stools in elderly man is pancreatic or biliary malignancy until proven otherwise.
recommended_action: Go to ER or urgent GI clinic today for abdominal ultrasound, CT with contrast, CA 19-9, liver function tests, and biliary assessment.
red_flags: Rapidly worsening jaundice
Severe pruritus from bile salts
Cholangitis with fever and rigors

user_symptom_description: I've had this weird pins and needles feeling in both my feet for about 3 months. It's worse at night and feels like I'm walking on hot sand. I was recently told my blood sugar is borderline high.
urgency_reason: Early diabetic neuropathy in a prediabetic patient requires glycemic control to prevent progression to severe sensory loss.
recommended_action: See GP within one week for HbA1c, vitamin B12, and nerve conduction study referral; start foot care education immediately.
red_flags: Foot ulcer or wound not healing
Complete loss of sensation in feet
Sudden worsening with new weakness

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين عندي ألم شديد في خصيتي الشمال، بتبدأ خفيفة وبتتزود تدريجياً. مش عندي حرارة ومش حصلتلي إصابة. عمري 25.
urgency_reason: Gradual painless or mildly painful testicular mass in a young man is testicular cancer until proven otherwise; early detection is curative.
recommended_action: See urologist urgently within days for scrotal ultrasound and serum tumor markers (AFP, beta-hCG, LDH).
red_flags: Palpable hard lump on testicle
Back pain suggesting retroperitoneal spread
Gynecomastia indicating hormonal secretion

user_symptom_description: My back has been killing me for the past three weeks after I sneezed really hard. The pain shoots down my right leg all the way to my toes. Sitting makes it much worse.
urgency_reason: Radiculopathy with dermatomal pain pattern requires imaging to assess disc herniation and guide physiotherapy or surgical referral.
recommended_action: See GP for lumbar MRI and physiotherapy referral; NSAIDs and activity modification while awaiting imaging.
red_flags: Bladder or bowel incontinence
Saddle anesthesia
Rapidly progressive leg weakness

user_symptom_description: من بكرة الصبح وأنا بحس بخفقان في قلبي بيجي ويروح، وعيني بتدوم بسرعة وبحس بدوار. بشرب قهوة كتير جداً وما نمتش النهارده.
urgency_reason: Palpitations with clear caffeine and sleep deprivation trigger are likely benign but warrant ECG to confirm normal rhythm.
recommended_action: Reduce caffeine intake immediately; sleep adequately; see GP for resting ECG within one week if palpitations persist.
red_flags: Syncope or near-fainting during palpitations
Chest pain accompanying palpitations
Heart rate exceeding 150 bpm persistently

user_symptom_description: My 8-year-old has been wetting the bed almost every night for the past month after being dry for 2 years. He also seems very thirsty all the time and lost some weight.
urgency_reason: Secondary enuresis with polydipsia and weight loss in a child is new-onset T1DM until proven otherwise — DKA may be present.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately for blood glucose, ketones, and blood gas; DKA requires urgent IV insulin and fluid resuscitation.
red_flags: Vomiting or abdominal pain
Rapid deep breathing (Kussmaul)
Altered consciousness or fruity breath odor

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهر وأنا بحس بحرقان وحكة شديدة في فتحة طيزي، بيتزود بالليل وبعد الأكل الحار. مش شايفة أي دم.
urgency_reason: Perianal symptoms without bleeding are likely hemorrhoids or fissure requiring examination but no urgent intervention.
recommended_action: See GP for anorectal examination; increase dietary fiber and fluid intake; topical hydrocortisone may relieve symptoms.
red_flags: Bright red rectal bleeding
Lump that cannot be pushed back in
Fever with rectal pain suggesting abscess

user_symptom_description: Over the past few weeks I've had a headache every morning on the right side of my head. The scalp is tender when I touch it and chewing food makes my jaw ache. I'm 73.
urgency_reason: Jaw claudication with temporal scalp tenderness in elderly is giant cell arteritis — untreated it causes irreversible bilateral blindness within days.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately for ESR, CRP, and urgent high-dose corticosteroids; do not wait for temporal artery biopsy before starting treatment.
red_flags: Any visual disturbance or vision loss
Sudden onset of double vision
Scalp necrosis

user_symptom_description: بقالي 5 أيام بحس بألم شديد في حلقي على جهة واحدة بس وبلقي صعوبة في البلع حتى المية. صوتي بقى غريب وبحس إن في حاجة بتدفع اللوزة.
urgency_reason: Peritonsillar abscess with difficulty swallowing fluids is an airway emergency requiring immediate drainage.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately; ENT consultation for needle aspiration or incision and drainage; IV antibiotics and airway monitoring required.
red_flags: Inability to open mouth fully (trismus)
Drooling indicating inability to swallow saliva
Stridor or difficulty breathing

user_symptom_description: I've been having episodes of intense fear that come out of nowhere — my heart pounds, I can't breathe, I feel like I'm dying, and my hands go numb. They last about 15 minutes and happen 3-4 times a week now.
urgency_reason: Frequent panic attacks severely impair quality of life and cardiac causes must be excluded before psychiatric treatment begins.
recommended_action: See GP within 3 days for ECG, glucose, thyroid, and 24-hour urine catecholamines; then psychiatry for CBT and possible medication.
red_flags: Sustained heart rate over 200 bpm during attack
Attack triggered by exercise rather than psychological stress
Hypertension during attacks above 180/110

user_symptom_description: أنا 66 سنة وبقالي أسبوعين ضهري الأسفل بيوجعني وجع شديد جداً حتى وأنا قاعدة أو نايمة، وما فيش إصابة ولا مجهود. عندي استيوبوروسيس من سنتين.
urgency_reason: Spontaneous severe back pain in an osteoporotic elderly woman is vertebral fracture until proven otherwise; spinal instability risk.
recommended_action: Go to urgent care or ER for spinal X-ray and MRI; assess for neurological compromise; vertebroplasty may be indicated.
red_flags: New leg weakness or numbness
Bladder or bowel dysfunction
Fever suggesting spinal infection

user_symptom_description: I've developed a rash that started on my wrists and ankles about 5 days ago after a camping trip. It's now spread to my torso and I have a fever, headache, and muscle aches.
urgency_reason: RMSF is rapidly fatal if doxycycline is delayed; fever with petechial rash after outdoor exposure is an emergency.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately; do not wait for confirmatory serology — start doxycycline empirically based on clinical suspicion.
red_flags: Petechiae becoming purpuric or non-blanching
Confusion or altered consciousness
Signs of multi-organ failure

user_symptom_description: بقالي 3 أشهر بحس بتعب وإرهاق شديد حتى مع أبسط الحاجات زي الاستحمام، وبيجيلي ألم في عضلاتي ومفاصلي كل يوم ومش بتحسن بالراحة. وعندي صداع متكرر.
urgency_reason: Disabling fatigue with post-exertional malaise requires exclusion of treatable organic causes before ME/CFS diagnosis.
recommended_action: See GP for CBC, TSH, ANA, ESR, CRP, B12, and ferritin; graded activity therapy only after organic causes excluded.
red_flags: Significant objective weakness
Night sweats with weight loss
Focal neurological symptoms

user_symptom_description: I've noticed yellow-ish eyes since this morning and my urine is dark like tea. I feel nauseous and have right upper quadrant pain. I had unprotected sex about 6 weeks ago.
urgency_reason: Acute hepatitis with jaundice requires liver function testing urgently to assess severity and risk of hepatic failure.
recommended_action: Go to urgent care today for LFTs, hepatitis serology panel, coagulation studies; avoid all alcohol and hepatotoxic medications.
red_flags: Confusion or personality change suggesting encephalopathy
Coagulation abnormalities with easy bleeding
INR above 1.5

user_symptom_description: بنتي عمرها 3 سنين وبقالها يومين بتحكي إنها مش شايفة كويس وعينها الشمال بتنحرف للجنب أحياناً. ما فيش حادثة ولا إصابة.
urgency_reason: New onset strabismus with visual complaints in a young child requires urgent neurological evaluation to exclude brain tumor or raised ICP.
recommended_action: Go to ER today for urgent ophthalmology and neurology evaluation; brain MRI with contrast is indicated.
red_flags: Morning vomiting without nausea
Papilledema on fundoscopy
Behavioral changes or declining developmental milestones

user_symptom_description: For two weeks I've had pain and weakness in my thighs when I walk — both sides equally — and it gets better when I bend forward or sit down. I have to stop and lean on a shopping cart to rest.
urgency_reason: Neurogenic claudication with classic shopping cart sign requires MRI to assess canal narrowing and plan intervention.
recommended_action: See orthopedist for lumbar MRI; physiotherapy and epidural injections are first-line; surgical decompression if severe.
red_flags: Bladder or bowel dysfunction
Progressive lower limb weakness
Pain at complete rest suggesting vascular cause

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين عندي تورم في رقبتي الجانب الأيمن وإحساس بضغط على حلقي. مش بتألم بس بحس إن في حاجة هناك. أحياناً بيصعب أبلع.
urgency_reason: New neck mass with dysphagia requires ultrasound and TSH to evaluate thyroid pathology and assess for malignancy.
recommended_action: See GP within one week for thyroid ultrasound, TSH, and free T4; fine needle aspiration biopsy if nodule present.
red_flags: Rapid increase in size over days
Voice hoarseness from recurrent laryngeal nerve compression
Difficulty breathing

user_symptom_description: I've been having explosive, watery diarrhea for the past 4 days after taking antibiotics for a chest infection. My stomach cramps are terrible and the diarrhea has a really foul smell.
urgency_reason: Post-antibiotic severe diarrhea with cramps is C. diff until proven otherwise; risk of toxic megacolon if untreated.
recommended_action: See GP urgently for stool C. diff toxin test; stop current antibiotic if possible; start vancomycin or fidaxomicin; strict hand hygiene.
red_flags: Fever above 38.5°C
Blood in stool
Abdominal distension suggesting megacolon

user_symptom_description: من أسبوع وأنا حاسة بوجع خفيف في صدري لما بتنفس وبحس بضيق أحياناً. قبل أسبوعين كنت في سفرية طويلة في طيارة 12 ساعة.
urgency_reason: Pleuritic chest pain with dyspnea after prolonged immobility on a flight raises strong concern for pulmonary embolism.
recommended_action: Go to ER today for D-dimer, ECG, and CT pulmonary angiogram; do not delay even with mild symptoms.
red_flags: Oxygen saturation below 94%
Syncope or near-fainting
Coughing blood

user_symptom_description: I've been noticing that I lose control of my bladder when I cough, sneeze, or laugh. It started small but now happens multiple times a day and I'm embarrassed to go out.
urgency_reason: Stress incontinence significantly impacts quality of life but is not acutely dangerous; pelvic floor therapy is highly effective.
recommended_action: See gynecologist or urologist for urodynamic evaluation; start pelvic floor (Kegel) exercises; pessary or surgical options available.
red_flags: Blood in urine
New onset incontinence with back pain and leg weakness
Complete inability to control bladder all the time

user_symptom_description: بقالي سنة بحس بألم في أسفل بطني عند التبوّل وبعد الجنس وكمان صعوبة في التبوّل وتبوّل متكرر. الدكتر قبل كده قالي مفيش التهاب في البول.
urgency_reason: Chronic prostatitis CPPS is debilitating but non-urgent; multimodal treatment is needed for symptom management.
recommended_action: See urologist for prostate assessment and possible EPS culture; alpha-blockers, NSAIDs, and physiotherapy are mainstays of treatment.
red_flags: High fever with acute severe perineal pain suggesting prostate abscess
Blood in semen
Significant urinary retention

user_symptom_description: My 11-year-old has been complaining about joint pain that moves from one joint to another over the past week. First it was his knee, now it's his wrist. He had a sore throat 3 weeks ago.
urgency_reason: Migratory polyarthritis following streptococcal pharyngitis is acute rheumatic fever until proven otherwise — carditis can develop rapidly.
recommended_action: See pediatrician urgently for ECG, echocardiogram, ASO titer, CRP, and ESR; start benzathine penicillin and aspirin.
red_flags: New heart murmur
Chorea movements
Chest pain or palpitations

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهرين أحس بإرهاق شديد مع ألم في عضلاتي في الكتفين والفخذين ومش قادرة أقوم من الكرسي بسهولة. وعندي صعوبة في رفع إيديا فوق دماغي.
urgency_reason: Progressive proximal muscle weakness requires urgent CK measurement and muscle biopsy to start immunosuppressive therapy.
recommended_action: See GP within 3 days for CK, aldolase, TSH, LFTs, and ANA; urgent rheumatology or neurology referral.

Respiratory muscle weakness

user_symptom_description: I've had terrible acne for the past 2 years — deep painful cysts on my face, chest, and back that leave scars. Nothing I've tried from the pharmacy has helped at all.
urgency_reason: Severe scarring acne unresponsive to OTC treatments requires dermatological evaluation for oral isotretinoin consideration.
recommended_action: See dermatologist for systemic treatment — oral antibiotics, hormonal therapy, or isotretinoin; avoid squeezing cysts.
red_flags: Rapidly spreading pustules with fever
Extreme joint pain with acne flare

user_symptom_description: بقالي 4 أيام وأنا مش قادرة أتكلم صح، كلامي بقى غير مفهوم وبيهرف. ما فيش ضعف في إيديا ولا رجليا. عمري 70.
urgency_reason: New dysarthria lasting 4 days in an elderly patient is a posterior circulation stroke requiring urgent brain imaging and intervention.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; even subacute stroke warrants emergency evaluation and secondary prevention initiation.

Dysphagia with aspiration risk
Rapidly worsening speech or ataxia

user_symptom_description: I've been obsessively washing my hands up to 50 times a day because I'm terrified of contamination. I know it's irrational but I can't stop. My hands are raw and bleeding. It's ruining my life.
urgency_reason: Severe OCD with self-induced tissue damage requires urgent psychiatric treatment with ERP therapy and SSRI medication.
recommended_action: See psychiatrist within one week; first-line is CBT with ERP plus SSRI (fluvoxamine or sertraline); see dermatologist for wound care.
red_flags: Suicidal ideation from distress
Complete inability to leave home
Self-harm beyond accidental excoriation

user_symptom_description: بنتي عمرها 10 سنين ومن شهرين بتشرب مية كتير جداً وبتروح الحمام كتير. ووزنها ما نزلش. دكتور الأسنان قال عندها فم جاف.

recommended_action: See pediatrician within 3 days for fasting glucose, urine osmolality, electrolytes, and serum ADH; water deprivation test may be needed.

user_symptom_description: I've had a severe headache for the past 3 days that started suddenly while I was exercising. It was the worst pain I've ever felt and came on like a thunderclap. I've had some neck stiffness since.
urgency_reason: Thunderclap headache is subarachnoid hemorrhage until proven otherwise — re-bleeding risk is high and mortality increases with delay.

Vomiting with neck stiffness

user_symptom_description: من تلاتة أسابيع وأنا بحس بألم شديد في حوضي ينزل لأسفل ظهري ورجلي. دمي في البول. ما عنديش حرارة. عمري 75 وبشرب سجاير.

recommended_action: See urologist urgently for cystoscopy, urine cytology, and CT urogram; do not delay investigation.

Bilateral leg edema from lymphatic obstruction

user_symptom_description: I've been having problems with my balance for the past month — I keep bumping into things on my right side and my right hand feels clumsy. My vision seems a bit off too. I'm 27.

Bladder or bowel dysfunction

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهرين بيجيلي ألم في صدري في المنتصف بيجي على شكل نوبات وبينزل للبطن. بيتحسن لما بشرب المية الباردة. مش بيزيد بالجهد.

user_symptom_description: I have a wound on my right heel that has been there for two weeks and just won't heal. It's not very painful but it looks deeper than it should. I have diabetes and circulation problems.
urgency_reason: Diabetic foot ulcer with poor circulation can lead to gangrene and limb amputation within days without specialist wound care.
recommended_action: See GP or diabetic foot clinic urgently today; wound swab, X-ray to exclude osteomyelitis, vascular assessment; off-loading required.
red_flags: Black or gangrenous tissue
Foul smell or deep tissue visible
Spreading redness with fever

user_symptom_description: I have patches of hair missing from my scalp in perfectly round circles. They appeared suddenly over a few weeks. My scalp isn't itchy or scaly and I feel fine otherwise.
urgency_reason: Alopecia areata is an autoimmune condition that can be distressing but is not medically urgent; evaluation helps guide treatment.
