recommended_action: Serum uric acid (may be normal during attack); joint aspiration if septic arthritis cannot be excluded; oral naproxen or colchicine for acute attack; avoid allopurinol during acute phase; start allopurinol 4 weeks after resolution; purine-restricted diet and alcohol reduction.
red_flags: Fever above 38.5°C suggesting septic arthritis requiring joint washout
Multiple joint involvement simultaneously
Tophus formation indicating chronic tophaceous gout

user_symptom_description: I've had this really itchy red rash on my elbows and knees for months. The skin there is thick and has a silvery scale on top. It sometimes bleeds when I scratch it. My nails look pitted and discoloured too.
urgency_reason: Chronic plaques with nail involvement are consistent with moderate psoriasis requiring topical and potentially systemic therapy.
recommended_action: Topical potent corticosteroid and vitamin D analogue combination; tar shampoo for scalp; DLQI score to assess impact; screen for psoriatic arthritis; if DLQI above 10 refer for phototherapy or systemic therapy (methotrexate, biologics); emollients.
red_flags: Erythroderma covering over 90% body surface area
Acute pustular psoriasis with fever requiring hospital admission
Rapidly worsening joint involvement suggesting psoriatic arthritis

user_symptom_description: بنتي لاحظت إني بقيت بتلعثم في كلامي فجأة من ساعتين وإيدي الأيسر بتتخدر وأصعب أرفعها. أنا عندي 69 سنة وعندي سكر وضغط.
urgency_reason: Sudden dysarthria with unilateral limb weakness in a diabetic hypertensive patient is stroke until proven otherwise — thrombolysis window is closing.
recommended_action: Call 999 immediately — FAST positive; note exact time of onset; non-contrast CT head on arrival; blood glucose to exclude hypoglycaemia; IV alteplase if within 4.5 hours and no contraindications; mechanical thrombectomy assessment; aspirin 300mg; stroke unit admission.
red_flags: Worsening deficits suggesting malignant MCA infarction
Haemorrhagic transformation on CT
Brainstem involvement with respiratory compromise

user_symptom_description: I've been urinating extremely frequently — about 15 times a day — and I'm absolutely exhausted. I've lost about 6kg in the last month without trying and I'm so thirsty all the time no matter how much I drink.
urgency_reason: Classic triad of polydipsia, polyuria, and weight loss requires urgent blood glucose to exclude diabetic ketoacidosis.
recommended_action: Random blood glucose urgently — if above 11.1 mmol/L confirm with fasting glucose; ABG and urine ketones to exclude DKA; GAD antibodies and C-peptide; if DKA present admit for IV insulin protocol; if not in DKA initiate insulin and endocrinology referral.
red_flags: Blood glucose above 20 with ketonaemia indicating DKA
Kussmaul breathing from metabolic acidosis
Altered consciousness from hyperosmolar state

user_symptom_description: بقالي يومين وعندي حكة شديدة جداً في منطقة حساسة وإفرازات بيضاء زي الجبن مع رائحة مش كويسة. أنا مش حامل وبخد مضاد حيوي من أسبوع.
urgency_reason: Antibiotic-associated candidal vaginitis with classic symptoms is appropriate for direct treatment but recurrent episodes require investigation.
recommended_action: High vaginal swab; single dose oral fluconazole 150mg or clotrimazole pessary; treat partner only if symptomatic; complete antibiotic course; avoid douching; cotton underwear; if recurrent (4+ per year) investigate for diabetes and immunosuppression; prophylactic fluconazole weekly for 6 months.
red_flags: Fever and pelvic pain suggesting pelvic inflammatory disease
Skin ulceration suggesting STI
Symptoms persisting after 2 courses of antifungal

user_symptom_description: I came back from a trip to Southeast Asia 2 weeks ago. Since then I've had fevers that spike every 2 days, I'm drenched in sweat when they break, and I feel terrible with headaches and muscle aches.
urgency_reason: Cyclical fever post-travel to malaria-endemic region is malaria until proven otherwise requiring urgent thick and thin blood film.
recommended_action: Urgent thick and thin blood films plus malaria RDT; FBC, LFTs, blood glucose, renal function; if P. falciparum or mixed infection admit immediately; IV artesunate for severe falciparum; oral chloroquine plus primaquine for vivax; notify public health.
red_flags: Cerebral malaria with confusion or seizures
Severe anaemia or thrombocytopenia
Jaundice with renal failure suggesting severe falciparum

user_symptom_description: ابني عنده 11 سنة وعنده حرارة من 3 أيام مع طفح جلدي أحمر بدأ من وشه ونزل للجسم. وقبل الطفح بكام يوم كان عنده علامات زكام عادية وعيونه كانت حمرا.
urgency_reason: Classic measles presentation with prodrome and cephalocaudal rash spread requires isolation, public health notification, and monitoring for complications.
recommended_action: Isolate immediately; salivary measles IgM and PCR; notify public health authority; vitamin A supplementation; check immunisation status; supportive care; monitor for pneumonia, encephalitis, and otitis media; contact tracing of school and family.
red_flags: Respiratory distress from measles pneumonia
Severe headache with altered consciousness from encephalitis
Immunocompromised contact requiring urgent post-exposure prophylaxis

user_symptom_description: I've had really bad pain in my right upper tummy, especially after eating fatty foods. It comes in waves and sometimes goes to my right shoulder. I vomited twice last night and the pain kept me awake.
urgency_reason: Nocturnal RUQ pain with vomiting and fatty food trigger suggests acute cholecystitis requiring urgent ultrasound and surgical assessment.
recommended_action: Go to A&E; abdominal ultrasound urgently; FBC, LFTs, amylase, CRP; IV access; NBM; IV morphine and antiemetic; IV cefuroxime and metronidazole; laparoscopic cholecystectomy within 72 hours; ERCP if CBD stones on imaging.
red_flags: High fever with rigors and jaundice indicating ascending cholangitis requiring emergency decompression
Peritonism from perforated gallbladder
Pancreatitis complicating gallstone disease

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين بحس بضيق في صدري لما ببتلع الأكل، وبدأت يمشيلي بصعوبة حتى السوائل. ونزل وزني 7 كيلو في شهرين. عندي 71 سنة وبدخن من صغري.
urgency_reason: Progressive dysphagia with significant weight loss in an elderly male smoker is oesophageal cancer until proven otherwise requiring urgent endoscopy.
recommended_action: Urgent upper GI endoscopy with biopsy within 2 weeks; CT chest, abdomen, pelvis for staging; PET scan; nutritional support and dietitian referral; MDT discussion for surgical, oncological, or palliative management; oesophageal stenting if inoperable.
red_flags: Complete inability to swallow any liquid requiring emergency stenting
Aspiration pneumonia from oesophageal obstruction
Cachexia suggesting advanced metastatic disease

user_symptom_description: I was stung by a bee about 20 minutes ago and now my lips and tongue are swelling up, I have hives all over, I feel like I can't breathe properly and I feel dizzy and about to pass out.
urgency_reason: Anaphylaxis with airway compromise, respiratory distress, and cardiovascular involvement requires immediate adrenaline injection.
recommended_action: Call 999; IM adrenaline 0.5mg (1:1000) into outer thigh immediately; lay flat with legs elevated; high-flow oxygen; IV chlorphenamine 10mg and hydrocortisone 200mg; IV fluids for hypotension; observe minimum 6-12 hours; prescribe 2 EpiPens on discharge; allergy referral.
red_flags: Stridor from laryngeal oedema requiring emergency cricothyrotomy
Cardiac arrest from anaphylactic shock
Biphasic reaction occurring 4-8 hours later

user_symptom_description: بقالي 3 أسابيع وبحس بضيق وقلق شديد قبل ما أروح الشغل، وبيجيلي وجع في بطني الصبح، وأحياناً بتقيأ من شدة التوتر. حسيت بالضغط ده من لما بدأت مشاكل مع مديري الجديد.
urgency_reason: Anxiety symptoms clearly linked to an identifiable stressor are consistent with adjustment disorder responding to brief psychological intervention.
recommended_action: Brief CBT or problem-solving therapy; occupational health referral if workplace issues persist; short-term SSRI if severity warrants; relaxation techniques; treat IBS symptoms symptomatically; reassess at 4-6 weeks; address workplace stressor directly.
red_flags: Development of suicidal ideation
Escalation to major depressive episode
Complete inability to attend work for more than 2 weeks

user_symptom_description: My vision in my left eye went completely black for about 2 minutes this morning, then came back to normal by itself. It was like a curtain being pulled down. I have high blood pressure and I'm 55.
urgency_reason: Transient monocular vision loss is amaurosis fugax — a TIA equivalent heralding imminent stroke requiring same-day vascular assessment.
recommended_action: Go to TIA clinic or A&E same day; ABCD2 score; carotid duplex ultrasound urgently; MRI DWI brain; echocardiogram and Holter monitor; aspirin 300mg immediately; high-intensity statin; carotid endarterectomy if stenosis above 70%; admit if ABCD2 score 4 or above.
red_flags: Completed stroke within 48 hours of TIA
Bilateral visual loss suggesting vertebrobasilar TIA
Complete retinal artery occlusion causing permanent vision loss

user_symptom_description: بنتي عندها 5 سنين وبقالها يومين جلدها أصفر وعيونها بقت صفرا، وبولها بقى أصفر غامق. مش عندها ألم في بطنها بس تعبانة.
urgency_reason: New-onset jaundice with dark urine in a child requires urgent LFTs to assess liver function and viral serology to confirm hepatitis A.
recommended_action: Urgent LFTs, bilirubin fractions, FBC, hepatitis A IgM and HAV antigen; prothrombin time to assess coagulation; abdominal ultrasound; supportive care with rest and adequate nutrition; no paracetamol; notify public health; school exclusion until non-infectious; contact tracing.
red_flags: Coagulopathy or falling albumin from acute liver failure
Encephalopathy from fulminant hepatitis
Abdominal pain with rigidity suggesting perforated viscus

user_symptom_description: I've had pain in both my wrists and hands that wakes me up at night. My hands feel numb and tingly, especially in my thumb and first two fingers. I work as a cashier and the symptoms get worse after a long shift.
urgency_reason: Bilateral nocturnal median nerve paraesthesia in an occupationally at-risk worker is carpal tunnel syndrome requiring splinting and nerve conduction studies.
recommended_action: Nerve conduction studies to confirm severity; night wrist splints in neutral position; workplace ergonomic assessment; corticosteroid injection if moderate symptoms; surgical carpal tunnel decompression if conservative measures fail or severe denervation on NCS; thyroid and diabetes screen.
red_flags: Thenar muscle wasting indicating severe median nerve compression
Loss of thumb opposition
Rapid progression despite splinting

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوع وعندي ألم شديد في منطقة الحزام من الخلف لقدام على جنبي الأيمن، وبعدين ظهرت حبوب صغيرة حمراء في نفس المنطقة. الألم زي ما حد بيحرقني.
urgency_reason: Classic dermatomal vesicular rash with preceding burning pain in an elderly patient requires prompt antiviral therapy to reduce post-herpetic neuralgia risk.
recommended_action: Oral acyclovir 800mg 5 times daily for 7 days — most effective within 72 hours of rash; gabapentin or amitriptyline for neuropathic pain; calamine lotion for rash; keep rash covered; exclude ophthalmic zoster if V1 involvement; check for immunosuppression.
red_flags: Rash affecting ophthalmic branch requiring urgent ophthalmology referral
Disseminated zoster in immunocompromised patient
Ramsay Hunt syndrome with facial palsy and ear vesicles

user_symptom_description: I've been having recurrent nosebleeds almost every day for the past 3 weeks. They last about 10 minutes each time. I recently started taking ibuprofen daily for back pain and I also drink alcohol most evenings.
urgency_reason: Recurrent epistaxis linked to NSAID and alcohol use requires medication review and BP check but is unlikely to represent serious pathology.
recommended_action: Stop ibuprofen and reduce alcohol; blood pressure measurement; FBC, clotting screen, LFTs; ENT review for cauterisation of Little's area if recurrent; apply Naseptin cream; first aid technique for acute bleeds; look for telangiectasia if family history of HHT.
red_flags: Haemodynamic instability from severe blood loss
Posterior bleed not responding to anterior packing
Petechiae elsewhere suggesting thrombocytopenia

user_symptom_description: أنا عندي 38 سنة ومن ساعتين وأنا حاسة بدوخة مفاجئة وبلف عليا الدنيا بشكل شديد، وأنا بحس كأن الأوضة دايرة من حواليا. وعندي غثيان وقيأت مرتين.
urgency_reason: Acute sustained vertigo with nausea requires HINTS examination to differentiate peripheral from central cause before attributing to vestibular neuritis.
recommended_action: Perform HINTS examination to exclude cerebellar stroke; MRI brain if any central features; prochlorperazine 12.5mg IM for acute nausea; vestibular sedatives for maximum 3 days; vestibular rehabilitation exercises from day 3; antivirals if herpes zoster suspected.
red_flags: Abnormal HINTS test suggesting posterior fossa stroke
Vertical nystagmus indicating cerebellar pathology
New onset diplopia or dysphagia accompanying vertigo

user_symptom_description: I've been having really bad diarrhoea — about 10 times a day — with blood and mucus in it for the past week. I have cramping all day, lost my appetite completely, and I'm feeling exhausted. I was in hospital 2 weeks ago for a different issue.
urgency_reason: High-frequency bloody diarrhoea with mucus following recent hospitalisation raises strong suspicion for C. difficile requiring urgent stool testing.
recommended_action: Stool toxin PCR for C. difficile; FBC, CRP, electrolytes, albumin; AXR to exclude toxic megacolon; oral vancomycin 125mg QID for 10 days; stop proton pump inhibitors if possible; strict contact precautions; IV fidaxomicin if severe; consider faecal transplant for recurrent disease.
red_flags: Abdominal distension suggesting toxic megacolon on AXR
Haemodynamic instability from dehydration and sepsis
WBC above 15 or creatinine rising sharply indicating severe C. diff

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهر وبجيلي نوبات بخرج فيها كلام بدون ما أقصد وجسمي بيتحرك حركات غريبة زي ما حد ضربني. بفقد السيطرة على نفسي لفترة بسيطة. بيجيني في الشغل والبيت.
urgency_reason: Episodic involuntary movements and vocalisations require neurological assessment to distinguish functional from structural or epileptic aetiology.
recommended_action: Video-EEG monitoring to characterise events; MRI brain; psychological assessment for underlying stressors; CBT and physiotherapy as first-line for FND; if Tourette's confirmed: psychoeducation, habit reversal therapy, clonidine or aripiprazole for severe tics; occupational therapy.
red_flags: Status epilepticus if events prove to be seizures
Self-injury from violent movements
Rapidly progressive course suggesting autoimmune encephalitis

user_symptom_description: For the past month I've been having chest pain that is sharp and gets worse when I breathe in deeply or lie flat. It feels better when I sit forward. I had a bad cold about 2 weeks ago and I'm 35.
urgency_reason: Pleuritic chest pain relieved by sitting forward following viral illness is classic pericarditis requiring ECG to confirm and NSAIDs plus colchicine treatment.
recommended_action: ECG for saddle-shaped ST elevation; FBC, CRP, troponin, ESR; echocardiogram to exclude effusion; aspirin or ibuprofen plus colchicine 0.5mg twice daily for 3 months; restrict exercise for 3 months; cardiology follow-up; MRI if myopericarditis suspected.
red_flags: Beck's triad suggesting cardiac tamponade requiring pericardiocentesis
Elevated troponin indicating myopericarditis
Haemodynamic compromise from large effusion

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين وعندي حكة شديدة في جسمي كله من غير ما يبان عندي طفح، والأكتر في الليل. وبولي بقى أصفر غامق وبرازي بقى أبيض. وجلدي بدأ يصفر شوية.
urgency_reason: Painless obstructive jaundice with pale stool and dark urine in an elderly patient is pancreatic head malignancy until proven otherwise requiring urgent imaging.
recommended_action: Urgent LFTs, direct bilirubin, CA 19-9, CEA; CT chest, abdomen, pelvis with contrast; MRCP; biliary decompression with ERCP stenting if surgical candidate; endoscopic ultrasound with biopsy; MDT referral; Whipple's procedure assessment; nutritional support.
red_flags: Cholangitis from biliary obstruction requiring emergency ERCP
Duodenal obstruction needing palliative bypass
Acute deterioration with sepsis

user_symptom_description: I've noticed blood in my stool — bright red — a few times this week. I also feel like I haven't emptied my bowels properly after going. I'm 45, no weight loss, and my dad had bowel cancer at 55.
urgency_reason: Rectal bleeding with tenesmus and first-degree family history of colorectal cancer at young age requires urgent 2-week wait colonoscopy referral.
recommended_action: Urgent 2-week wait lower GI cancer pathway referral; FBC for anaemia; digital rectal examination; rigid sigmoidoscopy in clinic; colonoscopy for full visualisation; CT staging if cancer confirmed; CEA baseline; offer family screening programme.
red_flags: Iron deficiency anaemia with rectal bleeding strongly suggesting malignancy
Change in bowel habit persisting more than 4 weeks
Palpable rectal mass on DRE

user_symptom_description: أنا عندي 26 سنة وبقالي شهرين دورتي الشهرية مش جاية، ومش حامل، وعندي حليب بيخرج من ثديي لوحده. أنا مش بخد أي أدوية.
urgency_reason: Amenorrhoea with galactorrhoea in a young woman off medications requires serum prolactin and pituitary MRI to exclude prolactinoma.
recommended_action: Fasting serum prolactin, TFTs, pregnancy test, FSH, LH, oestradiol; MRI pituitary with contrast; if macroadenoma confirmed treat with cabergoline; monitor for visual field defects from optic chiasm compression; bone density assessment for oestrogen deficiency.
red_flags: Bitemporal hemianopia from chiasmal compression requiring urgent surgery
Pituitary apoplexy with severe sudden headache
Progressive visual loss from macroadenoma

user_symptom_description: My knee is very painful, hot, and swollen. It came on overnight with no injury. I can barely bend it. I had a sore throat about 3 weeks ago that I didn't treat and I've been feeling feverish.
urgency_reason: Acute hot monoarthritis with fever in a young male requires emergency joint aspiration to exclude septic arthritis as irreversible joint destruction occurs within 24-48 hours.
recommended_action: Go to A&E immediately; joint aspiration with synovial fluid for WBC, Gram stain, and culture; blood cultures; FBC, CRP, uric acid; IV flucloxacillin empirically; do not delay antibiotics; arthroscopic washout; if reactive arthritis confirmed use NSAIDs and ASO titre.
red_flags: WBC above 50,000 cells/mm3 in synovial fluid confirming infection
Gonococcal arthritis requiring IV ceftriaxone
Osteomyelitis extending from joint

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهر وبولي بقى أبطأ وبيجيلي على دفعات وبصحى الليل 3 أو 4 مرات أجيب بول. وأحياناً بحس إن مثانتي ما فضيتش. عندي 70 سنة.
urgency_reason: Lower urinary tract symptoms in a 70-year-old male are most likely BPH but PSA and DRE are mandatory to exclude prostate cancer.
recommended_action: PSA and DRE; IPSS questionnaire; urinalysis to exclude UTI; post-void residual ultrasound; flow rate study; alpha-blocker (tamsulosin) for LUTS; 5-alpha reductase inhibitor if prostate volume large; TURP if failed medical management; renal function check.
red_flags: Acute urinary retention requiring catheterisation
Haematuria suggesting bladder cancer or prostate cancer
Elevated creatinine from obstructive nephropathy

user_symptom_description: I was involved in a car accident 6 weeks ago and since then I've been having flashbacks, nightmares, and I keep flinching at loud sounds. I feel emotionally numb and can't talk about what happened. I haven't been able to return to work.
urgency_reason: Full PTSD symptom cluster present for over 4 weeks following trauma requires formal psychological assessment and trauma-focused therapy.
recommended_action: PCL-5 screening tool; trauma-focused CBT or EMDR as first-line psychological treatment; SSRI (paroxetine or sertraline) if therapy unavailable; avoid benzodiazepines; occupational health referral for phased return to work; peer support group; safety planning.
red_flags: Suicidal ideation related to traumatic guilt
Substance misuse as avoidance behaviour
Complete social isolation with inability to self-care

user_symptom_description: ابني عنده 10 سنين وبقاله يومين ما بيأكلش وبيقول إن بطنه بيوجعه في المنتص وبيجيله غثيان. الليلة حرارته اتعلت وبدأ الألم يتركز في جهة اليمين السفلانية.
urgency_reason: Classic migration of pain to RIF with anorexia, nausea, and fever over 2 days is textbook appendicitis requiring immediate surgical assessment.
recommended_action: Go to A&E now; FBC and CRP; ultrasound abdomen first — if inconclusive CT abdomen; IV access and fluid resuscitation; NBM; IV morphine; IV co-amoxiclav; laparoscopic appendicectomy urgently; measure Paediatric Appendicitis Score.
red_flags: Diffuse peritonism indicating perforation
Septic shock from peritonitis
Appendix abscess requiring drainage

user_symptom_description: I've been having really bad acne on my face and chest for a year now. I've tried all the creams from the pharmacy but nothing helps. The spots are deep and leave scars. My periods are also irregular and I have extra hair on my face and chin.
urgency_reason: Acne, hirsutism, and menstrual irregularity constitute the PCOS triad requiring hormonal workup and dermatological treatment for associated skin manifestations.
recommended_action: LH, FSH, testosterone, DHEAS, 17-OHP, prolactin, TFTs; pelvic ultrasound for ovarian morphology; COCP with cyproterone acetate for hirsutism and acne; metformin if metabolic features; isotretinoin referral if severe scarring acne; weight management if BMI elevated.
red_flags: Virilisation with clitoromegaly suggesting adrenal or ovarian tumour
Rapid onset suggesting congenital adrenal hyperplasia
Cushing's features with central obesity and striae

user_symptom_description: بقالي 5 أيام وعندي حمى عالية وقشعريرة وعندي ألم في صدري لما ببتلع ريقي. وبلغمي بقى لونه بني محمر. وبحس بتعب شديد وما قدرتش آكل حاجة من 3 أيام.
urgency_reason: High fever with rigors, rusty sputum, and pleuritic chest pain in an elderly patient is lobar pneumonia requiring hospital assessment using CURB-65 scoring.
recommended_action: Go to A&E; CXR; CURB-65 score; sputum culture and sensitivity; blood cultures; FBC, CRP, U&E, LFTs; SpO2; if CURB-65 3-5 admit and start IV co-amoxiclav plus clarithromycin; oxygen to maintain SpO2 above 94%; review at 48 hours for response.
red_flags: SpO2 below 92% requiring ITU assessment
Septic shock from bacteraemic pneumonia
Empyema from parapneumonic effusion requiring drainage

user_symptom_description: I've been feeling really low for about 4 months. I sleep really badly, I've lost a lot of weight, and I've completely stopped going out. But last month I also had a week where I felt amazing — I barely needed sleep, I spent thousands of pounds online, and talked really fast. Now I'm low again.
urgency_reason: Documented hypomanic episode alternating with major depression constitutes bipolar II requiring mood stabiliser rather than antidepressant alone.
recommended_action: Urgent psychiatric assessment; do not start SSRI alone as it may trigger mania; initiate lamotrigine or quetiapine as mood stabiliser; lithium if recurrent or severe; psychoeducation about triggers and cycle recognition; financial and social support; crisis plan.
red_flags: Active suicidal ideation during depressive phase
Full manic episode with psychosis requiring admission
Rapid cycling with more than 4 episodes per year

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوع وفخذي الأيسر منتفخ وبيوجعني وإحساسه دافئ أكتر من الأيمن. وجيتني من بعد ما قعدت في السرير أسبوع من عملية في ركبتي. ما عنديش ضيق في التنفس.
urgency_reason: Post-surgical proximal DVT is high risk for pulmonary embolism requiring urgent anticoagulation after duplex ultrasound confirmation.
recommended_action: Go to hospital urgently; Wells DVT score; duplex venous ultrasound; if high probability start DOAC such as rivaroxaban immediately without waiting for result; D-dimer if low probability; minimum 3 months anticoagulation post-surgery; assess for underlying thrombophilia.
red_flags: Sudden dyspnoea or chest pain suggesting PE
Phlegmasia cerulea dolens from massive iliofemoral DVT
Compartment syndrome from massive thigh swelling

user_symptom_description: I've been having difficulty swallowing for the past 3 weeks, only with solids so far. I'm losing weight and I've had a cough that brings up food when I lie down. I'm 62, a smoker, and drink alcohol daily.
urgency_reason: Progressive dysphagia with weight loss in an elderly male with smoking and alcohol history demands urgent 2-week wait endoscopy for cancer exclusion.
recommended_action: Urgent upper GI endoscopy with biopsy; CT chest, abdomen, pelvis for staging; PET-CT and laparoscopy if surgical candidate; dietitian for nutritional support; MDT discussion; oesophagectomy versus chemoradiotherapy versus palliation based on staging; stent if inoperable dysphagia.
red_flags: Complete dysphagia to liquids requiring emergency stent
Haematemesis from bleeding tumour
Aspiration pneumonia from regurgitation

user_symptom_description: بنتي عندها سنتين وبقاله يومين مش بتبكيش كتير بس واضح إنها مش كويسة. لاقيت طفح على جسمها زي نقط حمرا مش بتتفشي لو ضغطت عليها. وحرارتها 38.5 وبتستنى.
urgency_reason: Non-blanching petechial rash with fever and drowsiness in a toddler is meningococcal disease until proven otherwise — every minute without antibiotics increases mortality.
recommended_action: Call 999 immediately; give IM/IV benzylpenicillin 300mg before transfer if available; IV ceftriaxone on arrival; blood cultures; FBC, CRP, CRP, clotting; LP only if stable after antibiotics; intensive care alert; rifampicin prophylaxis for close contacts; public health notification.
red_flags: Rapid spreading purpura indicating fulminant meningococcaemia
Haemodynamic shock requiring aggressive fluid resuscitation
Disseminated intravascular coagulation from sepsis

user_symptom_description: I've been having dull pain in my lower back on both sides for 3 weeks and recently I've noticed puffiness around my eyes especially in the morning. My urine is looking really foamy lately.
urgency_reason: Frothy urine with periorbital oedema suggests heavy proteinuria requiring urgent urinalysis and renal function tests to confirm nephrotic syndrome.
recommended_action: Urinalysis with urine PCR; FBC, U&E, albumin, LFTs, lipid profile; renal ultrasound; nephrology referral; renal biopsy likely needed; treat underlying cause; diuretics for oedema; anticoagulation if severe hypoalbuminaemia below 25g/L; ACE inhibitor to reduce proteinuria.
red_flags: Severe hypoalbuminaemia below 20g/L with anasarca
Acute kidney injury from thrombotic complications
Rapidly rising creatinine suggesting nephritic component

user_symptom_description: بقالي 4 أيام وعندي ألم في ظهري الأوسط بيزيد لو ضغطت على فقراتي، وعندي حمى وبتعرق الليل. أنا بدأ علاج السل من شهرين بس مش بشرب الأدوية بانتظام.
extracted_symptoms: thoracic back pain with vertebral tenderness
urgency_reason: Vertebral tenderness with fever and night sweats in a patient with active TB and poor adherence requires urgent MRI spine to exclude cord compression from Pott's disease.
recommended_action: Urgent MRI spine with contrast; ESR, CRP, full TB workup; sputum cultures; neurosurgical referral if cord compression; directly observed therapy to ensure adherence; extend anti-TB regimen; spinal immobilisation; re-engage with infectious disease team; contact tracing.
red_flags: Lower limb weakness or paraplegia from cord compression requiring emergency decompression
Psoas abscess from vertebral destruction
Kyphotic deformity progression

user_symptom_description: I've been losing hair in round patches on my head for the past 2 months. The patches are completely smooth with no redness or scaling. I've been under a lot of stress at university lately.
urgency_reason: Patchy non-scarring alopecia following stress is alopecia areata — benign but psychologically distressing, requiring dermatological assessment and support.
recommended_action: Clinical diagnosis in most cases; TFTs and ANA to exclude autoimmune association; intralesional triamcinolone injections for patchy disease; topical minoxidil; dermoscopy; reassure that 80% of limited patches regrow spontaneously; stress management and psychological support; wig service referral.
red_flags: Ophiasis pattern or totalis suggesting poor prognosis
Rapid progression to alopecia universalis
Nail pitting suggesting concurrent autoimmune disease

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين وعندي ألم شديد في عيني الأيمن، وبيجيلي صداع حول العين، وبصري اتضبب فيها وبشوف هالات حوالين الأنوار. وحسيت بالغثيان.
urgency_reason: Acute severe eye pain with halos and blurred vision is angle-closure glaucoma with intraocular pressure emergency that can cause permanent blindness within hours.
recommended_action: Emergency ophthalmology referral immediately; measure IOP; IV acetazolamide 500mg and topical pilocarpine 2%; supine positioning; IV mannitol if IOP remains high; urgent laser peripheral iridotomy to relieve pupil block; prophylactic iridotomy to fellow eye; do not give pupil-dilating drops.
red_flags: Fixed mid-dilated pupil from iris ischaemia
IOP above 60 mmHg causing corneal oedema
Permanent visual loss if not treated within hours

user_symptom_description: My periods have become extremely heavy in the last 4 months, soaking through a pad every hour for the first 2 days. I'm passing large clots and feeling really faint and tired. I'm 42.
urgency_reason: Heavy menstrual bleeding with near-syncope requires haemoglobin check and pelvic ultrasound to identify structural cause and prevent severe anaemia.
recommended_action: FBC for anaemia; pelvic ultrasound; endometrial biopsy if over 45 or risk factors; LNG-IUS as first-line; tranexamic acid and NSAIDs for acute heavy periods; iron supplementation; GnRH agonist for fibroids pre-surgery; uterine artery embolisation or myomectomy if surgery preferred.
red_flags: Haemoglobin below 7g/dL requiring blood transfusion
Intermenstrual or post-coital bleeding suggesting endometrial cancer
Rapid syncopal collapse from acute haemorrhage

user_symptom_description: بقالي يومين وعندي ألم شديد في خصيتي الشمال وبيجيلي فجأة من غير سبب. ومرفوعة شوية لفوق. وكلما مشيت أو حركتها زاد الوجع أكتر.
urgency_reason: Sudden severe testicular pain with elevated testis in a young male is testicular torsion until proven otherwise — testicular viability falls rapidly after 6 hours.
recommended_action: Go to A&E immediately; do not wait for ultrasound if clinical suspicion high; emergency scrotal exploration and bilateral orchidopexy; Doppler ultrasound only if diagnosis uncertain and should not delay surgery; analgesia; detorsion within 4-6 hours for maximum viability.
red_flags: Pain onset more than 6 hours ago reducing testicular salvage chance
Absent Cremasteric reflex confirming torsion
Contralateral testis also bell-clapper deformity

user_symptom_description: I've been confused and not myself for the past 2 days according to my daughter. I don't know what day it is and I keep seeing things that aren't there. I have a urine infection apparently. I'm 81 and I'm usually sharp.
extracted_symptoms: acute onset in previously alert patient
urgency_reason: Acute delirium with fluctuating cognition in an elderly patient requires hospital admission to treat precipitant and prevent falls and further deterioration.
recommended_action: Admit for investigation; treat UTI with appropriate antibiotics; U&E, glucose, calcium, LFTs, TFTs, FBC, blood cultures; medication review for anticholinergic or sedative burden; quiet, well-lit environment; family presence; avoid restraints or unnecessary catheterisation; 4AT delirium screening.
red_flags: Worsening despite treating precipitant suggesting structural brain pathology
Fall with head injury during delirious episode
Respiratory compromise from aspiration

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين وعندي ألم في مؤخرة رأسي بيجيلي الصبح لما بصحى، وبيصحبه غثيان وأحياناً قيء. وبلاقي أن الوجع بيتحسن بعد ما أعدي الصبح. وكمان بشوف دبل.
urgency_reason: Morning headache with vomiting and diplopia is a classic raised intracranial pressure syndrome requiring immediate neuroimaging.
recommended_action: Go to A&E immediately; urgent CT head with contrast; MRI brain if CT inconclusive; neurosurgery referral; IV dexamethasone 10mg loading dose if mass lesion confirmed; fundoscopy for papilloedema; avoid LP until ICP excluded; blood pressure assessment.
red_flags: Rapidly deteriorating consciousness
Unequal pupils from transtentorial herniation
Cerebellar ataxia suggesting posterior fossa herniation

user_symptom_description: My 5-year-old has had a noisy chest when he breathes for the past year, especially at night and when he runs around. He's had two courses of antibiotics for chest infections this year and he's had eczema since he was a baby.
urgency_reason: Recurrent nocturnal and exercise-induced wheeze with atopic background in a 5-year-old is childhood asthma requiring diagnosis and step-up inhaler therapy.
recommended_action: Spirometry if age allows; FeNO measurement; SABA reliever plus low-dose inhaled steroid controller; spacer device education; written asthma action plan; trigger avoidance; annual review; consider LTRA if atopic; refer to paediatric asthma clinic if poorly controlled.
red_flags: Acute severe wheeze unresponsive to bronchodilator
SpO2 below 94% requiring emergency treatment
Growth faltering suggesting cystic fibrosis or uncontrolled severe asthma

user_symptom_description: بقالي 3 أشهر وعندي ألم في مفاصل كتيرة وبجيلي حرارة منخفضة وشعري بيتساقط كتير. وظهرلي طفح أحمر على وجنتي وأنفي مش بيروح. بحس بتعب مستمر.
urgency_reason: Malar rash with polyarthritis, hair loss, and systemic symptoms fulfils multiple ACR/EULAR SLE criteria requiring urgent immunological workup.
recommended_action: ANA, anti-dsDNA, complement C3/C4, FBC, U&E, urinalysis with PCR; CXR; echocardiogram; hydroxychloroquine as baseline therapy; sunscreen and photoprotection; NSAIDs for arthritis; prednisolone for flares; nephrology referral if renal involvement; monitor for organ involvement.
red_flags: Haematuria and proteinuria indicating lupus nephritis requiring biopsy
Pericarditis or pleuritis from serositis
Neuropsychiatric features from cerebral lupus

user_symptom_description: I've had diarrhoea and cramping for 3 months, with blood in my stool sometimes. I've lost 5kg and I'm 24. The pain is mostly in my lower right abdomen and I've noticed I have a fever most afternoons.
urgency_reason: Chronic bloody diarrhoea with RLQ pain, weight loss, and fever in a young adult is Crohn's disease until proven otherwise requiring colonoscopy and biopsy.
recommended_action: Colonoscopy with terminal ileum intubation and biopsy; CT enterography for small bowel assessment; FBC, CRP, ESR, stool calprotectin; exclude TB and C. difficile; induce remission with prednisolone or budesonide; initiate azathioprine or biological therapy; nutritional support; surgery for complications.
red_flags: Fistula formation suggesting penetrating disease
Abscess from sealed perforation
Toxic megacolon requiring emergency colectomy

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوع وعندي ألم شديد جداً في فكي الأيمن، وبيجيلي كهربا على وشي لمدة ثواني زي نشلة بتاكل نص وشي. بيجيلي لو لمست وشي أو اكلت أو تكلمت.
urgency_reason: Electric shock facial pain with classic trigger zones is trigeminal neuralgia requiring carbamazepine therapy and MRI to exclude secondary causes.
recommended_action: MRI brain with trigeminal nerve protocol to exclude MS, tumour, or neurovascular compression; carbamazepine starting 100mg twice daily titrating to effect; oxcarbazepine alternative; dental review to exclude odontogenic cause; neurosurgical referral if drug-resistant for microvascular decompression.
red_flags: Bilateral trigeminal neuralgia suggesting MS or brainstem lesion
Sensory loss in addition to pain suggesting secondary cause
Failure of two adequate drug trials requiring surgical assessment

user_symptom_description: I've been having nosebleeds and noticed bruises appearing on my body without any bumps or injuries. My gums also bleed a lot when I brush. I've been more tired than usual over the past month.
urgency_reason: Spontaneous mucosal and skin bleeding with fatigue requires urgent FBC to assess platelet count and rule out haematological malignancy.
recommended_action: Urgent FBC with blood film; coagulation screen, LFTs, HIV and hepatitis C serology; peripheral blood film review; if ITP confirmed treat with prednisolone if platelets below 30; IVIG for urgent elevation; haematology referral urgently; avoid NSAIDs and aspirin; restrict contact sports.
red_flags: Platelet count below 10 requiring emergency admission
Intracranial bleeding from severe thrombocytopenia
Blast cells on film suggesting acute leukaemia

user_symptom_description: بقالي 3 أسابيع وعندي ألم مستمر في أسفل بطني على الجهتين مع أوجاع لما بجيبي العلاقة الزوجية، وإفرازات مش طبيعية ورائحة. وعندي حرارة خفيفة.
urgency_reason: Bilateral pelvic pain with dyspareunia, abnormal discharge, and fever in a young woman is PID requiring prompt antibiotic treatment to prevent tubal infertility.
recommended_action: Endocervical swabs for gonorrhoea and chlamydia; high vaginal swab; pelvic ultrasound to exclude tubo-ovarian abscess; outpatient oral ceftriaxone plus doxycycline plus metronidazole for 14 days; admit if abscess, pregnancy, or no improvement; partner notification and treatment; fertility follow-up.
red_flags: Tubo-ovarian abscess on ultrasound requiring IV antibiotics or drainage
Peritonism suggesting ruptured ectopic pregnancy or abscess
Failure to improve after 72 hours of oral antibiotics

user_symptom_description: I've had pain in my right shin for 3 weeks that started after I began training for a marathon. It's a dull ache during running that gets worse at the end of runs and takes days to settle. The bone feels tender when I press on it.
urgency_reason: Point tenderness over tibial bone in a runner with progressive pain requires imaging to differentiate stress fracture from shin splints.
recommended_action: X-ray tibia — often normal initially; MRI if X-ray normal and high suspicion; stop running immediately; crutches if pain on weight-bearing; bone density assessment if recurrent stress fractures; graduated return to activity after 6-8 weeks; gait analysis and orthotic assessment; calcium and vitamin D.
red_flags: Complete fracture on X-ray requiring cast or surgical fixation
Anterior cortex involvement suggesting high-risk fracture
Pain at rest suggesting pathological fracture

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين وعندي حكة جامدة في الجسم كله، والجلد جف جداً ومش بيتحسن بالمرطبات. وبشوف الجلد بتاعي بدأ يتقشر. الليل الحكة بتزيد جداً وما بنامش.
urgency_reason: Generalised pruritus worse at night in an elderly patient requires scabies exclusion before attributing to senile dry skin.
recommended_action: Examine for burrows in web spaces, wrists, and genitalia; dermoscopy or skin scraping for mites; permethrin 5% cream head-to-toe for 8-12 hours — two applications 1 week apart; treat all household contacts simultaneously; wash all bedding and clothing at 60°C; if crusted scabies add oral ivermectin.
red_flags: Norwegian crusted scabies in immunocompromised patients requiring isolation
Secondary bacterial infection of excoriated skin
Persistent itch 6 weeks after adequate treatment suggesting reinfection

user_symptom_description: I've noticed a lump in my left breast about 2 weeks ago. It's hard, doesn't move much, and I can't feel it on the right side. I'm 48 and my mother had breast cancer at 55. I haven't had a mammogram recently.
urgency_reason: Hard immobile breast lump in a 48-year-old with first-degree family history of breast cancer requires urgent 2-week wait referral to a triple assessment breast clinic.
recommended_action: Urgent 2-week wait breast clinic referral; triple assessment: clinical examination plus mammogram plus ultrasound plus core biopsy; axillary lymph node assessment; if malignancy confirmed: staging CT and bone scan; MDT discussion; surgical and oncological management; genetic counselling for BRCA testing.
red_flags: Skin dimpling or nipple retraction indicating locally advanced disease
Peau d'orange skin changes
Axillary mass from nodal involvement

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوع وعندي ألم شديد في معدتي بيجيلي على معدة فاضية وبيتحسن لما باكل. وأحياناً الليل بيصحيني الألم. واتقيأت مرتين دم أحمر فاتح اليوم.
urgency_reason: Haematemesis in a peptic ulcer patient is active upper GI bleeding requiring emergency endoscopy and resuscitation.
recommended_action: Call 999; IV access with two large-bore cannulae; FBC, group and save, clotting, U&E; IV PPI omeprazole 80mg bolus then 8mg/hour; urgent upper GI endoscopy within 24 hours (same day if haemodynamically unstable); adrenaline injection and clipping at endoscopy; H. pylori testing and eradication.
red_flags: Haemodynamic instability requiring massive transfusion protocol
Bloody NG aspirate indicating continued active bleeding
Rebleeding after initial endoscopic haemostasis requiring surgical intervention

user_symptom_description: I've had swelling and redness around my big toenail on my right foot for 2 weeks. I tried to cut it myself and now there's yellow pus coming from it. It's very painful and I can barely walk.
urgency_reason: Localised ingrown toenail with superficial infection can be managed with conservative treatment and minor surgical procedure without hospital admission.
recommended_action: Oral flucloxacillin for 5 days; warm soaks twice daily; phenol partial nail avulsion under local anaesthetic if no improvement; exclude diabetes before procedure; patient education on correct nail trimming; check tetanus status; refer to podiatry for recurrent cases.
red_flags: Spreading cellulitis up the leg
Deep infection with bone tenderness suggesting osteomyelitis
Patient with diabetes or peripheral vascular disease requiring multidisciplinary foot team

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهر وبحس بثقل في ساقي اليسار وعندي دوالي كبيرة، وبيجيلي تشنجات الليل في الساق. الساق بقت تحت الركبة بنية اللون وفيها قرحة صغيرة.
urgency_reason: Venous ulceration with lipodermatosclerosis indicates advanced chronic venous insufficiency requiring graduated compression and specialist wound care.
recommended_action: ABPI to exclude arterial disease before compression therapy; four-layer compression bandaging if ABPI above 0.8; wound debridement and antimicrobial dressings; aspirin and pentoxifylline; duplex venous ultrasound; surgical ablation of incompetent saphenous veins; leg elevation; weight management.
red_flags: ABPI below 0.5 contraindicating compression therapy
Signs of cellulitis requiring antibiotics
Rapidly enlarging ulcer suggesting squamous cell carcinoma (Marjolin's ulcer)

user_symptom_description: I have had a continuous ringing sound in my right ear for the past month that's really affecting my sleep and concentration. It started after I went to a very loud concert. I also feel like my hearing on that side is slightly reduced.
urgency_reason: Unilateral tinnitus with hearing loss after noise exposure requires pure tone audiogram and MRI to exclude acoustic neuroma.
recommended_action: Pure tone audiometry and tympanometry; MRI internal auditory meati to exclude acoustic neuroma; tinnitus retraining therapy; sound enrichment at night; hearing aid if significant loss confirmed; avoid further noise exposure and wear ear protection; CBT for tinnitus distress if severe.
red_flags: Rapidly progressive unilateral deafness suggesting acoustic neuroma or sudden SNHL
Associated vertigo suggesting Meniere's disease
Pulsatile tinnitus suggesting vascular pathology

user_symptom_description: بقالي 10 أيام وعندي إحساس بحرقان لما ببول وبروح الحمام كتير جداً بس بيجي شوية في كل مرة. عندي ألم في أسفل بطني. المشكلة دي رجعتلي 3 مرات في 6 شهور.
urgency_reason: Three or more UTIs in 6 months constitutes recurrent UTI requiring investigation for risk factors and prophylactic antibiotic strategy.
recommended_action: MSU for culture at each episode; renal and bladder ultrasound; exclude STI with cervical swabs; post-coital antibiotic prophylaxis if coitally related; continuous low-dose antibiotic prophylaxis; vaginal oestrogen if post-menopausal; cystoscopy if haematuria or interstitial cystitis suspected.
red_flags: Fever and loin pain suggesting ascending pyelonephritis
Haematuria without infection suggesting bladder malignancy
Structural renal abnormality on imaging requiring urological intervention

user_symptom_description: I work in construction and have been using vibrating tools for 10 years. My fingers go white and numb in the cold and they take a long time to warm up. The numbness is getting more frequent and it's not just in the cold anymore.
possible_conditions: Vibration White Finger / Hand Arm Vibration Syndrome
primary_condition: Vibration White Finger / Hand Arm Vibration Syndrome
urgency_reason: Occupational Raynaud's from vibrating tools meets HAVS criteria requiring health surveillance and possible removal from vibrating work.
recommended_action: Occupational health referral; ANA, anti-centromere, anti-Scl70 to exclude connective tissue disease; Stockholm Workshop Scale grading; reduce vibration exposure and wear thermal gloves; nifedipine for severe vasospasm; employer notification under RIDDOR; hand-arm vibration surveys.
red_flags: Digital ulceration or gangrene suggesting critical digital ischaemia
Anti-centromere antibody positive suggesting systemic sclerosis
Neurological component with significant grip strength loss

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهرين وبحس بصداع خفيف مستمر وأحياناً بحس بتنميل في وجنتي. وبلاحظ إن إيدي الأيمن بيرتجف وأنا ماشية. عندي 76 سنة وعندي ضغط وكوليسترول.
urgency_reason: Facial numbness with new tremor and vascular risk factors in an elderly patient may represent small vessel TIA requiring urgent brain imaging and secondary prevention.
recommended_action: Same-day TIA clinic or A&E attendance; MRI DWI brain; carotid duplex; echo and Holter; aspirin 300mg and high-intensity statin immediately; ABCD2 scoring; BP optimisation; if tremor persists neurological review for Parkinsonism; driving cessation pending review.
red_flags: Completed ischaemic stroke progression
New motor deficit or dysphasia
Hypertensive crisis precipitating the event

user_symptom_description: I've been having terrible night sweats, losing weight without trying, and I've noticed my lymph nodes in my neck and armpits are swollen and not painful. I'm 38, non-smoker, and I've been feeling tired for about 2 months.
urgency_reason: B-symptom triad of night sweats, weight loss, and fever with painless lymphadenopathy is lymphoma until proven otherwise requiring urgent lymph node biopsy.
recommended_action: Urgent FBC, ESR, LDH, uric acid; CT chest, abdomen, pelvis; HIV and EBV serology; TB screen; excision lymph node biopsy — not fine needle aspiration; PET scan for staging; ABVD chemotherapy for Hodgkin's; haematology MDT referral; fertility preservation counselling before treatment.
red_flags: Mediastinal mass causing SVC obstruction
Bone marrow failure from extensive infiltration
Transformation to aggressive lymphoma with rapid nodal growth

user_symptom_description: بنتي عندها 7 سنين وعندها وجع في ركبتيها الاتنين من أسبوعين وبتصحى الليل من الوجع. ما فيش إصابة وركبها مش منتفخة. دكتور قالنا هي بتكبر وهيعدي.
urgency_reason: Bilateral nocturnal limb pain in a school-age child without swelling is likely growing pains but leukaemia must be excluded with FBC.
recommended_action: FBC and ESR to exclude malignancy and inflammatory arthritis; physical examination for lymphadenopathy and hepatosplenomegaly; if investigations normal reassure parents about growing pains; paracetamol or ibuprofen for nocturnal episodes; gentle massage and warmth; reassess if pain pattern changes.
red_flags: Pallor, easy bruising, or lymphadenopathy suggesting leukaemia
Joint swelling or morning stiffness suggesting JIA
Unilateral pain or bone tenderness pointing to stress fracture or bone tumour

user_symptom_description: I've been having pins and needles in both my feet for 3 months, worse at night. I'm 44, overweight, and I've been feeling really thirsty and going to the toilet frequently. My mother has type 2 diabetes.
urgency_reason: Peripheral neuropathy with polyuria and polydipsia in an overweight patient with family history strongly suggests undiagnosed type 2 diabetes with early end-organ damage.
recommended_action: Fasting glucose and HbA1c; U&E and eGFR; urine albumin-creatinine ratio; lipid profile; B12 and TFTs; fundoscopy; if diabetes confirmed start metformin; lifestyle modification and weight loss; foot care education; statin and ACE inhibitor if indicated; diabetes education programme.
red_flags: HbA1c above 86 indicating poorly controlled diabetes with high complication risk
Foot ulceration from existing neuropathy
Renal impairment from diabetic nephropathy

user_symptom_description: بقالي 5 أيام وعندي ألم في الصدر بيجيلي على فترات مع ضيق خفيف في التنفس. عندي ضغط وسكر وبقالي ثلاث أيام ما اخدتش أدويتي. عندي 78 سنة وخايف أروح المستشفى.
urgency_reason: New or crescendo chest pain in a 78-year-old diabetic hypertensive with missed medications is unstable angina or NSTEMI requiring immediate hospital assessment.
recommended_action: Call 999 immediately; aspirin 300mg chewed; GTN if available; ECG within 10 minutes; serial troponins; IV access; IV heparin; dual antiplatelet therapy; urgent cardiology review; coronary angiography within 72 hours; restart all antihypertensive and diabetic medications under monitoring.
red_flags: ST depression or T-wave inversion indicating NSTEMI
Sustained chest pain at rest lasting over 20 minutes suggesting STEMI
Acute pulmonary oedema from ischaemic LV dysfunction

user_symptom_description: I've been feeling exhausted all the time for months and my friends say I look pale. I've had really heavy periods all my life and I constantly crave ice. My tongue feels sore and smooth.
urgency_reason: Classic iron deficiency anaemia with pica and glossitis from chronic menstrual blood loss requires iron supplementation and investigation of menorrhagia.
recommended_action: FBC, ferritin, TIBC, serum iron, B12, folate; coeliac serology; review menstrual history and start LNG-IUS; oral ferrous sulphate 200mg three times daily for 3-6 months; dietary advice; recheck haemoglobin in 4 weeks; parenteral iron if oral not tolerated; colonoscopy if any GI symptoms.
red_flags: Haemoglobin below 7g/dL requiring blood transfusion
Associated change in bowel habit suggesting lower GI source of blood loss
Failure to respond to oral iron despite adherence suggesting malabsorption

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهرين وعندي كحة جافة مزعجة جداً، بيجيلي طول اليوم. وبلاحظت إنها بدأت بعد ما الدكتور زود جرعة الأدوية بتاعة الضغط. مش عندي زكام ولا حرارة.
extracted_symptoms: onset after ACE inhibitor dose increase
urgency_reason: Dry cough temporally related to ACE inhibitor dose increase is a classic adverse effect requiring medication switch.
recommended_action: Switch ACE inhibitor to ARB such as losartan or valsartan — equally effective for hypertension with negligible cough risk; confirm cough resolves within 4 weeks of switch; no need for respiratory investigations unless cough persists; check BP after medication change.
red_flags: Haemoptysis suggesting a respiratory diagnosis requiring investigation
Cough with dyspnoea suggesting heart failure not medication effect
Persistent cough 8 weeks after stopping ACE inhibitor suggesting alternative diagnosis

user_symptom_description: I've had a painful red lump in my armpit for 5 days. It's getting bigger and now I can feel it's full of fluid. I had a small cut in my armpit while shaving last week. I've been feverish and feel unwell.
urgency_reason: Fluctuant axillary abscess with systemic features requires surgical incision and drainage and antibiotics to prevent spreading cellulitis.
recommended_action: Surgical incision and drainage under local anaesthetic; send pus for culture; oral flucloxacillin or co-amoxiclav for 5-7 days; wound packed and left open; FBC and CRP; review in 48 hours; exclude hidradenitis suppurativa if recurrent; consider diabetes screen for recurrent skin abscesses.
red_flags: Spreading cellulitis with red streaking suggesting lymphangitis
Sepsis with high fever and systemic toxicity
MRSA infection requiring IV vancomycin

user_symptom_description: ابني عنده سنة ونص وبقاله يومين عنده إسهال مائي كتير جداً وبيتقيأ، وما بيشربش بسهولة. بيبكي بس دموعه قليلة وحفاضاته جافة من 8 ساعات. وشايف إن عيونه غايرة شوية.
extracted_symptoms: dry nappies for 8 hours and sunken eyes
urgency_reason: Signs of severe dehydration in an infant including sunken eyes, dry nappies, reduced tears, and poor intake require emergency IV fluid resuscitation.
recommended_action: Go to A&E immediately; IV access and IV fluid resuscitation with 20ml/kg 0.9% saline bolus; blood glucose, electrolytes, bicarbonate; stool rotavirus antigen; continue oral rehydration if mild; nasogastric fluids as bridge; reassess after each bolus; rotavirus vaccine check; reassess weight hourly.
red_flags: Altered consciousness from severe dehydration and electrolyte imbalance
Bloody stool suggesting intussusception or HUS
Lack of urine output despite IV fluids suggesting renal impairment

user_symptom_description: I've had yellow, thick discharge from my penis for 4 days and it burns a lot when I urinate. I had unprotected sex about a week ago with a new partner. There is also some swelling and discomfort in my left testicle.
urgency_reason: Purulent urethral discharge with dysuria following unprotected sex is gonorrhoea until proven otherwise requiring urgent swabs and dual antibiotic therapy.
recommended_action: Urethral swab for gonorrhoea culture; NAAT for gonorrhoea and chlamydia; IM ceftriaxone 1g plus oral azithromycin 1g same day; treat partner simultaneously; HIV, syphilis, and hepatitis B testing; testicular ultrasound if epididymo-orchitis suspected; test of cure in 2 weeks; abstain until both partners treated.
red_flags: Disseminated gonococcal infection with arthritis-dermatitis syndrome
Testicular abscess formation from untreated epididymo-orchitis
HIV seroconversion illness from concurrent acquisition

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهر وعندي وجع شديد في مؤخرة رأسي بيبدأ فجأة لما باعطس أو بكح أو بحاول أعمل مجهود. الوجع شديد جداً ويخف بعد كام دقيقة. خايفة أروح دكتور.
urgency_reason: Recurrent thunderclap headache triggered by Valsalva manoeuvre requires immediate CT and LP to exclude subarachnoid haemorrhage before any other diagnosis.
recommended_action: Go to A&E immediately; non-contrast CT head; if CT negative LP for xanthochromia at least 12 hours after onset; MRI and MRA brain; nimodipine for RCVS; avoid triggers; neurosurgical review if SAH or aneurysm found; admit for monitoring; do not reassure until SAH definitively excluded.
red_flags: Worst headache of life with meningism confirming SAH

user_symptom_description: I've had a strange metallic taste in my mouth for the past month and my gums keep bleeding when I brush my teeth. My dentist said my gums look inflamed but I brush twice a day. I'm also very tired.
urgency_reason: Spontaneous gum bleeding with fatigue and metallic taste may indicate a blood dyscrasia requiring urgent CBC with differential.
recommended_action: See GP urgently for CBC with differential and peripheral blood smear; coagulation panel and vitamin C level also needed.
red_flags: Petechiae on skin or palate
Bone pain or lymph node swelling
Fever with night sweats

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين بحس بألم شديد في أسفل بطني على الجانبين مع حرارة خفيفة وإفراز من الذكر. كنت عندي علاقة من أسبوعين.
urgency_reason: Urethral discharge with pelvic pain requires prompt STI testing and treatment to prevent ascending infection and infertility.
recommended_action: See sexual health clinic or GP today for urethral swab and NAAT testing; start azithromycin empirically; notify partners.

user_symptom_description: My daughter noticed that I've been having trouble swallowing my pills and sometimes food goes down the wrong way. I've had two episodes of pneumonia in the past year. I have Parkinson's disease.
urgency_reason: Aspiration with recurrent pneumonia in Parkinson's disease requires urgent swallowing assessment to prevent fatal aspiration pneumonia.
recommended_action: See neurologist urgently; refer to speech and language therapist for videofluoroscopy swallowing study; modify food and pill textures immediately.

Rapid weight loss from inability to eat safely
New fever with respiratory symptoms

user_symptom_description: I've been having really sharp pain behind my sternum that gets worse when I lean forward or lie down. It started three days ago after I had a bad flu. The pain is better when I sit up and lean forward.
urgency_reason: Post-viral pericarditis requires urgent ECG and echocardiogram to exclude cardiac tamponade and myocarditis.
recommended_action: Go to ER or cardiologist urgently for ECG, troponin, echocardiogram, and CRP; start NSAIDs and colchicine; restrict exercise for 3 months.
red_flags: Muffled heart sounds with hypotension and raised JVP
Troponin elevation suggesting myocarditis
Rapid deterioration with breathlessness

user_symptom_description: بنتي عمرها 11 سنة وبقالها شهرين تشكي من وجع في ركبتيها الاتنين وبتتعب بسرعة لما بتلعب. لقيت طفح أحمر على وشها وبتشكي من ضوء الشمس. فقدت شوية وزن.

Severe anemia or thrombocytopenia

user_symptom_description: I've been having episodes where my fingers turn white, then blue, then red when I go outside in the cold. It's incredibly painful and takes 30 minutes to go back to normal. It happens every time the temperature drops.

Skin thickening on hands

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهر بحس بألم وضعف في ساقي اليمين والتعب بيزيد مع الوقت. كمان لاحظت إن ساقي اليمين أقل سمك من اليسار. عندي 71 سنة وعندي سكر.
urgency_reason: Progressive leg atrophy in a diabetic patient requires urgent neurological evaluation to differentiate diabetic amyotrophy from compressive or vascular causes.
recommended_action: See neurologist urgently for EMG and nerve conduction study; MRI lumbar spine; optimize glycemic control with endocrinologist.

Bilateral involvement developing

user_symptom_description: I've been restricting what I eat for two years. I've lost 20 kg and I now weigh 42 kg at 165 cm. I know I look thin but I still feel fat. My periods stopped 8 months ago and I'm always cold.
urgency_reason: Anorexia nervosa with BMI below 15 has the highest mortality of any psychiatric disorder; cardiac arrhythmia and refeeding syndrome are immediate risks.
recommended_action: See eating disorder specialist urgently; ECG, electrolytes, bone density, and cardiac monitoring essential; multidisciplinary team care required.
red_flags: Heart rate below 40 bpm
Potassium below 3.0 causing arrhythmia

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين بحس بألم في صدري زي وخز يجيلي بين كتافي لما بتنفس. وعندي سعال جاف مستمر. أنا عندي مرض المناعة الذاتية وبآخد دواء يخفض المناعة.
urgency_reason: An immunosuppressed patient with new respiratory symptoms is at high risk for opportunistic infections which can be rapidly fatal.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately; chest X-ray, CT chest, sputum for PCP stain, and oxygen saturation; do not delay — empirical TMP-SMX may be life-saving.
red_flags: Oxygen saturation below 90%
Rapid breathing rate above 30 breaths/min
Deterioration within hours

user_symptom_description: My legs feel like lead when I walk and they cramp up terribly at night. My calves are darker than usual and I have varicose veins for years. Now there's a brownish stain on my lower leg skin.
urgency_reason: Advanced venous insufficiency with hemosiderin staining is pre-ulcerative and requires compression therapy to prevent venous ulceration.
recommended_action: See GP for venous Doppler and referral to vascular clinic; start compression stockings grade 2; elevate legs; wound care if ulceration develops.

Acute leg swelling and pain suggesting new DVT

user_symptom_description: I got a tick bite while hiking last week. A red circular rash appeared around the bite site that's been slowly expanding. I now have flu-like symptoms and some joint aches.
urgency_reason: Erythema migrans is diagnostic of early Lyme disease; prompt doxycycline prevents progression to cardiac and neurological Lyme disease.
recommended_action: See GP today; erythema migrans is a clinical diagnosis — start doxycycline 100mg twice daily for 14-21 days; serology can be falsely negative early.
red_flags: Heart palpitations or syncope suggesting Lyme carditis
Facial palsy or meningism
Severe joint swelling in large joints

user_symptom_description: بقالي سنة بيجيلي ألم في حوضي بعد الجنس مباشرة وبيفضل لساعات. وبحس بثقل في المنطقة دي. الدكتور قالي ما فيش التهاب. أنا متجوزة وعايزة أنجب.
urgency_reason: Deep dyspareunia with pelvic pain in a woman seeking fertility strongly suggests endometriosis; early laparoscopy improves conception rates.
recommended_action: See gynecologist urgently given fertility goals; pelvic MRI and diagnostic laparoscopy are required; endometriosis lesion excision improves fertility.
red_flags: Complete inability to have intercourse
Cycle-related rectal bleeding
Cyclical hematuria

user_symptom_description: I accidentally spilled boiling water on my right forearm. The skin is red, blistering in patches, and extremely painful. It happened about an hour ago and covers an area about the size of my palm.
urgency_reason: Partial thickness burns require proper wound care, infection prevention, and pain management at a burn unit or urgent care.
recommended_action: Go to urgent care or ER; cool with running water for 20 minutes — not ice; cover loosely with clean wrap; do not pop blisters; tetanus check.
red_flags: Burn appearing white, brown, or painless (full thickness)
Burns on face, hands, genitals, or joints
Burns exceeding 10% body surface area

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهر عندي إحساس بنبض في بطني وشايف حاجة بتنبض لما أنام على ضهري. مش عندي ألم بس بقالي مدة عندي ضغط. عمري 70.
urgency_reason: Pulsatile abdominal mass in a hypertensive elderly man is AAA until proven otherwise; rupture is 80% fatal without emergency surgery.
recommended_action: Go to ER today for urgent abdominal ultrasound; if AAA confirmed, CT angiography and vascular surgery consultation needed.
red_flags: Sudden severe tearing abdominal or back pain
Hypotension with pulsatile mass

user_symptom_description: I've had increasing difficulty climbing stairs and getting up from a low chair over the past 3 months. I don't have joint pain but my muscles feel genuinely weak. I also noticed a reddish-purple rash on my eyelids.
urgency_reason: Dermatomyositis is a paraneoplastic condition in adults requiring cancer screening alongside immunosuppressive treatment.
recommended_action: See rheumatologist urgently; get CK, aldolase, anti-Jo-1, MRI of muscles; full cancer screen including CT chest/abdomen/pelvis.

Dysphagia from pharyngeal involvement
Interstitial lung disease symptoms

user_symptom_description: بقالي 10 أيام لاحظت تصبغ غريب في وجهي وعنقي وإبطي — بقع بنية داكنة في الطيات. وبحس بإعياء وفقدت شهيتي وبقيت أشتهي الملح جداً.

urgency_reason: Addison's disease can progress to life-threatening adrenal crisis with any intercurrent illness or stress; urgent cortisol testing is needed.
recommended_action: See endocrinologist urgently for 8am cortisol, ACTH stimulation test, serum sodium, potassium, and glucose; carry hydrocortisone emergency injection.
red_flags: Severe vomiting with hypotension suggesting Addisonian crisis
Extreme weakness and confusion
Low sodium below 125 mmol/L

user_symptom_description: I've been feeling nauseous after eating for the past two months, especially after fatty foods. I feel full very quickly even with small amounts of food and I've lost some weight.
urgency_reason: Early satiety with weight loss requires upper endoscopy to exclude gastric malignancy before attributing to motility disorder.

red_flags: Vomiting undigested food from days ago
Significant weight loss over 5kg
Blood in vomitus

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهرين عندي وجع شديد بيجيلي في ليلي رجلي الاتنين وبيصحيني من النوم. الوجع بيكون في العظام مش في العضلات. ونزلت في ملوحة الدم عندي.
urgency_reason: Bone pain with hyponatremia in elderly requires urgent evaluation to exclude malignancy and assess vitamin D and parathyroid status.
recommended_action: See endocrinologist urgently for vitamin D, PTH, calcium, phosphate, ALP, and bone X-ray; SPEP and myeloma screen also needed.

Severe hypercalcemia causing confusion
Marked ALP elevation suggesting Paget's or malignancy

user_symptom_description: I've been experiencing shortness of breath that gets worse every time I exercise and I've noticed my fingers and toes have a bluish tinge. My doctor told me my oxygen is always around 88%. I was born with a heart problem.
extracted_symptoms: central cyanosis of fingers and toes
urgency_reason: Chronic cyanosis from Eisenmenger physiology requires specialist management; pulmonary vasodilator therapy may improve quality of life.
recommended_action: See congenital heart disease cardiologist urgently; right heart catheterization, echocardiogram, and CBC for polycythemia assessment.

Hemoptysis
Rapid deterioration in oxygen levels

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوع لاحظت إن جلدي وبياض عيني اصفرو ببطء. مش عندي ألم ومعاش إسهال. بس عندي تعب وإفرازات بول دكنة. أنا بشرب الحبوب من 6 شهور.
urgency_reason: New jaundice in a young woman on OCP requires urgent LFTs and liver evaluation to assess severity and stop offending agent.
recommended_action: Stop OCP and see gastroenterologist urgently for LFTs, ALP, GGT, hepatitis serology, and ANA; liver ultrasound to exclude biliary obstruction.

INR rising significantly

user_symptom_description: I've had severe diarrhea, stomach cramps, and nausea for the past 18 hours after attending a buffet yesterday evening. Several of my friends who ate the same food are also sick with similar symptoms.

Blood in stool
Neurological symptoms like double vision suggesting botulism

user_symptom_description: عندي 76 سنة وبقالي شهر عندي ضعف في رجلي الاتنين وبتوجعني وعندي صعوبة في المشي. وبحس بنمل في قدميا. عندي ضغط مزمن وسكر.
urgency_reason: Bilateral leg weakness with paresthesia in a diabetic hypertensive requires MRI spine and vascular assessment to direct treatment.
recommended_action: See neurologist within 2 weeks; MRI lumbar spine, nerve conduction study, ABI measurement, and CBC; epidural injection or surgical decompression may be needed.
red_flags: Bladder or bowel incontinence
Rapid progression to inability to walk
Saddle anesthesia

user_symptom_description: I've been vomiting every morning for the past 3 months. It's not just nausea — I bring up yellow-green bile and I feel very weak and light-headed afterward. I'm not pregnant.
urgency_reason: Persistent morning vomiting requires exclusion of metabolic, endocrine, and neurological causes before diagnosing cyclic vomiting.

Significant electrolyte disturbance from vomiting

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين بحس بتنميل وخدران في الوجنتين وحول فمي على الجانبين. وعندي تشنجات في إيديا الاتنين لما بتنفس بسرعة. مش عندي تاريخ مرضي.

Cardiac arrhythmia from hypocalcemia

user_symptom_description: My family says I've been acting very unlike myself since yesterday — I keep picking at my bedsheets, I'm seeing things that aren't there, and I don't know what day it is. I've been on a new antibiotic for a urinary infection.
urgency_reason: Acute delirium in elderly requires emergency evaluation to identify and treat reversible causes and prevent complications.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately; stop suspected causative antibiotic after medical review; review all medications; assess for underlying UTI worsening.

Complete loss of ability to communicate

user_symptom_description: I've been having recurrent nosebleeds almost every day for the past 3 weeks. Each one takes 20-30 minutes to stop. My blood pressure has been very high lately and I'm on aspirin for my heart.
urgency_reason: Recurrent severe epistaxis with uncontrolled hypertension requires urgent blood pressure control and ENT assessment to prevent hemorrhage.

user_symptom_description: ابني عمره 14 سنة وبقاله شهرين بيشكي من وجع في صدره لما بيتنفس عميق وبيزيد لو كان قاعد فترة طويلة. وشاكل كمان كأن صدره زلوع للداخل.

Cardiac arrhythmia detected
Rapid progression of deformity

user_symptom_description: I developed a sudden, very itchy hives reaction all over my body about two hours after taking ibuprofen for a headache. This has happened before with aspirin. I don't have breathing problems.
urgency_reason: Recurrent NSAID hypersensitivity requires formal allergy evaluation and documentation to prevent anaphylaxis in the future.
recommended_action: Take oral antihistamine now; avoid all NSAIDs; see GP for allergy referral; use paracetamol as safe alternative; carry antihistamines.
red_flags: Throat tightening or wheezing developing
Facial swelling
Blood pressure dropping

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهرين بحس بحكة شديدة جداً بالليل خصوصاً على جسمي كله من غير أي طفح. ووزني نزل وعندي عرق ليلي. عمري 69.
urgency_reason: Generalized pruritus with B symptoms (night sweats, weight loss) in an elderly man is lymphoma until proven otherwise.
recommended_action: See GP urgently for CBC, LDH, ESR, renal function, LFTs, and CT chest/abdomen; check for palpable lymphadenopathy.
red_flags: Palpable firm lymph nodes
Rapidly progressive weight loss over 10%
Persistent fever above 38°C

user_symptom_description: I've been feeling incredibly irritable and wired for the past 3 weeks. I'm barely sleeping — maybe 3 hours a night — but I don't feel tired. I've started three new businesses and spent a lot of money impulsively.
extracted_symptoms: decreased need for sleep without fatigue
urgency_reason: Full manic episode with impulsive behavior and sleep reduction requires urgent psychiatric evaluation to prevent dangerous consequences.
recommended_action: Go to psychiatry emergency or see psychiatrist urgently; mood stabilizer initiation needed; thyroid function should be checked.
red_flags: Psychotic features like grandiose delusions
Danger to self or others
Complete inability to sleep for more than 3 days

user_symptom_description: بقالي 3 أيام عندي ألم شديد خلف كعبي الأيمن بيزيد لما بمشي أو أقوم على رأس أصابعي. في ورم واضح هناك. ما فيش إصابة مباشرة بس كنت لعاب تنس.
urgency_reason: Achilles tendon pathology in an active individual requires Thompson test to exclude rupture before physiotherapy is prescribed.
recommended_action: See orthopedist urgently for Thompson test (squeezing calf); if rupture excluded, start eccentric heel drop exercises and load management.
red_flags: Inability to plantarflex against resistance
Sudden pop sensation during activity
Complete loss of push-off power

user_symptom_description: I have been on warfarin for my artificial heart valve for years. This morning I woke up with blood in my urine and I've also noticed some unusual bruising on my thighs. My INR was 4.8 last check.
urgency_reason: Supratherapeutic INR with active bleeding in an anticoagulated patient is an emergency due to risk of intracranial hemorrhage.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately; do not stop warfarin without guidance; IV vitamin K and possible fresh frozen plasma may be needed; do not miss valve thrombosis.
red_flags: Headache or neurological symptoms suggesting intracranial bleed
GI bleeding with hemodynamic compromise
INR above 8

user_symptom_description: My right shoulder has been completely frozen for 4 months. I can barely move it in any direction and the pain is worst at night. It started after I kept my arm in a sling for a fracture. I'm 52 and diabetic.
urgency_reason: Diabetic frozen shoulder has a prolonged course; early physiotherapy and hydrodilatation shorten disability duration.
recommended_action: See orthopedist for shoulder X-ray and MRI; hydrodilatation injection is effective; intensive physiotherapy; optimize glycemic control.
red_flags: Fever suggesting septic arthritis in the joint
Complete inability to use arm
Rapid worsening without prior immobilization trigger

user_symptom_description: بنتي عمرها 13 سنة وبقالها أسبوع عندها دوار شديد وغثيان بعد كل ما بتقرأ في العربية أو بتلعب في الموبايل. وبيجيلها صداع في مقدمة رأسها بعد كده.
urgency_reason: Vestibular migraine in adolescents is benign but requires ophthalmological and neurological assessment to exclude vision and vestibular pathology.
recommended_action: See pediatric neurologist and ophthalmologist for convergence testing; migraine prevention therapy if confirmed; screen use reduction.
red_flags: Hearing loss or tinnitus accompanying vertigo
Vertigo lasting days without resolution
Neurological deficits

user_symptom_description: I've been losing weight over the past three months despite eating more than usual. I also have loose stools every day and feel nervous and shaky. My heart seems to be racing at rest. My neck looks a bit puffy.
urgency_reason: Symptomatic hyperthyroidism with goiter and tachycardia requires urgent thyroid function tests and cardiac monitoring to prevent thyroid storm.
recommended_action: See endocrinologist within 3 days; get TSH, free T3, T4, and TSH receptor antibodies; start beta-blocker for symptom control; avoid iodine.
red_flags: Fever above 38.5°C with extreme agitation (thyroid storm)
Atrial fibrillation on ECG
Eye protrusion with pain or vision loss

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين بحس بضعف في إيدي الاتنين وبيوجعني رقبتي وبيجيلي صدمة كهربا لما بخم رأسي للأسفل. وبصوابع قدميا بتتنمل.
urgency_reason: Lhermitte's sign with bilateral limb involvement indicates cervical cord compression that can lead to permanent paralysis without surgery.
recommended_action: See neurologist urgently; emergency MRI cervical spine; avoid neck manipulation; neurosurgical consultation if cord signal change on MRI.
red_flags: Rapidly progressive weakness in all limbs
Bladder or bowel incontinence
Inability to walk safely from spasticity

user_symptom_description: I've had severe generalized itching all over my body for the past two months — especially bad at night. My skin is not rashed but I've scratched myself raw. I'm 6 months pregnant.
urgency_reason: ICP is associated with sudden intrauterine fetal death; urgent bile acid testing and fetal monitoring are mandatory.
recommended_action: Go to obstetric unit immediately for serum bile acids, LFTs, and fetal CTG monitoring; ursodeoxycholic acid reduces risk; early delivery may be needed.
red_flags: Reduced fetal movements
Jaundice developing
Bile acids above 40 micromol/L indicating high fetal risk

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهرين بيجيلي ألم في بطني الأيمن أعلى بيجي ويروح لمدة ساعة ونص وبيتحسن لوحده. بيزيد بعد الأكل الدسم. مش عندي حمى ولا اصفرار.
urgency_reason: Biliary colic from gallstones will recur with risk of acute cholecystitis; elective cholecystectomy evaluation is warranted.
recommended_action: See GP for abdominal ultrasound and LFTs; if gallstones confirmed, refer to surgeon for elective laparoscopic cholecystectomy discussion.
red_flags: Pain lasting more than 6 hours suggesting acute cholecystitis
Fever developing during an episode
Jaundice appearing with pain

user_symptom_description: I've been feeling lightheaded and my heart seems to be doing random extra beats. I've had diarrhea and vomiting for three days and have barely been able to drink anything. My heart feels very irregular.
urgency_reason: Cardiac arrhythmia from dehydration and likely hypokalemia can progress to ventricular fibrillation requiring immediate IV fluid and electrolyte replacement.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately for ECG, serum potassium, magnesium, and IV fluid resuscitation; cardiac monitoring mandatory until potassium corrected.
red_flags: Sustained tachycardia or bradycardia
Syncope or near-fainting
Muscle paralysis from severe hypokalemia

user_symptom_description: بنتي لاحظت إن ذاكرتي بدأت تضعف منذ سنة وكمان بيجيلي هلاوس — بشوف ناس صغيرة بتتمشى في البيت بالليل. وبيجيلي ارتعاش في جسمي أحياناً.
urgency_reason: Lewy body dementia has dangerous sensitivity to antipsychotic medications; correct diagnosis is critical to prevent life-threatening neuroleptic reactions.
recommended_action: See neurologist urgently; DaTscan and brain MRI; NEVER start typical antipsychotics — they can be fatal in LBD; rivastigmine may help.
red_flags: Fluctuating level of consciousness
Severe Parkinsonian rigidity
Autonomic instability with syncope

user_symptom_description: My skin has been getting progressively tighter on my hands and face over the past year. My fingers are always cold and blue in the cold. I've developed heartburn and find it hard to open my mouth fully.
urgency_reason: Systemic sclerosis with skin tightening and GERD may progress to pulmonary fibrosis and renal crisis requiring early intervention.
recommended_action: See rheumatologist urgently; anti-Scl-70, anticentromere antibodies, HRCT chest, echocardiogram, and renal function monitoring.
red_flags: Sudden severe hypertension suggesting scleroderma renal crisis
Progressive dyspnea from pulmonary fibrosis
Digital gangrene

user_symptom_description: بقالي 3 أيام عندي ألم ووخز في رجلي اليسار من الردف لأسفل القدم. وبحس بضعف في رجلي لما بحاول أرفعها. بيتزود لما بقعد ساعة أو أكتر.
extracted_symptoms: left leg pain from buttock to foot
possible_conditions: Acute Lumbar Disc Herniation with Radiculopathy
primary_condition: Acute Lumbar Disc Herniation with Radiculopathy
urgency_reason: Sciatica with leg weakness suggests L4-L5 or L5-S1 nerve root compression with motor deficit requiring urgent MRI and possible surgical evaluation.
recommended_action: See orthopedist urgently for lumbar MRI; NSAIDs and nerve pain medication; urgent surgical referral if motor deficit worsens.
red_flags: Foot drop
Bladder or bowel dysfunction
Rapidly worsening weakness over days

user_symptom_description: I've had really bad acne on my chin and jaw for the past year. It flares up badly the week before my period. I've also been gaining weight around my middle and my skin is oilier than ever.
urgency_reason: Hormonal acne with central obesity requires hormonal evaluation to exclude PCOS or adrenal pathology before treatment.
recommended_action: See dermatologist and GP for testosterone, DHEAS, LH/FSH ratio, and pelvic ultrasound; anti-androgen therapy or combined OCP is first-line.
red_flags: Rapid onset virilization
Irregular periods with hirsutism
Severe persistent acne unresponsive to all treatment

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوع وأنا بحس بضيق شديد في التنفس من غير أي مجهود وعندي سعال بيطلع مخاط أصفر. عندي سكر وبشرب سجاير 50 سنة. حرارتي 38.2.
urgency_reason: COPD exacerbation with purulent sputum and fever in a diabetic long-term smoker is a medical emergency requiring hospital admission.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; oxygen therapy, IV antibiotics, bronchodilators, and systemic steroids required; admit to hospital.
red_flags: Oxygen saturation below 88%
Paradoxical breathing or use of accessory muscles
