Altered consciousness from CO2 retention

user_symptom_description: I've been having double vision for the past 3 weeks — I see two images side by side. It goes away when I cover one eye. I also have a mild drooping of my right eyelid.
urgency_reason: Third nerve palsy with ptosis may indicate a posterior communicating artery aneurysm at risk of rupture — subarachnoid hemorrhage risk is high.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately for brain CT angiography and MRI; neurosurgical consultation for aneurysm assessment; do not delay.
red_flags: Pupil dilated and unresponsive to light
Severe headache accompanying diplopia
Progressive drowsiness

user_symptom_description: ابني عمره 2 سنة ومن الصبح عنده ألم واضح في بطنه وبيبكي كتير ومبسوطش. ولاحظت إن في حاجة في بطنه اليمين بارزة زي كتلة. وبقى عنده دم في براز لونه زي مربى الفراولة.
urgency_reason: Currant jelly stool with abdominal mass and inconsolable crying in a toddler is intussusception — bowel necrosis occurs within hours without reduction.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; go to pediatric ER; air or contrast enema reduction is the treatment; surgical backup required.
red_flags: Peritoneal signs suggesting perforation
Hemodynamic instability
Bile-stained vomiting with distension

user_symptom_description: I've had a persistent dry cough for 6 weeks that nothing seems to shift. I don't have a cold and I'm not a smoker. I started a new blood pressure tablet about 8 weeks ago and the cough started after that.
urgency_reason: ACE inhibitor cough affects 10-15% of users and resolves within 4 weeks of discontinuation; switching to ARB is the solution.
recommended_action: See GP to confirm and switch from ACE inhibitor to ARB (e.g., losartan); cough should resolve within 4 weeks; chest X-ray if persists.
red_flags: Hemoptysis
Fever with worsening cough
Breathlessness developing

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهر بتقطر بول مني طول اليوم حتى من غير ما أحس. بعرف إن عندي تقدم في السن وعندي تلف في أعصابي من السكر. الدكتور قاللي إن البول بيتجمع ومش بيطلع صح.
urgency_reason: Chronic urinary retention from diabetic neurogenic bladder causes silent renal damage requiring catheterization and urodynamic evaluation.
recommended_action: See urologist for urodynamic study and post-void residual measurement; clean intermittent self-catheterization training; optimize glycemic control.
red_flags: Renal impairment from bilateral hydronephrosis
Recurrent urosepsis
Complete inability to void at all

user_symptom_description: I was in a car accident last week. I have chest pain that's worse with breathing, and my chest looks bruised. The doctor took an X-ray but said it was clear. The pain is sharp and localized.
urgency_reason: Rib fractures can be X-ray-negative; adequate pain control is essential to prevent hypoventilation and pneumonia.
recommended_action: Return to ER or see GP for reassessment; CT chest is more sensitive for rib fractures; adequate analgesia critical; breathing exercises to prevent pneumonia.
red_flags: Progressive shortness of breath suggesting delayed pneumothorax
More than 3 adjacent rib fractures suggesting flail chest
Oxygen saturation falling

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين بحس بوخز ونمل في رجليا الاتنين من الركبة لأصابع القدم، وبيجيلي إحساس مزعج في ساقيا بالليل بيخليني لازم أحركهم طول الوقت عشان أريح.
extracted_symptoms: need to move legs for relief
urgency_reason: RLS significantly disrupts sleep and quality of life; iron deficiency as a cause must be checked and treated first before dopaminergic therapy.
recommended_action: See GP for ferritin, CBC, B12, and folate; iron supplementation if ferritin below 75; neurologist for dopamine agonist if iron normal.
red_flags: Rapid progression to daytime symptoms
Associated leg weakness or objective neurological findings
Symptoms not relieved by movement

user_symptom_description: I have episodes where I feel like I'm going to pass out at the dentist. My pulse drops really low and I get pale and sweaty. It also happens when I see blood or get an injection. I come around quickly.
urgency_reason: Classic vasovagal syncope with identifiable trigger is benign but needs cardiac evaluation to confirm and prevent recurrence.
recommended_action: See GP for ECG to exclude cardiac cause; lie down during triggering procedures; leg raise before triggers; behavioral therapy for needle phobia.
red_flags: Syncope during exercise rather than passive trigger
No prodrome before losing consciousness
Cardiac arrhythmia on ECG

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهرين بحس بتعب شديد جداً حتى لو نمت كويس. ووزني نزل من غير ما أقصد. وعندي عرق بالليل كتير. كنت باعمل فحص دوري قبل سنة وكان كله تمام.
urgency_reason: Constitutional B symptoms with new fatigue in an elderly man with previously normal health require urgent malignancy and TB screening.
recommended_action: See GP urgently for full blood count, LDH, ESR, chest X-ray, CT body, HIV test, TB test, and palpation for lymphadenopathy.
red_flags: Palpable lymph nodes
Bone pain
Respiratory symptoms suggesting mediastinal involvement

user_symptom_description: I've had chronic headaches every single day for the past 4 months. I take over-the-counter painkillers nearly every day to manage them. The headaches have been getting worse, not better, despite taking more medication.
urgency_reason: Medication overuse headache worsens with increased analgesic use; gradual withdrawal with preventive therapy is the only cure.
recommended_action: See neurologist; discuss gradual analgesic withdrawal plan; start preventive migraine therapy; brain MRI to exclude secondary causes.
red_flags: Headache waking from sleep consistently
Progressive neurological deficits
Papilledema on eye exam

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهر عندي ألم وحرقان في جلدي على الجذع من غير ما يبان أي حاجة على الجلد. قبل يومين ظهرت فقاعات صغيرة في نفس المنطقة. مش عندي حمى بس الألم شديد.
urgency_reason: Shingles in a young adult may indicate immunosuppression; antivirals within 72 hours reduce severity and postherpetic neuralgia risk.
recommended_action: See GP today for antiviral prescription; investigate for underlying immunosuppression (HIV, malignancy) given young age; analgesics for pain.
red_flags: Rash spreading to face or eye area
Progressive weakness in limbs near rash
Signs of immunosuppression like recurrent infections

user_symptom_description: I'm 35 weeks pregnant and have been having contractions every 7 minutes for the past 2 hours. My bag of waters may have broken as I felt a sudden gush. My baby hasn't moved as much today.
urgency_reason: Preterm labor with membrane rupture at 35 weeks and reduced fetal movement requires immediate obstetric evaluation for fetal wellbeing.
recommended_action: Call emergency services and go to labor and delivery immediately; do not put anything in vagina; fetal monitoring and steroids for lung maturity may be needed.
red_flags: Heavy vaginal bleeding
Cord prolapse visible at introitus
Complete cessation of fetal movement

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين بحس بحرقان وألم في جلدي تحت الإبط في اليمين وفيه طفح أحمر واضح. بيوجعني جداً وبعض الجلد بيلمع. عندي ضغط سكر.
urgency_reason: Intertriginous candidiasis in a diabetic requires topical antifungal treatment and glycemic optimization to prevent recurrence.
recommended_action: See GP for topical clotrimazole or miconazole cream; keep area dry; optimize blood sugar; check HbA1c; recurrent cases may need oral fluconazole.
red_flags: Fever suggesting systemic candidiasis
Rapidly spreading redness
Very high blood sugar indicating DKA

user_symptom_description: I've been losing my balance and falling to the left repeatedly over the past 2 weeks. My handwriting has become terrible and my arm movements feel jerky and overshooting when I reach for things.
urgency_reason: Progressive cerebellar ataxia requires urgent brain MRI to exclude posterior fossa stroke, tumor, or demyelinating disease.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately for brain MRI with contrast and posterior fossa sequences; neurology consultation urgent.
red_flags: Sudden onset of ataxia rather than progressive
Accompanying headache and vomiting
Rapid worsening over hours

user_symptom_description: بقالي 4 أيام بعاني من إسهال مائي ومعوي شديد. ما فيه دم لكن بيجيلي تشنجات في بطني كل شوية. كنت في رحلة خارج البلد ورجعت الأسبوع اللي فات.
urgency_reason: Post-travel diarrhea lasting 4 days requires stool testing to exclude giardia, cryptosporidium, and parasites beyond typical ETEC.
recommended_action: See GP for stool microscopy, culture, and parasites; start azithromycin or ciprofloxacin if severe; aggressive oral rehydration.
red_flags: Blood in stool appearing
Fever above 38.5°C
Signs of severe dehydration with dizziness

user_symptom_description: I've had a persistent ringing in my right ear that started two weeks ago. It's constant, high-pitched, and I think my hearing has gotten worse on that side. No pain, no vertigo.
urgency_reason: Unilateral progressive hearing loss with tinnitus requires urgent MRI to exclude acoustic neuroma while there is still a treatment window.
recommended_action: See ENT urgently for audiometry; MRI internal auditory canals with gadolinium; early detection enables nerve-sparing microsurgery or radiosurgery.
red_flags: Rapid hearing loss over days suggesting sudden SNHL requiring steroids
Facial weakness suggesting large neuroma
Balance deterioration

user_symptom_description: بقالي 3 أيام عندي ألم شديد في رأسي الجانب الأيسر وبيجيلي غثيان وبتقيأ. بشوف ضبابي في عيني الشمال من مبارح وعندي ضغط مزمن. عمري 73.
urgency_reason: Severe headache with visual changes and vomiting in an elderly hypertensive patient is a hypertensive emergency with possible intracranial hemorrhage.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; do not take extra BP medication without medical supervision; urgent CT head, BP measurement, and neuro assessment needed.
red_flags: BP above 220/120 mmHg
Focal neurological deficit
Loss of consciousness

user_symptom_description: I have a rash that's been spreading around my waist for the past month. It's ring-shaped with a clear center and the border keeps moving outward. It's mildly itchy. I live in a wooded area.
urgency_reason: Expanding erythema migrans from Lyme disease requires prompt doxycycline to prevent disseminated neurological and cardiac Lyme disease.
recommended_action: See GP today; erythema migrans is a clinical diagnosis — start doxycycline immediately without waiting for serology; photograph the rash.
red_flags: Heart palpitations or syncope
Facial nerve palsy
Severe joint swelling developing

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهر بيجيلي ألم في قلبي لما ببص للأسفل أو ببص على الموبايل لفترة. وبيجيلي تصلب في رقبتي. شاب وبشتغل على الكمبيوتر 12 ساعة في اليوم.
urgency_reason: Occupational cervical overuse is common and responds to ergonomic correction and physiotherapy; neurological signs must be excluded.
recommended_action: See GP and physiotherapist; immediate ergonomic workstation correction; screen at eye level; cervical exercises; take regular breaks.
red_flags: Arm numbness or weakness suggesting radiculopathy
Lhermitte's sign
Rapid worsening with any neurological deficit

user_symptom_description: I've been coughing for 3 months now, the cough is dry, and I have increasing shortness of breath especially at night. My legs are swollen and I have to use 3 pillows to sleep. I've gained 4 kg in 2 weeks.
urgency_reason: Orthopnea with rapid weight gain and bilateral edema indicates acute decompensated heart failure requiring immediate diuresis.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; sit upright; go to ER for IV furosemide, BNP, chest X-ray, and echocardiogram.
red_flags: Pink frothy sputum
Oxygen saturation below 90%
Cyanosis of lips or fingernails

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوع بحس بضعف في قدمي اليسار وبيوقعني. بسمع طقطقة في مفصل كعبي اليسار لما بمشي. وعندي تنميل في القدم اليسار. ما فيش رضة.
urgency_reason: New foot drop requires urgent evaluation to determine cause and prevent permanent nerve damage from compression or demyelination.
recommended_action: See neurologist urgently for EMG and nerve conduction study; MRI lumbar spine; ankle-foot orthosis to prevent falls immediately.
red_flags: Bilateral foot drop
Bowel or bladder dysfunction
Rapid progression suggesting cord lesion

user_symptom_description: My 5-year-old has been wetting the bed every night even though she was dry for over a year. She's also been very thirsty, drinking huge amounts, and seems more tired than usual lately.
urgency_reason: Secondary enuresis with polydipsia in a previously dry child is new-onset T1DM until proven otherwise; DKA can be fatal without emergency treatment.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately for blood glucose; if high, full DKA protocol with IV insulin and fluids; do not give oral glucose drinks.
red_flags: Rapid deep breathing
Vomiting with abdominal pain
Fruity breath or altered consciousness

user_symptom_description: I've noticed that I feel extremely hot while everyone else feels fine, and I've been having hot flashes with intense sweating throughout the day and especially at night. My periods have become irregular. I'm 48.
urgency_reason: Perimenopausal symptoms are common and manageable; thyroid function should be checked to exclude hyperthyroidism as a concurrent cause.
recommended_action: See GP for FSH, LH, TSH, and estradiol; discuss hormone replacement therapy or alternatives; lifestyle modifications and CBT for hot flashes.
red_flags: Severe anxiety with hypertension suggesting phaeochromocytoma
Facial flushing with diarrhea suggesting carcinoid
Symptoms in a younger woman under 40

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهرين بحس بثقل وضغط في صدري الأيسر بيجيلي لما بتوتر أو بحرك حاجة تقيلة وبيروح بعد دقيقتين من الراحة. عندي سكر وكولسترول وبشرب سجاير.
urgency_reason: Stable angina in a diabetic smoker with multiple risk factors requires urgent cardiac workup to prevent progression to ACS.
recommended_action: See cardiologist urgently; stress ECG or nuclear stress test and angiogram assessment; start aspirin, statin, and beta-blocker if confirmed.
red_flags: Angina at rest or lasting more than 20 minutes
Worsening episodes with lower threshold triggers
Associated diaphoresis or nausea

user_symptom_description: I've developed a really noticeable tremor in both my hands over the past 6 months. It's worse when I try to hold things or pour a drink — not when my hands are at rest. It runs in my family.
urgency_reason: Essential tremor is benign but progressive; propranolol or primidone can significantly improve function and quality of life.
recommended_action: See neurologist for clinical assessment; propranolol is first-line if tremor is functionally impairing; review any medications that worsen tremor.
red_flags: Resting tremor developing suggesting Parkinsonism
Rapid progression to head or voice tremor
Associated cerebellar signs

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوع عندي التهاب واحمرار حول ضفر إبهام قدمي الأيمن مع ألم وتورم وبدأ يخرج منه إفراز صفراء. الظفر زلط في جسمي.
urgency_reason: Infected ingrown toenail with purulent discharge requires drainage and possible nail avulsion to prevent spreading cellulitis.
recommended_action: See GP for assessment; partial nail avulsion under local anesthesia and oral antibiotics; teach proper nail cutting technique to prevent recurrence.
red_flags: Red streaking spreading up the foot
Fever
Diabetic patient with any foot infection

user_symptom_description: I've been feeling increasingly short of breath and my doctor told me my hemoglobin is only 7. I'm very pale, have no energy to do anything, and my heart seems to race even just walking around the house.
urgency_reason: Hemoglobin of 7 with cardiac symptoms from anemia requires emergency blood transfusion and urgent investigation for cause.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately for blood transfusion assessment; urgent investigation for source of anemia including GI bleeding, hemolysis, and bone marrow pathology.
red_flags: Angina or cardiac ischemia precipitated by anemia
Hemoglobin falling below 6
Evidence of active bleeding

user_symptom_description: بقالي 3 أسابيع بحس بألم في ركبتي اليمين من الناحية الداخلية بيتزود لما أقطع أو أنزل السلم. ما فيش إصابة بس بدأت أشتغل في بلاط. الركبة ورمت شوية.
extracted_symptoms: pain with squatting and descending stairs
urgency_reason: Medial knee pain with functional limitation from a new occupational load requires MRI to assess meniscal integrity.
recommended_action: See orthopedist for knee examination and MRI; temporary work modification; physiotherapy for quadriceps strengthening; arthroscopy if tear confirmed.
red_flags: Locked knee unable to fully extend
Significant joint effusion
Inability to bear weight at all

user_symptom_description: My 16-year-old has been eating enormous amounts of food but losing weight rapidly. He's always thirsty, urinating constantly, and feels exhausted. He's been vomiting since yesterday.
urgency_reason: New-onset T1DM with vomiting in an adolescent is DKA until proven otherwise — cerebral edema during treatment is the leading cause of DKA mortality in children.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; go to pediatric ER for glucose, blood gas, ketones; controlled IV insulin and fluid protocol for DKA.
red_flags: Rapid deep breathing (Kussmaul)
Altered consciousness
Blood glucose above 30 mmol/L with large ketones

user_symptom_description: أنا 38 سنة وبحس بألم شديد في صدري على اليسار بيجيلي مرات كثيرة، وبشوف بيجيلي قبله خدران في إيدي الشمال. الألم مدته نص ساعة ويروح. آخر مرة كان أشد.
urgency_reason: Crescendo pattern chest pain with arm numbness in a 38-year-old woman is unstable angina until proven otherwise — high risk of imminent MI.
recommended_action: Call emergency services or go to ER immediately; ECG, troponin, and cardiac monitoring urgent; aspirin 300mg if not allergic.
red_flags: Pain at rest for more than 20 minutes
Diaphoresis or syncope
ST changes on ECG

user_symptom_description: I've started falling asleep suddenly and without warning during the day — while eating, talking mid-sentence, or once even while driving. I also have very vivid dreams right when I fall asleep. I'm 67.
extracted_symptoms: sleep attacks during eating and talking
urgency_reason: Sudden-onset sleep attacks while driving are an immediate road safety emergency requiring immediate driving cessation and urgent evaluation.
recommended_action: Stop driving immediately; see neurologist urgently for MSLT (Multiple Sleep Latency Test) and polysomnography; review all sedating medications.
red_flags: Cataplexy with sudden muscle weakness triggered by laughter
Driving incidents
Sleep attacks in water (swimming, bathing)

user_symptom_description: بقالي 10 أيام بيجيلي وجع في بطني الأسفل وأنا بتبوّل وبتبوّل كتير. جربت دواء من الصيدلية ما نفعش. وبقى عندي حرارة خفيفة من يومين.
urgency_reason: Persistent UTI with fever after failed treatment may indicate upper urinary tract involvement or resistant organism requiring culture-guided antibiotics.
recommended_action: See GP urgently for midstream urine culture; reassess antibiotic choice; renal ultrasound if upper tract involvement suspected; STI screen.
red_flags: Flank pain with high fever suggesting pyelonephritis
Rigors indicating bacteremia
Inability to tolerate oral fluids

user_symptom_description: I have constant pain under my right foot when I take my first steps in the morning. After a few minutes of walking it eases up, but comes back after I've been sitting for a while. I've gained weight recently.
extracted_symptoms: plantar heel pain worse with first steps
urgency_reason: Classic plantar fasciitis is a common benign condition responding well to stretching and orthotic support; no urgency.
recommended_action: See physiotherapist for plantar fascia stretching program; supportive footwear with heel cushion; weight reduction; night splint for persistent cases.
red_flags: Constant severe pain at rest not relieved by anything
Neurological symptoms in the foot
Non-healing wound on the heel

user_symptom_description: بنتي قالت إن عندي كحة جافة مستمرة من شهرين ووزني نزل ومش بنام كويس من كتر التعرق بالليل. ما بشربش سجاير بس عندي قطة في البيت.
possible_conditions: Cat Scratch Disease with Pulmonary Involvement
urgency_reason: Constitutional B symptoms with chronic cough in elderly requires urgent TB evaluation; active TB is a public health emergency.
recommended_action: See GP urgently for chest X-ray, sputum AFB smear and culture, IGRA or Mantoux test, and isolation precautions if TB suspected.
red_flags: Hemoptysis
Cavitation on chest X-ray
Household contacts developing similar symptoms

user_symptom_description: I've been having very dark thoughts lately and thinking that my family would be better off without me. I've been planning how I might end my life. I feel completely hopeless and see no way forward.
possible_conditions: Major Depressive Disorder with Suicidal Ideation
primary_condition: Major Depressive Disorder with Suicidal Ideation
urgency_reason: Active suicidal ideation with a plan is a psychiatric emergency requiring immediate crisis intervention to preserve life.
recommended_action: Call emergency services or go to psychiatric ER immediately; do not leave person alone; remove access to means; crisis line: in Egypt, call 08008880700.
red_flags: Specific plan and access to means
Previous suicide attempt
Giving away possessions or saying goodbyes

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوع عندي ألم شديد في رجلي اليمين بعد كسر كنت عاملاه منذ 6 أسابيع. الجبيرة اتشالت الأسبوع اللي فات بس الألم أشد من أي وقت. ورجلي الوان.
urgency_reason: CRPS after fracture is a debilitating condition that responds better to early treatment; delayed diagnosis leads to permanent functional loss.
recommended_action: See orthopedist urgently; triple phase bone scan and MRI; start physiotherapy immediately; gabapentin, vitamin C, and mirror therapy are evidence-based.
red_flags: Progressive spreading of pain and skin changes to entire limb
Complete loss of limb function
Trophic changes like hair and nail abnormalities

user_symptom_description: My right hand has been weak for the past month — I can't grip things properly and I keep dropping things. My thumb muscles look thinner than the left side. I work as a carpenter.
possible_conditions: Severe Carpal Tunnel Syndrome with Nerve Damage
primary_condition: Severe Carpal Tunnel Syndrome with Nerve Damage
urgency_reason: Thenar muscle wasting indicates severe median nerve compression with axonal damage requiring urgent surgical decompression to prevent permanent loss.
recommended_action: See orthopedist urgently for nerve conduction study and EMG; surgical carpal tunnel release is urgent when thenar atrophy is present.
red_flags: Rapid progression of wasting to other hand muscles
Upper motor neuron signs suggesting MND
Bilateral involvement

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهر بيجيلي ألم في مفاصل كتافي وردفي الصبح وأصحى على ألم. بيخدلي ساعتين عشان أتحرك بشكل طبيعي. وعندي إرهاق وحمى خفيفة مساءً. عمري 68.
urgency_reason: PMR in elderly must be urgently assessed for concurrent giant cell arteritis which can cause permanent blindness within days.
recommended_action: See rheumatologist urgently; ESR, CRP, CBC, and temporal artery assessment; prednisolone produces dramatic improvement; monitor for visual symptoms.
red_flags: Jaw pain when chewing
Temporal headache or scalp tenderness
Any visual disturbance — treat as emergency

user_symptom_description: I've had recurring painful ulcers on my genitals and inside my mouth at the same time, and both my eyes have been red and painful. I've had these episodes 3 times this year.
urgency_reason: Behcet's disease with ocular involvement can cause blindness; uveitis requires urgent ophthalmic assessment and immunosuppressive therapy.
recommended_action: See rheumatologist urgently; ophthalmology evaluation same day for uveitis; HLA-B51 testing; colchicine and immunosuppressants are mainstays.
red_flags: Sudden vision loss from retinal vasculitis
Neurological Behcet's with headache and focal signs
Vascular Behcet's with DVT or arterial aneurysm

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهرين بيجيلي صداع خلف رأسي بيزيد لما بضغط على بطني أو بعطس. وأحياناً بحس بوخز في إيديا. ما عنديش رضة.
urgency_reason: Valsalva-triggered occipital headache with arm paresthesia is classic Chiari I malformation requiring MRI and neurosurgical evaluation.
recommended_action: See neurologist urgently; brain and cervical spine MRI with CSF flow study; neurosurgical decompression if cerebellar tonsil herniation confirmed.
red_flags: Progressive arm or leg weakness
Swallowing difficulty
Scoliosis developing rapidly

user_symptom_description: I punched a wall in anger two days ago and now my hand is swollen and bruised at the knuckles. My ring finger looks crooked and I can't make a fist properly.
urgency_reason: Metacarpal fracture requires X-ray to assess angulation; more than 40 degrees angulation needs surgical correction.
recommended_action: Go to urgent care for hand X-ray; buddy strap and ulnar gutter splint if angulation acceptable; hand surgery referral if significantly displaced.
red_flags: Rotational deformity of the finger
Open wound over knuckle from human bite
Neurovascular compromise of the finger

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين بحس بضربات قلب غير منتظمة طول اليوم مع دوار. دكتور القلب قالي من زمان إن عندي اتساع في الأذين الأيسر. ما بحسش بضيق في التنفس.
urgency_reason: New atrial fibrillation in an elderly patient with left atrial enlargement requires anticoagulation to prevent stroke and rhythm control evaluation.
recommended_action: Go to urgent cardiology or ER for ECG confirmation; start anticoagulation if not contraindicated; rate control with beta-blocker; CHA2DS2-VASc score assessment.
red_flags: Hemodynamically unstable AF requiring cardioversion
Rapid ventricular response above 150 bpm
New heart failure symptoms

user_symptom_description: I started a new job where I stand for 8 hours a day. Over the past month my lower legs have swollen by the end of each day, I have achy legs, and bulging veins have become more visible.
possible_conditions: Varicose Veins with Chronic Venous Insufficiency
primary_condition: Varicose Veins with Chronic Venous Insufficiency
urgency_reason: Occupational CVI is common and manageable with compression and lifestyle changes; DVT must be excluded if swelling is unilateral.
recommended_action: See GP for venous Doppler if unilateral; grade 2 compression stockings during work; regular walking breaks; leg elevation at end of day.
red_flags: Sudden unilateral swelling with calf pain suggesting DVT
Skin ulceration or breakdown
Increasing warmth with erythema

user_symptom_description: بقالي 3 أسابيع بحس بثقل وألم في خصيتي اليمين والمنطقة دي بتكبر ببطء. مش عندي حمى ولا ألم شديد. عمري 24 سنة.
urgency_reason: Painless progressive testicular enlargement in a young man is testicular cancer until proven otherwise; early orchiectomy is curative.
recommended_action: See urologist urgently for scrotal ultrasound and serum tumor markers (AFP, beta-hCG, LDH); do not delay for biopsy — radical orchiectomy is diagnostic.
red_flags: Rapid increase in testicular size
Back pain suggesting retroperitoneal lymph node metastases
Gynecomastia or breast tenderness

user_symptom_description: I've been having terrible cramps in my calves every night for the past 3 months, mostly in my right leg. They wake me from sleep and last several minutes. I've been taking a diuretic for blood pressure.
urgency_reason: Diuretic-induced electrolyte imbalance is a common and correctable cause of muscle cramps requiring blood testing.
recommended_action: See GP for serum magnesium, potassium, sodium, and calcium; magnesium and potassium supplementation if deficient; review diuretic need and dose.
red_flags: Cardiac arrhythmia with electrolyte abnormalities
Severe muscle weakness accompanying cramps
Signs of dehydration

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهر عندي آلام شديدة في عظامي خصوصاً في الضلوع والظهر والحوض. وبقيت فقير في الدم وكلاوي بتعبت. عمري 71 سنة.
urgency_reason: Triad of bone pain, anemia, and renal impairment in elderly is myeloma until proven otherwise; hypercalcemia may require urgent treatment.
recommended_action: Go to ER for urgent SPEP, urine Bence-Jones protein, serum free light chains, calcium, creatinine, and skeletal survey; hematology referral.
red_flags: Hypercalcemia causing confusion or coma
Spinal cord compression from vertebral lesion
Acute kidney injury requiring dialysis

user_symptom_description: I've been experiencing episodes of intense abdominal pain lasting 3-5 days happening almost monthly. During the attacks I vomit constantly and nothing helps. Between attacks I feel completely normal. I'm 25.
urgency_reason: Monthly severe colic with vomiting in a young woman requires urgent porphyria screen as triggers like medications can precipitate fatal attacks.
recommended_action: See GP urgently during an acute attack for urine porphobilinogen; between attacks get AIP gene panel; avoid triggers: alcohol, fasting, hormonal medications.
red_flags: Neurological symptoms like seizures or weakness during attack
Dark red/brown urine during attack
Severe hyponatremia with attack

user_symptom_description: بقالي يومين عندي ألم شديد في بطني الأيمن أعلى يزيد بالتنفس وعندي قشعريرة وحرارة 39.5. جلدي بدأ يبان أصفر اليوم.
urgency_reason: Charcot's triad of RUQ pain, fever with rigors, and jaundice is acute cholangitis — a surgical emergency with 10% mortality without biliary decompression.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately; IV antibiotics, blood cultures, ERCP for biliary drainage are emergency interventions; Tokyo severity scoring needed.
red_flags: Hypotension suggesting septic shock (Reynold's pentad)
Altered mental status
Rapidly worsening jaundice

user_symptom_description: My husband says I've been grinding my teeth at night for months and it's so loud it wakes him up. My jaw is sore every morning and two of my teeth have cracked. I've been very stressed at work.
urgency_reason: Bruxism causing dental fractures requires prompt dental evaluation and occlusal splint fabrication to prevent further dental damage.
recommended_action: See dentist for custom occlusal guard; stress management with CBT; check for obstructive sleep apnea; review any medications causing bruxism.
red_flags: Daytime jaw locking or inability to open fully
Severe TMJ pain radiating to ear
Symptoms in a younger person with neurological signs

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهرين أحس بألم موجع في منطقة الفخذ ونزل لركبتي الأيمن. الألم بيزيد لما بدير رجلي للداخل. بقالي يومين بيصعب علي أمشي.
urgency_reason: Groin pain with internal rotation restriction may indicate AVN of femoral head — collapse occurs if undetected and untreated, requiring total hip replacement.
recommended_action: See orthopedist urgently for hip X-ray and MRI (most sensitive for early AVN); identify risk factors (steroids, alcohol, sickle cell); core decompression surgery if early stage.
red_flags: Sudden inability to weight bear from collapse
Bilateral hip symptoms
Risk factors like high-dose steroid use or alcoholism

user_symptom_description: My 4-year-old has been crying and holding his belly for the past 6 hours. He's been vomiting and when I press the right lower part of his belly he screams. He stopped eating since yesterday.
urgency_reason: Peritoneal tenderness with vomiting and anorexia in a toddler with 6-hour history is appendicitis until excluded — perforation risk increases every hour.
recommended_action: Go to pediatric ER immediately; nothing by mouth; urgent surgical consultation, CBC, CRP, and ultrasound; CT scan if ultrasound inconclusive.
red_flags: Abdomen becoming rigid and board-like
Child suddenly quieting after extreme pain — may indicate perforation
High fever with rapid deterioration

user_symptom_description: من شهرين وأنا بحس بكتل صلبة في إبطي الأيمن مش بتوجعني بس بتكبر. قبل 6 شهور عملت جراحة لاستئصال ورم في نفس الثدي الأيمن.
urgency_reason: Progressive axillary lymphadenopathy after ipsilateral breast surgery is metastatic recurrence until proven otherwise requiring immediate oncology evaluation.
recommended_action: Go to breast oncology or ER urgently; lymph node biopsy, CT staging scan, and oncology consultation needed immediately; do not delay.
red_flags: Skin changes on breast or chest wall
Arm lymphedema developing
Systemic symptoms like bone pain or breathlessness

user_symptom_description: I've been getting severe cramp-like pain in my left calf when I walk about 50 meters. I have to stop and the pain disappears after resting. My foot sometimes feels cold and looks pale. I'm 74.
urgency_reason: Short claudication distance with cold pale foot in elderly man indicates severe PAD with limb-threatening ischemia requiring vascular intervention.
recommended_action: Go to vascular surgery or ER urgently for ABI, CTA angiography, and limb salvage assessment; revascularization or angioplasty may be needed.
red_flags: Rest pain in foot especially at night
Non-healing ulcer on toe or foot
Black or gangrenous toes

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين بيجيلي صداع خلف عيني الشمال مع رؤية ضبابية لدقائق وبعدين بيرجع. الصداع بيكون على الجانب ونص بيزيد بالحركة.
urgency_reason: Transient monocular visual loss requires urgent evaluation to exclude amaurosis fugax from carotid embolism even in a young adult.
recommended_action: See neurologist urgently; carotid Doppler, ECG, and echocardiogram to exclude vascular cause; ophthalmology for ocular pressure; MRI brain.
red_flags: Visual loss lasting more than 30 minutes
Associated limb weakness or speech disturbance
Recurrence increasing in frequency

user_symptom_description: I've developed severe frostbite on three fingers on my right hand after being caught in a blizzard for 2 hours. The fingers are white, hard, and completely numb. They started to look blue at the tips.
urgency_reason: Deep frostbite with tissue cyanosis requires emergency rapid rewarming in 37-39°C water to salvage digits before irreversible tissue death.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately; do not rub or massage; rapid rewarming in 37-39°C water in hospital setting; ibuprofen and thrombolytics within 24 hours.
red_flags: Black eschar forming indicating full tissue death
Blistering with hemorrhagic fluid
Systemic hypothermia

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين بحس بإرهاق شديد وضيق نفس حتى في الراحة. بالليل بصحي من النوم لأني مبهورة. رجليا ورمانة والأدوية اللي بآخدها للقلب مش بتشتغل زي زمان.
urgency_reason: Decompensated heart failure refractory to outpatient medications requires emergency hospital admission for IV diuresis and advanced therapy.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; sit upright; go to ER for IV furosemide, BNP, echo, and possibly IV inotropes; ICU admission may be needed.
red_flags: Oxygen saturation below 88%
Pink frothy sputum
Confusion or altered consciousness from poor cardiac output

user_symptom_description: I was playing squash and suddenly felt a loud pop in my right knee followed by immediate swelling. I couldn't continue playing and my knee feels very unstable, like it might give way when I try to walk.
urgency_reason: Acute ACL rupture with hemarthrosis requires urgent assessment to plan surgical reconstruction and prevent secondary meniscal and cartilage damage.
recommended_action: Go to urgent care for knee X-ray to exclude fracture; RICE protocol; MRI knee within one week; refer to sports orthopedic surgeon for reconstruction planning.
red_flags: Knee locked in flexion unable to extend
Neurovascular compromise with cold or numb foot
Tibial fracture on X-ray

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين بحس بحرقة في صدري بعد الأكل خصوصاً لو اتمددت، وبيجيلي طعم حامض في بقي وبلاقي نفسي بتعب وأنا نايمة أحياناً.
urgency_reason: Typical GERD presentation without alarm features; lifestyle modification and PPI therapy are first-line before further workup.
recommended_action: Start omeprazole 20mg before breakfast for 4 weeks; avoid lying down 3 hours after meals; elevate bed head; follow up if no improvement.
red_flags: Difficulty or pain swallowing solids
Unintentional weight loss
Black or tarry stools

user_symptom_description: I am 78 and I've been forgetting where I put things more than usual, but last week I forgot my daughter's name for a moment and got lost walking home from the corner store I've used for years.
urgency_reason: New disorientation in familiar surroundings and loss of close family names suggests progressing cognitive decline requiring formal neuropsychological assessment.
recommended_action: Schedule geriatric neurology appointment within 2 weeks; MMSE and MoCA cognitive tests; MRI brain; consider carer safety supervision at home.
red_flags: Getting lost inside his own home
Leaving gas on or fire hazards unattended
Sudden personality change or aggression

user_symptom_description: My 3-year-old woke up at 2am making a barking cough sound and her breathing was noisy, like a seal. She had a mild cold for two days before this. She looks scared and is breathing faster than normal.
urgency_reason: Stridor at rest with respiratory distress and tachypnea in a toddler warrants urgent evaluation to exclude severe croup or epiglottitis requiring airway management.
recommended_action: Go to pediatric ER now; cool mist or night air may help en route; dexamethasone and nebulized epinephrine if stridor at rest; monitor oxygen saturation.
red_flags: Drooling or inability to swallow saliva
Child sitting forward unable to lie flat
Oxygen saturation below 92%

user_symptom_description: أنا عندي 28 سنة وبقالي شهر بحس بألم في أسفل ضهري لما بقعد أو بوقف كتير، بيروح لو اتمددت. بشتغل على كمبيوتر 8 ساعات في اليوم.
urgency_reason: Postural low back pain in a young adult with clear occupational trigger and no neurological features is a mechanical problem manageable conservatively.
recommended_action: Ergonomic workstation adjustment; NSAIDs for 5 days; physiotherapy referral; core-strengthening exercises; reassess in 4 weeks if no improvement.
red_flags: Leg weakness or foot drop
Numbness in the groin or inner thighs
Loss of bladder or bowel control

user_symptom_description: I've had a widespread red itchy rash for the past 3 days after starting a new antibiotic. The rash started on my chest and spread to my arms and back. No trouble breathing but it's very uncomfortable.
urgency_reason: Drug rashes must be evaluated to exclude early Stevens-Johnson syndrome, which requires prompt antibiotic discontinuation and monitoring.
recommended_action: Stop the antibiotic immediately and contact prescribing doctor; take oral antihistamine for itch; attend dermatology or GP within 24 hours; photograph the rash.
red_flags: Blistering or skin peeling
Mouth sores or eye redness
Facial swelling or difficulty breathing

user_symptom_description: بقالي 3 أيام بحس بألم في بطني الجانب الأيمن من فوق وبيجيلي غثيان بعد الأكل خصوصاً لو أكلت أكل دسم. الألم أحياناً بيوصل لكتفي الأيمن.
urgency_reason: Persistent RUQ pain with shoulder radiation and nausea in an elderly woman suggests acute cholecystitis requiring urgent imaging and surgical consultation.
recommended_action: Go to ER today for abdominal ultrasound, CBC, LFTs, and lipase; IV fluids and antibiotics if cholecystitis confirmed; surgical consult for cholecystectomy timing.
red_flags: High fever with rigors suggesting cholangitis
Jaundice or yellow skin
Severe pain not relieved with analgesia

user_symptom_description: I've been feeling really low and empty for about two months. I don't enjoy anything anymore, even things I used to love. I sleep too much but still feel exhausted and I've been missing work.
urgency_reason: Functional impairment from a 2-month depressive episode with anhedonia and hypersomnia warrants prompt psychiatric evaluation and treatment initiation.
recommended_action: Schedule psychiatry appointment within one week; TSH blood test to exclude thyroid cause; safe environment check; CBT referral alongside medication assessment.
red_flags: Thoughts of self-harm or suicide
Complete inability to care for oneself
Psychotic symptoms like hallucinations

user_symptom_description: عندي 45 سنة وصحيت الصبح ولقيت إيدي الشمال تنمل وضعيفة وبقي شايل شوية. دلوقتي أحسن بس مكملتش أكتر من ساعة تقريباً. معايا ضغط.
urgency_reason: TIA is a stroke warning with highest recurrence risk in 24-48 hours; hypertensive patient with motor and speech symptoms requires same-day emergency evaluation.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately even though symptoms resolved; MRI DWI, carotid Doppler, ECG, and echocardiogram; start aspirin 300mg now unless contraindicated; admit for monitoring.
red_flags: Symptom recurrence or progression to permanent deficit
Sudden severe headache
Loss of consciousness or seizure

user_symptom_description: My 8-year-old has had wheezing and a tight chest since yesterday. He uses his inhaler but it barely helps this time. He's been coughing all night and it's worse than his usual asthma.
urgency_reason: Poor response to reliever inhaler with nocturnal symptoms indicates moderate-to-severe asthma exacerbation requiring medical assessment and possible systemic steroids.
recommended_action: Go to pediatric ER; 2-4 puffs salbutamol via spacer every 20 min en route; oral prednisolone; check oxygen saturation; chest X-ray to exclude pneumonia.
red_flags: Accessory muscle use or nasal flaring
Oxygen saturation below 92%
Inability to speak in full sentences

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهرين بحس بتعب شديد وعندي سعال جاف ما بيروحش وبلاقي نفسي بيضيق لما بصعد السلم. دخنت 30 سنة وبطلت من 5 سنين.
urgency_reason: Chronic dyspnea with significant smoking history requires spirometry and chest imaging to establish COPD severity and exclude malignancy.
recommended_action: Schedule pulmonology appointment within 2 weeks; spirometry, chest CT, and 6-minute walk test; sputum cytology; low-dose CT lung cancer screening given smoking history.
red_flags: Hemoptysis
Unintentional weight loss over 5kg
Hoarseness of voice persisting over 3 weeks

user_symptom_description: I've had painful red bumps on my face and chest for years but the last two months they've gotten cystic, deep, and leave dark scars. Over-the-counter creams do nothing for them.
urgency_reason: Severe cystic acne with scarring requires dermatological management to prevent permanent disfigurement, but is not medically urgent.
recommended_action: Book dermatology appointment; topical retinoid and benzoyl peroxide bridge; discuss oral isotretinoin candidacy; baseline LFTs and lipids before isotretinoin.
red_flags: Rapidly spreading cellulitis around lesions
Fever with tender lymph nodes
Vision changes if isotretinoin started

user_symptom_description: أنا حامل في الشهر السابع وبقالي يومين حاسة بضغط شديد في رأسي وشفتي منتفخة وعيني بتعمل بيضان. بقيسي الضغط وطالع 160/110.
urgency_reason: BP 160/110 with headache and visual symptoms at 28 weeks is severe preeclampsia with imminent eclampsia risk requiring immediate obstetric admission.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; lie on left side; go to obstetric emergency for IV magnesium sulfate, antihypertensives, fetal monitoring, and delivery planning.
red_flags: Seizure onset
Epigastric pain suggesting HELLP
Absent fetal movements

user_symptom_description: I've been urinating much more than usual — maybe 10 times a day — and I'm constantly thirsty no matter how much I drink. I've lost about 5kg in the past month without trying.
urgency_reason: Classic triad of polyuria, polydipsia, and rapid weight loss in an adult suggests new-onset diabetes with possible diabetic ketoacidosis requiring same-day blood glucose check.
recommended_action: Go to GP or urgent care today for fasting glucose, HbA1c, and urine ketones; if glucose above 300 or ketones positive, go to ER immediately for DKA workup.
red_flags: Vomiting or abdominal pain with fruity breath
Confusion or altered consciousness
Rapid deep breathing

user_symptom_description: وقعت من السلم النهارده الصبح وبحس بألم شديد في ورك أيماني ومش قادرة أمشي. رجلي الأيمن حاسة إنها أقصر من الشمال.
urgency_reason: Limb shortening with inability to weight-bear after a fall in an elderly woman is a hip fracture until proven otherwise and requires emergency surgical fixation.
recommended_action: Call emergency services; do not attempt to stand or walk; ER for X-ray pelvis and hip; urgent orthopedic surgical consult for hemiarthroplasty or DHS fixation.
red_flags: Signs of blood loss such as hypotension or pallor
Neurovascular compromise with cold numb foot
Associated head injury from the fall

user_symptom_description: I've been having a burning feeling when I urinate for 3 days and I need to go urgently all the time even when my bladder is nearly empty. My urine smells really strong and looks cloudy.
urgency_reason: Classic lower UTI symptoms in a young woman with no systemic features can be managed with a short antibiotic course without urgent evaluation.
recommended_action: Send urine MSU for culture; start nitrofurantoin or trimethoprim for 3-5 days empirically; drink 2L water daily; return if fever develops.
red_flags: Fever above 38.5°C with rigors suggesting pyelonephritis
Loin pain or costovertebral tenderness
Symptoms not improving after 48 hours of antibiotics

user_symptom_description: بقالي 4 أيام عندي ألم في عيني الأيمن مع احمرار وحساسية للضو وبشوف دواير حوالين الأنوار في الليل. دلوقتي صداع فوق عيني.
urgency_reason: Eye pain with halos and headache is acute angle-closure glaucoma until excluded — intraocular pressure must be measured immediately to prevent irreversible vision loss.
recommended_action: Go to ophthalmology emergency immediately; IOP measurement; acetazolamide 500mg IV and topical pilocarpine; urgent laser iridotomy if confirmed.
red_flags: Sudden complete vision loss
Nausea and vomiting from raised IOP
Fixed mid-dilated pupil

user_symptom_description: My 10-year-old has had a sore throat and fever of 102°F for 2 days. Her throat looks really red with white patches and the glands in her neck are swollen. She says swallowing feels like glass.
urgency_reason: Centor criteria score of 4 with exudate and lymphadenopathy in a child warrants rapid strep test and antibiotic therapy to prevent rheumatic fever.
recommended_action: Same-day pediatric appointment; rapid strep antigen test; if positive, start amoxicillin 10-day course; ibuprofen for fever and pain; monospot test if no improvement in 3 days.
red_flags: Drooling with inability to open mouth fully suggesting abscess
Stridor or muffled voice
Rash suggesting scarlet fever

user_symptom_description: أنا عندي 70 سنة وبقالي شهر بحس بتنميل وألم زي الإبر في رجليا من الركبة لأخماص القدم خصوصاً بالليل. السكر بتاعي مش متحكم فيه كويس.
urgency_reason: Bilateral stocking neuropathy in a poorly controlled diabetic requires HbA1c optimization, B12 check, and foot care program to prevent ulceration.
recommended_action: Review diabetes control and adjust medications; check HbA1c, B12, folate, and renal function; start pregabalin or duloxetine for neuropathic pain; daily foot inspection.
red_flags: Foot ulcer or wound not healing
Loss of protective sensation leading to injury
Rest pain suggesting critical ischemia

user_symptom_description: I had a bee sting 10 minutes ago and now my lips are swelling, I feel my throat getting tight, and I'm breaking out in hives all over my body. I feel dizzy and my heart is racing.
urgency_reason: Multi-system allergic reaction with airway involvement and hemodynamic compromise following a sting is anaphylaxis requiring immediate epinephrine.
recommended_action: Inject epinephrine 0.3mg IM into outer thigh immediately if auto-injector available; call 911; lie flat with legs elevated; go to ER for monitoring and second epinephrine dose if needed.
red_flags: Stridor or inability to speak
Loss of consciousness
Absent radial pulse

user_symptom_description: عندي 22 سنة وبقالي 3 أشهر بيجيلي ألم في بطني على الجانب الأيسر يمشي مع ألم مفاصل في ركبتيا وأحياناً بشوف دم في البراز.
urgency_reason: Rectal bleeding with joint involvement in a young adult suggests inflammatory bowel disease requiring colonoscopy and rheumatology co-assessment.
recommended_action: Schedule gastroenterology appointment within 1 week; CRP, ESR, fecal calprotectin, and stool cultures; colonoscopy with biopsies; rheumatology referral for arthropathy.
red_flags: Heavy rectal bleeding with hemodynamic instability
Fever with severe abdominal tenderness suggesting perforation
Weight loss exceeding 10% body weight

user_symptom_description: I've noticed a lump in my right breast about the size of a marble for the past 3 weeks. It's hard, doesn't move much, and the skin above it looks a bit puckered. There's no pain.
urgency_reason: Hard immobile lump with skin puckering has high malignant features and requires urgent triple assessment within 2 weeks under a suspected cancer pathway.
recommended_action: Attend GP today for urgent 2-week cancer referral to breast clinic; mammogram and ultrasound; core needle biopsy if imaging suspicious; do not delay.
red_flags: Nipple discharge or retraction
Axillary lymph node enlargement
Rapid increase in lump size

user_symptom_description: بقالها أسبوع بتاخد أدوية جديدة للضغط وبدأت تحس بدوخة لما بتقوم من الكرسي، وسقطت مرة في الحمام بسببها. عندها 80 سنة.
urgency_reason: New antihypertensive causing orthostatic falls in an 80-year-old is a medication safety issue requiring dose adjustment and fall risk mitigation.
recommended_action: Review antihypertensive dose with GP within 2 days; measure lying and standing BP; consider compression stockings; remove home fall hazards; add bed grab-rail.
red_flags: Head injury from a fall
Syncope lasting more than a few seconds
Chest pain or palpitations accompanying the dizziness

user_symptom_description: I've had pain and swelling in my right big toe joint since yesterday morning after a dinner party with lots of red meat and beer. It's so tender I can't even put a bedsheet on it.
urgency_reason: Classic podagra presentation warrants uric acid testing and anti-inflammatory treatment, with joint aspiration to exclude septic arthritis if febrile.
recommended_action: Start indomethacin or colchicine within 24 hours of attack onset; check serum uric acid after attack resolves; avoid alcohol and red meat; discuss allopurinol after 4-6 weeks.
red_flags: Fever above 38.5°C suggesting septic arthritis
Multiple joints involved simultaneously
Tophi or chronic joint deformity

user_symptom_description: بقالي 10 أيام بحس بعيني الأيمن ضبابي وبشوف نقط سودة بتطير قدامي وفجأة لقيت إن جزء من الشاشة اللي بشوفها اختفى من ناحية الجنب.
urgency_reason: New floaters with peripheral field loss indicates retinal detachment requiring emergency ophthalmology evaluation within hours to prevent total vision loss.
recommended_action: Go to ophthalmology emergency immediately; dilated fundoscopy; urgent vitreoretinal surgery if detachment confirmed; lie flat and avoid sudden head movements en route.
red_flags: Sudden complete loss of central vision
Shadow or curtain covering more than half the visual field
Severe eye pain

user_symptom_description: I got a cut on my foot from a rusty nail last week and now the wound looks really angry — red, swollen, and oozing yellow pus. My leg is swollen up to the knee and I have a fever.
possible_conditions: Deep Vein Thrombosis with Wound Infection
urgency_reason: Ascending erythema with fever after a penetrating injury suggests spreading infection requiring IV antibiotics and urgent assessment to exclude necrotizing fasciitis.
recommended_action: Go to ER today; mark erythema borders; IV flucloxacillin or co-amoxiclav; blood cultures before antibiotics; tetanus booster check; surgical consult if demarcation not improving in 12 hours.
red_flags: Rapid spread of redness despite antibiotics
Extreme disproportionate pain or skin discoloration suggesting NF
Crepitus in the tissue on palpation

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهرين بحس بصعوبة في البلع للأكل الصلب. الأكل بيوقف في صدري وبفقدت 8 كيلو من غير ما أقصد. عندي 65 سنة ودخنت لسنين.
urgency_reason: Progressive solid dysphagia with significant weight loss in an elderly male smoker is esophageal cancer until proven otherwise, requiring urgent endoscopy.
recommended_action: Urgent 2-week cancer pathway referral; upper GI endoscopy with biopsy; CT chest-abdomen-pelvis for staging; nutritional support; multidisciplinary team review.
red_flags: Complete inability to swallow liquids
Aspiration pneumonia
Hematemesis

user_symptom_description: My 7-year-old wet the bed three nights in a row this week after being dry for over a year. He also seems very thirsty during the day and has been asking to use the bathroom at school a lot.
urgency_reason: Secondary enuresis combined with polydipsia and polyuria in a child is diabetic ketoacidosis presentation until excluded by urgent blood glucose.
recommended_action: Take child to GP or urgent care today for finger-prick blood glucose and urine dipstick; if glucose above 11mmol/L or ketones present, go to pediatric ER immediately.
red_flags: Vomiting or abdominal pain
Fruity breath odor
Lethargy or decreased consciousness

user_symptom_description: عندي ألم في مفصل ورك أيماني بقاله 6 أشهر، بيزيد بالمشي وبيقلل شوية بالراحة. الألم بيوصل لرجلي أحياناً وبستحملش أمشي أكتر من 10 دقايق.
urgency_reason: Chronic mechanical hip pain with functional limitation requires X-ray to confirm osteoarthritis and physiotherapy to delay surgical intervention.
recommended_action: Hip X-ray AP and lateral views; NSAIDs if tolerated; physiotherapy for hip muscle strengthening; walking aid if needed; discuss total hip replacement if conservative management fails.
red_flags: Sudden inability to bear any weight
Fever with hip pain suggesting septic arthritis
Pain at rest at night waking from sleep suggesting AVN

user_symptom_description: I had a bad episode last night where my whole right side went stiff and started jerking uncontrollably for about 2 minutes. I bit my tongue and when I came around I had no memory of it. It has never happened before.
urgency_reason: First seizure in a young adult requires urgent neurological evaluation and brain imaging to exclude structural cause before driving or high-risk activities.
recommended_action: Go to ER or neurology same day; MRI brain with contrast; EEG; blood glucose, electrolytes, and toxicology screen; driving ban until cleared by neurologist; no heights or water immersion.
red_flags: Prolonged seizure over 5 minutes
Multiple seizures in 24 hours without full recovery
Focal neurological deficit persisting after seizure

user_symptom_description: بقالي 4 أيام بقشعريرة وحرارة عالية وألم في ضهري من تحت الضلوع والبول بتاعي غامق ونتن وبيحس بحرقة وقت البول.
urgency_reason: Febrile UTI with loin pain in an elderly woman carries urosepsis risk and requires IV antibiotics and hospital admission for monitoring.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately; urine culture and blood cultures before antibiotics; IV ceftriaxone; renal ultrasound to exclude abscess or obstruction; monitor for sepsis criteria.
red_flags: Confusion or altered consciousness suggesting septic encephalopathy
Hypotension or tachycardia meeting sepsis criteria
Inability to tolerate oral fluids

user_symptom_description: I've had psoriasis for years but over the past month my joints have started hurting — mainly my fingers look swollen like sausages and my lower back is stiff every morning for over an hour.
urgency_reason: Dactylitis with inflammatory spinal symptoms in a psoriasis patient requires rheumatology assessment to start DMARDs before irreversible joint damage.
recommended_action: Rheumatology referral within 2 weeks; X-rays of hands and sacroiliac joints; CRP, ESR, RF, and anti-CCP; consider methotrexate or TNF inhibitor; dermatology co-management.
red_flags: Severe spinal pain with loss of lumbar movement
Eye redness suggesting uveitis
Nail pitting worsening alongside joint disease

user_symptom_description: ابنتي عمرها 5 سنين ومن امبارح عندها حمى 39 وجلدها أحمر متوهج زي السنفرة وبيقشر حواليه بقها. حلقها وجعها وقالتلي بيحسها جلدها شوكية.
urgency_reason: Sandpaper rash with sore throat and fever in a child meets criteria for scarlet fever requiring prompt antibiotic treatment to prevent rheumatic fever complications.
recommended_action: Same-day pediatric appointment; throat swab for culture; start penicillin V or amoxicillin for 10 days; monitor for rash spread; school exclusion until 24 hours on antibiotics.
red_flags: Rash becoming blistering or peeling in sheets
Strawberry tongue with lip cracking suggesting Kawasaki
Arthritis or cardiac symptoms weeks after infection

user_symptom_description: I've been getting headaches on one side that build up slowly and throb with my heartbeat. I see flashing zigzag lights for about 20 minutes before the headache starts. Nausea comes with it and I need to lie in a dark room.
urgency_reason: Classic migraine with visual aura is a recurrent condition requiring prophylactic and abortive treatment planning, not urgent intervention.
recommended_action: Neurology appointment within 4 weeks; start sumatriptan for acute attacks with anti-emetic; migraine diary; discuss topiramate or amitriptyline prophylaxis if attacks frequent.
red_flags: Aura lasting more than 60 minutes
Headache described as worst ever sudden onset
Persistent neurological deficit after headache resolves

user_symptom_description: عندي 68 سنة وبقالي أسبوعين بحس بضعف في رجليا الإتنين وبيصعب عليا أقوم من الكرسي من غير أيديا. ما عنديش ألم بس بحس بالرجلين تقيلتين.
urgency_reason: Proximal bilateral muscle weakness without pain in an elderly man requires CK, ESR, and autoimmune panel to differentiate myositis from metabolic or paraneoplastic cause.
recommended_action: Blood tests including CK, LDH, ANA, anti-Jo-1, TSH, and ESR within one week; EMG and muscle biopsy if myositis confirmed; CT chest-abdomen to exclude occult malignancy.
red_flags: Difficulty swallowing or aspiration of food
Skin changes over knuckles or eyelids suggesting dermatomyositis
Rapid respiratory muscle weakness

user_symptom_description: I keep getting cold sores on my lips every few weeks. But this time one has been there for 3 weeks and isn't healing, and a new painful blister appeared inside my mouth on my cheek.
urgency_reason: Prolonged non-healing HSV lesion with increasing frequency may indicate immune compromise requiring HIV and blood count testing.
recommended_action: GP appointment within one week; HIV, full blood count, and glucose test; oral acyclovir 400mg 5x daily for 10 days; discuss valacyclovir suppressive therapy for frequent recurrences.
red_flags: Lesions spreading to eye causing eye pain
Fever with meningism suggesting HSV encephalitis
New oral white plaques suggesting concurrent candidiasis

user_symptom_description: أنا عندي ضغط دم عالي من 5 سنين وبآخد دوا عليه. من 3 أيام بحس بصداع شديد في قفا رأسي وبقيسي الضغط وطالع 190/120.
urgency_reason: Symptomatic BP 190/120 with headache in a treated hypertensive requires same-day medical assessment to exclude end-organ damage and adjust medications.
recommended_action: Go to ER or urgent care today; urinalysis, ECG, fundoscopy, and creatinine to assess for hypertensive emergency; controlled BP reduction with oral agents; review medication adherence.
red_flags: Sudden vision loss or double vision
Chest pain or shortness of breath
Confusion, focal weakness, or speech change suggesting hypertensive encephalopathy

user_symptom_description: My 2-year-old swallowed a small button battery about an hour ago. He seems okay now and is not choking, but I'm really worried about what to do.
urgency_reason: Button battery ingestion in a toddler can cause fatal esophageal perforation within 2 hours from electrical current — emergency removal is mandatory regardless of symptoms.
recommended_action: Go to pediatric ER immediately; do not give food or water; chest and abdominal X-ray to localize battery; urgent endoscopic retrieval if esophageal; honey 2 tsp every 10 min en route if available.
red_flags: Drooling or inability to swallow
Vomiting or chest pain
Any respiratory distress

user_symptom_description: بقالي 3 أشهر حاسة بألم وتيبس في أصابع إيديا في الصبح لمدة ساعتين وأصابعي بتورم وبيبقو دافيين. الألم في الإتنين زي بعض.
urgency_reason: Symmetric small joint arthritis with prolonged morning stiffness meets early RA criteria requiring urgent DMARDs to prevent irreversible joint erosion.
recommended_action: Urgent rheumatology referral within 2 weeks; RF, anti-CCP, ESR, CRP, and X-rays of hands and feet; start methotrexate if diagnosis confirmed; NSAIDs for symptomatic relief.
red_flags: Sudden joint deformity or tendon rupture
Neck pain with hand weakness suggesting cervical spine involvement
Nodules on elbows or severe systemic symptoms

user_symptom_description: I started a new antibiotic 4 days ago and since then I've had watery diarrhea up to 8 times a day with cramping. The diarrhea is green and has a really bad smell. I'm also feverish.
urgency_reason: Post-antibiotic profuse diarrhea with fever in an elderly patient is C. difficile until proven otherwise, requiring prompt stool testing and targeted treatment.
recommended_action: Stop current antibiotic; stool for C. difficile toxin PCR; start oral vancomycin 125mg QID for 10 days; isolate to prevent spread; hydration support; escalate if abdomen rigid.
red_flags: Abdominal distension suggesting toxic megacolon
Bloody diarrhea with dropping BP
Altered consciousness from sepsis

user_symptom_description: عندي 30 سنة وبقالي أسبوعين مرعوب من الأماكن الضيقة لدرجة قلبي بيزعق ونفسي بيقصر لو دخلت مصعد أو أماكن زحمة. بديت أتجنب الخروج.
extracted_symptoms: shortness of breath in confined spaces
urgency_reason: Claustrophobia causing occupational and social avoidance warrants CBT and gradual exposure therapy, but is not a medical emergency.
recommended_action: Book psychiatry or clinical psychology appointment; CBT with graded exposure is first-line; SSRI if phobia is severe; cardiac causes excluded with ECG given palpitations.
red_flags: Complete inability to leave the house
Development of suicidal thoughts
Panic attacks leading to syncope requiring cardiac evaluation

user_symptom_description: I've been having very heavy periods for the last 6 months — soaking through a pad every hour on heavy days. I've also been feeling dizzy, cold all the time, and look pale according to my friends.
urgency_reason: Symptomatic anemia with severe menorrhagia requires urgent CBC, iron studies, and pelvic ultrasound to identify the underlying gynecological cause.
recommended_action: GP appointment within 3 days; CBC, ferritin, TSH, and clotting screen; pelvic ultrasound to exclude fibroids; start oral iron; tranexamic acid during menstruation; gynecology referral.
red_flags: Hemoglobin below 7 g/dL requiring transfusion
Syncopal episodes from blood loss
Pelvic mass on examination

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهر بحس بألم في الكتف الأيمن وصعوبة في رفع إيدي فوق رأسي. الألم بيصحيني من النوم لو اتقلبت على جنبي الأيمن. ما عندي إصابة.
urgency_reason: Atraumatic rotator cuff pathology in an elderly man requires shoulder ultrasound or MRI to determine tear extent before physiotherapy or surgical planning.
recommended_action: Shoulder ultrasound or MRI; physiotherapy for rotator cuff strengthening; subacromial steroid injection if impingement confirmed; surgical repair referral for full-thickness tears.
red_flags: Sudden complete inability to raise arm after a fall
Shoulder swelling with fever suggesting septic arthritis
Wasting of deltoid or supraspinatus muscles

user_symptom_description: I was stung by a jellyfish at the beach an hour ago. The pain is excruciating, there are red whip-like welts across my arm, and I'm feeling nauseous and my chest feels tight.
urgency_reason: Systemic symptoms including chest tightness and nausea after a jellyfish sting may indicate allergic or toxic systemic reaction requiring urgent evaluation.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately; rinse with seawater not fresh water; carefully remove visible tentacles; IV antihistamine and analgesia; ECG if chest tightness persists; epinephrine if anaphylaxis develops.
red_flags: Throat tightening or stridor
Collapse or loss of consciousness
Cardiac arrhythmia on monitoring

user_symptom_description: بقالي 4 أشهر شعري بيتساقط بكميات كبيرة جداً كل ما بشطفه أو باسرحه. مش عارفة إيه السبب بس مريت بضغط نفسي شديد من 6 أشهر.
urgency_reason: Diffuse hair loss 3-6 months after psychological stressor is typical telogen effluvium which is self-limiting, but thyroid and iron causes should be excluded.
recommended_action: GP or dermatology appointment; TSH, ferritin, and CBC; reassure that TE is usually reversible; stress management referral; reassess in 6 months; minoxidil if persistent.
red_flags: Patchy bald spots with exclamation-mark hairs suggesting alopecia areata
Scalp scaling or scarring hair loss
Eyebrow or eyelash loss

user_symptom_description: My 82-year-old mother has been confused and not herself since this morning. She keeps asking where she is and didn't recognize my husband. She also has a high temperature and her breathing is faster than normal.
urgency_reason: Acute delirium with fever and tachypnea in an elderly woman is a sepsis presentation until proven otherwise requiring emergency assessment.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; go to ER for sepsis work-up including urine, blood cultures, chest X-ray, and CBC; start antibiotics within 1 hour; orientate and reassure patient calmly.
red_flags: Hypotension or mottled skin indicating septic shock
Seizure activity
Meningism with neck stiffness

user_symptom_description: عندي 50 سنة وبقالي 3 أشهر بحس بألم أسفل بطني ولما بروح الحمام البراز بيكون ضيق وأحياناً فيه دم أحمر فاتح أو داكن. وزني بينزل.
urgency_reason: Change in bowel habit with rectal bleeding and weight loss in a 50-year-old man meets criteria for urgent colorectal cancer pathway referral.
recommended_action: Urgent 2-week cancer pathway colonoscopy; CEA tumor marker, CBC, and iron studies; CT staging if cancer confirmed; do not attribute bleeding to hemorrhoids without scoping.
red_flags: Profuse rectal bleeding with hemodynamic instability
Palpable abdominal mass
Jaundice suggesting liver metastases

user_symptom_description: My 9-year-old has been limping for 2 weeks and says her left hip hurts. She's not been running at school and the teacher noticed she walks with a limp. No fever and no injury.
urgency_reason: Insidious hip pain with limp in a school-age child without fever requires X-ray to exclude avascular necrosis of femoral head and slipped epiphysis.
recommended_action: Pediatric appointment within 3 days; X-ray pelvis AP and frog-leg lateral; MRI if X-ray normal but symptoms persist; orthopedic referral for Perthes or SCFE if confirmed; activity restriction.
red_flags: Fever suggesting septic arthritis — an orthopedic emergency
Inability to bear any weight
Referred knee pain masking hip pathology

user_symptom_description: I've been having trouble sleeping for 3 months, waking up 3 or 4 times a night and feeling totally un-refreshed in the morning. My mind races the moment my head hits the pillow about work and money.
urgency_reason: Chronic insomnia with cognitive arousal pattern responds well to CBT-I and sleep hygiene intervention, which should be tried before medication.
recommended_action: Refer for CBT for Insomnia (CBT-I) as first-line; strict sleep hygiene including fixed wake time; no screens 1 hour before bed; anxiety assessment; short-term melatonin as bridge only.
red_flags: Witnessed breathing pauses during sleep suggesting sleep apnea
Excessive daytime sleepiness causing accidents
Onset of suicidal thoughts linked to exhaustion

user_symptom_description: جلدي بقاله أسبوع بيطلع فقاعات صغيرة بتحترق وبتوجع على جسمي في خط من ضهري لصدري من الجانب الأيمن بس. عندي ألم زي الكهرباء قبل ما الفقاعات تطلع.
urgency_reason: Dermatomal vesicular eruption consistent with shingles requires antiviral therapy within 72 hours of rash onset to reduce duration and postherpetic neuralgia risk.
recommended_action: GP appointment today; start valacyclovir 1g TDS for 7 days if within 72 hours of rash onset; calamine lotion and analgesics; cover lesions; check for eye involvement if rash near forehead.
red_flags: Rash involving tip of nose suggesting ocular zoster
Facial weakness or ear vesicles indicating Ramsay Hunt syndrome
Immunocompromised patient with rapidly spreading rash

user_symptom_description: I'm 76 and was brought in by my son. I've been much more confused than usual for the past two days. I also keep seeing things that aren't there — insects on the walls — and my hands are shaking more than usual.
urgency_reason: Visual hallucinations with acute confusion and worsening tremor in an elderly man require urgent medication review and neurological assessment to prevent harm.
recommended_action: ER visit for medication review — avoid haloperidol as it is contraindicated in Lewy body dementia; brain CT, metabolic panel, urine culture; consider rivastigmine; neurology inpatient review.
red_flags: Neuroleptic sensitivity reaction if given typical antipsychotics
Falls risk from worsening Parkinsonism
Autonomic instability with hypotension or syncope

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهرين بحس بألم متكرر في بطني السري وتحته بيجيلي بعد الأكل وبيروح لو روحت الحمام. بطني بيتنفخ كتير وأحياناً إسهال وأحياناً إمساك.
urgency_reason: Rome IV criteria met for IBS without alarm features; dietary and lifestyle modification is first-line management.
recommended_action: Low FODMAP diet trial for 6 weeks; soluble fiber supplementation; stress management; celiac serology and thyroid tests to exclude organic cause; referral if no improvement.
red_flags: Rectal bleeding not explained by hemorrhoids
Waking from sleep with symptoms
Unintentional weight loss

user_symptom_description: I've had a painless swelling in my right testicle for about 6 weeks. It's a firm lump and feels separate from the testicle itself. I'm 25 and had an undescended testicle that was fixed surgically when I was a child.
urgency_reason: Painless testicular mass in a young man with cryptorchidism history is testicular cancer until proven otherwise; early radical orchidectomy is curative in most cases.
recommended_action: Urgent scrotal ultrasound; tumor markers AFP, beta-hCG, and LDH; urgent urology referral for radical orchidectomy; CT chest-abdomen-pelvis for staging; sperm banking before treatment.
red_flags: Rapid increase in testicular size
Back pain suggesting retroperitoneal lymphadenopathy
Gynecomastia suggesting hormone-secreting tumor

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين بجيلي نوبات إحساس بحرارة شديدة مفاجئة من جوا تصحيني من النوم وبعدها تعرق غزير. عمري 48 سنة وبقالي 3 شهور دورتي مش جاية منتظمة.
urgency_reason: Hot flashes with menstrual irregularity at age 48 is perimenopause; thyroid function and FSH should confirm this before hormone therapy discussion.
recommended_action: GP appointment; FSH, LH, and TSH bloods; discuss HRT risks and benefits; consider low-dose SSRI or venlafaxine if HRT contraindicated; calcium and vitamin D supplementation.
red_flags: Drenching night sweats with weight loss and lymphadenopathy
Postmenopausal bleeding occurring after 12 months of amenorrhea
Palpitations requiring ECG to exclude arrhythmia

user_symptom_description: I am 80 and I've been feeling very weak and dizzy for 3 days. I've not been eating much and noticed my urine is very dark. I take blood pressure tablets and a water tablet every day.
urgency_reason: Symptomatic dehydration in an elderly man on diuretics and antihypertensives risks acute renal failure and electrolyte crisis requiring same-day blood tests.
recommended_action: Go to ER or urgent care today; U&E, creatinine, and eGFR urgently; stop or halve diuretic if AKI confirmed; oral or IV rehydration; review all antihypertensives for dose reduction.
red_flags: Urine output below 400ml per day
Confusion or reduced consciousness from hyponatremia
Muscle cramps or arrhythmia from hypokalemia

user_symptom_description: My 6-year-old has had blood in his urine for 2 days. He said it burns when he wees and his tummy hurts near the belly button. He doesn't have a fever.
urgency_reason: Hematuria with dysuria in a child requires urine culture to confirm UTI and renal ultrasound to exclude structural abnormality or stone.
recommended_action: Pediatric appointment today; urine dipstick and MC&S; renal ultrasound; if UTI confirmed start trimethoprim for 7 days; if hematuria persists after treatment, refer to pediatric nephrology.
red_flags: Facial or body swelling suggesting nephrotic syndrome
Fever developing suggesting pyelonephritis
Gross painless hematuria without dysuria

user_symptom_description: عندي 40 سنة وبقالي يومين ألم خلف الصدرة بيزيد لما ببلع وبيقل لما بميل للأمام. عندي حمى خفيفة وقبلها بأسبوع كنت مريض بعدوى تنفسية.
urgency_reason: Post-viral pleuritic chest pain relieved by leaning forward is classic pericarditis; ECG is mandatory to confirm and exclude myocarditis and pericardial effusion.
recommended_action: Go to ER for ECG, troponin, CRP, and echocardiogram; if pericarditis confirmed start ibuprofen plus colchicine for 3 months; restrict strenuous exercise; follow up echocardiogram at 4 weeks.
red_flags: Pulsus paradoxus or hypotension suggesting cardiac tamponade
Troponin rise indicating myocarditis
Friction rub with hemodynamic instability

user_symptom_description: I've been losing weight without trying for the past 2 months — about 8kg. I feel nervous and shaky all the time, my heart races even when I'm resting, and I feel hot when everyone else is comfortable.
urgency_reason: Symptomatic hyperthyroidism with weight loss and tachycardia requires urgent thyroid function testing and cardioprotective therapy before progression to thyroid storm.
recommended_action: GP appointment within 2 days for TSH, free T4, T3, and TSH receptor antibodies; start propranolol for symptom control; urgent endocrinology referral; radioiodine, carbimazole, or surgery discussion.
red_flags: Heart rate above 140 with atrial fibrillation
Extreme agitation and hyperthermia suggesting thyroid storm
Exophthalmos with eye pain or vision change

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين بحس بألم في عظمة قصبتي الأيسر من غير سبب وأنا بتمشي بس، ما عنديش إصابة. خضت من ناحية هشاشة عظام لأني بعد سن اليأس.
urgency_reason: Spontaneous bone pain in a postmenopausal woman requires imaging to exclude stress fracture and bone metastases alongside DEXA scan for osteoporosis evaluation.
recommended_action: X-ray tibia and fibula; if negative with persistent pain, MRI for stress fracture; DEXA bone density scan; check vitamin D, calcium, and ALP; start bisphosphonate if osteoporosis confirmed.
red_flags: Sudden complete inability to bear weight from complete fracture
Night pain at rest with weight loss suggesting malignancy
Multiple bone pains in different locations

user_symptom_description: I've been having trouble starting to urinate and the stream is very weak. I wake up 3-4 times a night to use the bathroom and feel like my bladder never fully empties. I'm 55.
urgency_reason: Lower urinary tract symptoms in a 55-year-old man are most likely BPH; PSA testing is essential to exclude prostate cancer before starting alpha-blocker therapy.
recommended_action: GP for PSA, renal function, urine dipstick, and digital rectal examination; uroflowmetry; start tamsulosin if BPH confirmed; urology referral if PSA elevated or poor medication response.
red_flags: Complete urinary retention requiring catheterization
Blood in urine
Bone pain or weight loss suggesting metastatic prostate cancer

user_symptom_description: أنا عندي 26 سنة وفجأة قبل ساعتين أحسيت بضيق نفس شديد وألم في صدري الأيمن بيزيد مع الشهيق. مش عندي أي مرض ومش بدخن. جسمي نحيف وطولي عالي.
urgency_reason: Acute pleuritic pain with dyspnea in a tall thin young man is spontaneous pneumothorax until excluded by chest X-ray; tension pneumothorax can be rapidly fatal.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately; upright chest X-ray; if large pneumothorax, needle aspiration or chest drain insertion; oxygen supplementation; CT chest if recurrent to assess for bleb.
red_flags: Tracheal deviation to opposite side indicating tension pneumothorax
Oxygen saturation below 90%
Hemodynamic collapse with absent breath sounds

user_symptom_description: I've been having extremely painful periods for about a year. The pain starts a week before my period and stays throughout. I also have pain during sex and I sometimes feel a deep ache in my pelvis even when I'm not menstruating.
urgency_reason: Progressive dysmenorrhea with dyspareunia and chronic pelvic pain requires gynecological assessment and laparoscopic evaluation to confirm and treat endometriosis.
recommended_action: GP referral to gynecology; pelvic ultrasound; trial of combined oral contraceptive pill; NSAIDs for pain; diagnostic laparoscopy if medical treatment fails; fertility counseling if relevant.
red_flags: Acute pelvic pain with fever suggesting ruptured endometrioma or PID
Urinary or bowel symptoms suggesting deep infiltrating endometriosis
Difficulty conceiving over 12 months

user_symptom_description: عندي 75 سنة وفجأة الصبح صحيت وشفتي بتتكلم صعب وإيدي الشمال ضعيفة ومش قادر أمسك الفنجان. دلوقتي بعد ساعتين الكلام أحسن بس الإيد لسه ضعيفة.
urgency_reason: Persistent arm weakness with dysarthria in an elderly man is an acute stroke until proven otherwise; thrombolysis window is time-critical.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; note exact time of symptom onset; go to stroke unit for CT brain, thrombolysis assessment if within 4.5 hours, and MRI DWI; antiplatelet therapy; swallowing assessment before any food.
red_flags: Complete arm and leg paralysis on the same side
Sudden loss of consciousness
Symptoms spreading to involve face and leg

user_symptom_description: My 11-year-old has been having episodes of staring blankly into space for a few seconds and then suddenly blinking rapidly. It happens multiple times a day and she doesn't seem aware during them. Her teacher noticed too.
urgency_reason: Multiple daily absence episodes affecting school performance require EEG to confirm epilepsy diagnosis and start appropriate antiepileptic therapy.
recommended_action: Pediatric neurology referral within 2 weeks; hyperventilation provocation during EEG to trigger absences; start ethosuximide if confirmed; inform school; restrict swimming unsupervised.
red_flags: Episode evolving into tonic-clonic convulsion
Postictal confusion lasting minutes
Failure to respond during episode lasting over 30 seconds

user_symptom_description: بقالي 10 أيام عندي سيلان من إيد ذكري وألم وقت التبول. ما عنديش قرحة. كان عندي علاقة جنسية جديدة من 3 أسابيع.
urgency_reason: Urethral discharge with dysuria after new sexual contact requires STI testing and dual antibiotic therapy given local gonorrhea resistance patterns.
recommended_action: Sexual health clinic or GP within 24 hours; urethral swab for NAAT gonorrhea and chlamydia; empirical ceftriaxone 500mg IM plus azithromycin 1g oral; partner notification and testing.
red_flags: Testicular pain and swelling suggesting epididymo-orchitis
Fever with joint pain suggesting disseminated gonorrhea
Rectal or pharyngeal symptoms

user_symptom_description: I've had a lump on my neck just below my left jaw for 3 weeks. It's about the size of a grape, a bit tender, and it showed up during a cold. Now the cold is gone but the lump is still there.
