recommended_action: Go to ENT emergency today; audiogram to confirm SSNHL; start prednisolone 60mg daily for 7 days if no contraindication; MRI internal auditory canals to exclude acoustic neuroma; intratympanic steroid if oral steroids fail.
red_flags: Complete deafness in the affected ear
Facial palsy alongside hearing loss suggesting Ramsay Hunt
Balance failure suggesting labyrinthine involvement

user_symptom_description: I've been spotting between my periods and after sex for the past 2 months. My periods have also been irregular. I'm 34 and have been with the same partner for years. I had my last smear 3 years ago which was normal.
urgency_reason: Postcoital and intermenstrual bleeding in a woman with a smear 3 years ago requires urgent colposcopy referral to exclude cervical malignancy regardless of previous normal smear.
recommended_action: Urgent 2-week cancer pathway referral for colposcopy; endocervical swab for chlamydia; pelvic examination; do not wait for next smear cycle if symptoms present; STI screen.
red_flags: Pelvic pain with bleeding suggesting advanced local spread
Watery offensive vaginal discharge
Visible lesion on cervix on speculum examination

user_symptom_description: عندي 44 سنة وبقالي 3 أسابيع عيني اليمين بتدمع من غير ما أبكي وبحس فيها كأن فيه حاجة وزي حرقة. وفيه إحمرار في ركن عيني الأيمن.
urgency_reason: Persistent unilateral tearing with medial canthal inflammation warrants ophthalmology assessment to confirm nasolacrimal obstruction and exclude early dacryocystitis.
recommended_action: Ophthalmology appointment; lacrimal syringing to confirm obstruction; if dacryocystitis present, oral co-amoxiclav and warm compress; dacryocystorhinostomy (DCR) surgery if obstruction confirmed and symptomatic.
red_flags: Acute swelling over lacrimal sac with fever indicating acute dacryocystitis
Abscess formation requiring incision and drainage
Orbital cellulitis spreading from lacrimal area

user_symptom_description: My 10-year-old fell off a trampoline and landed on his arm. He's crying constantly, his forearm looks bent in the middle, and he can't move it at all. There is mild swelling but no skin break.
urgency_reason: Visible forearm deformity with complete loss of movement after a fall is a displaced fracture requiring emergency reduction and immobilization to prevent neurovascular compromise.
recommended_action: Go to pediatric ER immediately; do not attempt to straighten; X-ray forearm AP and lateral including wrist and elbow; IV analgesia; pediatric orthopedic reduction under general anesthesia; check radial pulse and median nerve function.
red_flags: Absent radial pulse indicating vascular injury
White or numb hand indicating compartment syndrome risk
Skin tent from bone threatening open fracture

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهرين بصحي من النوم بعد كوابيس مزعجة عن حادثة سيارة خضتها السنة اللي فاتت. بتجنب ركوب العربيات وبحس بالفزع والخوف لو سمعت صوت إطارات.
urgency_reason: PTSD with avoidance and hyperarousal causing functional impairment requires trauma-focused CBT or EMDR as first-line treatment to prevent chronicity.
recommended_action: Referral to trauma-focused CBT or EMDR therapy; PCL-5 PTSD severity score; avoid alcohol and sedative use as coping; consider sertraline as adjunct if CBT alone insufficient; support group referral.
red_flags: Suicidal ideation linked to the trauma
Dissociative episodes losing time
Complete social isolation and inability to work

user_symptom_description: I've had severe burning diarrhea, vomiting, dizziness, and pins and needles around my mouth after eating some homemade preserves at a friend's house 6 hours ago. My vision is slightly blurry and my throat feels weak.
extracted_symptoms: diarrhea and vomiting after home-preserved food
urgency_reason: Descending paralysis signs including throat weakness and blurred vision after home-preserved food ingestion is botulism until proven otherwise — antitoxin is time-critical.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; go to ER for respiratory monitoring and botulinum antitoxin administration; stool and serum for botulinum toxin; ICU admission; notify public health authority; check other people who ate the food.
red_flags: Progressive difficulty breathing from respiratory muscle paralysis
Complete ptosis and external ophthalmoplegia
Loss of gag reflex with aspiration risk

user_symptom_description: بقالي 4 أيام ألم حاد في صدري الأيمن من تحت الإبط وكمان بيزيد بالشهيق وعندي بصاق فيه دم. كنت مريضة في أوضتي طول الأسبوع الفاتت.
urgency_reason: Pleuritic chest pain with hemoptysis after immobility in an elderly woman is pulmonary embolism with pulmonary infarction until proven otherwise requiring immediate anticoagulation.
recommended_action: Call emergency services; go to ER immediately; CTPA urgently; start LMWH or IV heparin if high clinical probability before imaging; oxygen supplementation; thrombophilia screen; echocardiogram for right heart strain.
red_flags: Hemodynamic compromise indicating massive PE requiring thrombolysis
Oxygen saturation below 88%
Syncope accompanying the chest pain

user_symptom_description: I've started sleepwalking — my wife found me in the kitchen twice last week at 2am making food with no memory of it. I've also been doing and saying strange things in my sleep. This started after I began a new sleeping tablet.
urgency_reason: Sleepwalking emerging after starting a hypnotic medication is a known side effect of Z-drugs and benzodiazepines requiring immediate discontinuation for patient safety.
recommended_action: Stop the hypnotic medication with GP guidance; ensure bedroom safety — lock doors and windows, remove kitchen hazards; if episodes continue, refer for polysomnography; consider CBT-I as non-pharmacological alternative for insomnia.
red_flags: Injury to self or partner during episode
Sleepwalking continuing after stopping medication suggesting idiopathic parasomnia
EEG changes suggesting nocturnal frontal lobe epilepsy

user_symptom_description: أنا عندي 24 سنة وبقالي سنة بحس بوجع في مفاصل إيديا الصغيرة وعيوني بيبقوا حمرا وجافين وبيجيلي جفاف في بقي. الأعراض دي بتيجي وبتروح.
urgency_reason: Episodic arthritis with sicca symptoms and mucosal involvement in a young woman requires autoimmune panel to distinguish SLE from Sjögren's and guide treatment.
recommended_action: Rheumatology referral; ANA, anti-dsDNA, anti-Ro, anti-La, complement C3/C4, and urinalysis for protein; Schirmer's test for dry eyes; CBC for cytopenias; hydroxychloroquine if SLE confirmed.
red_flags: Facial butterfly rash developing
Foamy urine suggesting lupus nephritis
Pleuropericarditis with chest pain

user_symptom_description: I'm 71 and I've been coughing up a tablespoon of blood twice this week with no other symptoms except mild breathlessness. I'm an ex-smoker and have not had a cough or cold recently.
extracted_symptoms: frank hemoptysis twice in one week
urgency_reason: Unprovoked hemoptysis in an elderly ex-smoker without an infective cause is lung cancer until proven otherwise and requires urgent chest imaging.
recommended_action: Urgent chest CT with contrast; flexible bronchoscopy; sputum cytology x3; urgent 2-week cancer pathway referral; CBC, clotting, and renal function; PET scan if malignancy confirmed for staging.
red_flags: Massive hemoptysis over 200ml threatening airway
Hemodynamic instability from blood loss
Bilateral lung infiltrates on CT suggesting alternative diagnosis

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهر بحس بإرهاق شديد وقلبي بيرفرف وضيق نفس خفيف. الدكتور قالي إن عندي أنيميا حادة وطلبيلي فحص. أنا مش بآكل لحمة.
possible_conditions: Iron Deficiency Anemia from Poor Intake
urgency_reason: Severe anemia with palpitations in a vegetarian requires B12 and iron studies to identify the deficiency type and initiate appropriate replacement.
recommended_action: Urgent FBC with reticulocyte count, blood film, ferritin, B12, folate, and LDH; if B12 deficient, start IM hydroxocobalamin injections; iron supplementation if also iron-deficient; dietary counseling on fortified foods.
red_flags: Hemoglobin below 7 g/dL requiring transfusion
Neurological symptoms like peripheral neuropathy or subacute combined degeneration of cord suggesting B12 deficiency
Hemolytic features on film suggesting different diagnosis

user_symptom_description: I work in an air-conditioned office and for the past 3 months I've had a cough and low-grade fever every Monday to Wednesday, which completely disappears over weekends. I feel fine at home.
urgency_reason: Temporal work-related respiratory symptoms with fever suggest hypersensitivity pneumonitis or Legionella contamination of the air conditioning system requiring occupational health and pulmonology review.
recommended_action: Pulmonology referral; HRCT chest; spirometry before and after work; serum precipitins for relevant antigens; occupational health referral for air conditioning and cooling tower inspection; Legionella urinary antigen.
red_flags: Rapidly progressive dyspnea at rest
Acute severe febrile illness meeting Legionnaires' disease criteria
Irreversible fibrotic changes on CT from chronic HP

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين بحس بتورم في جنبي الأيسر من البطن وبأحس بإن فيه حاجة بتضغط في بطني. بولي اشمر مرتين وعندي تعب وفقدان شهية.
urgency_reason: The classic triad of flank mass, hematuria, and constitutional symptoms in an elderly woman is renal cell carcinoma until proven otherwise.
recommended_action: Urgent CT abdomen-pelvis with contrast; CBC, renal function, LFTs, LDH, and calcium; urgent urology referral on 2-week cancer pathway; bone scan and chest CT for staging; radical nephrectomy or partial nephrectomy if operable.
red_flags: Varicocele on left side that does not decompress lying down — suggesting IVC tumor thrombus
Paraneoplastic hypercalcemia causing confusion
Pulmonary nodules on chest X-ray

user_symptom_description: I've had ongoing fatigue, brain fog, and muscle aches for 8 months following a confirmed COVID-19 infection. Some days I feel I can barely function. Any physical exertion makes all my symptoms much worse for days.
urgency_reason: Post-exertional malaise lasting over 3 months after COVID requires structured multidisciplinary long COVID assessment and paced rehabilitation to avoid boom-bust cycles.
recommended_action: GP referral to long COVID clinic; thyroid, FBC, and ferritin to exclude treatable co-pathology; energy pacing and activity diary; avoid graded exercise therapy if post-exertional malaise is prominent; CBT for co-existing mood symptoms.
red_flags: Cardiac chest pain requiring ECG — post-COVID myocarditis
Oxygen saturation drop with exertion
Severe psychiatric deterioration with suicidal thoughts

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوع بحس بحرقة وألم في صدري يمين بعد الأكل مباشرة وبيشع لكتفي الأيمن. الألم بيزيد بالحركة وأحياناً بيجيلي غثيان. طلعت حامل من 8 أسابيع.
urgency_reason: Right upper quadrant pain with shoulder radiation in an 8-week pregnant woman requires same-day ultrasound to exclude cholecystitis as it can trigger preterm labor if untreated.
recommended_action: Urgent GP or obstetric review; abdominal ultrasound same day; LFTs, CBC, and CRP; low-fat diet; if cholecystitis confirmed, IV antibiotics safe in pregnancy; laparoscopic cholecystectomy preferred in 2nd trimester if needed.
red_flags: Fever with jaundice suggesting cholangitis — urgent surgery required
Signs of preterm labor
Severe epigastric pain with elevated transaminases suggesting HELLP

user_symptom_description: I've been peeling and itching between my toes for 3 weeks. The skin looks white and soggy between the fourth and fifth toes and there are some small blisters on the arch of my foot. It smells bad.
urgency_reason: Interdigital maceration with pruritus and vesicles in a typical distribution is athlete's foot, a superficial fungal infection responding to topical antifungals.
recommended_action: Apply topical terbinafine cream twice daily for 2 weeks; keep feet dry; change socks daily; dry thoroughly between toes after washing; if not improving at 4 weeks, systemic terbinafine 250mg for 2 weeks.
red_flags: Spreading cellulitis from a portal of entry between toes
Diabetic foot with any skin breakdown requiring urgent podiatry
Vesicles coalescing into bullae suggesting bullous tinea pedis

user_symptom_description: بنتي عمرها 12 سنة وبدأت بتقول إنها مش شايفة كويس لما بتحاول تقرأ في السبورة في المدرسة وبتزغزغ عيونها. مدرستها قالتلنا إنها بتمسح عيونها كتير.
urgency_reason: School-age onset of distance blurring with squinting is the classic presentation of myopia requiring optometry assessment and prescription glasses.
recommended_action: Optometry or ophthalmology appointment for refraction; prescription spectacles if myopia confirmed; discuss myopia control options such as orthokeratology or low-dose atropine; annual review for progression monitoring.
red_flags: Sudden vision loss or flashes suggesting retinal disease
Head tilting suggesting strabismus or nystagmus
Eye pain or redness suggesting anterior segment disease

user_symptom_description: I've been having very painful, swollen lymph nodes in my armpits and groin for 5 days. I have a fever of 103°F and feel extremely unwell. I remember getting a small scratch from a stray cat 2 weeks ago.
urgency_reason: Painful regional lymphadenopathy with high fever following a cat scratch is Bartonella henselae infection requiring antibiotic treatment to reduce node suppuration.
recommended_action: GP appointment within 24 hours; Bartonella henselae serology; start azithromycin 500mg day 1 then 250mg for 4 days; do not lance nodes unless pointing and fluctuant; blood cultures and LFTs; lymph node biopsy only if diagnosis uncertain.
red_flags: Encephalitis with seizures — rare Bartonella complication
Node becoming fluctuant and pointing requiring needle aspiration
Eye involvement with Parinaud's oculoglandular syndrome

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين بحس بتعب شديد في إيديا وساقيا لما بحاول أمسك حاجة أو أمشي. قلبي بيتسارع أحياناً وبضيق نفس. أنا خضت عملية قلب مفتوح من 6 شهور.
urgency_reason: Fatigue with dyspnea and palpitations 6 months after cardiac surgery may indicate persistent anemia, pericardial effusion, or residual heart failure requiring cardiac follow-up.
recommended_action: Urgent cardiology follow-up; FBC, ferritin, and BNP; ECG and echocardiogram; chest X-ray for effusion; review all medications including beta-blockers for side effects; iron infusion or transfusion if Hb below 8.
red_flags: Chest pain suggesting pericarditis or bypass graft occlusion
Rapid deterioration in exercise tolerance
New pericardial effusion with hemodynamic compromise suggesting tamponade

user_symptom_description: I've had itchy red scaly patches on my elbows and knees for 2 years. They get worse in winter and improve in summer with sunlight. The patches have a silver scale on top and bleed a bit when I scratch them.
urgency_reason: Chronic plaque psoriasis at extensor sites is a well-recognized pattern that responds to topical therapy but requires dermatology review for moderate-to-severe disease.
recommended_action: Topical potent corticosteroid plus vitamin D analogue (calcipotriol/betamethasone) alternating; coal tar shampoo for scalp; PASI scoring at dermatology; methotrexate or biologics for severe disease; screen for psoriatic arthritis.
red_flags: Erythrodermic psoriasis with widespread skin erythema and systemic compromise
Pustular psoriasis with fever
Joint pain suggesting psoriatic arthritis

user_symptom_description: عندي 26 سنة وبقالي أسبوعين بحس بألم في قضيبي وخصيتيا مع حمى وبيجيلي قشعريرة. إيدي الأيسر متورمة وبحسها دافئة ومتألمة من أسبوع.
urgency_reason: Fever with polyarticular involvement and genitourinary symptoms in a young man suggests disseminated gonococcal infection requiring blood cultures and IV antibiotics before irreversible joint damage.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately; blood cultures, urethral swab, and joint aspiration if effusion; IV ceftriaxone 1g daily; transition to oral antibiotics after 24-48 hours; sexual health clinic referral; partner notification.
red_flags: Purulent joint with complete loss of movement suggesting septic arthritis
Endocarditis signs — new murmur, splinter hemorrhages
Purpuric skin lesions from bacteremia

user_symptom_description: I'm 74 and I've been feeling increasingly breathless walking up stairs for 3 months. Recently I fainted in the supermarket. My doctor heard a harsh murmur at my chest. I've also had some chest tightness on exertion.
possible_conditions: Heart Failure with Preserved Ejection Fraction
urgency_reason: The classic triad of syncope, angina, and dyspnea with a systolic murmur in an elderly woman is severe aortic stenosis — median survival without intervention is under 2 years after syncope.
recommended_action: Urgent cardiology referral; echocardiogram to quantify valve area and gradient; avoid strenuous activity; cardiac catheterization; TAVI or surgical AVR depending on surgical risk; do not use vasodilators.
red_flags: Sudden complete syncope with no warning suggesting critical obstruction
Acute pulmonary edema
Ventricular arrhythmia from LVH and ischemia

user_symptom_description: عندي 49 سنة وبقالي شهر بحس بألم في بطني على الجانب الأيمن أعلى وتحته متناوباً وبيجيلي إسهال فيه مخاط أحياناً وبيلاقي دم. وزني نزل وحاسس بتعب عام.
urgency_reason: Right-sided abdominal pain with blood in stool, weight loss, and fatigue in a middle-aged man meets urgent cancer pathway criteria requiring colonoscopy.
recommended_action: Urgent 2-week cancer pathway colonoscopy; CBC for anemia; CEA; CT abdomen-pelvis; CRP and ESR; stool for ova, cysts, and culture to exclude infective cause; iron replacement if anemic.
red_flags: Palpable right iliac fossa mass
Acute bowel obstruction with distension
Peritoneal signs suggesting perforation

user_symptom_description: My 7-year-old has been having episodes where he suddenly goes rigid for a few seconds then starts jerking all over his body. His eyes roll back, he turns blue around the lips, and he's completely unresponsive for about 2 minutes. He then sleeps deeply afterward.
urgency_reason: A first unprovoked generalized tonic-clonic seizure in a 7-year-old requires emergency assessment and neuroimaging to identify a structural cause before diagnosing idiopathic epilepsy.
recommended_action: Go to pediatric ER; check glucose and electrolytes; MRI brain; EEG; neurology referral; parental seizure first aid education; consider anti-epileptic medication after second unprovoked seizure; driving and activity restrictions discussion.
red_flags: Seizure lasting over 5 minutes requiring rectal diazepam or buccal midazolam
Focal neurological deficit persisting after seizure
Serial seizures without recovery suggesting status epilepticus

user_symptom_description: بقالي سنة بحس بألم متكرر في بطني السري بيجيلي مع الدورة بالضبط وبيشع لظهري. التوجع شديد لدرجة بستنى إجازة من الشغل. علاج الألم العادي مش بينفع.
urgency_reason: NSAID-resistant dysmenorrhea causing occupational impairment requires pelvic MRI to distinguish adenomyosis from endometriosis and guide hormonal or surgical management.
recommended_action: Gynecology referral; pelvic ultrasound and MRI for adenomyosis or endometriosis; trial of combined OCP or levonorgestrel IUD; laparoscopy if MRI inconclusive; discuss definitive surgical options if childbearing complete.
red_flags: Sudden severe pelvic pain mid-cycle suggesting ruptured ovarian cyst
Dyspareunia worsening suggesting deep infiltrating endometriosis
Infertility alongside menstrual pain

user_symptom_description: Three weeks ago I noticed my speech has been slightly slurred and I've had difficulty finding words in conversation. My wife says I seem to take longer to process questions. I'm 76 with a history of high blood pressure.
urgency_reason: Subacute speech and cognitive changes with hypertension history in an elderly man raises concern for cerebrovascular disease requiring urgent MRI and antiplatelet therapy.
recommended_action: Urgent neurology referral; MRI brain with DWI; carotid Doppler; optimize blood pressure below 130/80; start aspirin if lacunar infarcts confirmed; cognitive assessment; speech therapy referral.
red_flags: Sudden step-wise decline suggesting new acute stroke
Gait apraxia with urinary incontinence suggesting NPH
Rapid global deterioration suggesting Creutzfeldt-Jakob disease

user_symptom_description: عندي 20 سنة وبقالي أسبوعين بقلق من إن إيديا أو وجهي أو شعري مش مظبوطين لدرجة إني ببقى 3-4 ساعات قدام المرايا كل يوم ومش بخرج من البيت من الإحراج.
urgency_reason: Body dysmorphic disorder causing complete social isolation and hours of compulsive checking requires urgent psychiatric assessment as suicide risk is significantly elevated in this condition.
recommended_action: Urgent psychiatry referral; suicide risk assessment at first contact; CBT with ERP targeting mirror checking; high-dose SSRI such as fluvoxamine or sertraline; advise against cosmetic procedures which worsen BDD.
red_flags: Suicidal ideation linked to perceived defect
Seeking cosmetic procedures which can reinforce the disorder
Delusional intensity of belief not responding to CBT

user_symptom_description: I have type 2 diabetes and high blood pressure. For the past month I've noticed frothy bubbly urine every morning and my ankles have been swelling, particularly at the end of the day.
urgency_reason: Frothy urine indicating proteinuria with edema in a diabetic hypertensive patient suggests diabetic nephropathy requiring urgent renal function and proteinuria quantification.
recommended_action: Urgent spot urine albumin:creatinine ratio; serum creatinine and eGFR; optimize BP below 130/80 with ACE inhibitor; tighten glycemic control; nephrology referral if eGFR below 45 or proteinuria heavy; low-protein diet.
red_flags: eGFR below 30 indicating advanced CKD
Serum potassium above 6 from RAAS blockade
Nephrotic-range proteinuria above 3.5g daily with hypoalbuminemia

user_symptom_description: My 8-year-old fell from a slide and hit her head. She cried immediately but then seemed fine. An hour later she vomited twice and says her head hurts a lot. She is now very sleepy and hard to wake up.
urgency_reason: A lucid interval followed by progressive drowsiness after head trauma is a neurosurgical emergency — extradural hematoma from middle meningeal artery injury requires immediate CT and urgent surgical evacuation.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; go to pediatric ER; urgent CT head without delay; neurosurgical team on standby; do not give sedating medications; monitor GCS every 15 minutes; surgical evacuation if EDH confirmed.
red_flags: GCS dropping below 13 — intubation and emergency surgery
Fixed and dilated pupil from herniation
Irregular breathing pattern suggesting brainstem compromise

user_symptom_description: بقالي 3 أسابيع بحس بألم في ظهر فخذي الأيمن بيشع لتحت الركبة ويوصل للقدم. الألم زي إبرة كهربا وبيزيد لما بقعد أو بمشي كتير وبيروح لو اتمددت على ظهري.
possible_conditions: Lumbar Disc Herniation L4/L5 or L5/S1
primary_condition: Lumbar Disc Herniation L4/L5 or L5/S1
urgency_reason: Classic sciatica with dermatomal radiation below the knee requires MRI to confirm disc level and guide conservative versus surgical management.
recommended_action: MRI lumbar spine; NSAIDs and gabapentin or amitriptyline for neuropathic pain; avoid prolonged sitting; physiotherapy; epidural steroid injection at 6 weeks if no improvement; surgical microdiscectomy if foot drop develops.
red_flags: Foot drop on dorsiflexion
Saddle anesthesia or perianal numbness
Bilateral leg symptoms with bowel or bladder involvement

user_symptom_description: I've been having a dull ache in my upper left abdomen for 3 weeks. When my doctor examined me she felt something enlarged under my left rib cage. I've lost about 6kg and have drenching night sweats.
urgency_reason: Massive splenomegaly with B symptoms in an elderly woman requires urgent haematology evaluation to diagnose lymphoma or myeloproliferative disorder and initiate treatment.
recommended_action: Urgent FBC with differential and blood film; LDH, uric acid, and ESR; CT chest-abdomen-pelvis; bone marrow biopsy; BCR-ABL for CML; haematology referral same week; PET-CT if lymphoma suspected.
red_flags: Splenic rupture from massive enlargement presenting with acute severe left-sided pain
Blast crisis in CML with very high WBC
Hyperviscosity syndrome with visual changes

user_symptom_description: عندي 52 سنة وبعد ما ركضت في السباق من أسبوعين، حسيت بألم مفاجئ في ساقي اليمين ورجلي باردة وزرقاء. مش قادر أحرك أصابعي ومحسش بيها.
possible_conditions: Aortic Dissection Extending to Iliac Artery
urgency_reason: The 6 Ps of acute limb ischemia are present — pain, pallor, pulselessness, paresthesia, paralysis, and poikilothermia — this is a vascular emergency with a 6-hour window before irreversible muscle death.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; go to vascular surgery ER; IV heparin bolus; urgent CT angiography; embolectomy or intra-arterial thrombolysis within 6 hours; do not elevate the limb; fasciotomy if reperfusion syndrome develops.
red_flags: Fixed mottled skin with muscle rigor indicating irreversible ischemia
Systemic acidosis from ischemic necrosis
Cardiac source of embolism requiring echo and anticoagulation

user_symptom_description: I've had a persistent dry cough for six weeks that won't go away. It gets worse at night and after meals. My throat always feels like something is stuck in it and my voice sounds hoarse in the mornings.
urgency_reason: Chronic dry cough with globus and postprandial worsening is consistent with silent reflux requiring dietary modification and PPI trial rather than urgent intervention.
recommended_action: Start twice-daily PPI trial for 8 weeks; elevate head of bed 30 degrees; avoid late meals, caffeine, alcohol, and acidic foods; refer for laryngoscopy if no improvement at 8 weeks.
red_flags: Hemoptysis or blood-tinged sputum
Unintentional weight loss over 5kg
Dysphagia or painful swallowing

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين بحس بألم شديد في صدري من الجنب الأيسر بيتحرك للكتف، وبيزيد لما بنام على ضهري وبيقل لما بقعد متقدمة للأمام. عندي 68 سنة وعندي ضغط.
urgency_reason: Positional chest pain relieved by leaning forward in an elderly hypertensive woman is classic pericarditis requiring urgent ECG and echocardiogram to exclude pericardial effusion.
recommended_action: Urgent ECG and echocardiogram today; check CRP, ESR, troponin, and CBC; start high-dose aspirin or ibuprofen with colchicine if pericarditis confirmed; restrict physical activity; admit if effusion detected.
red_flags: Muffled heart sounds with hypotension suggesting tamponade
ST elevation across multiple leads
Fever above 38.5 with signs of systemic infection

user_symptom_description: My 4-year-old has been limping for three days and refusing to walk. He had a cold last week but it cleared up. He doesn't have a fever now but he cries whenever I try to move his left hip and keeps his leg turned outward.
urgency_reason: Acute hip pain with restricted movement in a child requires urgent differentiation from septic arthritis which can destroy the joint within hours if untreated.
recommended_action: Urgent hip ultrasound to detect effusion; check WBC, CRP, ESR; apply Kocher criteria to risk-stratify for septic arthritis; if Kocher score 3-4 admit for joint aspiration; if transient synovitis confirmed give ibuprofen and rest with 48-hour follow-up.
red_flags: Fever developing above 38.5 degrees
CRP above 20 or WBC above 12000
Child screaming with any passive hip movement

user_symptom_description: أنا عندي 22 سنة وبقالي شهر بحس بوخز وتنميل في إيدي الاتنين لما بصحى من النوم، وبعدين بيفضل معايا طول النهار. بيزيد لما بشيل حاجات تقيلة أو بكتب على الكمبيوتر كتير.
urgency_reason: Bilateral nocturnal hand tingling worsened by repetitive activities in a young adult is classic carpal tunnel syndrome requiring nerve conduction study and ergonomic intervention before surgical consideration.
recommended_action: Nerve conduction study and EMG to confirm bilateral CTS; night splints in neutral wrist position; ergonomic keyboard adjustment; NSAID course for 2 weeks; corticosteroid injection if no improvement at 6 weeks; surgical decompression if thenar wasting develops.
red_flags: Thenar muscle wasting indicating advanced nerve damage
Complete loss of grip strength
Symptoms spreading to forearm and shoulder suggesting proximal entrapment

user_symptom_description: I've noticed blood in my urine twice this week. There's no pain at all which is what's scaring me. I'm 48, I smoke about 15 cigarettes a day and work in a factory that handles industrial dyes. The toilet water turns completely pink.
urgency_reason: Painless macroscopic hematuria in a middle-aged male smoker with occupational aromatic amine exposure is bladder cancer until proven otherwise and requires urgent urological evaluation.
recommended_action: Urgent urine cytology and flexible cystoscopy within 2 weeks; CT urogram to assess upper urinary tract; urine culture to exclude infection; smoking cessation counseling; occupational exposure documentation for medicolegal record.
red_flags: Clot retention causing inability to void
Weight loss or bone pain suggesting metastatic disease
Bilateral hydronephrosis on imaging

user_symptom_description: عندي 75 سنة وبقالي شهرين بنسى أسماء ناس قريبين مني وبضيع مكان مفاتيحي وموبايلي كل يوم. امبارح اتوهت في الشارع اللي ساكن فيه من 40 سنة. مراتي قلقانة عليا أوي.
extracted_symptoms: progressive memory loss for familiar names
urgency_reason: Progressive episodic memory loss with spatial disorientation in an elderly man requires urgent cognitive assessment and neuroimaging to establish dementia type and exclude reversible causes.
recommended_action: MMSE and MoCA cognitive testing urgently; MRI brain with hippocampal volumetry; check B12, folate, TSH, syphilis serology to exclude reversible causes; involve family in safety planning; driving assessment; neurology referral within 2 weeks.
red_flags: Rapid decline over days suggesting delirium or CJD
Visual hallucinations suggesting Lewy body dementia
Gait disturbance and urinary incontinence suggesting normal pressure hydrocephalus

user_symptom_description: I'm 19 and I keep having episodes where my vision goes black for about 30 seconds when I stand up quickly. I feel my heart pounding and get really lightheaded. I've actually fainted twice in the past month, once at the gym.
urgency_reason: Recurrent syncope with exertional trigger in a young adult requires cardiac evaluation to exclude structural heart disease before attributing to benign POTS.
recommended_action: 12-lead ECG and echocardiogram; active stand test with lying and standing BP and HR measurements; 24-hour Holter monitor; increase fluid and salt intake; compression stockings; tilt table test if diagnosis unclear; avoid sudden positional changes.
red_flags: Syncope during exercise rather than after suggesting arrhythmia
Family history of sudden cardiac death
Chest pain or palpitations preceding loss of consciousness

user_symptom_description: بقالي 3 أيام عندي إسهال مائي شديد جداً، أكتر من 10 مرات في اليوم، ودم في البراز. معاه تقلصات بطن مؤلمة جداً وحمى 39. كنت آكل في مطعم من 2 يوم قبل ما يبدأ.
extracted_symptoms: bloody watery diarrhea more than 10 times daily
urgency_reason: Bloody diarrhea exceeding 10 episodes daily with high fever and severe cramps indicates invasive bacterial dysentery with risk of dehydration, sepsis, and hemolytic uremic syndrome.
recommended_action: Stool culture and sensitivity urgently; CBC, CRP, urea, creatinine, and electrolytes; IV fluid resuscitation if signs of dehydration; ciprofloxacin or azithromycin after culture; avoid antidiarrheal agents; admit if unable to tolerate oral fluids or HUS suspected.
red_flags: Decreased urine output with rising creatinine suggesting HUS
Altered consciousness or seizures
Peritoneal signs suggesting bowel perforation

user_symptom_description: I'm 71 and for the past month I've been waking up at 3am completely drenched in sweat, needing to change my clothes. I also have this deep aching pain in my mid-back that's constant and doesn't go away with paracetamol. I haven't had a fall or injury.
urgency_reason: Constant non-mechanical back pain with B symptoms in an elderly woman requires urgent malignancy workup as spinal metastases can cause irreversible cord compression if not detected early.
recommended_action: Urgent MRI spine with whole-body staging; CBC, ESR, CRP, LDH, serum protein electrophoresis, PSA, CA-125, and calcium; chest X-ray; bone profile; oncology or haematology referral within one week; do not delay imaging.
red_flags: Leg weakness or numbness suggesting cord compression requiring emergency MRI
Bowel or bladder dysfunction
Pathological fracture on imaging

user_symptom_description: My 2-year-old has had a high fever of 40 degrees for 5 days that keeps coming back even with Calpol. Her eyes look red and puffy, her lips are cracked and really red, and her hands and feet are swollen. She has a rash on her tummy too.
urgency_reason: Five classic features of Kawasaki disease in a toddler constitute a pediatric emergency requiring same-day IVIG and aspirin to prevent coronary artery aneurysm formation.
recommended_action: Emergency pediatric admission today; echocardiogram to assess coronary arteries; IVIG 2g/kg single infusion plus high-dose aspirin immediately; CBC, CRP, ESR, ALT, albumin, urinalysis; daily cardiac monitoring; repeat echo at 2 and 6 weeks.
red_flags: Coronary artery dilatation on echo requiring anticoagulation
Myocarditis with reduced ejection fraction
IVIG resistance requiring second dose or infliximab

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوع بحس بألم حاد في بطني من الجنب الأيمن تحت الضلوع مباشرة، بيزيد جداً لما باكل أكل دسم أو شيبس. الألم بيجي على شكل نوبات وبيصحيني من النوم. أحياناً بحس بغثيان.
urgency_reason: Episodic right upper quadrant pain triggered by fatty food with nocturnal attacks strongly indicates symptomatic cholelithiasis requiring ultrasound and surgical referral to prevent cholecystitis.
recommended_action: Urgent abdominal ultrasound; LFTs, GGT, ALP, amylase, and bilirubin; low-fat diet immediately; analgesia with diclofenac suppository; surgical referral for laparoscopic cholecystectomy; if fever or jaundice develops go to ER immediately.
red_flags: Fever with rigors suggesting acute cholecystitis or cholangitis
Jaundice suggesting common bile duct stone
Severe constant pain suggesting perforation or pancreatitis

user_symptom_description: I'm 26 and I've been losing hair in round bald patches on my scalp. It started as one small patch two months ago and now I have three patches. There's no itching or pain. My mum has thyroid disease and I've been under a lot of stress at work.
urgency_reason: Patchy non-scarring alopecia in a young adult with autoimmune family history is consistent with alopecia areata which is not medically dangerous but requires dermatological assessment and thyroid screening.
recommended_action: Dermatology referral within 4 weeks; check TSH, T4, ANA, and CBC to screen for associated autoimmune conditions; intralesional triamcinolone injections for active patches; minoxidil topical as adjunct; counsel on 80% spontaneous regrowth within one year for limited disease.
red_flags: Rapid progression to total scalp loss suggesting alopecia totalis
Associated nail pitting and loss suggesting severe systemic alopecia areata
Scarring or scaling suggesting tinea or lichen planopilaris

user_symptom_description: عندي 70 سنة وبقالي يومين مش قادر أمشي صح، رجلي الشمال تقيلة وبتتسحب. وكمان كلامي بقى تقيل ومش واضح. مفيش صداع أو قيء بس حاسس إن نص وشي مش بيتحرك زي الأول.
extracted_symptoms: left leg weakness with dragging gait
urgency_reason: Acute focal neurological deficits including limb weakness, dysarthria, and facial asymmetry in an elderly man are a stroke emergency requiring immediate brain imaging and potential thrombolysis.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; do not wait; CT brain without contrast on arrival to exclude hemorrhage; if within 4.5-hour thrombolysis window give IV alteplase; MRI DWI if CT negative; antiplatelet therapy; admit to stroke unit; swallowing assessment before oral intake.
red_flags: Deteriorating consciousness level suggesting large hemisphere infarct
Vomiting with severe headache suggesting hemorrhagic transformation
Airway compromise requiring intubation

user_symptom_description: I've had eczema since childhood but for the past three weeks my skin all over my body has turned bright red and is peeling in sheets. I have a fever and I feel cold even though it's warm. I stopped one of my medications last week on my own.
urgency_reason: Erythroderma affecting more than 90% of body surface causes massive fluid and protein loss, thermoregulatory failure, and high-output cardiac failure and is a dermatological emergency requiring immediate hospitalization.
recommended_action: Emergency admission; IV fluid resuscitation and electrolyte correction; temperature regulation with warm blankets; skin barrier emollients hourly; dermatology consult same day; identify and stop offending drug; systemic immunosuppression with cyclosporine or biologics; monitor cardiac status.
red_flags: Hypotension and tachycardia indicating high-output cardiac failure
Sepsis from skin barrier loss
Severe hypoalbuminemia with peripheral edema

user_symptom_description: أنا عندي 25 سنة وبقالي 3 أشهر بحس بحرقان وألم في المعدة قبل الأكل وبيروح بعد ما باكل. بعيط من الألم أحياناً في الصبح على الصايم. شربت حاجات على المعدة بس مش بيفيد كتير.
urgency_reason: Classic hunger pain relieved by food with early morning fasting pain strongly indicates duodenal ulcer requiring H. pylori testing and PPI therapy to prevent perforation or bleeding.
recommended_action: H. pylori urea breath test or stool antigen test; upper GI endoscopy if symptoms persist beyond 4 weeks or alarm features present; triple therapy with PPI, amoxicillin, and clarithromycin for 14 days if H. pylori positive; avoid NSAIDs and alcohol; repeat breath test 4 weeks after treatment.
red_flags: Black tarry stool suggesting upper GI bleeding
Sudden severe pain suggesting perforation requiring emergency surgery
Vomiting old blood or coffee-ground material

user_symptom_description: I'm 35 and I've been having random episodes of my heart fluttering and skipping beats for about two months. They last a few seconds, happen several times a day, and I feel them in my throat. Coffee and stress seem to make them worse. I don't faint.
urgency_reason: Isolated palpitations without syncope or chest pain in a young adult with clear lifestyle triggers are likely benign ectopics but require ECG and Holter to exclude structural or arrhythmic cause.
recommended_action: 12-lead ECG; 24 or 48-hour Holter monitor; echocardiogram to assess cardiac structure; thyroid function tests; reduce caffeine and alcohol; stress management; beta-blocker if PVCs symptomatic and frequent; reassure if structurally normal heart.
red_flags: Syncope or pre-syncope during palpitation episode
Palpitations with chest pain or breathlessness
Family history of sudden cardiac death under 40

user_symptom_description: ابنتي عندها 9 سنين وبقالها أسبوع بتشكي من ألم في رجلها الشمال في المنطقة تحت الركبة. الألم بيزيد لما بتلعب وبيقل لما بتريح. مفيش تورم واضح بس في نتوء صغير على العظم. مش بيها حمى.
urgency_reason: Activity-related anterior knee pain with tibial tuberosity prominence in a growing child is classic Osgood-Schlatter disease, a benign self-limiting traction apophysitis requiring activity modification.
recommended_action: Clinical diagnosis; X-ray knee if atypical features; reduce high-impact activities like running and jumping; quadriceps and hamstring stretching program; ibuprofen for pain during flares; patellar tendon strap; reassure parents that condition resolves with skeletal maturity.
red_flags: Fever or night sweats suggesting infection or malignancy
Persistent pain at rest unrelated to activity
Rapidly enlarging bony mass suggesting tumor

user_symptom_description: I haven't been able to sleep properly for four months. I lie in bed for hours, my mind won't stop racing, and then I wake up at 4am and can't go back to sleep. I'm exhausted all day but I can't nap either. I've started dreading bedtime.
urgency_reason: Four-month insomnia with all three subtypes and conditioned arousal is chronic insomnia disorder requiring cognitive behavioral therapy for insomnia as first-line treatment before any pharmacological intervention.
recommended_action: CBT-I program as first-line treatment including sleep restriction, stimulus control, and relaxation techniques; sleep diary for 2 weeks; screen for depression and anxiety with PHQ-9 and GAD-7; check TSH; avoid benzodiazepines as first step; short-term melatonin or low-dose doxepin if CBT-I unavailable.
red_flags: Suicidal ideation in context of sleep deprivation and depression
Witnessed apneas or loud snoring suggesting OSA requiring polysomnography
Leg restlessness at night suggesting restless legs syndrome

user_symptom_description: عندي 66 سنة وبقالي أسبوع بحس بألم شديد جداً في فكي من ناحية اليمين، زي ضربات كهرباء بتجي كل شوية وتروح في ثواني. بيجي لما باكل أو باتكلم أو حتى لما اللقمة بتلمس خدي. بيجنني من الألم.
urgency_reason: Classic electric shock paroxysms triggered by light touch in the trigeminal distribution in an elderly woman requires MRI to exclude neurovascular compression or secondary causes and urgent pain control.
recommended_action: MRI brain with trigeminal nerve protocol to exclude vascular compression or demyelination; start carbamazepine 100mg twice daily titrating slowly; dental examination to exclude odontogenic cause; neurosurgery referral for microvascular decompression if medication fails or intolerable side effects.
red_flags: Bilateral pain or sensory loss suggesting secondary trigeminal neuralgia from MS or tumor
Continuous background pain in addition to paroxysms
Corneal reflex loss suggesting trigeminal nerve damage

user_symptom_description: I'm 28 and for the past two weeks I've been feeling completely hopeless and empty. I can't get out of bed, I've stopped eating properly, I can't concentrate at work, and I've been crying for no reason. I've been thinking that everyone would be better off without me.
possible_conditions: Major Depressive Disorder with Suicidal Ideation
primary_condition: Major Depressive Disorder with Suicidal Ideation
urgency_reason: Active suicidal ideation alongside five DSM criteria for major depression in a young adult requires same-day psychiatric assessment and safety planning to prevent self-harm.
recommended_action: Same-day psychiatric evaluation; suicide risk assessment using Columbia scale; safety planning with removal of lethal means; start SSRI such as sertraline 50mg; arrange urgent psychological therapy; involve trusted family member or friend; follow up within 48 to 72 hours; if active plan for self-harm arrange immediate admission.
red_flags: Active plan or intent to self-harm requiring emergency admission
Psychotic features with command hallucinations
Refusal of any safety planning or support

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهر بحس بضيق في التنفس لما بصعد سلم أو بمشي بسرعة، وبليل بقى بنام على 3 مخدات علشان أقدر أتنفس. كمان رجلي الاتنين منتفخين من فترة. عندي ضغط وسكر من 5 سنين.
urgency_reason: Orthopnea with bilateral leg edema and exertional dyspnea in a hypertensive diabetic patient indicates decompensated heart failure requiring urgent echocardiogram and diuretic therapy.
recommended_action: Urgent echocardiogram; BNP or NT-proBNP; CXR for pulmonary congestion; ECG; optimize antihypertensives; start or uptitrate loop diuretic furosemide; ACE inhibitor and beta-blocker for HFrEF if confirmed; daily weight monitoring; strict 1.5-litre fluid restriction; low-sodium diet.
red_flags: Resting dyspnea or inability to lie flat at all requiring emergency admission
Oxygen saturation below 92 percent
Acute pulmonary edema with frothy pink sputum

user_symptom_description: My 7-year-old has had a sore throat and fever for 3 days. This morning I noticed a bright red rash all over his chest and back that feels rough like sandpaper. His tongue looks bumpy and red like a strawberry. His throat is really red with white spots.
urgency_reason: Classic scarlet fever presentation with sandpaper rash, strawberry tongue, and streptococcal tonsillitis in a school-age child requires antibiotic treatment to prevent rheumatic fever and glomerulonephritis.
recommended_action: Throat swab for group A Streptococcus; start oral phenoxymethylpenicillin for 10 days or amoxicillin; age-appropriate paracetamol for fever; exclude school until 24 hours after starting antibiotics; urine dipstick at 2 weeks to screen for post-streptococcal glomerulonephritis.
red_flags: Spreading neck swelling suggesting peritonsillar abscess
Airway compromise with drooling and stridor
Urine turning dark or red 2 weeks later suggesting glomerulonephritis

user_symptom_description: عندي 77 سنة وبقالي أسبوعين عندي ألم شديد في كتفي الاتنين وعنقي وبيجي كمان في وركي، وبيزيد الصبح لحد ما بتحرك. مش قادر أرفع إيدي فوق رأسي وبقيت تعبان ونحلت 4 كيلو.
urgency_reason: Bilateral shoulder and hip girdle pain with morning stiffness and weight loss in an elderly man requires urgent ESR, CRP, and temporal artery assessment to exclude concurrent giant cell arteritis which causes irreversible blindness.
recommended_action: Urgent ESR and CRP; ask specifically about headache, scalp tenderness, jaw claudication, and visual symptoms; if GCA suspected start prednisolone 40-60mg immediately before biopsy; if PMR alone start prednisolone 15mg daily; temporal artery biopsy within 2 weeks; monitor for steroid side effects.
red_flags: Sudden visual loss or diplopia indicating GCA-related ischemia requiring emergency high-dose steroids
Jaw claudication suggesting GCA
New headache with scalp tenderness in a PMR patient

user_symptom_description: I'm 23 and I woke up this morning with a really swollen, red, and painful right testicle. It came on suddenly with no injury. The pain is severe and I feel sick with it. The testicle seems to be sitting higher than normal.
urgency_reason: Sudden testicular pain with high-riding testicle in a young male is testicular torsion until proven otherwise requiring surgical exploration within 4 to 6 hours to salvage the testicle.
recommended_action: Go to emergency department immediately; do not wait for ultrasound if clinical suspicion is high; urgent surgical scrotal exploration and bilateral orchidopexy; Doppler ultrasound only if diagnosis unclear and does not delay surgery; testicular salvage rate is 100 percent within 6 hours, drops to 50 percent after 12 hours.
red_flags: Time from onset exceeding 6 hours dramatically reduces salvage rate
Contralateral testicular pain suggesting bilateral torsion
Fever suggesting secondary infection if torsion missed

user_symptom_description: بقالي سنتين بعاني من ألم في البطن بيتحسن بعد ما أروح الحمام. أحياناً بيجي الإسهال وأحياناً إمساك. البطن دايماً منتفخة ومليانة غازات، وبيزيد التعب والمواقف الضاغطة.
urgency_reason: Two-year history of Rome IV criteria-meeting symptoms without alarm features is consistent with IBS requiring dietary modification and reassurance rather than urgent investigation.
recommended_action: Celiac serology and TTG-IgA; full blood count and CRP; hydrogen breath test for SIBO; low-FODMAP diet trial for 6 weeks; antispasmodics such as mebeverine for cramp; soluble fiber supplementation; address psychological stress with CBT referral; colonoscopy only if alarm features present.
red_flags: Rectal bleeding or mucus in stool
Unintentional weight loss over 5kg
Symptoms waking patient from sleep suggesting organic disease

user_symptom_description: I'm 74 and I had a fall in my bathroom last night. I can't put any weight on my left leg at all. My left hip area looks bruised and my left leg looks shorter and twisted outward compared to my right. I'm in terrible pain.
extracted_symptoms: inability to weight-bear on left leg
urgency_reason: Classic neck of femur fracture presentation in an elderly woman after a low-energy fall requires emergency admission and surgery within 36 hours to reduce mortality and restore mobility.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; do not attempt to move patient; IV morphine analgesia; urgent AP pelvis and lateral hip X-ray; fast-track orthopaedic admission; surgical fixation or hemiarthroplasty within 36 hours; VTE prophylaxis; bone protection with calcium, vitamin D, and bisphosphonate; falls and osteoporosis assessment.
red_flags: Neurovascular compromise with absent distal pulses
Pathological fracture from underlying malignancy on X-ray
Perioperative cardiac or respiratory decompensation

user_symptom_description: أنا عندي 27 سنة وبقالي 3 أسابيع بلاحظ إن جلدي اصفر وعيني برضو اصفرت، وبحس بتعب شديد وفقدان الشهية. عندي ألم خفيف في بطني من الجنب الأيمن. مجاورة صاحبتي اللي اتعملتلها إبرة مؤخراً.
urgency_reason: New-onset jaundice with hepatic symptoms and exposure history in a young adult requires urgent hepatitis serology to establish diagnosis, assess liver function, and identify infectious contacts.
recommended_action: Urgent liver function tests, INR, and full hepatitis serology including HBsAg, anti-HBc IgM, anti-HAV IgM, HCV RNA; abdominal ultrasound; public health notification if hepatitis B confirmed; rest, hydration, avoid alcohol and hepatotoxic drugs; antiviral therapy if acute on chronic or fulminant hepatitis.
red_flags: INR above 1.5 suggesting acute liver failure requiring transplant assessment
Encephalopathy or asterixis
Rapidly rising bilirubin with coagulopathy

user_symptom_description: I've been getting migraines since I was a teenager but lately something different is happening. Last week I had one where my whole right arm went numb and weak for about an hour before the headache started. It scared me a lot. I'm 42 now.
urgency_reason: New motor aura lasting one hour in a middle-aged adult with migraine history requires urgent neuroimaging to exclude TIA or stroke before attributing to hemiplegic migraine.
recommended_action: Urgent MRI brain with DWI sequences to exclude ischemic event; carotid Doppler; ECG and cardiac monitoring; if TIA confirmed start aspirin 300mg immediately then clopidogrel; if hemiplegic migraine confirmed avoid triptans and ergotamines; preventive therapy with flunarizine or verapamil; family screening for CACNA1A mutation.
red_flags: Motor deficit lasting more than 24 hours suggesting stroke not migraine
Symptoms occurring without subsequent headache suggesting TIA
Altered consciousness during aura suggesting basilar migraine

user_symptom_description: بنتي عندها 3 سنين وبقالها يومين تقيئ كل ما تاكل أو تشرب حاجة، وعندها إسهال. النهارده بقت خاملة جداً وعيونها غايرة وبكيها من غير دموع. شفايفها جافة جداً.
urgency_reason: Sunken eyes, absent tears, dry mucous membranes, and lethargy in a toddler indicate severe dehydration of more than 10% body weight requiring immediate IV fluid resuscitation.
recommended_action: Emergency admission immediately; IV access and bolus normal saline 20ml/kg; rehydration over 4 hours with maintenance plus deficit replacement; electrolytes, glucose, and urine output monitoring; oral rehydration solution once tolerating; rotavirus testing; if glucose low treat immediately; reassess every 30 minutes.
red_flags: Altered consciousness or seizure suggesting hyponatremic or hypoglycemic complication
Bilious vomiting suggesting surgical obstruction
Petechial rash suggesting meningococcal septicemia

user_symptom_description: I'm 39 and for the past month I've had pain in both of my eyes when I move them, and my vision in my right eye went blurry for about a week and then came back. I also noticed that sometimes my right hand feels numb and I feel exhausted all the time.
extracted_symptoms: transient unilateral visual blurring resolving spontaneously
urgency_reason: Two separate neurological episodes affecting optic nerves and sensory pathways separated in time and space in a young adult woman fulfil McDonald criteria for MS requiring urgent neurological evaluation and MRI.
recommended_action: Urgent MRI brain and spinal cord with gadolinium; visual evoked potentials; CSF analysis for oligoclonal bands; AQP4 and MOG antibodies to exclude NMOSD; ophthalmology referral for optic neuritis; IV methylprednisolone for acute relapse; disease-modifying therapy discussion with neurologist; multidisciplinary MS team referral.
red_flags: Rapidly progressive paraparesis suggesting aggressive MS or NMOSD
Sphincter dysfunction with spinal cord lesion
Cognitive decline suggesting primary progressive MS

user_symptom_description: عندي 80 سنة وبقالي أسبوع وأنا هايج ومش عارف مكاني، وبشوف حاجات مش موجودة في الأوضة. أهلي بيقولوا إني مش عارفهم. قبلها كنت تمام. عندي ضغط وبآخد كتير أدوية.
urgency_reason: Acute onset confusion with hallucinations in an elderly patient on multiple medications is delirium until proven otherwise requiring immediate identification and treatment of underlying cause.
recommended_action: Emergency admission; full medication review and stop anticholinergic, sedative, and opioid drugs where possible; urine culture, CBC, CMP, blood glucose, LFTs, TFTs; CT brain to exclude stroke or bleed; ECG; blood cultures if febrile; non-pharmacological orientation measures; haloperidol only if patient safety at risk; involve family in reorientation.
red_flags: Focal neurological deficits suggesting stroke
Fever with neck stiffness suggesting meningitis
Severe agitation with risk of falls or self-harm

user_symptom_description: I'm 24 and last night I was at a party and had a few drinks. About an hour later my whole body started itching, I came up in huge red welts all over my skin, my throat started to feel tight, and I couldn't breathe properly. My friend gave me an antihistamine but it didn't help much.
urgency_reason: Urticaria with throat tightness and respiratory difficulty constitutes anaphylaxis requiring immediate intramuscular adrenaline regardless of antihistamine administration.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; IM adrenaline 0.5mg into outer thigh now; lay flat with legs raised unless breathing difficulty; high-flow oxygen; IV access and normal saline bolus; chlorphenamine and hydrocortisone IV after adrenaline; 6-hour observation minimum; prescribe two adrenaline auto-injectors on discharge; allergy clinic referral.
red_flags: Stridor suggesting upper airway obstruction requiring intubation
Hypotension unresponsive to adrenaline suggesting refractory anaphylaxis
Loss of consciousness

user_symptom_description: بقالي 4 أشهر بحس بألم في مفاصلي الصغيرة في إيدي الاتنين وأصابعي، خصوصاً الصبح لما بصحى بيكونوا متيبسين ساعة على الأقل. المفاصل حمرا ومنتفخة. بدأت برضو أتعب بسرعة وعندي حمى خفيفة.
urgency_reason: Symmetrical small joint synovitis with morning stiffness exceeding one hour strongly suggests early rheumatoid arthritis requiring urgent DMARD therapy within the window of opportunity to prevent joint destruction.
recommended_action: Anti-CCP antibodies, rheumatoid factor, ESR, CRP, and ANA; X-rays of hands and feet; ultrasound to confirm synovitis; start methotrexate 10mg weekly with folic acid and hydroxychloroquine early; NSAIDs and bridging prednisolone for symptom relief; rheumatology referral within 3 weeks; DAS28 score monitoring.
red_flags: Cervical spine instability with neck pain and arm symptoms
Vasculitic skin lesions or peripheral neuropathy suggesting extra-articular RA
Rapidly progressive joint destruction on X-ray

user_symptom_description: I work construction and for the past two months I've had a dull constant ache in my lower back that shoots down my right leg to my foot. It feels like electricity or burning. Sitting in the van kills me, coughing makes it worse, and lying on my left side gives some relief.
extracted_symptoms: lower back pain with right leg radiation to foot
possible_conditions: Lumbar Disc Herniation L4-L5 or L5-S1
primary_condition: Lumbar Disc Herniation L4-L5 or L5-S1
urgency_reason: Classic sciatica with dermatomal radiation to foot worsened by Valsalva maneuver in a manual worker requires MRI to identify disc level and guide targeted management.
recommended_action: MRI lumbar spine without contrast; NSAIDs and gabapentin or pregabalin for neuropathic component; physiotherapy with McKenzie extension exercises; avoid prolonged sitting and heavy lifting; epidural steroid injection at 6 weeks if no improvement; surgical microdiscectomy if foot drop or bladder dysfunction develops.
red_flags: Foot drop on dorsiflexion
Saddle anesthesia or perianal numbness
Bilateral leg weakness with bowel or bladder involvement suggesting cauda equina

user_symptom_description: عندي 69 سنة وعندي سكري من 15 سنة. لاحظت من شهرين إن جرح صغير في قدمي الأيمن مش بيتعالج وبيكبر. الجرح بيتعفن وعنده رايحة، والجلد حواليه بقى داكن. محسش بألم فيه.
extracted_symptoms: diabetic neuropathy with no pain sensation
urgency_reason: Infected non-healing diabetic foot ulcer with absent pain sensation risks rapid progression to osteomyelitis, gas gangrene, and limb amputation requiring urgent multidisciplinary diabetic foot team assessment.
recommended_action: Urgent diabetic foot team referral same week; wound swab for culture and sensitivity; X-ray foot to exclude osteomyelitis; ankle-brachial index; HbA1c and glucose optimization; broad-spectrum antibiotics including anaerobic cover; daily wound debridement; offloading with total contact cast; vascular surgery if ABI below 0.5.
red_flags: Crepitus in wound suggesting gas gangrene requiring emergency amputation
Fever and systemic sepsis from foot infection
Bone visible in wound base confirming osteomyelitis requiring 6-week IV antibiotics

user_symptom_description: I'm 21 and I've been noticing a yellowish discharge from both nipples for about 6 weeks. I'm not pregnant and not breastfeeding. My periods have been irregular and I've had some headaches behind my eyes that are different from my usual ones. I'm not on any medication.
urgency_reason: Bilateral galactorrhea with menstrual irregularity and new retro-orbital headaches in a young woman suggests prolactinoma with possible chiasmal compression requiring pituitary MRI.
recommended_action: Fasting serum prolactin level; TSH and free T4; urine pregnancy test; MRI pituitary with gadolinium; visual field testing by confrontation and perimetry; if macroadenoma confirmed start cabergoline or bromocriptine; ophthalmology referral if visual field defect; neurosurgery if chiasmal compression with visual loss.
red_flags: Bitemporal visual field loss suggesting chiasmal compression
Pituitary apoplexy with sudden severe headache and diplopia
Prolactin above 5000 suggesting giant prolactinoma

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوع بحس بألم شديد في الجنب الأيمن بيشع لأسفل البطن والخصية. الألم جاي على شكل مغص ومش بيوقف. بلقي في البول دم وبيجيني قيء من الألم.
extracted_symptoms: severe right flank pain radiating to groin and testicle
urgency_reason: Classic ureteric colic with flank-to-groin radiation, hematuria, and vomiting requires urgent CT KUB to confirm stone size and position and guide intervention.
recommended_action: Non-contrast CT KUB urgently; urine dipstick and culture; CBC, creatinine, and electrolytes; urine pH; IV diclofenac or ketorolac for analgesia plus antiemetic; alpha-blocker tamsulosin to facilitate passage of stones under 10mm; urological intervention for stones above 10mm or obstruction with infection; strain urine for stone analysis.
red_flags: Fever with loin pain suggesting obstructed infected kidney requiring emergency drainage
Rising creatinine from bilateral obstruction
Solitary kidney with obstruction

user_symptom_description: I'm 82 and my son noticed that I've been shuffling when I walk for the past year, and my handwriting has got really tiny. I shake in my right hand when I'm resting and it goes away when I pick something up. I've also been falling backwards sometimes.
extracted_symptoms: right-hand resting tremor disappearing with action
urgency_reason: Classic triad of resting tremor, bradykinesia shown by micrographia, and postural instability in an elderly man fulfils clinical criteria for Parkinson's disease requiring neurological assessment and levodopa initiation.
recommended_action: Neurological assessment with UPDRS scoring; review all medications for dopamine antagonists as reversible cause; DaTscan if diagnosis uncertain; start levodopa-carbidopa or dopamine agonist; physiotherapy for gait and balance; occupational therapy for home safety; speech therapy if dysarthria; driving assessment; falls prevention program.
red_flags: Early falls in first year suggesting PSP not PD
Dementia preceding motor symptoms suggesting Lewy body dementia
Rapid progression requiring DBS evaluation

user_symptom_description: أنا عندي 29 سنة وبقالي أسبوعين بحس بضيق في النفس فجأة حتى وأنا قاعدة، ووجعي في صدري، وقلبي بيدق بسرعة. بدأ الموضوع من بعد ما ولدت بشهر. ساقي اليسار منتفخة ومؤلمة من أسبوع.
urgency_reason: Sudden dyspnea with pleuritic chest pain, tachycardia, and symptomatic DVT in a postpartum woman is pulmonary embolism until proven otherwise requiring immediate anticoagulation and CT pulmonary angiography.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; IV access and oxygen; full anticoagulation with LMWH enoxaparin weight-based dosing immediately before imaging if high clinical probability; CTPA urgently; bilateral leg Doppler; echocardiogram if hemodynamically unstable; thrombolysis if massive PE with shock; transition to warfarin or DOAC for minimum 3 months.
red_flags: Hemodynamic instability with BP below 90 suggesting massive PE requiring thrombolysis
Right heart strain on echo or ECG
Syncope preceding presentation

user_symptom_description: My 10-year-old has had recurring abdominal pain around his belly button for three months. It comes and goes and never lasts more than an hour. He's fine between attacks. The school nurse has checked him twice and found nothing. He's been anxious about school this year.
urgency_reason: Recurrent brief periumbilical pain with normal intervals and school anxiety in a child fulfils functional abdominal pain criteria but requires basic investigations to exclude organic pathology.
recommended_action: Stool calprotectin, CBC, CRP, celiac serology, and urine culture; abdominal ultrasound; dietary diary; reassurance and explanation to family; referral to pediatric psychologist for anxiety-focused CBT; regular meals and adequate hydration; physical activity; avoid school avoidance reinforcement.
red_flags: Pain waking from sleep suggesting organic cause
Blood in stool or persistent diarrhea
Weight loss or growth faltering

user_symptom_description: بقالي 3 أشهر بحس بحرقان وحكة شديدة في منطقة الفرج، وعندي إفرازات بيضاء تقيلة زي الجبنة. بيزيد قبل الدورة بأسبوع. جربت كريمات من الصيدلية بس بترجع بعد شوية.
urgency_reason: Recurrent candidiasis occurring more than 4 times per year requires investigation for predisposing factors including diabetes and immunosuppression and long-term suppressive antifungal therapy.
recommended_action: High vaginal swab with culture and sensitivity to confirm Candida species; fasting glucose and HbA1c to exclude diabetes; HIV test; oral fluconazole 150mg for acute episode; suppressive therapy with weekly fluconazole for 6 months; avoid tight synthetic underwear; probiotics may reduce recurrence.
red_flags: Abnormal cervical cells on smear
Unusual vaginal bleeding with discharge
Failure to respond to azole therapy suggesting non-albicans Candida or resistance

user_symptom_description: I'm 73 and for six months I've been getting pain in my left calf when I walk about 200 metres. I have to stop and rest for a minute and then I can walk again. My legs feel cold and look pale compared to what they used to. I smoke heavily.
urgency_reason: Intermittent claudication with 200-metre limitation, cold pale limbs, and heavy smoking indicates significant peripheral arterial disease requiring ankle-brachial index measurement and cardiovascular risk reduction.
recommended_action: Ankle-brachial index measurement both legs; duplex Doppler ultrasound of lower limb arteries; cardiovascular risk factor assessment including lipids, glucose, and BP; urgent smoking cessation; antiplatelet therapy with aspirin or clopidogrel; statin therapy; supervised exercise program; vascular surgery referral if ABI below 0.5 or rest pain develops.
red_flags: Rest pain or nocturnal pain suggesting critical limb ischemia
Non-healing ulcer or gangrene
Sudden severe pain suggesting acute arterial occlusion

user_symptom_description: عندي 20 سنة وبقالي أسبوع عندي حمى وتعب شديد وجعي في حلقي جداً لدرجة إني مش قادر ابلع. غددي في عنقي منتفخة وكبيرة. لاحظت كمان إن عيني اصفرت شوية.
urgency_reason: Classic EBV triad of pharyngitis, cervical lymphadenopathy, and fatigue with jaundice suggesting hepatitis in a young adult requires monospot test and LFTs and strict activity restriction to prevent splenic rupture.
recommended_action: Monospot heterophile antibody test; if negative EBV-specific antibodies VCA IgM and IgG; CBC for atypical lymphocytosis; LFTs and bilirubin; avoid amoxicillin which causes rash in EBV; avoid contact sports and heavy lifting for 4 weeks due to splenomegaly risk; paracetamol for fever; rest and hydration.
red_flags: Sudden left upper quadrant pain suggesting splenic rupture requiring emergency surgery
Airway compromise from massive tonsillar swelling
Bilirubin or transaminases severely elevated suggesting EBV hepatitis

user_symptom_description: I'm 44 and I've noticed that when I cough, sneeze, or laugh I sometimes leak urine. It's been happening for about a year and it's getting embarrassing. I've had three vaginal deliveries. I also need to rush to the toilet suddenly sometimes.
extracted_symptoms: stress urinary incontinence on cough sneeze and laugh
urgency_reason: Mixed stress and urge incontinence in a multiparous woman requires pelvic floor assessment and bladder diary before considering surgical or pharmacological intervention.
recommended_action: 3-day bladder diary; pelvic floor examination for prolapse; urine culture to exclude infection; referral to women's health physiotherapist for pelvic floor muscle training for minimum 3 months; bladder training for urgency component; oxybutynin or mirabegron for overactive bladder; midurethral sling surgery if stress component predominant and refractory to physiotherapy.
red_flags: Hematuria associated with incontinence suggesting bladder tumor or stone
Neurological symptoms suggesting neurogenic bladder
Complete bladder emptying failure with overflow

user_symptom_description: بقالي 10 أيام بحس بألم شديد في رأسي من الجنب الأيمن فوق الأذن وفي فودة رأسي. الألم جاي وجاي وبيزيد لما بمضغ أكل. عندي 70 سنة وعندي ألم في كتفي برضو.

user_symptom_description: I'm 50 and recently I've been feeling full very quickly when eating, even after just a few bites. I've lost about 7kg without trying over the past two months. I have a dull constant ache in my upper abdomen that sometimes goes through to my back. I was a heavy drinker for years.

Oxygen saturation below 92 percent

user_symptom_description: I'm 30 and for two years I've been having painful periods that put me in bed for 2 days every month. The pain starts 5 days before my period and I also have deep pain during sex. I've tried multiple pain medications but nothing works well. My periods are irregular.

user_symptom_description: عندي 45 سنة وبقالي أسبوع وأنا حاسس بألم حاد وتيبس في إبهام قدمي الأيمن. الإبهام محمر ومنتفخ ولامسته بالإيد كمان بيوجعني. ماكلت لحم أوي وشربت كحول في عزومة وبعدها بأسبوع جاء الألم.

urgency_reason: Classic podagra in a middle-aged man after dietary purine and alcohol loading is gout requiring anti-inflammatory treatment and serum uric acid measurement to guide urate-lowering therapy.

user_symptom_description: I'm 67 and I've been short of breath for two months that keeps getting worse. I never smoked but I keep getting this dry cough that won't go away. When I breathe deeply it feels tight. My doctor said my lungs sound crackly at the base.

Pulmonary hypertension on echo with severe limitation

user_symptom_description: I'm 37 and last week I suddenly lost hearing in my right ear completely. It happened when I woke up one morning. There's a loud ringing in that ear constantly and sometimes I feel dizzy. I have no ear infection and no recent illness.

user_symptom_description: أنا عندي 24 سنة وبقالي شهرين بحس بتعب شديد ومش قادرة أركز في أي حاجة. وزني بيزيد وجلدي بقى جاف وشعري بيتساقط. دايماً بردانة حتى في الصيف. بدأ كمان صوتي يتغير ويبقى أخشن.

user_symptom_description: I'm 55 and I noticed a mole on my back that my wife says has changed over the past few months. It's become larger, darker in some patches and lighter in others, and the edge looks uneven and jagged now. It's about 8mm across. It doesn't hurt.
urgency_reason: A pigmented lesion fulfilling ABCDE criteria for melanoma in a middle-aged adult requires urgent dermatology review and excision biopsy within 2 weeks as early-stage melanoma is curable by surgery alone.

user_symptom_description: عندي 76 سنة وبقالي أسبوع بحس بضيق شديد في التنفس حتى وأنا قاعد. بلفظ كلام وبقيئ مع الضيق. صدري بيصفر لما بتنفس. عندي ربو من صغري بس المرة دي الموضوع أشد بكتير.

user_symptom_description: I've been having episodes of feeling my heart race out of nowhere for about three months. They start suddenly, my heart beats really fast and regular, and they stop just as suddenly. During episodes I feel short of breath and dizzy. One lasted 40 minutes last week.

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهرين بعاني من صداع شديد في نص رأسي مع غثيان وقيء. الصداع بيجي مرتين أو تلاتة في الأسبوع ويفضل معايا 6-8 ساعات. الضوء والصوت بيأذوني جداً. بيروح لما بنام في أوضة مظلمة.

user_symptom_description: عندي 71 سنة وبقالي 3 أيام بصحى على ألم شديد في الضهر والخصر من ورا. مش قادرة أقف صح من الألم. مفيش إصابة بس كنت بشيل كياس تقيلة. الألم بيزيد مع الحركة وبيقل لما باتمدد.

user_symptom_description: I'm 48 and for the past year I've been having severe hot flashes every few hours, day and night. My periods have been very irregular for 18 months. I've been moody and my sleep has been terrible. I also have vaginal dryness making intimacy painful.

user_symptom_description: عندي 74 سنة وبقالي 5 أيام بحس بألم شديد جداً في بطني وتورم في بطني بيزيد. مش قادر أفضي وما جاش ريح. بدأ بعد ما أكلت ببضع أيام. حسيت بقيء وغثيان شديد.

Cecum diameter above 12cm on CT suggesting impending perforation

user_symptom_description: I'm 22 and last week I started having severe nausea and vomiting that won't stop. I'm 9 weeks pregnant. I can't keep any food or even water down. I've lost 3kg in one week. I feel extremely weak and dizzy when I stand up.

Potassium below 3.0 causing cardiac arrhythmia
Jaundice or liver dysfunction suggesting hyperemesis hepatitis

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين بحس بألم في الجنب الأيمن من الأمام وبيشع للكتف الأيمن. جلدي بدأ يصفر وعيني برضو صفراء. البول أصفر داكن جداً والبراز بقى أبيض. عندي حمى وقشعريرة.
extracted_symptoms: right upper quadrant pain radiating to right shoulder
possible_conditions: Hepatocellular Carcinoma with Bile Duct Invasion
urgency_reason: Charcot's triad of RUQ pain, fever with rigors, and jaundice is acute cholangitis, a biliary emergency with 30 percent mortality if bile duct decompression is delayed beyond 24 hours.
recommended_action: Emergency admission; blood cultures immediately before antibiotics; piperacillin-tazobactam IV broad-spectrum antibiotics; IV fluid resuscitation; urgent LFTs, bilirubin, CBC, coagulation; abdominal ultrasound immediately; urgent ERCP within 24 hours for biliary decompression; surgical consult for cholecystectomy after acute episode; monitor for Reynold's pentad with altered consciousness and hypotension.
red_flags: Altered consciousness and hypotension completing Reynold's pentad requiring ICU admission

user_symptom_description: My 6-year-old has had a rash for 3 days that started on her face and has now spread to her trunk and arms. The spots start as small red bumps and then turn into blisters that pop and crust over. She's very itchy and has a low fever. Her classmate had the same thing last week.
extracted_symptoms: centripetal spread from face to trunk
stages of papule vesicle and crust simultaneously
urgency_reason: Typical chickenpox presentation in a school-age child is self-limiting and managed with supportive care unless in a high-risk group requiring antiviral therapy.
recommended_action: Clinical diagnosis; calamine lotion or chlorphenamine for pruritus; paracetamol for fever, avoid ibuprofen as associated with necrotizing fasciitis in varicella; trim nails to prevent excoriation and secondary bacterial infection; keep home from school until all lesions crusted; acyclovir if immunocompromised, neonate, or adult; isolate from pregnant women and immunosuppressed contacts.

Persistent high fever beyond day 5 suggesting varicella pneumonia
Neurological symptoms such as ataxia or severe headache suggesting encephalitis

user_symptom_description: بقالي 6 أشهر بحس بوجع في مفاصل يديا وركبي وبقعدد ساعة الصبح قبل ما تتحرك. بلاحظ كمان بقع حمرا على جلدي على كوعي وركبي. خالتي عندها نفس المشكلة في الجلد والمفاصل.
extracted_symptoms: erythematous skin plaques on elbows and knees

urgency_reason: Inflammatory arthritis with psoriatic skin plaques and family history requires early DMARD therapy to prevent irreversible joint damage and dactylitis progression.
recommended_action: X-rays of hands and feet for periosteal reaction and pencil-in-cup deformity; MRI of affected joints; nail examination for pitting and onycholysis; HLA-B27; CRP and ESR; skin biopsy if diagnosis uncertain; start methotrexate 15mg weekly plus folic acid; NSAID and topical corticosteroid for psoriasis plaques; biologic therapy TNF inhibitor if methotrexate fails.
red_flags: Spinal involvement with sacroiliitis suggesting axial psoriatic arthritis
Dactylitis with rapid joint destruction on imaging
Uveitis requiring ophthalmology co-management

user_symptom_description: I'm 69 and my daughter noticed that I've been coughing constantly for two months, a dry cough that won't stop. I've also had to sit upright in bed to breathe comfortably at night. My ankles are swollen and I've put on 4kg in 3 weeks. I'm on ramipril.
extracted_symptoms: persistent dry cough on ACE inhibitor
primary_condition: ACE Inhibitor-Induced Cough with Decompensated Heart Failure
urgency_reason: Cough from ACE inhibitor masking worsening heart failure symptoms in an elderly woman with fluid overload requires drug substitution and urgent cardiac assessment to prevent acute pulmonary edema.
extracted_symptoms: chronic dry cough on ACE inhibitor
recommended_action: Switch ramipril to sacubitril-valsartan or candesartan urgently; echocardiogram; BNP; CXR for pulmonary congestion; uptitrate loop diuretic furosemide; daily weight monitoring; fluid restriction 1.5 litres; low-sodium diet; cough should resolve within 1-4 weeks of ACE inhibitor cessation.
red_flags: Resting dyspnea with oxygen saturation below 92 percent requiring emergency admission
Acute pulmonary edema with frothy sputum
Angioedema from ACE inhibitor requiring immediate drug cessation and adrenaline

user_symptom_description: عندي 35 سنة ومش نايم صح من 3 شهور. بصحى كل شوية وزوجتي بتقول إني بوقف في التنفس أحياناً بالليل. صحيت مرة وأنا بخنق. بحس بصداع كل صبح وتعبان طول اليوم وعندي صعوبة في التركيز.
urgency_reason: Witnessed apneas with choking episodes and morning headaches indicate obstructive sleep apnea with potential nocturnal hypoxia requiring polysomnography and CPAP therapy to prevent cardiovascular complications.
recommended_action: Overnight polysomnography or home sleep apnea test; Epworth Sleepiness Scale scoring; BMI and neck circumference assessment; CPAP therapy if AHI above 15; weight loss counseling as each 10 percent weight loss reduces AHI by 26 percent; positional therapy for positional OSA; ENT evaluation for anatomical causes; advise against driving until treated.
red_flags: Oxygen saturation nadir below 80 percent on oximetry suggesting severe OSA
Cor pulmonale from chronic hypoxia on echo
Patient is a commercial vehicle driver requiring immediate driving restriction notification

user_symptom_description: I'm 20 and I've been restricting what I eat severely for about a year. I'm 5'5 and now weigh only 42kg. I know I look very thin but when I look in the mirror I still see myself as fat. My periods stopped 6 months ago. My hair is falling out and I feel cold all the time.
urgency_reason: BMI below 16 with amenorrhea and severe dietary restriction in a young woman meets criteria for high medical risk anorexia nervosa with risk of cardiac arrhythmia, bone loss, and refeeding syndrome.
recommended_action: Urgent eating disorder specialist referral; ECG for QTc prolongation and bradycardia; electrolytes, phosphate, magnesium, glucose; bone density DEXA scan; nutritional rehabilitation with very gradual caloric increase to avoid refeeding syndrome; phosphate supplementation; family-based treatment for young adults; consider inpatient admission if BMI below 14 or medical instability.
red_flags: QTc above 450ms on ECG suggesting arrhythmia risk requiring cardiac monitoring
Phosphate below 0.5 during refeeding suggesting refeeding syndrome
Syncope or collapse from severe bradycardia or hypoglycemia

user_symptom_description: بقالي يومين بحس بصداع شديد جداً مختلف عن أي صداع عندي قبل كده، جاي فجأة زي ضربة في رأسي. معاه تيبس في رقبتي وبحس بشعاع الضوء بيأذيني جداً. قيئت مرتين.
urgency_reason: Thunderclap headache reaching maximum intensity within seconds with meningism is subarachnoid hemorrhage until proven otherwise and a neurosurgical emergency with 50 percent mortality within 30 days.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; CT brain without contrast as first investigation; if CT negative perform lumbar puncture 6-12 hours after headache onset looking for xanthochromia; neurosurgery consult immediately if SAH confirmed; CT angiography to identify ruptured aneurysm; nimodipine 60mg every 4 hours to prevent vasospasm; blood pressure control; admit to neurosurgical unit.
red_flags: Altered consciousness or GCS decline requiring immediate intubation and CT
Rebleed with sudden deterioration requiring emergency surgery
Hydrocephalus on CT requiring external ventricular drain

user_symptom_description: I'm 80 and for the past month my wife says I've been acting out my dreams at night, shouting, punching and kicking in my sleep. I almost fell out of bed twice. During the day I'm fine. I also have a slight tremor in my right hand.
extracted_symptoms: dream enactment with shouting and hitting
possible_conditions: REM Sleep Behavior Disorder with Parkinsonism
primary_condition: REM Sleep Behavior Disorder with Parkinsonism
urgency_reason: REM sleep behavior disorder with emerging rest tremor in an elderly man is a prodrome of synucleinopathy such as Parkinson's disease or Lewy body dementia requiring neurology evaluation and sleep safety measures.
recommended_action: Polysomnography to confirm RBD with muscle atonia loss; neurological examination for parkinsonism; MRI brain; DaTscan; cognitive assessment with MoCA; clonazepam 0.5mg at night or melatonin 3mg for RBD; bed rails and floor padding for safety; remove sharp objects near bed; long-term follow-up for parkinsonism progression; family education.
