recommended_action: TSH, free T3, free T4, TRAb, TPOA; carbimazole 20-40mg daily titrated to TFTs; propranolol 40mg three times daily for symptomatic relief; ophthalmology referral for proptosis — selenium may slow eye disease; definitive therapy with radioiodine or thyroidectomy after biochemical control; monthly TFTs while on carbimazole; agranulocytosis warning — stop carbimazole if sore throat or fever.
red_flags: Thyroid storm with hyperthermia, tachycardia and confusion requiring ICU
Corneal exposure from severe proptosis requiring emergency eye care
Agranulocytosis from carbimazole with neutrophil count below 0.5

user_symptom_description: I've been having episodes of severe abdominal pain, vomiting, and dark urine every few months since I was a teenager. The attacks last about a week and I'm completely fine between them. My urine turns port-wine coloured during attacks. I'm 32.
urgency_reason: Episodic abdominal pain with port-wine urine since youth is acute intermittent porphyria requiring urgent urine porphobilinogen during attack for diagnosis.
recommended_action: Urgent spot urine porphobilinogen and ALA during attack; urine turns pink-red on standing; high-carbohydrate IV glucose infusion aborts mild attacks; IV haemin for severe attacks; avoid triggers: alcohol, fasting, certain drugs including sulphonamides, OCP, barbiturates; genetic testing; family screening; haem arginate for prophylaxis in frequent attacks.
red_flags: Motor neuropathy with ascending weakness suggesting Guillain-Barré mimic requiring urgent treatment
Seizures from SIADH-related hyponatraemia
Respiratory failure from diaphragmatic neuropathy

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين وعندي ضعف في ساقيّ الأتنين وبدأ من كفوف أقدامي ولسه بيطلع لفوق. وبحس بتنميل في إيدي كمان. عندي 68 سنة وكان عندي إسهال بعد أكل دجاج قبل 3 أسابيع.
urgency_reason: Ascending paralysis following diarrhoeal illness is Guillain-Barré syndrome — respiratory failure can develop within days requiring emergency admission and respiratory monitoring.
recommended_action: Emergency admission; FVC measurement every 4-6 hours; admit to HDU if FVC below 20ml/kg; CSF for albuminocytological dissociation; nerve conduction studies; IVIG 0.4g/kg for 5 days or plasmapheresis; heparin for VTE prophylaxis; NG tube if bulbar palsy; intubation if FVC declining rapidly; physiotherapy; psychological support for prolonged recovery.
red_flags: FVC below 15ml/kg requiring emergency intubation
Autonomic instability with cardiac arrhythmia
Bulbar palsy with aspiration risk

user_symptom_description: أنا مرضعة وعندي 27 سنة وبقالي يومين ثديي الأيمن أحمر ومتورم وحاسة بحرقان فيه وعندي حرارة 38.8 وتعب شديد. البقعة الحمرا بتتوسع.
urgency_reason: Lactational mastitis with spreading erythema and systemic fever requires immediate antibiotic treatment and ultrasound to exclude abscess formation.
recommended_action: Flucloxacillin 500mg QID for 10-14 days; continue breastfeeding or expressing from affected side — do not stop; breast ultrasound if not improving in 48 hours to exclude abscess; if abscess confirmed needle aspiration or surgical incision and drainage; warm compresses; ensure correct latch with lactation consultant; analgesia with ibuprofen safe in breastfeeding.
red_flags: Fluctuant mass suggesting abscess requiring drainage
No improvement after 48 hours of antibiotics suggesting MRSA
Non-lactational breast cellulitis in elderly woman suggesting inflammatory breast cancer requiring biopsy

user_symptom_description: I've been having episodes where I suddenly feel intensely fearful and my heart races for no reason. During these I feel like something terrible is about to happen but nothing does. They last 2-3 minutes and leave me shaky. I've had 8 in the past month.
urgency_reason: Frequent brief panic attacks with anticipatory anxiety meets panic disorder criteria but phaeochromocytoma must be excluded before assuming purely psychiatric aetiology.
recommended_action: 24-hour urinary metanephrines and catecholamines; blood glucose during attack if possible; ECG and 24-hour Holter; CBT with interoceptive exposure as gold standard treatment; SSRI sertraline 50mg starting dose; panic diary; breathing retraining; avoid caffeine and energy drinks; graduated activity plan; inform GP to exclude medical causes.
red_flags: Sustained hypertension during attacks suggesting phaeochromocytoma
Diaphoresis with palpitations suggesting hypoglycaemia requiring glucose testing
Development of agoraphobia preventing work or social function

user_symptom_description: بقالي 3 أيام وعندي صعوبة شديدة في الكلام وابني لاحظ إن ريقي بيسيل وما قادرش آكل بدون ما الأكل يوقع. عندي 73 سنة وعندي ضغط.
urgency_reason: Acute dysarthria with dysphagia and drooling in a hypertensive elderly patient is brainstem stroke requiring emergency thrombolysis assessment.
recommended_action: Call 999 immediately; FAST assessment positive; note time of onset precisely; NBM due to aspiration risk; non-contrast CT head on arrival; glucose check; IV alteplase if within 4.5 hours and no contraindication; swallowing assessment before any oral intake; stroke unit admission; NG tube for nutrition if dysphagia severe; DVT prophylaxis.
red_flags: Respiratory compromise from bilateral vocal cord palsy requiring intubation
Locked-in syndrome from basilar artery occlusion
Aspiration pneumonia from unsafe swallowing

user_symptom_description: I've had blood in my urine once last week — it was bright red with clots — and now it seems to have cleared. I have no pain, no fever. I'm 30 and I play contact sports. I had a mild knock to my side during rugby.
urgency_reason: Frank haematuria following flank trauma requires CT urogram to grade renal injury and exclude significant laceration even after apparent resolution.
recommended_action: CT urogram with delayed phase; FBC and renal function; if Grade I-II renal contusion conservative management with rest and hydration; avoid contact sport for 4-6 weeks; urology follow-up; urinalysis repeat at 6 weeks; if haematuria persists beyond trauma period investigate for underlying renal malignancy; exclude bleeding disorder.
red_flags: Haemodynamic instability from renal vascular injury requiring emergency angioembolisation
Grade IV-V renal laceration with urinary extravasation requiring surgery
Persistent haematuria without trauma history requiring malignancy workup

user_symptom_description: بقالي 3 أشهر وبحس بصعوبة في البلع لكل حاجة حتى السوائل، وبيجيلي ألم في الصدر لما ببتلع. وأحياناً الأكل بيرجع لفوق تاني. عندي 40 سنة وما عنديش تاريخ في أمراض الجهاز الهضمي.
urgency_reason: Dysphagia to both solids and liquids with regurgitation in a 40-year-old suggests achalasia requiring manometry and endoscopy for confirmation.
recommended_action: Upper GI endoscopy to exclude malignancy — mandatory; high-resolution oesophageal manometry is gold standard for diagnosis; barium swallow may show bird-beak appearance; pneumatic dilation as first-line treatment; per oral endoscopic myotomy as alternative; Heller myotomy with fundoplication for surgical option; calcium channel blockers or nitrates for symptom relief pending definitive treatment.
red_flags: Rapid weight loss suggesting oesophageal malignancy requiring urgent biopsy
Megaoesophagus with aspiration pneumonia
Pseudoachalasia from subcarinal malignancy mimicking primary achalasia

user_symptom_description: My 9-year-old has been having bloody noses almost every day for the last month. They come on without warning and bleed for 5-10 minutes. He also bruises really easily and his gums look pale. He seems really tired lately.
urgency_reason: Recurrent bleeding with pallor and easy bruising in a child is acute leukaemia until proven otherwise — a haematological emergency requiring same-day FBC and blood film.
recommended_action: Go to A&E or paediatric urgent care immediately; urgent FBC, blood film, coagulation screen; if blast cells on film or pancytopenia admit immediately; bone marrow aspirate for definitive diagnosis; blood and platelet transfusion if needed; oncology referral for induction chemotherapy; psychological support for family; avoid aspirin and NSAIDs.
red_flags: Blast cells on peripheral blood film confirming acute leukaemia
WBC above 100 suggesting hyperleukocytosis with tumour lysis risk
Intracranial bleeding from severe thrombocytopenia

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهر وعندي ألم في ضهري السفلاني بيجيلي من الرأس لأسفل مع تنميل في الرجلين الأتنين. وبدأت ما أعرفش أحبس بولي صح. عندي 45 سنة.
urgency_reason: Bilateral leg radiculopathy with urinary incontinence is cauda equina syndrome — a neurosurgical emergency where permanent bladder dysfunction occurs if decompression is delayed beyond 24-48 hours.
recommended_action: Go to A&E immediately; MRI lumbar spine emergently; neurosurgical referral within hours; emergency laminectomy and discectomy if confirmed; catheterise if urinary retention; post-void residual measurement; do not delay for non-contrast MRI — gadolinium if infection or malignancy suspected; analgesic support; physiotherapy planning post-surgery.
red_flags: Saddle anaesthesia — pathognomonic of cauda equina syndrome
Complete urinary retention or faecal incontinence indicating severe compression
Rapid progression over hours mandating emergency surgery within 24 hours

user_symptom_description: My family says I've been staring blankly for a few seconds many times a day and then I come back to myself. I have no memory of these episodes. They started about 3 weeks ago. I'm 74 and in good health otherwise.
urgency_reason: New-onset episodic consciousness impairment in an elderly patient requires urgent MRI to exclude structural lesion and EEG to characterise seizure type.
recommended_action: Urgent MRI brain with contrast; EEG ideally capturing an episode; blood glucose and electrolytes; driving cessation immediately; levetiracetam as first-line antiepileptic in elderly; neurology review within 2 weeks; DVLA notification; advise supervision near water and heights; investigate for underlying cause including tumour or cerebrovascular disease.
red_flags: Secondary generalisation to tonic-clonic seizure
Status epilepticus requiring emergency benzodiazepines
Intracranial mass lesion on MRI requiring neurosurgical assessment

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين وعندي طفح أحمر دائري في ساقي بتكبر ببطء، وعندي تعب وألم في مفاصلي. وأنا كنت في رحلة تخييم في الغابة من شهر وتعرضت للناموس والحشرات.
extracted_symptoms: tick bite exposure camping 1 month ago
urgency_reason: Expanding erythema migrans rash with arthralgia after tick bite exposure is Lyme disease requiring prompt antibiotic treatment to prevent dissemination.
recommended_action: Clinical diagnosis if classic EM rash — serology may be negative early; ELISA and Western blot for Lyme borrelia; oral doxycycline 100mg twice daily for 21 days; amoxicillin in pregnancy or if doxycycline contraindicated; if cardiac or neurological involvement IV ceftriaxone; tick avoidance advice; remove any remaining ticks with fine tweezers; notify tick bite register.
red_flags: Complete heart block from Lyme carditis requiring pacing
Lyme neuroborreliosis with meningitis or radiculopathy
Lyme arthritis of large joints refractory to antibiotics

user_symptom_description: I've had recurrent mouth ulcers — sometimes 5 or 6 at once — for years, but now I also have painful genital ulcers and my right eye has been red and painful. My knee is also swollen. I'm 35.
urgency_reason: International Study Group criteria for Behçet's disease are met with oral ulcers, genital ulcers, uveitis, and arthritis requiring specialist immunosuppression.
recommended_action: International criteria assessment; pathergy test; HLA-B51 testing; ophthalmology review for uveitis — risk of blindness without treatment; colchicine for mucocutaneous disease; azathioprine for uveitis; anti-TNF agents for refractory disease; thalidomide for severe oral and genital ulcers; MDT approach with dermatology, ophthalmology, neurology.
red_flags: Neuro-Behçet's with cerebral venous thrombosis or parenchymal involvement
Pulmonary aneurysm from vasculitis — rare but fatal
Progressive uveitis causing irreversible visual loss without immunosuppression

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوع وعندي ضيق في التنفس وبحس إن حلقي بيضيق، وبيجيلي صوت أثناء التنفس من الخارج. ما عنديش أي طفح ولا حكة. عندي 69 سنة وبخد ليزينوبريل من 5 سنين.
urgency_reason: Progressive airway angioedema from ACE inhibitor can cause fatal asphyxia — this is an airway emergency even without urticaria.
recommended_action: Call 999 immediately; stop lisinopril permanently; high-flow oxygen; icatibant 30mg SC injection as bradykinin antagonist specific for ACE inhibitor angioedema — adrenaline has limited effect; fresh frozen plasma if icatibant unavailable; anaesthetics alert for potential emergency airway; switch to ARB or calcium channel blocker for hypertension; medical alert bracelet; avoid all ACE inhibitors lifelong.
red_flags: Stridor worsening despite treatment requiring emergency intubation or surgical airway
Complete airway obstruction from tongue or laryngeal oedema
Recurrent episodes despite stopping ACE inhibitor suggesting hereditary angioedema

user_symptom_description: I've been getting migraines since my teens but the one I had yesterday was completely different. It came on in under a minute — the worst pain I have ever experienced in my life — and I vomited. It has eased somewhat but my neck feels stiff now.
urgency_reason: Thunderclap headache that is the worst of life with neck stiffness is subarachnoid haemorrhage until proven otherwise — 50% of patients have a warning bleed before fatal re-bleed.
recommended_action: Call 999 immediately; non-contrast CT head within 6 hours — 98% sensitive for SAH; if CT negative LP at 12 hours for xanthochromia; neurosurgical review urgently; nimodipine 60mg every 4 hours to reduce vasospasm; analgesia; CT angiography or DSA for aneurysm; coil or clip aneurysm within 24-48 hours; ICU monitoring; do not give aspirin until aneurysm secured.
red_flags: Re-bleed from unsecured aneurysm with sudden severe headache worsening
Hydrocephalus causing rapid deterioration requiring external ventricular drain
Cerebral vasospasm causing delayed ischaemic neurological deficit day 4-14

user_symptom_description: بنتي عندها 10 سنين وبقالها أسبوعين تتشكى من ألم في بطنها السفلاني وحمى 38.3 وألم في فخذها الأيمن لما تمشي. كمان بيجيلي ألم لما بضغط على منطقة معينة في فخذها.
urgency_reason: Hip pain with fever and antalgic gait in a child — Kocher criteria must be applied and septic arthritis excluded urgently as avascular necrosis occurs within 24-48 hours.
recommended_action: Go to A&E; Kocher criteria: fever, non-weight-bearing, raised ESR, raised WBC; hip ultrasound for effusion; if effusion present emergency joint aspiration under GA; FBC, CRP, blood cultures; if WBC in aspirate above 50,000 emergency washout; IV flucloxacillin; distinguish from transient synovitis — if temperature below 38 and CRP normal can observe; MRI if diagnosis uncertain.
red_flags: All 4 Kocher criteria positive — 99% probability of septic arthritis requiring immediate surgery
Avascular necrosis of femoral head from delayed treatment
MRSA septic arthritis requiring vancomycin

user_symptom_description: I'm a 50-year-old office worker and I've had a stiff neck and pins and needles in both arms for 3 months. When I trip or stumble I feel really unsteady and my feet feel heavy. I've been dropping things more often.
urgency_reason: Progressive myelopathy with bilateral arm paraesthesia and gait disturbance from cervical spondylosis requires urgent MRI and neurosurgical assessment before irreversible cord damage.
recommended_action: Urgent MRI cervical spine; neurosurgical referral for decompression assessment; physiotherapy for symptom management; avoid high-impact activities and contact sports until reviewed; cervical collar not helpful long-term; anterior cervical discectomy and fusion or laminoplasty for cord compression; occupational therapy for hand function; falls prevention.
red_flags: Rapid deterioration over days suggesting acute disc prolapse causing myelopathy requiring emergency surgery
Bladder dysfunction indicating severe cord compression
Hyperreflexia below level with extensor plantar responses confirming upper motor neuron involvement

user_symptom_description: بقالي 4 أيام وعندي طفح أحمر منتشر على جسمي بعد ما خدت مضاد حيوي من يومين. الطفح في كل مكان تقريباً وفيه حبوب محمرة ومستديرة. مش عندي ضيق في التنفس.
urgency_reason: Drug rash requires stopping the causative antibiotic and assessment for more serious reactions including SJS and DRESS before reassurance.
recommended_action: Stop the antibiotic immediately; assess for SJS features: mucosal involvement, skin detachment, eye symptoms; assess for DRESS: fever, lymphadenopathy, facial oedema, eosinophilia; if simple drug rash: antihistamine and topical steroid; document allergy clearly; avoid rechallenge; FBC for eosinophilia; skin allergy clinic referral for formal allergy testing.
red_flags: Mucosal erosions or blistering indicating SJS requiring emergency dermatology admission
Facial swelling with lymphadenopathy suggesting DRESS syndrome
Airway involvement from drug allergy requiring adrenaline

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين وأنا حاسة بضيق في التنفس بيزيد ببطء وبيجيلي سعال جاف. عندي سرطان الثدي من سنتين وبخد علاج. وأنا شايفة إن ضهري بدأ يوجعني.
urgency_reason: Progressive dyspnoea with dry cough in a breast cancer patient is malignant pleural effusion until proven otherwise requiring urgent CXR and oncology referral.
recommended_action: CXR; CT chest with contrast; pleural aspiration — send fluid for cytology, protein, LDH, pH; therapeutic pleural drainage if large effusion; pleurodesis for recurrent effusion; oncology review for systemic disease control; bone scan and MRI spine for spinal metastases; analgesia for back pain; palliative care input; SACT reassessment.
red_flags: Mediastinal shift from tension effusion requiring emergency drainage
Spinal cord compression from vertebral metastasis requiring emergency dexamethasone and radiotherapy
Rapidly accumulating effusion suggesting pericardial involvement

user_symptom_description: I've been waking up with terrible headaches every morning for 3 weeks that slowly ease during the day. I also snore loudly and my wife says I stop breathing for short periods at night. I'm overweight and my neck size is 18 inches.
urgency_reason: Morning headache with witnessed apnoeas and snoring in an obese patient with large neck circumference is OSA causing nocturnal hypercapnia requiring sleep study.
recommended_action: Epworth Sleepiness Scale; overnight oximetry or home sleep apnoea test; CPAP titration study if confirmed; CPAP therapy as first-line; mandibular advancement device for mild-moderate; weight loss programme; positional therapy if positional OSA; refer to sleep clinic; advise against driving if ESS score above 11 until treated; check cardiovascular and metabolic complications.
red_flags: MRI brain to exclude intracranial hypertension if morning headache before sleep study confirms OSA
Severe daytime somnolence causing road traffic accident risk
Central sleep apnoea pattern suggesting cardiac or brainstem pathology

user_symptom_description: ابني عنده 14 سنة وبقاله شهرين بيشكي من ألم في منطقة الحبة الموجودة تحت ركبته بالذات لما بجري أو بنزل السلم. وهو رياضي وبيلعب كرة كتير. الألم اتحسن لما بيوقف تمرين.
urgency_reason: Tibial tuberosity pain in a sport-active adolescent during a growth spurt is classic Osgood-Schlatter disease requiring activity modification and physiotherapy.
recommended_action: Clinical diagnosis — X-ray only if diagnosis uncertain to exclude avulsion fracture; reduce high-impact activity during flares; quadriceps and hamstring stretching; ice after exercise; patellar tendon strap; reassure family condition is self-limiting and resolves after skeletal maturity; modify sporting participation rather than complete rest; return to full sport as symptoms allow.
red_flags: Avulsion fracture of tibial tuberosity requiring surgical fixation
Night pain or bone tenderness at rest suggesting osteosarcoma
Bilateral severe pain preventing normal daily activities

user_symptom_description: I've been feeling very thirsty and urinating a lot since starting lithium 6 months ago. I'm drinking over 5 litres a day and going to the toilet constantly. My urine is very pale and dilute.
urgency_reason: Severe polyuria on lithium is nephrogenic diabetes insipidus requiring renal function assessment and lithium level to prevent nephrotoxicity and electrolyte disturbance.
recommended_action: Serum lithium level; U&E and creatinine; urine and plasma osmolality; water deprivation test with desmopressin response; reduce lithium dose to lowest effective level; amiloride 5-10mg daily reduces lithium-induced NDI; ensure adequate fluid intake; discuss mood stabiliser alternatives with psychiatrist if severe; annual renal function monitoring.
red_flags: Lithium level above 1.5mmol/L indicating toxicity with coarse tremor and confusion
Hypernatraemia from inadequate water replacement
Progressive renal impairment from lithium nephropathy

user_symptom_description: بقالي يومين وعندي ألم شديد في صدري يمتد لأعلى لرقبتي وظهري، زي ما حاجة بتشق. الألم بدأ فجأة جداً وأنا صاحيان وعندي ارتفاع في الضغط من 20 سنة.
urgency_reason: Sudden tearing chest pain radiating to back with hypertension is aortic dissection until proven otherwise — mortality increases 1-2% per hour without treatment.
recommended_action: Call 999 immediately; IV access and blood for FBC, U&E, group and save, D-dimer; ECG to exclude STEMI — do not give thrombolysis if dissection suspected; CT aortogram with contrast; IV labetalol to target SBP 100-120; type A dissection requires emergency surgical repair; type B managed medically unless complications; cardiothoracic surgery emergency alert.
red_flags: Aortic regurgitation murmur from proximal dissection involving aortic root
Pulse deficit or limb ischaemia from dissection extending to branch vessels
Pericardial effusion from haemopericardium causing tamponade

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهر وأنا حاسس بضعف في إيدي الأيمن وصعوبة في رفع القدم من الأرض لما بمشي. وبيجيلي تشنجات في العضلات. عندي 30 سنة وكمان بحس إن كلامي بدأ يتعثر.
urgency_reason: Upper and lower motor neuron signs with bulbar involvement in a young adult is motor neurone disease until proven otherwise requiring urgent neurological assessment.
recommended_action: Urgent neurology referral; MRI brain and spine; nerve conduction studies and EMG for denervation pattern; creatine kinase; genetic testing for SOD1, FUS, TDP43; riluzole 50mg twice daily only disease-modifying drug available; MDT approach with speech therapy, dietitian, physiotherapy; gastrostomy when swallowing compromised; NIV for respiratory failure; palliative care planning early.
red_flags: Respiratory muscle weakness with FVC below 50% requiring NIV urgently
Rapid bulbar progression causing aspiration pneumonia
Combined UMN and LMN signs at same spinal level confirming ALS

user_symptom_description: I've had a lump in my neck for 6 weeks that's been growing. It doesn't hurt. I've also been feeling very tired and have lost 4kg. I'm 38 and I had my thyroid removed for cancer 5 years ago.
possible_conditions: Recurrent Thyroid Cancer with Lymph Node Metastasis
primary_condition: Recurrent Thyroid Cancer with Lymph Node Metastasis
urgency_reason: Enlarging neck mass with weight loss in a patient with prior thyroid cancer is recurrence until proven otherwise requiring urgent thyroglobulin, ultrasound, and oncology review.
recommended_action: Serum thyroglobulin and anti-TG antibodies; neck ultrasound with FNAC of suspicious node; TSH suppression assessment; whole body RAI scan if differentiated thyroid cancer; PET-CT for RAI-negative disease; radioiodine ablation for amenable metastases; lenvatinib or sorafenib for RAI-refractory disease; oncology MDT discussion; ensure adequate TSH suppression with levothyroxine.
red_flags: Rapid lymph node enlargement suggesting transformation to more aggressive histology
Airway compromise from lymph node mass
Distant metastases to bone or lung on imaging

user_symptom_description: بقالي 3 أيام وعندي وجع شديد في عيني الأيمن وبيجيلي ألم في رأسي فوق العين. وعيني بقت أحمر جداً وشايفة ضباب ونجوم. وبحس بغثيان.
urgency_reason: Acute angle-closure glaucoma with halos and nausea causes irreversible blindness within hours if intraocular pressure is not urgently reduced.
recommended_action: Emergency ophthalmology immediately; IOP measurement — typically above 40-70mmHg; IV acetazolamide 500mg; topical pilocarpine 2% every 15 minutes; topical beta-blocker and alpha-agonist; IV mannitol if IOP unresponsive; laser peripheral iridotomy once IOP controlled; prophylactic iridotomy to fellow eye; avoid pupil-dilating medications in future; screen family members.
red_flags: IOP above 60mmHg causing corneal epithelial oedema and permanent damage
Fixed mid-dilated pupil from iris ischaemia
Vision loss becoming permanent if untreated beyond 24-48 hours

user_symptom_description: I've been having recurrent episodes of painless bright red rectal bleeding for 2 months. The blood is on the toilet paper and around the outside of the stool — not mixed in. I have a feeling of incomplete emptying and itching around my back passage.
extracted_symptoms: bright red rectal bleeding separate from stool
urgency_reason: Bright red rectal bleeding coating stool in a young adult is most likely haemorrhoids but colorectal cancer must be excluded if over 50 or other risk factors present.
recommended_action: Digital rectal examination and proctoscopy; high-fibre diet and adequate hydration; topical lidocaine and hydrocortisone; rubber band ligation for grade II-III haemorrhoids; haemorrhoidectomy for grade IV; rigid sigmoidoscopy if over 50 or alarm features; refer for colonoscopy if family history or iron deficiency anaemia; treat pruritus with bland emollient.
red_flags: Dark blood mixed in stool suggesting proximal bleeding source
Change in bowel habit or weight loss suggesting malignancy
Prolapsed irreducible haemorrhoid with strangulation requiring emergency treatment

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين وعندي أرق شديد ومزاجي تغيّر جداً وبحس بطاقة زيادة عن اللزوم وبفكر بسرعة جداً وبخطط لمشاريع كتيرة في نفس الوقت. وما بنامش أكتر من ساعتين لكن ما بحسش بتعب.
extracted_symptoms: decreased need for sleep without fatigue
urgency_reason: Full manic episode with decreased sleep need, racing thoughts, and grandiosity requires urgent psychiatric assessment as behavioural dyscontrol and self-harm risk are high.
recommended_action: Same-day urgent psychiatric assessment; urine drug screen; TFTs and glucose; olanzapine or quetiapine for acute mania; lithium or valproate for mood stabilisation; lorazepam for agitation; hospital admission if safety concern or if patient refusing treatment; do not start antidepressant; involve family; crisis plan; address driving safety.
red_flags: Psychotic features with delusions of grandeur requiring antipsychotic urgently
Reckless behaviour including financial harm or sexual disinhibition
Rapid cycling to depressive phase with suicidal risk

user_symptom_description: I'm a 40-year-old type 1 diabetic and this morning I found myself confused, sweating heavily, and my partner says I was very aggressive and couldn't respond properly. My blood sugar was 1.8 mmol/L when she checked.
urgency_reason: Severe hypoglycaemia with neuroglycopenic symptoms and inability to self-treat requires IM glucagon or IV glucose immediately to prevent seizure and brain damage.
recommended_action: IM glucagon 1mg if IV access unavailable; IV dextrose 75ml of 20% if IV access available; recheck glucose at 10 minutes; once alert give long-acting carbohydrate; identify precipitant — missed meal, insulin error, alcohol, exercise; review insulin regimen with diabetes team; consider continuous glucose monitor; hypoglycaemia unawareness assessment; DVLA guidance for driving.
red_flags: Prolonged neuroglycopenia causing permanent brain injury
Cardiac arrhythmia from severe hypoglycaemia
Recurrent severe hypoglycaemia indicating insulin regimen needs urgent review

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهر وعندي ألم متزايد في ورك الأيسر بيجيلي حتى وأنا قاعد وبيصحيني الليل. عندي سرطان البروستاتا من 3 سنين وعندي علاج هرموني. ووزني نزل 5 كيلو.
extracted_symptoms: progressive left hip pain at rest and night
known prostate cancer on hormonal therapy
urgency_reason: Night pain with weight loss in a prostate cancer patient is bone metastases until proven otherwise requiring urgent bone scan and oncology review.
recommended_action: Urgent PSA and bone scan; plain X-ray hip; MRI if pathological fracture risk; oncology referral for disease reassessment; zoledronic acid or denosumab for bone metastases; radiotherapy for painful bone metastases; orthopaedic surgical fixation if impending fracture using Mirels score; opioid analgesia; palliative care input; ADT resistance assessment.
red_flags: Impending pathological fracture requiring prophylactic fixation
Spinal cord compression from vertebral metastasis — emergency dexamethasone and MRI
PSA failure indicating castration-resistant disease needing docetaxel or enzalutamide

user_symptom_description: I've been having a really embarrassing problem — I lose control of my bladder when I sneeze, cough or exercise. It's been getting worse over 6 months since I had my second baby. It's really affecting my confidence and I've stopped going to the gym.
urgency_reason: Post-partum stress incontinence from pelvic floor weakness requires pelvic floor physiotherapy as first-line treatment before considering surgical options.
recommended_action: Pelvic floor physiotherapy as first-line — supervised Kegel exercises for minimum 3 months; bladder diary; urodynamic assessment if mixed incontinence suspected; pessary as adjunct; duloxetine for moderate to severe if surgery declined; mid-urethral sling surgery if physiotherapy fails; avoid oestrogen cream if breastfeeding; weight management.
red_flags: Continuous leakage suggesting vesicovaginal fistula from birth trauma
Haematuria with incontinence suggesting bladder tumour
Urinary retention with overflow incontinence requiring catheterisation

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين وعندي احمرار وتورم وألم شديد في ساقي الأيمن تحت الركبة. وجلدي في المنطقة دي بقى ساخن جداً وأحمر وفيه خطوط حمراء بتتمد لفوق.
urgency_reason: Spreading cellulitis with lymphangitic streaking indicates ascending bacterial infection requiring immediate parenteral antibiotics to prevent septicaemia.
recommended_action: Go to A&E; IV flucloxacillin if non-severe spreading; mark the erythema border with pen to monitor progression; FBC and CRP; blood cultures if systemic symptoms; elevate limb; if streaking suggests lymphangitis IV benzylpenicillin; CT if necrotising fasciitis not excluded; switch to oral antibiotic after 48 hours of clinical improvement; skin portal of entry treatment.
red_flags: Disproportionate pain with soft tissue crepitus suggesting necrotising fasciitis requiring emergency surgical debridement
Septic shock from systemic bacteraemia
Failure to respond to IV antibiotics after 48 hours suggesting deep tissue infection or abscess

user_symptom_description: ابني عنده 7 سنين وبقاله 3 أسابيع وعنده كحة جافة مستمرة بتيجيلي في الليل بالذات وبعد الركض. قبل كده عندي إكزيما وأبوه عنده حساسية. مش عنده حمى.
urgency_reason: Nocturnal and exercise-triggered dry cough with atopic background is cough variant asthma requiring inhaled corticosteroid trial for diagnosis and treatment.
recommended_action: Therapeutic trial of inhaled salbutamol before exercise and low-dose ICS budesonide via spacer; FeNO measurement if available; spirometry with bronchodilator reversibility if age allows; allergy testing; if cough resolves on ICS confirms diagnosis; write asthma action plan; educate parents on spacer technique; review in 6 weeks; montelukast as add-on if needed.
red_flags: Wheeze or acute dyspnoea on examination suggesting more severe asthma
Night waking with cough requiring nebulisation
Failure to respond to ICS trial suggesting alternative diagnosis including foreign body or pertussis

user_symptom_description: I've had a strange rash around my mouth and on my nose for months — red bumps that look like acne but aren't. It gets worse with steroid creams that I keep trying. I'm 33 and I've tried every face cream available.
urgency_reason: Perioral rash worsening with topical steroids is classic perioral dermatitis requiring complete steroid cessation and antibiotic treatment.
recommended_action: Stop all topical steroids immediately — warn of initial flare on steroid withdrawal; tetracycline or doxycycline 100mg daily for 8-12 weeks; topical metronidazole 0.75% alternative; use only non-comedogenic moisturiser and mild cleanser; no make-up during treatment; reassure complete resolution expected; identify original steroid trigger and avoid.
red_flags: Steroid-induced rosacea from prolonged potent topical steroid use
Facial rash not improving after 8 weeks suggesting alternative diagnosis
Associated eye involvement suggesting ocular rosacea needing ophthalmology

user_symptom_description: بقالي يومين وعندي ألم شديد في بطني الأسفل الأيمن وحمى عالية وبرود شديد. وكمان عندي ألم لما بضغط على منطقة بين الظهر والورك من الأيمن. عندي 70 سنة وعندي سكري.
urgency_reason: Fever with rigors and psoas muscle tenderness in a diabetic elderly patient is psoas abscess until proven otherwise — commonly missed and fatal if untreated.
recommended_action: Go to A&E immediately; CT abdomen pelvis with IV contrast urgently; FBC, CRP, blood cultures, HbA1c; broad-spectrum IV antibiotics covering Gram-negatives and Staphylococcus; CT-guided or surgical drainage; identify primary source — vertebral osteomyelitis, Crohn's, or renal infection; IV fluids; insulin infusion for glucose control; prolonged antibiotic course 4-6 weeks.
red_flags: Septic shock from undrained abscess
Vertebral osteomyelitis as primary source requiring neurosurgical review
Retroperitoneal extension to hip joint causing septic arthritis

user_symptom_description: I've been using cocaine on weekends for 2 years. This past weekend after using a large amount I had crushing chest pain and my heart was racing terribly. I went to A&E and was told my ECG showed changes. I'm 26 and otherwise healthy.
urgency_reason: ECG changes with chest pain after cocaine use represent cocaine-induced coronary vasospasm or ACS requiring cardiac assessment and addiction counselling.
recommended_action: Serial troponins and ECGs; echocardiogram for LV function; benzodiazepines for agitation and vasospasm — NOT beta-blockers which worsen vasospasm by leaving alpha receptor unopposed; nitrates or calcium channel blockers for vasospasm; coronary angiography if troponin positive; addiction medicine referral for cocaine cessation; urine drug screen; aspirin; lifestyle advice.
red_flags: Confirmed STEMI from thrombosis on cocaine-induced plaque rupture requiring emergency PCI
Ventricular fibrillation from cocaine arrhythmia requiring defibrillation
Aortic dissection from cocaine-induced hypertensive surge

user_symptom_description: بقالي 5 أيام وعندي ألم شديد جداً في وجهي من تحت عيني وعلى أنفي، والألم بيزيد لما بمشي أو بنزل السلم. ومعي زكام خضراء ومقفولة من أسبوعين وحرارة خفيفة.
extracted_symptoms: pain worse on walking or bending
urgency_reason: Bacterial sinusitis criteria met with purulent discharge, facial pain worse on movement, and prolonged symptoms requiring antibiotic treatment.
recommended_action: Amoxicillin 500mg three times daily for 5-7 days; co-amoxiclav if penicillin allergy or failed amoxicillin; saline nasal irrigation; topical xylometazoline decongestant for maximum 5 days; steam inhalation; analgesia; advise patient to return if worsening or no improvement at 7 days; CT sinuses only if recurrent or complications suspected.
red_flags: Periorbital swelling or proptosis suggesting orbital cellulitis requiring emergency CT and IV antibiotics
Severe frontal headache suggesting frontal sinusitis or intracranial extension
Altered consciousness suggesting intracranial complication from sinusitis

user_symptom_description: I can't get or maintain an erection for the past 6 months. My libido is very low. I've also been having mood swings, fatigue, and I've noticed my testicles seem smaller than before. I'm 44.
urgency_reason: Erectile dysfunction with low libido and testicular atrophy requires testosterone level and pituitary hormone assessment to differentiate primary from secondary hypogonadism.
recommended_action: Fasting morning testosterone on two occasions; LH, FSH, prolactin, SHBG; TFTs; FBC and lipid profile; if low testosterone and low/normal LH FSH: MRI pituitary for secondary hypogonadism; if primary hypogonadism: testosterone replacement; exclude prostate cancer before starting TRT — PSA and DRE; manage cardiovascular risk factors; psychological assessment for depression.
red_flags: Very low testosterone with high FSH suggesting Klinefelter syndrome needing karyotype
Pituitary macroadenoma on MRI compressing optic chiasm
Infertility concerns requiring fertility specialist referral

user_symptom_description: بقالي 3 أشهر وعندي ألم مستمر في كل جسمي خاصة في العضلات، وعندي نقاط معينة لما بضغط عليها بيجيلي ألم شديد. وعندي أرق وتعب حتى بعد النوم. عندي 60 سنة وما عنديش مشاكل مفاصل.
urgency_reason: Widespread pain with tender points, sleep disturbance, and fatigue meeting 2010 ACR fibromyalgia criteria requires a positive diagnosis approach and multidisciplinary management.
recommended_action: FBC, ESR, CRP, TFTs, CPK, ANA, vitamin D — to exclude PMR, hypothyroidism, inflammatory myopathy; if bloods normal confirm fibromyalgia diagnosis; patient education that fibromyalgia is real and manageable; aerobic exercise programme as most effective treatment; amitriptyline 10-30mg at night for sleep and pain; duloxetine or pregabalin; CBT for pain catastrophising; avoid opioids.
red_flags: CRP and ESR markedly elevated suggesting PMR requiring steroids
CPK elevation suggesting inflammatory myopathy requiring biopsy
New synovitis suggesting evolution to inflammatory arthritis

user_symptom_description: بقالي 3 أيام وعندي احمرار وحرارة وتورم في ساقي الأيمن من الكاحل للركبة، وعندي حمى عالية وقشعريرة. وما كانش عندي إصابة ولا جروح.
urgency_reason: Rapidly spreading lower limb cellulitis with systemic sepsis requires same-day hospital admission and IV antibiotics as outpatient treatment is inadequate.
recommended_action: Go to A&E; mark erythema borders; IV flucloxacillin 2g QID; IV benzylpenicillin if erysipelas suspected; FBC, CRP, blood cultures, lactate; leg elevation; venous duplex to exclude DVT; CT if necrotising fasciitis not excluded — look for gas or fascial plane thickening; LRINEC score; step down to oral antibiotics when improving; identify and treat portal of entry.
red_flags: Disproportionate severe pain with skin mottling suggesting necrotising fasciitis requiring immediate surgical debridement as mortality is 20-40% even with treatment
Haemodynamic compromise from septic shock
Blistering or bullae formation indicating severe deep infection

user_symptom_description: I've had a constant buzzing and ringing in both ears for 4 months that's worse at night and when everything is quiet. I've been taking high-dose aspirin for a joint condition. It's driving me crazy and I can't concentrate at work.
urgency_reason: Bilateral tinnitus with high-dose aspirin use is salicylate ototoxicity — fully reversible on dose reduction or cessation.
recommended_action: Reduce aspirin dose with rheumatology guidance — switch to alternative NSAID or naproxen; pure tone audiometry; monitor for salicylate hearing loss which is also reversible; tinnitus retraining therapy and white noise generators if tinnitus persists after drug withdrawal; MRI if bilateral tinnitus persists after aspirin cessation to exclude bilateral acoustic neuromata; CBT for tinnitus distress.
red_flags: Accompanying hearing loss suggesting salicylate cochlear toxicity requiring immediate dose reduction
Persistent bilateral tinnitus after stopping aspirin requiring audiological and neurological investigation
Salicylate toxicity symptoms including tinnitus with nausea and vomiting indicating dangerous serum levels

user_symptom_description: I've had a progressive weakness in both my legs over the past 3 weeks. It started in my feet and is moving upward. I also had a bad stomach bug about 2 weeks ago. My hands are starting to feel weak too.
urgency_reason: Ascending paralysis post-GI illness is GBS until proven otherwise — respiratory muscle involvement can cause fatal respiratory failure within hours.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; admit for respiratory monitoring, forced vital capacity measurements, IVIG or plasmapheresis; LP for albuminocytologic dissociation.
red_flags: Shortness of breath or inability to count to 20 in one breath
Facial weakness or swallowing difficulty
Autonomic instability with blood pressure swings

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين بحس إن كلامي بقى مش واضح وصوتي تغير وبلاقي صعوبة في بلع السوايل أحياناً. ما فيش ضعف في إيديا أو رجليا. عمري 71 سنة.
urgency_reason: Progressive bulbar symptoms without limb involvement require urgent neurological evaluation to exclude ALS, where early respiratory planning improves survival.
recommended_action: See neurologist urgently within one week; EMG and nerve conduction study; MRI brain and brainstem; speech therapy for swallowing assessment.
red_flags: Respiratory muscle weakness with breathlessness
Choking on liquids with aspiration
Rapid progression to limb weakness

user_symptom_description: I was bitten by a dog 3 days ago on my right hand. The wound looked okay at first but now it's red, swollen, and there's pus coming out. I didn't get it checked when it happened.
urgency_reason: Dog bite infection on the hand progresses rapidly to tendon sheath and joint infection requiring urgent surgical and antibiotic management.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately for wound culture, X-ray to exclude fracture and foreign body, IV co-amoxiclav; tetanus booster; assess rabies risk and post-exposure prophylaxis.
red_flags: Tendon pain with passive finger extension suggesting tenosynovitis
Fever with spreading redness
Immunocompromised patient with any animal bite

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوع وأنا بحس بألم في عيني الأيمن لما بحركه وبشوف بقعة سوداء في وسط بصري في نفس العين. بيجيلي كمان ألم خلف العين. عمري 24.
urgency_reason: Optic neuritis is the first presentation of MS in 25% of cases; urgent MRI determines demyelination burden and guides immunotherapy decisions.
recommended_action: See neurologist and ophthalmologist urgently; MRI brain and orbits with gadolinium; IV methylprednisolone speeds visual recovery; visual evoked potentials.
red_flags: Rapid complete vision loss in the eye
Bilateral optic neuritis simultaneously
Spinal cord symptoms developing

user_symptom_description: My skin has turned bright red and is peeling off in sheets all over my body. It started as psoriasis patches but now my entire skin is red and raw. I have a fever and chills and feel very sick.
urgency_reason: Erythroderma covering the entire body causes life-threatening fluid loss, protein loss, thermoregulatory failure, and sepsis requiring ICU-level care.
recommended_action: Call emergency services; hospital admission for fluid resuscitation, temperature regulation, wound care, dermatology consultation, and systemic psoriasis therapy.
red_flags: Hypothermia from skin barrier loss
Hemodynamic compromise
Mucosal involvement suggesting toxic epidermal necrolysis

user_symptom_description: بنتي عمرها 8 سنين وبقالها شهرين بتشرب مية كتير وبتروح الحمام كتير ووزنها نزل. الأغرب إن دكتور عملها فحص دم وقاله السكر طبيعي. مش عارفة أعمل إيه.
urgency_reason: Polydipsia with polyuria and weight loss but normal glucose in a child requires water deprivation test and MRI pituitary to exclude central DI from cranial lesion.
recommended_action: See pediatric endocrinologist within one week; urine and serum osmolality; supervised water deprivation test; MRI brain and pituitary with gadolinium.
red_flags: Visual field defects suggesting suprasellar mass
Severe hypernatremia causing confusion
Growth arrest suggesting pituitary dysfunction

user_symptom_description: I've been having severe difficulty swallowing for 3 weeks — even my own saliva is hard to swallow. My voice sounds wet and gurgly and I've had two episodes of choking. I had a stroke 4 months ago.
extracted_symptoms: severe dysphagia to solids and liquids
urgency_reason: Severe post-stroke dysphagia with wet voice and choking episodes indicates high aspiration risk and imminent aspiration pneumonia without tube feeding.
recommended_action: Urgent speech and language therapy evaluation; videofluoroscopic swallowing study; consider NG tube or PEG for nutrition; nil by mouth until assessment.
red_flags: Fever with respiratory symptoms suggesting aspiration pneumonia
Complete inability to swallow saliva
Rapid weight loss from inability to eat safely

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهر بحس بتورم وألم في ساقي اليسار من الركبة للقدم، والجلد بقى بني غامق وتلمع. ما عنديش حمى. بشتغل ممرضة وبقف كتير.
urgency_reason: Unilateral leg changes with skin hyperpigmentation in a healthcare worker require Doppler to exclude active DVT and assess for post-thrombotic sequelae.
recommended_action: See GP for venous Doppler ultrasound; compression stockings grade 2; leg elevation; review prior DVT history; wound care if venous ulcer begins.
red_flags: Acute worsening suggesting new DVT
Venous ulcer opening
Bilateral edema suggesting systemic cause

user_symptom_description: I've been having uncontrollable muscle jerks in my arms every morning, especially when I reach for my coffee. I've also had two generalized seizures in the past 6 months, both in the morning. I'm 21.
urgency_reason: JME with generalized tonic-clonic seizures requires valproate or levetiracetam — untreated, GTCS risk during driving or swimming is life-threatening.
recommended_action: See neurologist urgently; EEG with photostimulation; MRI brain; start valproate or levetiracetam; strict sleep hygiene; avoid alcohol; no driving until seizure-free.
red_flags: Status myoclonus
Ataxia with myoclonus suggesting progressive myoclonic epilepsy
Seizure during water exposure

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين عندي ألم شديد في أسفل ظهري وبيمشي لصدري ومتقطع. وعندي دم في البول. ما عنديش حمى. آكلت مسكنات وبتحسن شوية بس بيرجع.
extracted_symptoms: severe colicky loin to chest pain
possible_conditions: Ureteral Stone with Upper Pole Location
primary_condition: Renal Stone with Upper Pole Location
urgency_reason: Upper ureteral or renal pelvic stone with hematuria causing severe colic requires imaging to assess stone burden and exclude obstruction.
recommended_action: Go to ER for non-contrast CT KUB; IV ketorolac for pain; IV fluids; urology consultation if stone above 10mm or obstruction present.
red_flags: Fever developing suggesting infected obstructed kidney — urological emergency
Complete anuria
Single functioning kidney with obstruction

user_symptom_description: I've been told my PSA was 18 at my last check. I have no symptoms except getting up at night to urinate 3 times. My GP wants me to see a specialist. I'm 68 and otherwise well.
possible_conditions: Benign Prostatic Hyperplasia with Elevated PSA
Urinary Tract Infection Causing PSA Rise
urgency_reason: PSA of 18 in a 68-year-old man is strongly suggestive of prostate cancer; urgent MRI and biopsy needed for diagnosis and staging before curative treatment window closes.
recommended_action: See urologist urgently; multiparametric MRI prostate first; then MRI-targeted plus systematic biopsy; bone scan if confirmed cancer; discuss treatment options.
red_flags: Bone pain suggesting metastases
Neurological symptoms from spinal cord compression
Hematuria

user_symptom_description: بقالي 3 أيام وأنا بحس بألم شديد في صدري وبقيت أبصق دم مع السعال. عمري 35 وبآخد حبوب منع الحمل من سنة. ما عنديش زكام أو كحة قديمة.
urgency_reason: Hemoptysis with pleuritic chest pain in a woman on OCP is pulmonary embolism with pulmonary infarction until proven otherwise — OCP is a major thrombotic risk factor.
recommended_action: Call emergency services; go to ER for CTPA, D-dimer, ECG, and oxygen saturation; stop OCP immediately; anticoagulation if PE confirmed.
red_flags: Oxygen saturation below 90%
Hemodynamic compromise with hypotension
Large clot burden on CTPA requiring thrombolysis

user_symptom_description: My 5-year-old boy has been diagnosed with nephrotic syndrome. He has massive swelling in his legs, face, and belly. He gained 4 kg in a week. The doctor is adjusting his steroids but the swelling keeps worsening.
urgency_reason: Worsening edema despite adequate steroid therapy in a child with nephrotic syndrome may indicate steroid resistance requiring kidney biopsy and alternative immunosuppression.
recommended_action: Go to pediatric nephrology urgently; urine protein:creatinine ratio, albumin, lipids; kidney biopsy if truly steroid-resistant after 8 weeks; monitor for spontaneous bacterial peritonitis.
red_flags: Fever with abdominal pain suggesting peritonitis
Thrombotic events from hypercoagulable state
Respiratory compromise from pleural effusion or ascites

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوع عندي احمرار وتورم وحرارة في إبهامي الأيمن بعد ما قصيت ضفري. الألم شديد جداً وبيزيد من يوم ليوم وبدأ فيه إفراز أصفر.
urgency_reason: Purulent paronychia requires surgical drainage to prevent spread to deeper hand spaces and flexor tendon sheaths.
recommended_action: See GP today for incision and drainage under digital block; send pus for culture; oral flucloxacillin; warm soaks; check diabetes status.
red_flags: Fluctuant swelling of the finger pulp suggesting felon
Red streaking up the hand or forearm
Inability to flex the finger from tenosynovitis

user_symptom_description: I went to a funeral last month and ever since I've had no appetite, stopped sleeping, can't stop crying, and feel a heavy emptiness. I know grief is normal but I feel paralyzed and can't do basic things. I'm 69.
possible_conditions: Major Depressive Disorder triggered by bereavement
primary_condition: Major Depressive Disorder triggered by bereavement
urgency_reason: Bereavement-triggered depression with functional impairment in an elderly woman requires assessment as elderly widows have elevated suicide risk.
recommended_action: See GP or psychiatrist within one week; screen for suicidal ideation; grief counseling and CBT are first-line; SSRI if meeting MDD criteria; social support.
red_flags: Any suicidal ideation or self-neglect
Refusal to eat or drink for days
Complete social withdrawal lasting more than 2 months

user_symptom_description: أنا طبيب أسنان وبقالي شهرين عندي تنميل في إبهامي وسبابتي الأيمن وبيزيد لما بشتغل. وعندي ألم في رسغي الأيمن. بشتغل 8 ساعات يومياً على مرضى.
urgency_reason: Occupational CTS in a dentist is common and worsens without intervention; early nerve conduction study prevents progression to thenar atrophy.
recommended_action: See orthopedist for nerve conduction study; wrist splint at night; ergonomic adjustment; corticosteroid injection; surgical decompression if conservative fails.
red_flags: Thenar muscle wasting
Constant rather than intermittent numbness
Bilateral progression

user_symptom_description: I've been having very heavy periods for the past year, soaking through a pad every hour for two days each cycle. I've been feeling exhausted and breathless climbing stairs. I'm 23 and my hemoglobin came back as 8.2.
urgency_reason: Hemoglobin of 8.2 with cardiac symptoms warrants urgent treatment and investigation for underlying cause of menorrhagia.
recommended_action: See GP urgently for ferritin, iron studies, TSH, coagulation screen; oral iron supplementation; pelvic ultrasound; tranexamic acid and NSAID for cycle management.
red_flags: Hemoglobin below 7 requiring transfusion
Coagulopathy screen positive suggesting bleeding disorder
Syncope from anemia

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوع وأنا حاسس بضغط في رأسي لما بصحى الصبح وبتقيأ مرة أو اتنين في الصبح. البصر بيزغلل أحياناً. مش عندي صداع شديد بس الأعراض بتزيد.
possible_conditions: Raised Intracranial Pressure from Brain Tumor
primary_condition: Raised Intracranial Pressure from Brain Tumor
urgency_reason: Morning headache with vomiting and visual blurring is the classic triad of raised ICP — a space-occupying lesion must be urgently excluded.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately for urgent CT brain with contrast; do not perform LP before imaging; neurosurgical consultation if mass lesion confirmed.
red_flags: Papilledema on fundoscopy
Cushing's triad: bradycardia, hypertension, irregular breathing
Sudden loss of consciousness

user_symptom_description: My daughter says I've been shuffling instead of walking properly for 6 months and I had three falls this year. My hands don't shake but my movements are very slow. I also have low blood pressure when I stand up.
urgency_reason: Parkinsonism with early falls, no tremor, and orthostatic hypotension is atypical parkinsonism — MSA or PSP — which responds poorly to levodopa and requires specialist care.
recommended_action: See neurologist urgently; brain MRI; autonomic function tests; tilt-table test; DaTscan; levodopa challenge; fall prevention and orthostatic hypotension management.
red_flags: Rapid functional decline within months
Stridor from vocal cord paralysis
Urinary retention requiring catheterization

user_symptom_description: بقالي يومين وأنا بحس بحرقان وألم شديد لما بتبوّل وعندي ألم في ظهري فوق حقوي الأيمن وحرارتي 39.5 مع قشعريرة شديدة. حامل في الشهر السادس.
urgency_reason: Pyelonephritis in pregnancy triggers preterm labor and maternal sepsis; IV antibiotics and fetal monitoring are mandatory emergency interventions.
recommended_action: Go to obstetric ER immediately; IV ceftriaxone; urine culture; fetal CTG monitoring; renal ultrasound; hospital admission required.
red_flags: Regular uterine contractions suggesting preterm labor
Fetal tachycardia on CTG
Hemodynamic instability suggesting septic shock

user_symptom_description: I've been having loud wheezing and cannot catch my breath for the past 3 hours. I've used my blue inhaler 8 times and it's not helping. I have severe asthma and I can only speak in two-word sentences.
urgency_reason: Inability to speak in full sentences with failed repeated bronchodilator use is life-threatening asthma requiring immediate nebulized salbutamol, IV steroids, and possible intubation.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; sit upright; use inhaler via spacer while waiting; oxygen if available; do not lie flat; this is an ICU-level emergency.
red_flags: Silent chest on auscultation (no wheeze — air movement stopped)
Cyanosis
Exhaustion with decreasing respiratory effort

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهر عندي بقعة بيضا على خدي اليسار ما فيهاش لون خالص، وبنت عمي عندها نفس المشكلة في إيديها. البقعة بتكبر ببطء.
urgency_reason: Vitiligo is autoimmune and associated with thyroid disease, T1DM, and Addison's disease requiring screening; not medically urgent but psychologically impactful.
recommended_action: See dermatologist; TSH, glucose, ANA screening; topical tacrolimus or steroids for small patches; narrowband UVB phototherapy for extensive disease.
red_flags: Rapid spread to large body surface area
Perioral or acral vitiligo suggesting higher autoimmune risk
Associated symptoms of Addison's or hypothyroidism

user_symptom_description: I have pain behind my breastbone that radiates into my back and feels like tearing. It started suddenly an hour ago. I've had uncontrolled high blood pressure for years. The pain is unlike anything I've ever felt.
urgency_reason: Sudden tearing back pain with hypertension history is aortic dissection until proven otherwise — Type A dissection is 1-2% per hour mortality without emergency surgery.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; do NOT give thrombolytics; urgent CT aortography; cardiothoracic surgery activation for Type A; blood pressure control for Type B.
red_flags: Pulse deficit between arms
Neurological deficit from carotid involvement
Hypotension suggesting tamponade

user_symptom_description: بقالي 4 أشهر بحس بضعف شديد في جسمي وبيجيلي آلام في عضلاتي بدون أي مجهود. عملت تحاليل وإجا معايا نقص شديد في فيتامين د. بيقولي الدكتور مستوياته 8.
possible_conditions: Severe Vitamin D Deficiency with Osteomalacia
primary_condition: Severe Vitamin D Deficiency with Osteomalacia
urgency_reason: Vitamin D level of 8 nmol/L with myalgia and weakness indicates osteomalacia requiring loading dose supplementation and investigation of underlying malabsorption.
recommended_action: See GP for high-dose vitamin D loading (300,000 IU over 6-10 weeks); check PTH, calcium, phosphate, ALP; investigate for malabsorption if no dietary reason.
red_flags: Bone tenderness suggesting stress fractures from osteomalacia
Hypocalcemia causing tetany
Progressive proximal muscle weakness

user_symptom_description: My 7-year-old has been complaining of pain in his right leg for 3 weeks, especially at night, which wakes him up crying. During the day he seems fine and runs around normally. His pediatrician said it's growing pains.
urgency_reason: Unilateral nocturnal bone pain in a child that wakes from sleep is never typical growing pains and requires X-ray to exclude bone tumor.
recommended_action: See pediatrician urgently for right leg X-ray; if any periosteal reaction or lytic lesion: urgent MRI and orthopedic oncology referral; CBC and LDH.
red_flags: Palpable bony swelling
Pathological fracture
Systemic symptoms like fever or weight loss

user_symptom_description: I've been having recurrent episodes of severe low blood sugar despite reducing my insulin dose. I get shaky, sweaty, and confused at random times and my wife has had to give me glucagon twice. I have Type 1 diabetes for 25 years.
urgency_reason: Hypoglycemia unawareness with repeated severe events requiring glucagon is life-threatening — the next event without rescue could be fatal.
recommended_action: See endocrinologist urgently; consider continuous glucose monitor or closed-loop insulin pump; strict avoidance of hypoglycemia for 3 months to restore awareness.
red_flags: Episode occurring during driving or alone
Loss of consciousness with delayed glucagon access
Seizure from hypoglycemia

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهرين بيجيلي ضيق في التنفس لما أضحك أو بكى أو أتكلم كتير، وأحياناً بيجي من غير سبب. وصوتي بقى خشن. ما عنديش كحة أو حرارة. عمري 70.
extracted_symptoms: dyspnea triggered by laughing, crying, and talking
urgency_reason: Progressive hoarseness with exertional dyspnea in an elderly woman requires urgent laryngoscopy to exclude laryngeal malignancy.
recommended_action: See ENT urgently for flexible laryngoscopy; CT neck and chest; biopsy if mass lesion seen; speech therapy if vocal cord dysfunction confirmed.
red_flags: Stridor at rest
Dysphagia developing alongside dysphonia
Palpable neck lymphadenopathy

user_symptom_description: I've been binge eating large amounts of food in secret at night and then making myself sick. I've been doing this almost daily for a year. My teeth are getting damaged and my cheeks look puffy. I feel ashamed.
urgency_reason: Bulimia nervosa with daily purging causes hypokalemia, esophageal rupture risk, dental destruction, and requires specialist eating disorder treatment.
recommended_action: See eating disorder specialist; check potassium, amylase, and LFTs; CBT-ED is gold standard; consider fluoxetine; dental review; nutritional rehabilitation.
red_flags: Potassium below 3.0 causing cardiac arrhythmia
Esophageal tear with hematemesis
Severe electrolyte disturbance causing muscle weakness

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين بحس بألم وحرارة في عيني وبشوف دوائر وهالات حول الأنوار بالليل. عندي الجلوكوما من سنتين وبقطر قطرات بس نسيت أسبوع.
urgency_reason: Acute angle-closure attack in a known glaucoma patient off drops causes irreversible optic nerve damage from IOP spike within hours.
recommended_action: Go to ophthalmology emergency immediately; resume all drops; IV acetazolamide and IV mannitol to lower IOP; laser peripheral iridotomy urgently.
red_flags: Vision loss progressing during the episode
Nausea and vomiting with severe eye pain
IOP above 50 mmHg on measurement

user_symptom_description: I've been having chest tightness and shortness of breath, and my cardiologist says my ejection fraction dropped from 55% to 30% over the past year. I'm on maximum medications but keep getting worse. I had a heart attack 2 years ago.
possible_conditions: Ischemic Cardiomyopathy with Severe LV Dysfunction
Advanced Heart Failure for Device Therapy
primary_condition: Ischemic Cardiomyopathy with Severe LV Dysfunction
urgency_reason: EF of 30% despite maximal therapy meets criteria for ICD and possibly CRT-D to prevent sudden cardiac death and improve function.
recommended_action: See advanced heart failure cardiologist; assess for ICD/CRT-D implantation; LVAD or transplant evaluation if eligible; palliative care discussion if not candidate.
red_flags: Syncope suggesting ventricular arrhythmia
NYHA Class IV — symptoms at rest
Worsening renal function from cardiorenal syndrome

user_symptom_description: بقالي 3 أيام وأنا بحس بألم شديد في خصري الأيمن وفخذي الأيمن لما أمشي أو أقوم من الكرسي. بيتحسن وأنا قاعدة. مش عندي رضة. عمري 42.
extracted_symptoms: right iliac fossa and right thigh pain
urgency_reason: Anterior hip and thigh pain aggravated by hip extension and relieved by flexion suggests iliopsoas pathology requiring imaging for confirmation.
recommended_action: See orthopedist for hip ultrasound or MRI; physiotherapy for hip flexor release; ultrasound-guided corticosteroid injection if confirmed bursitis.
red_flags: Fever suggesting psoas abscess
Palpable tender mass in the inguinal region
Systemic symptoms with spinal tenderness suggesting discitis with psoas involvement

user_symptom_description: My 14-year-old daughter has been pulling out her hair from her scalp and eyebrows for several months. She has a visible bald patch. She says she can't stop even though she tries. She's been stressed with exams.
extracted_symptoms: hair pulling from scalp and eyebrows
urgency_reason: Trichotillomania causes significant hair loss and shame; early habit reversal therapy prevents progression and secondary psychiatric complications.
recommended_action: See child psychiatrist or psychologist; Habit Reversal Training (HRT) is evidence-based; N-acetylcysteine may help; address school stress; family therapy.
red_flags: Hair ingestion (trichophagia) causing trichobezoar
Severe depression or self-harm
Complete scalp alopecia affecting school attendance

user_symptom_description: I've been having vivid nightmares every night since I returned from a war zone 6 months ago. I startle at any loud noise, avoid crowds, and feel emotionally numb to people I love. I can't return to work.
urgency_reason: PTSD with hyperarousal, avoidance, and functional impairment requires trauma-focused psychotherapy and possible pharmacotherapy to prevent chronicity.
recommended_action: See psychiatrist or PTSD-specialist psychologist; Trauma-Focused CBT or EMDR are gold standard; screen for suicidal ideation; sertraline or paroxetine if pharmacotherapy needed.
red_flags: Suicidal ideation or plan
Substance use as coping
Complete social isolation or inability to leave home

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين بحس بألم وتورم في مفصل رسغي الأيسر وبيجيلي حمى خفيفة. وعندي طفح أحمر صغير على ساقيا. معاش التهاب مفاصل من قبل. عمري 65.
urgency_reason: Migratory arthritis with rash and fever requires exclusion of DGI and septic arthritis; delayed treatment of DGI leads to joint destruction.
recommended_action: Go to ER for joint aspiration, blood cultures, STI screen including gonorrhea NAAT; IV ceftriaxone empirically; rheumatology and infectious disease consult.
red_flags: Multiple joint involvement suggesting polyarticular septic arthritis
Petechiae coalescing to purpura
Hemodynamic instability

user_symptom_description: I work in a chemical plant and over the past year I've developed a persistent cough, wheezing, and chest tightness that are much worse on workdays and improve over the weekend. I never had asthma before.
urgency_reason: Occupational asthma causes permanent airway damage with continued exposure; workplace removal and legal reporting are critical alongside treatment.
recommended_action: See pulmonologist for serial peak flow measurements at work and at home; spirometry; specific inhalation challenge; occupational health referral; remove from exposure.
red_flags: Severe exacerbation requiring ER visit
Permanent airway obstruction not reversing on holidays
Chemical accident with high-concentration exposure

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهر بيجيلي تقلصات وإسهال بعد ما باكل الأكل اللي فيه لاكتوز زي اللبن والجبن. لما بوقف عنهم بيرجع عادي. ما عنديش دم في البراز.
urgency_reason: Classic lactose intolerance is benign and dietary; celiac disease should be excluded before starting strict lactose avoidance.
recommended_action: See GP for anti-TTG IgA to exclude celiac disease; hydrogen breath test confirms lactose intolerance; lactase enzyme supplements; calcium alternatives for bone health.
red_flags: Weight loss despite dietary changes
Blood in stool
Symptoms persisting despite complete lactose avoidance

user_symptom_description: I was strimming in the garden without eye protection. I felt something hit my eye and now I have severe pain, my eye is watering constantly, and I can see a faint white spot on my cornea.
possible_conditions: Corneal Foreign Body with Secondary Rust Ring
primary_condition: Corneal Foreign Body with Secondary Rust Ring
urgency_reason: Visible corneal opacity after high-velocity projectile requires emergency slit-lamp examination to exclude penetrating injury before any removal attempt.
recommended_action: Go to ophthalmology ER immediately; do NOT rub eye; no topical anesthetic or drops without specialist guidance; slit-lamp exam; CT orbit if penetrating injury suspected.
red_flags: Irregular or teardrop-shaped pupil suggesting iris prolapse
Low intraocular pressure suggesting open globe
History of high-velocity metal on metal suggesting intraocular foreign body

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهر بيجيلي ألم في أسفل ظهري ووجعني كتير لما بكوع لقدام. وبحس بتنميل في كتافي الاتنين. عندي ضغط وبشرب دواء رقيق الدم. عمري 72.
urgency_reason: Bilateral arm paresthesia with back pain in an anticoagulated elderly patient may indicate spinal epidural hematoma compressing the cord — surgical decompression within 6-8 hours preserves function.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately; emergency MRI spine; reversal of anticoagulation; neurosurgical consultation for emergency decompression if confirmed.
red_flags: Rapidly progressive limb weakness
Bladder or bowel incontinence
Loss of all sensation below a level

user_symptom_description: I've had a painless lump in my neck on the right side for 3 months. It's firm and about 2 cm. I had no infections recently. I smoke and drink. I also noticed my voice has changed slightly.
possible_conditions: Squamous Cell Carcinoma of Head and Neck (Metastatic Node)
primary_condition: Squamous Cell Carcinoma of Head and Neck (Metastatic Node)
urgency_reason: A persistent hard neck node with voice change in a smoker-drinker is metastatic head and neck cancer until proven otherwise — delay in diagnosis significantly worsens prognosis.
recommended_action: See ENT urgently for panendoscopy and FNA of node; CT neck and chest; PET scan if no primary found; do not excise the node before primary is identified.
red_flags: Rapidly enlarging node
Dysphagia or odynophagia
Weight loss suggesting advanced disease

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهر عندي طفح أحمر على ساقيا من الركبة للكاحل على الجانبين. البقع زي كدمات بس ما فيش إصابة. ما بتبهت لما أضغط عليها. عندي ألم في مفاصلي.

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين عندي التهاب في عينيا الاتنين مع ألم وحساسية للضوء وبشوف ضبابي. ما بلبسش عدسات. وعندي ألم في ظهري الأسفل من سنة.

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهر بيجيلي تورم وألم في مفصل رسغي الأيمن وفي أصابع إيديا. وعندي بقع حمرا على جلدي على مرفقيا وركبيا. بيجيلي ألم في ظهري الأسفل كمان.

Uveitis episodes

user_symptom_description: My newborn son is 3 days old and has developed a yellow tinge to his skin and eyes today. He's feeding well and is alert. My first child didn't have this. Should I be worried?

urgency_reason: Day 3 neonatal jaundice requires serum bilirubin measurement urgently to assess phototherapy threshold and exclude hemolytic causes.

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهرين بيجيلي صداع خفيف وبحس بضغط خلف عيني وبيتحسن لما باخد مسكنات. وجدوا عندي ضغط عيون عالي في فحص اعتيادي. عمري 46 وعيوني سليمة.

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوع عندي ألم في إيدي اليسار وبيجيلي من الكتف لنهاية الإبهام. بيزيد لما بحرك رقبتي. مش عندي إصابة. وعندي ضعف في قبضة إيدي اليسار. عمري 68.

urgency_reason: Left arm pain with grip weakness in an elderly woman requires cardiac cause to be urgently excluded before attributing to cervical radiculopathy.

user_symptom_description: I've had severe pain inside my right ear for the past 3 days with discharge. The pain is excruciating when I pull my ear or press in front of it. I've been swimming every day this summer.

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهر بيجيلي ألم في رجلي الأيمن من أعلى الردف وبينزل لورا الركبة. وعندي خدران في جنب ساقي الأيمن. بيتزود لما بوقف فترة. عندي 29 سنة وبشتغل ممرضة.

possible_conditions: L4-L5 Disc Herniation with S1 Radiculopathy

urgency_reason: S1 radiculopathy in an active young nurse requires MRI to assess disc herniation and guide physiotherapy versus epidural injection management.

user_symptom_description: I've just been told I have HIV after testing positive. I feel completely shocked. I have no symptoms at all. My CD4 count is 680 and viral load is 45,000. I don't know what to do next.
possible_conditions: HIV with High CD4 (Early Chronic Infection)

Mental health crisis from diagnosis

user_symptom_description: بنتي عمرها 12 سنة وبقالها شهرين عندها حكة وطفح أحمر يتكرر على خديها وذراعيها خصوصاً في الشتاء. الجلد جاف جداً وبيتشقق. أمها عندها ربو.

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهرين عندي ضعف في عضلاتي والتعب بيجيلي بسرعة جداً، وعندي ألم في مفاصلي وجلدي بقى حساس للشمس. لقيوا في تحاليلي أجسام مضادة ANA إيجابية بقوة عالية. عمري 38.

user_symptom_description: I'm 34 and I've had a butterfly-shaped red rash across my cheeks for three weeks. My joints ache in the mornings, I've been losing clumps of hair, and I feel exhausted even after sleeping 10 hours. I also had a painful mouth ulcer last week.

user_symptom_description: عندي 79 سنة وبقالي أسبوع حاسس إن رجلي اليمين بقت ضعيفة ومش قادر أمشي صح. كمان بحس بخدر في رجلي الاتنين. الدكتور قالي من زمان إن عندي تضيق في العمود الفقري.

urgency_reason: Acute deterioration of bilateral leg symptoms in a patient with known spinal stenosis requires urgent MRI to exclude cauda equina syndrome which demands emergency surgical decompression.

user_symptom_description: I'm 24 and I've been having severe panic attacks for two months. They come out of nowhere, my heart pounds, I can't breathe, my hands tingle, and I'm convinced I'm dying. They last about 15 minutes. Now I'm scared to leave my flat in case one happens in public.

user_symptom_description: بنتي عندها 7 سنين وبقالها 3 أيام بتشكي من ألم في أذنها اليسار وبكاء من الألم بالليل. عندها حمى 38.5 وما بتسمع كويس بالأذن دي. مش بتأكل كويس.

user_symptom_description: I'm 45 and for the last two months I've had pain in my right shoulder that's worst at night. I can't sleep on that side at all. I can't reach behind my back or lift my arm above my head without a sharp catching pain. It came on gradually with no injury.

urgency_reason: Subacromial impingement with nocturnal pain and painful arc requires physiotherapy and subacromial injection before considering imaging for rotator cuff tear.

user_symptom_description: أنا عندي 70 سنة وبقالي شهر بلاحظ إن مستوى السكر في دمي بيطلع عالي جداً حتى مع الأدوية. فقدت 6 كيلو من غير سبب وبحس بتعب شديد. ومن فترة لقيت ورم صغير في بطني.

user_symptom_description: I'm 19 and I've been losing weight for three months. I eat a lot but keep losing weight. My heart races constantly, I sweat excessively even sitting still, and my hands shake. I've had diarrhea almost every day. My mum says my eyes look bigger than they used to.

recommended_action: TSH, free T4, free T3; TSH receptor antibodies; thyroid ultrasound; ophthalmology referral for proptosis assessment; start carbimazole 20-40mg titrating; propranolol for symptom control while achieving euthyroid state; consider radioiodine or thyroidectomy after 18-month course.

user_symptom_description: بقالي 3 أيام عندي ألم شديد في خصيتي الأيسر بيشع لبطني. الخصية منتفخة ومحمرة وساخنة. عندي حمى 38 وبحس بغثيان. الألم مستمر مش بيروح.

urgency_reason: Testicular pain with fever and gradual onset requires urgent Doppler ultrasound to exclude torsion and testicular abscess before treating as epididymo-orchitis with antibiotics.
recommended_action: Scrotal Doppler ultrasound urgently to confirm normal blood flow and exclude torsion; urethral swab and urine culture for STI and Gram-negative organisms; CBC and CRP; ciprofloxacin 500mg twice daily for 2-4 weeks if enteric organisms suspected; doxycycline if chlamydia STI-associated; scrotal support and NSAID analgesia; follow-up in 1 week.
red_flags: Absent blood flow on Doppler requiring immediate surgical exploration

user_symptom_description: My 5-year-old has had a really high fever of 40 degrees for two days and I noticed a stiff neck today when I tried to bend it forward. He has a headache and is much more sleepy than usual. He vomited once this morning and doesn't want any lights on.
urgency_reason: Classic meningitis triad of fever, neck stiffness, and photophobia with altered consciousness in a child is bacterial meningitis until proven otherwise requiring immediate IV antibiotics before any investigation.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; IV ceftriaxone 100mg/kg immediately without waiting for lumbar puncture if clinically unstable; IV dexamethasone to reduce inflammatory sequelae; CT head before LP if GCS below 13 or focal signs; blood cultures before antibiotics; lumbar puncture for CSF analysis when safe; PICU admission.
red_flags: Non-blanching petechial or purpuric rash suggesting meningococcal septicaemia

user_symptom_description: عندي 68 سنة وبقالي شهرين بحس بضغط في صدري لما بمشي أو بطلع سلم بيروح لما بقعد. الضغط بيشع لكتفي الأيسر. عندي سكري وضغط من 10 سنين ومش بدخن بس كنت بدخن من زمان.
urgency_reason: Classic exertional angina with cardiac risk factors in an elderly male requires urgent exercise stress testing or coronary angiography to risk-stratify for adverse cardiac events.
recommended_action: Resting ECG; exercise stress test or CT coronary angiogram; fasting lipid profile and HbA1c; start sublingual GTN for acute attacks; aspirin 75mg daily; atorvastatin 40-80mg; bisoprolol or amlodipine for angina prevention; PCI or CABG if high-risk lesions identified; lifestyle modification.
red_flags: Rest pain or pain at minimal exertion suggesting unstable angina requiring emergency admission

user_symptom_description: I'm 31 and I've been having a burning sensation when I urinate for 5 days. I need to go to the toilet constantly, even right after I've just been. There's a strong smell to my urine and it looks cloudy. I have some lower abdominal cramping too. I'm pregnant, 14 weeks.
urgency_reason: UTI in pregnancy is never uncomplicated as it significantly increases risk of preterm labour and pyelonephritis requiring prompt antibiotic treatment with pregnancy-safe agents.
recommended_action: Midstream urine culture before antibiotics; start cefalexin 500mg three times daily or nitrofurantoin if below 36 weeks pending culture result; avoid trimethoprim in first trimester and nitrofurantoin near term; test of cure urine culture 7 days after completion; monthly surveillance cultures for remainder of pregnancy.
red_flags: Loin pain with fever suggesting ascending pyelonephritis requiring IV antibiotics

Urine culture growing resistant organism requiring specialist advice

user_symptom_description: أنا عندي 22 سنة وبقالي يومين بحس بألم مفاجئ في صدري من الجنب الأيمن بيزيد لما بتنفس عميق. الألم بدأ وأنا بلعب كرة سلة فجأة. بحس بضيق في التنفس وقلبي بيدق بسرعة.
urgency_reason: Sudden pleuritic chest pain with dyspnea during exertion in a young tall male is spontaneous pneumothorax until proven otherwise requiring urgent chest X-ray and possible pleural decompression.
recommended_action: Chest X-ray PA erect immediately; high-flow oxygen; if large pneumothorax above 2cm needle aspiration or chest drain; if small and stable observation with repeat X-ray in 4 hours; CT chest if X-ray inconclusive; no exertion or air travel until fully resolved; smoking cessation; pleurodesis after second episode to prevent recurrence.
red_flags: Tracheal deviation and hemodynamic instability suggesting tension pneumothorax requiring immediate needle decompression

user_symptom_description: I'm 38 and I have had a red, scaly, itchy rash on my elbows, knees, and scalp for about a year. The patches have a silvery scale on top. My nails look pitted and one has separated from the nail bed. My joints in my fingers have been stiff and sore recently.

urgency_reason: Psoriasis with new inflammatory joint symptoms and nail changes fulfils CASPAR criteria for psoriatic arthritis requiring early DMARD therapy to prevent irreversible joint damage.
recommended_action: X-rays hands and feet; MRI affected joints; CRP and ESR; HLA-B27; skin biopsy if diagnosis uncertain; methotrexate 15mg weekly plus folic acid; topical corticosteroids and vitamin D analogues for skin; TNF inhibitor if DMARD failure; dermatology co-management for skin disease.
red_flags: Dactylitis sausage digit with rapid joint erosion on imaging
Spinal involvement with sacroiliitis requiring physiotherapy
Uveitis requiring ophthalmology co-management

user_symptom_description: عندي 76 سنة وبقالي 3 أيام بحس بدوخة شديدة وعدم توازن وما قدرتش أمشي من غير ما أمسك في حاجة. عندي طنين في أذني الأيسر من فترة. ما عنديش صداع أو مشكلة في الكلام.
urgency_reason: Acute vertigo with gait instability in an elderly woman requires urgent neuroimaging to exclude posterior circulation stroke before attributing to peripheral vestibular cause.
recommended_action: MRI brain with DWI urgently to exclude brainstem or cerebellar infarction; HINTS examination by trained clinician; head impulse test, nystagmus assessment, test of skew; if central features present treat as stroke; if peripheral vestibular neuritis confirmed prochlorperazine for acute nausea; vestibular rehabilitation physiotherapy; falls risk assessment.

New dysarthria or diplopia
