user_symptom_description: I'm 26 and for the past three months I've had episodes of flushing across my face and chest, watery diarrhea, and my heart races during these attacks. They last about 30 minutes and happen several times a week. No food seems to trigger them consistently.
extracted_symptoms: episodic cutaneous flushing face and chest
urgency_reason: Episodic flushing with diarrhea and palpitations unrelated to food raises concern for neuroendocrine tumor with carcinoid syndrome requiring 24-hour urinary 5-HIAA measurement.
recommended_action: 24-hour urinary 5-HIAA; serum chromogranin A; CT chest abdomen pelvis for primary tumor; Ga-68 DOTATATE PET-CT for staging; echocardiogram for carcinoid heart disease; octreotide scintigraphy; somatostatin analogue octreotide for symptom control; surgical resection if localized.

user_symptom_description: My 9-year-old has been wetting the bed again after being dry for two years. She also drinks a lot of water and keeps going to the toilet during the day. Her teacher says she seems tired and unfocused at school. She's lost some weight recently.

user_symptom_description: عندي 72 سنة وبقالي يومين فقدت القدرة على قراءة أي حاجة، كل الكتابة بقت مشوشة. عيني الأيمن فيه ضبابية مفاجئة وبرق. مش عندي ألم في العين. عندي سكري من 15 سنة.

user_symptom_description: I'm 30 and I've been constipated for three weeks, alternating with some loose stools. I've noticed a small amount of bright red blood on the toilet paper, not in the stool itself. I have some anal discomfort and a feeling that something is protruding after I go.

urgency_reason: Facial and neck swelling with distended neck veins and positional dyspnea is superior vena cava syndrome until proven otherwise, an oncological emergency requiring immediate imaging and stenting.

Hemodynamic instability from sepsis requiring immediate resuscitation

user_symptom_description: بقالي 6 أشهر بحس بألم في كتفي الأيمن وصعوبة في تحريكه في كل الاتجاهات. مش قادرة أمد إيدي خلف ضهري ولا أرفعها فوق رأسي. الألم بيزيد بالليل. الألم بدأ بعد ما أصبت بالتهاب في الكتف.
extracted_symptoms: inability to reach behind back and overhead

Night pain with constitutional symptoms suggesting malignancy

user_symptom_description: I'm 80 and I've been increasingly forgetful and confused over the past year. My family says I repeat the same questions over and over. Last week I forgot how to use the microwave I've had for 10 years. I also sometimes see small animals in the room that aren't there.

red_flags: Any conventional antipsychotic causing severe neuroleptic sensitivity reaction
Rapid cognitive decline suggesting CJD requiring specialist assessment
Syncope from autonomic dysfunction

user_symptom_description: أنا عندي 24 سنة وبقالي شهرين بعاني من قلق شديد وخوف مستمر من أن يصيبني مرض خطير. كل يوم بفحص جسمي وببحث في النت عن أعراض أمراض. حتى لما الدكتور بيقولي أنا بخير مش بصدقه وبروح لدكاترة تانيين.

user_symptom_description: I'm 47 and I've had a red, scaly rash in my groin and inner thighs for the past month. It's very itchy and the edges are raised and well-defined. It seems to be spreading slowly outward. I play football and use communal showers at the gym.

user_symptom_description: عندي 77 سنة وبقالي يوم واحد شايف ضبابية في عيني اليمين ومحتاج ضوء أكتر علشان أقرأ. من فترة طويلة بحس إن الألوان بقت باهتة. كمان بلاحظ إن الضوء بيبهرني أكتر من الأول لما بطلع من مكان مظلم.
urgency_reason: Progressive visual blurring with glare and color desaturation in an elderly man is cataract requiring optometry assessment to determine if surgical extraction is indicated.

user_symptom_description: I'm 36 and three days ago I woke up with one side of my face completely drooping. My right eye won't close properly and I can't smile on that side. There was no headache before it. It happened overnight and my speech is fine.

red_flags: Forehead sparing suggesting upper motor neuron stroke requiring urgent brain imaging

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوع عندي زكام وسعال وحرارة خفيفة وجسمي بيوجع. من امبارح بقيت أحس بأم في ظهري وعيني اليمين محمرة وبتوجع. لقيت بثرات صغيرة على جفني وحواليه. عندي 23 سنة.

urgency_reason: Periocular vesicular rash in the V1 trigeminal distribution is herpes zoster ophthalmicus requiring urgent ophthalmology and antiviral therapy to prevent corneal scarring and vision loss.

Elevated IOP from secondary glaucoma

user_symptom_description: I'm 50 and I've had increasing shortness of breath over six months and now I have swollen ankles too. I've been on treatment for scleroderma for years. My fingertips are always cold and go white then blue in the cold.
possible_conditions: Pulmonary Arterial Hypertension from Systemic Sclerosis
primary_condition: Pulmonary Arterial Hypertension from Systemic Sclerosis
urgency_reason: Systemic sclerosis is the highest risk connective tissue disease for pulmonary arterial hypertension and progressive dyspnea with edema requires urgent echocardiography and right heart catheterization.
recommended_action: Urgent echocardiogram with right heart pressure estimation; HRCT chest for ILD; 6-minute walk test; PFTs with DLCO; right heart catheterization if echo suggests PAH; anti-topoisomerase and ACA antibodies; if PAH confirmed start endothelin receptor antagonist bosentan or phosphodiesterase inhibitor sildenafil; anticoagulation; diuretics for edema.
red_flags: RVSP above 60mmHg on echo suggesting severe PAH with poor prognosis

user_symptom_description: عندي 68 سنة وبقالي شهرين بحس بضعف وتعب عام وفقدت 7 كيلو. لاحظت كمان كدمات بتيجي بسهولة على جلدي من غير سبب ونزيف لثتي لما بجوس أسناني. فحص الدم الأخير بين إن صفائحي الدموية قليلة جداً.
urgency_reason: Pancytopenia with thrombocytopenic bleeding and weight loss in an elderly man requires urgent bone marrow biopsy and haematology assessment to exclude transformation to acute leukaemia.
recommended_action: Urgent haematology referral within one week; bone marrow aspirate and trephine biopsy; peripheral blood film and blast count; cytogenetics; IPSS-R prognostic scoring; transfusion support for symptomatic anaemia and thrombocytopenia; EPO for transfusion-dependent anaemia; azacitidine for high-risk MDS; allogeneic stem cell transplant in eligible patients.

Sepsis from severe neutropenia requiring empirical antibiotics

user_symptom_description: I'm 20 and I've had a very painful red swelling in my armpit for the past 5 days. It started as a hard lump and is now bigger and soft in the middle. I have a fever of 38 and feel generally unwell. I shave my underarms regularly.

user_symptom_description: بقالي 3 أشهر بحس بألم متكرر في أسفل بطني من الجنب الأيسر مع تقلصات. بعض الأيام بيجيني إسهال وأيام تانية إمساك. بلاحظ إن البراز بيطلع أرفع من المعتاد. عندي 52 سنة ومش عملت منظار من قبل.

user_symptom_description: My 8-year-old has been having episodes where he suddenly goes blank and stares into space for about 10 seconds. His eyes blink rapidly and he doesn't respond to his name. This has happened around 20 times today during school. He has no memory of these episodes.

user_symptom_description: بقالي سنة وأنا عندي بقع بيضاء على جلدي على إيدي ووجهي وحواليه عيني. الجلد في المناطق دي فقد لونه خالص. مش بيوجعني ومفيش حكة بس بيضايقني نفسياً كتير لأني بشرتي سمرا والفرق واضح.

user_symptom_description: I'm 78 and I've had a very painful red eye for two days. My vision has gone blurry and I have a severe headache on the same side. The eye looks cloudy and hard. I feel nauseous and have vomited once. The pain came on suddenly this afternoon.

user_symptom_description: أنا عندي 26 سنة ومن 3 أسابيع بلاحظ ورم في خصيتي اليمين مش بيوجع خالص. الورم صلب ومتصل بالخصية. مش عندي حمى ومش بحس بتعب. لاحظته بالصدفة لما كنت بستحمم.

user_symptom_description: I'm 48 and for the past three months I've been getting a very painful burning sensation in my feet at night. My feet feel like they're on fire and I have to put them out of the bed covers. I also have some numbness in my toes. I've been taking metformin for type 2 diabetes for 8 years.

user_symptom_description: بنتي عندها 13 سنة وبقالها أسبوعين بتشكي من ألم حاد في بطنها من الجنبين مع تشنجات شديدة. الدورة الأولى جاتها من 3 شهور. ألم الدورة بيخليها تغيب من المدرسة يومين كل شهر.

user_symptom_description: I'm 45 and I was diagnosed with hypertension two years ago but stopped taking my medication six months ago because I felt fine. user_symptom_description: عندي 75 سنة وبقالي أسبوع بحس بألم شديد في بطني من الجنب الأيمن تحت الضلوع. الألم ثابت ومش بيروح. عندي حمى 39 وقيء ومش قادرة آكل. من فترة عملت أشعة وقالولي عندي حصوات في المرارة.

user_symptom_description: I'm 22 and I've been obsessively washing my hands up to 60 times a day because I'm terrified of contaminating myself or others with germs. My hands are raw and cracked from washing. I know it's irrational but I can't stop. It takes up about 4 hours of my day.

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوع بحس بالم حاد جداً في ظهري الأيمن بيشع لبطني وعانتي. بيجيني غثيان وقيئت مرة. بولي فيه دم. الألم مغص ومش بيروح. عندي 38 سنة ومعياي تاريخ حصوات كلى من قبل.

user_symptom_description: I'm 82 and over the last month I have become much more confused. I sleep during the day and stay awake at night. I've had hallucinations of people in my room. I have a new urinary catheter since my prostate operation 3 weeks ago.

Urinary retention suggesting blocked catheter requiring immediate flushing
Rapid cognitive decline raising concern for septic encephalopathy

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهرين بلاحظ انتفاخ وثقل في رقبتي من الجنب الأيسر. مش بيوجعني. بحس أحياناً بصعوبة في البلع. صوتي بقى أخشن شوية. مش عندي حمى وما نحلتش.

user_symptom_description: I'm 19 and I've been having sharp pain in my right knee for two months. It's worst just below my kneecap and gets really bad when I run, jump, or squat. There's a noticeable tender bump below my kneecap. I play football five times a week.

worsened by running jumping and squatting

user_symptom_description: بقالي سنة وأنا عندي ألم في بطني الأسفل المزمن بيزيد قبل الدورة وبعدها. كمان عندي بقا في البطن وانتفاخ بعد الأكل وبطء في حركة الأمعاء. لما بحاول أتبرز بيجيني ألم في المستقيم.

user_symptom_description: I'm 33 and I developed a high fever of 40 degrees, intense headache, and stiff neck two days ago. I was in Southeast Asia last month. Now I have some small red spots appearing on my legs and arms. I feel terrible and I'm confused.
urgency_reason: High fever with petechial rash after tropical travel with meningism is a potential dengue hemorrhagic fever or rickettsial infection emergency requiring immediate investigation and supportive treatment.
recommended_action: Emergency admission; IV access and fluid resuscitation; dengue NS1 antigen and IgM/IgG serology; malaria thick and thin films and RDT; blood culture; CBC for thrombocytopenia and platelet count every 12 hours; LP if meningism with normal CT; avoid NSAIDs and aspirin; platelet transfusion if below 20 with active bleeding; infectious disease consult.

user_symptom_description: عندي 69 سنة وبقالي 3 أشهر بحس بضيق في التنفس وسعال جاف ومستمر. جلدي بقى جاف وشعري بقل. وزني زاد 4 كيلو من غير ما أغير أكلي. بحس بتعب شديد وبردانة دايماً.
urgency_reason: Dyspnea and dry cough with classic hypothyroidism features in an elderly woman requires TSH measurement as myxedema causes pleural effusion and respiratory compromise.

user_symptom_description: I'm 25 and I've had a sore throat for a week that isn't getting better. Both sides of my throat are very swollen and I have white patches on my tonsils. I have a hot potato voice and it's getting hard to swallow even liquids. I can't fully open my mouth.

recommended_action: Emergency ENT assessment today; examination for peritonsillar bulge with uvular deviation; needle aspiration or incision and drainage under local anaesthesia; IV benzylpenicillin and metronidazole; adequate analgesia and hydration; CT neck if deep space infection suspected; tonsillectomy 6 weeks after resolution to prevent recurrence; admit if airway concern.

user_symptom_description: بقالي 3 أيام عندي حكة شديدة جداً في جسمي كله خصوصاً بالليل ومش شايف طفح ظاهر. بدأت الحكة بعد ما رجعت من رحلة قفز في الماء في نهر. عندي حمى خفيفة وصداع وآلام.
urgency_reason: Generalised pruritus with fever and myalgia after freshwater exposure in an endemic area is Katayama syndrome from acute schistosomiasis requiring serology and praziquantel treatment.
recommended_action: Schistosoma serology IgG and IgM; eosinophil count; stool and urine microscopy for eggs 4-6 weeks after exposure; full blood count; praziquantel 40mg/kg single dose or split over 2 days; repeat treatment at 4-6 weeks if serology still positive; abdominal ultrasound for hepatic involvement; chlorphenamine for itch.

Hepatosplenomegaly from chronic infection suggesting portal hypertension
Neurological symptoms from CNS involvement requiring high-dose steroids and praziquantel

user_symptom_description: I'm 70 and I've had blood in my saliva when I brush my teeth for two months. I've also noticed a white patch on the inside of my left cheek that has been there for over three months and isn't going away. I've smoked a pipe for 40 years.
extracted_symptoms: recurrent blood in saliva on brushing
persistent white buccal mucosal patch left cheek
urgency_reason: Non-resolving white oral mucosal patch in a heavy pipe smoker for 3 months is oral leukoplakia with significant malignant transformation risk requiring urgent incisional biopsy.
recommended_action: Urgent 2-week wait oral surgery or maxillofacial referral; incisional biopsy for histology including dysplasia grading; if high-grade dysplasia surgical excision with clear margins; if SCC confirmed CT neck and chest for staging; smoking cessation immediately; alcohol cessation; annual surveillance of remaining oral mucosa; dental review.
red_flags: Induration ulceration or bleeding from the lesion suggesting invasive SCC
Cervical lymphadenopathy suggesting nodal metastasis
Trismus suggesting deep invasion of pterygoid muscles

user_symptom_description: أنا عندي 28 سنة وبقالي أسبوع بحس بصداع خلف عيني الاتنين وأمامهم. الصداع بيزيد لما بانحني للأمام أو بنام. بلاحظت كمان إن رؤيتي بقت ضبابية أحياناً. وزني زاد كتير في آخر سنة وعندي 105 كيلو.
extracted_symptoms: worsened by bending forward and lying down
urgency_reason: Positional headache with visual symptoms and significant obesity requires urgent fundoscopy to identify papilledema and LP to measure raised CSF pressure before initiating acetazolamide therapy.
recommended_action: Emergency fundoscopy for papilledema; MRI brain with gadolinium to exclude secondary causes; LP for CSF pressure measurement if MRI normal; acetazolamide 250mg twice daily titrating; aggressive weight loss counseling as 10% weight loss achieves remission; topiramate as alternative; optic nerve sheath fenestration or CSF shunting if sight threatening.
red_flags: Visual field constriction suggesting optic nerve compression requiring urgent CSF drainage
Sixth cranial nerve palsy from raised ICP
Acute severe visual loss requiring emergency intervention

user_symptom_description: I'm 39 and I've had dry mouth and dry eyes for about a year. I go through lots of water all day but my mouth still feels like cotton. My eyes feel sandy and gritty. I've also had joint pains and a rash on my face in the sun.
urgency_reason: Sicca syndrome with polyarthralgia and photosensitive rash in a middle-aged woman fulfils criteria for Sjögren's syndrome requiring serological workup and monitoring for lymphoma development.
recommended_action: Anti-Ro/SSA and anti-La/SSB antibodies; ANA; lip salivary gland biopsy for lymphocytic infiltrate; Schirmer's test; ophthalmology for corneal staining; pilocarpine 5mg for dry mouth; hydroxychloroquine 200-400mg for systemic symptoms; artificial tears; avoid anticholinergic drugs; annual monitoring for non-Hodgkin lymphoma; renal and pulmonary involvement screening.
red_flags: Rapidly enlarging parotid gland suggesting lymphoma transformation
Renal tubular acidosis causing hypokalaemia
Peripheral neuropathy or vasculitis suggesting systemic Sjögren's requiring immunosuppression

user_symptom_description: ابني عنده 6 سنين وبقاله يومين عنده بقع وردية على وجهه وجسمه بدأت من الخدين وبعدين انتشرت. البقع ناعمة ومش بارزة ومش بتحك. عنده حمى خفيفة وزكام. من أسبوع كان في مدرسته حالة مشابهة.
extracted_symptoms: maculopapular rash starting on cheeks spreading to trunk
urgency_reason: Classic slapped cheek disease in a school-age child with contact history is parvovirus B19 fifth disease which is self-limiting but requires isolation advice from pregnant contacts.
recommended_action: Clinical diagnosis; parvovirus B19 IgM serology to confirm; paracetamol for fever; reassure parents condition is self-limiting resolving in 1-2 weeks; child is no longer infectious by time rash appears; urgently advise to avoid pregnant women as parvovirus causes fetal hydrops; haematology monitoring if known haemolytic anaemia as aplastic crisis can occur.
red_flags: Severe joint pain suggesting parvovirus arthritis in older children
Pallor and tachycardia in a child with sickle cell or haemolytic anaemia suggesting aplastic crisis
Pregnant contact requiring urgent parvovirus serology and fetal monitoring

user_symptom_description: I'm 52 and I've been having trouble with my memory and concentration for six months. I forget conversations I had that same day, I can't focus at work, and I feel mentally slow. My wife says I seem like a different person. I've been under extreme work stress and sleeping badly.
urgency_reason: Cognitive complaints in the context of severe stress, poor sleep, and personality change in a middle-aged man are more likely pseudodementia from depression than early Alzheimer's and require psychiatric assessment.
recommended_action: PHQ-9 and GAD-7 depression and anxiety screening; MoCA cognitive assessment; TSH, B12, folate, glucose; EEG if seizures suspected; treat underlying depression with SSRI sertraline 50mg and sleep hygiene; occupational stress management and possible work leave; repeat MoCA after 6 weeks of antidepressant treatment; neuropsychological testing if cognitive deficits persist.
red_flags: Rapid progression over weeks suggesting CJD or autoimmune encephalitis requiring urgent investigation
Focal neurological signs suggesting cerebrovascular disease
Active suicidal ideation requiring immediate intervention

user_symptom_description: عندي 65 سنة وبقالي شهر بحس بأعراض غريبة: بولي بقى فيه دم واحساس بحرق لما بتبولي. عملت تحليل بول وطلع نظيف. الدكتور قالي مافيش عدوى. الألم بيجي وبيروح.
urgency_reason: Painless recurrent hematuria with negative urine culture in a postmenopausal woman is bladder cancer until proven otherwise requiring urgent cystoscopy within 2 weeks regardless of negative MSU.
recommended_action: Urgent flexible cystoscopy within 2 weeks; urine cytology; CT urogram for upper tract assessment; do not attribute to UTI without positive culture; if bladder tumor found TURBT under general anaesthesia; staging and grading for treatment planning; BCG instillation for non-muscle-invasive bladder cancer; cystectomy for muscle-invasive disease.
red_flags: Clot retention causing inability to void requiring emergency catheterization
CT showing lymphadenopathy or upper tract involvement suggesting metastatic disease
Weight loss and bone pain suggesting advanced disease

user_symptom_description: I'm 21 and two weeks ago I started getting very itchy red bumps on my wrists and stomach that look like small blisters. My boyfriend has similar spots too. They're worse at night and on my fingers between the knuckles. I've never had this before.
urgency_reason: Pruritic rash in classic scabies distribution affecting both sexual partners is scabies requiring simultaneous treatment of both individuals and all household contacts.
recommended_action: Clinical diagnosis confirmed by distribution; both partners treated simultaneously with permethrin 5% cream neck to toe left for 12 hours and repeated at day 7; all household contacts treated; launder all clothing and bedding at 60 degrees; pruritus persists 4-6 weeks after cure due to allergic reaction; antihistamine for pruritus; oral ivermectin if permethrin fails.
red_flags: Crusted Norwegian scabies in immunosuppressed partner requiring isolation and oral ivermectin
Secondary impetiginization requiring topical antibiotics
Eczematized scabies requiring dermatology referral

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهرين بحس بدوخة بتيجي فجأة لما بحرك رأسي من جانب لجانب أو لما بنام وبحرك وضع رأسي. الدوخة بتعدي في أقل من دقيقة بس بيجيني غثيان. مش عندي طنين أو مشكلة في السمع.
extracted_symptoms: brief positional vertigo triggered by head movement
urgency_reason: Brief positional vertigo without auditory symptoms triggered by head position changes is BPPV requiring Dix-Hallpike test and Epley manoeuvre for rapid resolution in most patients.
recommended_action: Dix-Hallpike test to confirm posterior canal BPPV; Epley canalith repositioning manoeuvre 1-3 repetitions; success rate 90% with single session; teach Semont manoeuvre for home use; avoid prochlorperazine for BPPV as it masks symptoms; reassure benign and self-limiting; Brandt-Daroff exercises if Epley incomplete; neurology referral if HINTS examination suggests central cause.
red_flags: Direction-changing nystagmus on Dix-Hallpike suggesting central pathology
Persistent nystagmus beyond 1 minute suggesting cerebellar disease
Associated neurological symptoms requiring urgent MRI brain

user_symptom_description: My 4-year-old has had a fever on and off for the past 10 days and her eyes look red without any discharge. Her lips look red and cracked and her fingertips have started to peel. She has a rash on her body and I can feel a lump in her neck.
urgency_reason: Five of five classic criteria for Kawasaki disease in a toddler constitute a pediatric emergency requiring same-day IVIG to prevent coronary artery aneurysm formation.
recommended_action: Emergency pediatric admission; echocardiogram for coronary artery dilatation; IVIG 2g/kg single infusion plus high-dose aspirin 30-50mg/kg daily; CBC, CRP, ESR, LFTs, albumin, urinalysis; daily cardiac monitoring; repeat echo at 2 weeks and 6 weeks; transition to low-dose aspirin after fever resolves; IVIG-resistant cases require second dose or infliximab.
red_flags: Coronary artery Z-score above 2.5 requiring anticoagulation
Myocarditis with reduced EF requiring inotropic support
IVIG resistance requiring second dose or steroids

user_symptom_description: I'm 44 and I've had an itchy rash under both my breasts and in my groin for three weeks. The skin is red, moist, and has a very unpleasant smell. The edges of the rash have small satellite lesions. I've gained significant weight recently and sweat a lot.
urgency_reason: Intertrigo with satellite lesions in skin folds in an overweight hyperhidrotic woman is candidal infection requiring topical antifungal and skin fold hygiene measures.
recommended_action: Skin swab for microscopy and culture; fasting glucose and HbA1c to exclude diabetes; topical clotrimazole or miconazole cream twice daily for 4 weeks; absorbent cotton clothing; keep skin folds dry with moisture-wicking products; weight loss counseling; if poorly controlled consider oral fluconazole 150mg weekly for 4 weeks; treat coexisting tinea pedis as reservoir.
red_flags: New diagnosis of diabetes driving recurrent Candida
Non-response to antifungal suggesting inverse psoriasis requiring skin biopsy
Systemic candidiasis in immunocompromised patient

user_symptom_description: عندي 76 سنة وبقالي 3 أشهر بحس بألم في وركي الأيمن بيشع لركبتي. الألم بيزيد لما بمشي أو بقوم من الكرسي. رجلي اليمين حاسسها أقصر شوية من اليسار وبتلف للخارج. عندي سكري.
extracted_symptoms: right hip pain radiating to knee
worsened by walking and rising from chair
possible_conditions: Avascular Necrosis of Femoral Head from Steroid Use
urgency_reason: Severe hip OA with leg shortening and external rotation deformity causing significant functional limitation in an elderly diabetic requires X-ray grading and orthopaedic assessment for total hip replacement.
recommended_action: Standing AP pelvis and lateral hip X-ray; assess for Kellgren-Lawrence grade IV OA; paracetamol and topical diclofenac; physiotherapy for hip flexor and abductor strengthening; walking aid; intra-articular steroid injection for short-term relief; total hip arthroplasty referral given severity and functional limitation; peri-operative HbA1c optimisation below 69mmol/mol.
red_flags: Bone scan or MRI showing avascular necrosis requiring early core decompression
Weight loss or raised ESR suggesting secondary malignancy
Pathological fracture on X-ray

user_symptom_description: I'm 24 and I have been drinking very heavily for 3 years, sometimes a bottle of vodka a day. I tried to stop yesterday on my own and now I'm shaking uncontrollably, sweating profusely, and feeling very anxious. I had a seizure this morning.
urgency_reason: Seizure during alcohol withdrawal in a heavy dependent drinker is an emergency as progression to delirium tremens has 15% mortality and requires immediate IV benzodiazepine and thiamine administration.
recommended_action: Emergency admission immediately; IV lorazepam 4mg or diazepam 10mg IV for seizure and agitation; IV thiamine 500mg three times daily for 3 days before any glucose to prevent Wernicke encephalopathy; CIWA-Ar scale for monitoring; chlordiazepoxide reducing regimen; IV fluids and electrolyte replacement; monitor for delirium tremens; motivational interviewing for alcohol dependence treatment.
red_flags: Status epilepticus requiring IV phenytoin loading
Confusion and ophthalmoplegia suggesting Wernicke encephalopathy requiring high-dose IV thiamine immediately
Autonomic instability with hypertension and hyperpyrexia suggesting delirium tremens requiring ICU

user_symptom_description: بقالي 6 أشهر بحس بألم في عظام كتير وظهري وبيتعب مني السلم. مرتين وقعت بدون سبب واضح. عندي 40 سنة وبدأت نظامي غذائي صارم من سنة وبتجنب الألبان. مش بخرج كتير للشمس.
possible_conditions: Severe Vitamin D Deficiency with Osteomalacia
primary_condition: Severe Vitamin D Deficiency with Osteomalacia
urgency_reason: Diffuse bone pain with fall tendency and multiple risk factors for vitamin D deficiency requires serum 25-OH vitamin D measurement and high-dose replacement before excluding metabolic bone disease.
recommended_action: Serum 25-OH vitamin D, calcium, phosphate, ALP, PTH; if vitamin D below 25nmol/L loading dose vitamin D3 300,000 IU over 6-10 weeks then maintenance 800-2000 IU daily; calcium 1000mg daily; ALP should normalise in 3 months; DEXA scan; if serum protein electrophoresis abnormal exclude myeloma; weight-bearing exercise and falls prevention program.
red_flags: Vitamin D below 12.5 with ALP markedly raised suggesting severe osteomalacia with proximal myopathy
Pathological fracture from osteomalacia
Hypocalcaemia with tetany or seizures from severe deficiency

user_symptom_description: I'm 72 and my husband found me very confused at 5am this morning. I didn't know what day it was or where I was. I have no headache. My blood sugar reading was 2.1mmol/L on his glucometer. I'm on insulin and glibenclamide for my diabetes.
urgency_reason: Neuroglycopenia from severe hypoglycemia causing acute confusion requires immediate glucose administration as prolonged hypoglycemia causes irreversible brain damage.
recommended_action: If swallowing is impaired give IM glucagon 1mg or IV dextrose 75ml of 20%; if swallowing safe give 15-20g fast-acting carbohydrate glucose gel or 150ml fruit juice; recheck glucose every 15 minutes; if glibenclamide cause admit for 24-hour glucose monitoring as rebound hypoglycemia occurs; review diabetes regimen urgently; consider stopping glibenclamide in elderly; patient education.
red_flags: GCS below 8 requiring IV dextrose not oral glucose
Seizure from severe hypoglycemia requiring IV lorazepam then IV dextrose
Recurrent hypoglycemia despite treatment suggesting insulinoma or factitious insulin use

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين بحس بتيبس في إصبعي الكبير في قدمي الأيمن وعندي ألم عند خطوة واحدة في الصبح. الإصبع بيوجعني لما بضغط عليه وبتضخم. مش عندي تاريخ إصابة.
extracted_symptoms: first MTP joint stiffness right foot
pain at first step in morning
urgency_reason: First MTP joint pain and stiffness without trauma in an adult is hallux rigidus requiring X-ray to grade OA severity and guide orthotics or surgical management.
recommended_action: Weight-bearing foot X-ray AP and lateral; grade OA by Coughlin classification; rocker-bottom or carbon fibre stiff-soled shoe insert to limit dorsiflexion; topical diclofenac; corticosteroid injection for inflammatory flares; cheilectomy for Grade I-II; fusion or arthroplasty for Grade III-IV with severe functional limitation; weight management.
red_flags: Acute hot swollen joint suggesting septic arthritis or gout requiring aspiration
Night pain with constitutional symptoms suggesting osteoid osteoma or malignancy
Rapidly progressive stiffness in young person suggesting seronegative spondyloarthropathy

user_symptom_description: I'm 23 and my mood has been terrible for months. But what bothers me most is that I feel like I'm watching myself from the outside, like nothing around me is real. I feel disconnected from my own hands and face. These feelings last hours and happen every day.
possible_conditions: Major Depressive Disorder with Dissociative Features
urgency_reason: Persistent daily depersonalization lasting months with mood symptoms requires psychiatric evaluation and EEG to exclude temporal lobe epilepsy before initiating CBT for dissociation.
recommended_action: Cambridge Depersonalization Scale scoring; EEG to exclude temporal lobe seizures; MRI brain; PHQ-9 for depression; SSRI lamotrigine may help; CBT for depersonalization focused on attention retraining and cognitive restructuring; mindfulness in limited doses; treat comorbid depression with SSRI sertraline; avoid cannabis as major exacerbating factor; reassure not psychosis.
red_flags: Complex automatisms or postictal states suggesting temporal lobe epilepsy
Escalating dissociation with self-harm
Psychotic features suggesting schizophrenia spectrum requiring antipsychotics

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوع بحس بألم في عيني الاتنين لما بحركهم. بدأ كمان شوية ضبابية في رؤيتي. مش عندي احمرار في العين بس بحس بألم خلف العينين. عندي 34 سنة ومن فترة اتعالجت من التهاب مزمن في أمعائي.
extracted_symptoms: bilateral ocular pain on eye movement
urgency_reason: Painful eye movement with visual blurring in a patient with prior IBD raises concern for optic neuritis associated with MS or IBD-related demyelination requiring urgent neurological and ophthalmological evaluation.
recommended_action: Same-day ophthalmology assessment; visual acuity and color vision testing; pupil examination for relative afferent pupillary defect; visual field test; MRI brain and optic nerves with gadolinium; IV methylprednisolone 1g daily for 3 days accelerates recovery; neurology referral for MS workup including CSF oligoclonal bands; VEPs; discuss disease-modifying therapy risk.
red_flags: Rapid complete visual loss requiring emergency MRI and IV steroids
Bilateral simultaneous optic neuritis suggesting neuromyelitis optica requiring AQP4 antibodies
Failure to recover vision after steroids suggesting neuromyelitis optica spectrum disorder

user_symptom_description: My 2-year-old swallowed a small button battery from a remote control about 2 hours ago. He's been drooling a lot and crying and refusing to eat or drink. He was fine before but now he seems distressed.
urgency_reason: Button battery in the esophagus is a time-critical emergency as electrical current causes liquefactive necrosis within 2 hours requiring endoscopic removal within 2 hours regardless of symptoms.
recommended_action: Emergency services immediately; do not give food or water; immediately to emergency department; chest and abdominal X-ray to locate battery; emergency endoscopic removal by pediatric surgeon within 2 hours of ingestion; if battery has passed esophagus to stomach may observe with serial X-rays; immediate honey 10ml every 10 minutes in children above 1 year while in transport to reduce current damage; post-removal esophagoscopy for perforation.
red_flags: X-ray showing battery at thoracic esophagus level requiring most urgent removal
Hematemesis or coughing blood suggesting esophageal perforation or aortoesophageal fistula
Respiratory distress suggesting tracheal compression or fistula

user_symptom_description: بقالي 5 أيام عندي ألم شديد في ظهري الأيسر وعندي حمى 38.5 وقشعريرة وبتبول كتير ومع حرقان. البول لونه داكن وفيه رايحة. بقيئت مرتين في اليومين الأخيرين.
urgency_reason: Upper urinary tract infection with systemic features of fever, rigors, and vomiting requires IV antibiotics and IV fluids as oral antibiotics may not be absorbed adequately.
recommended_action: MSU culture before antibiotics; blood cultures if febrile above 38.5; CBC, CRP, creatinine, electrolytes; renal ultrasound to exclude obstruction or abscess; IV ceftriaxone 1g daily or co-amoxiclav if oral tolerated; IV fluids if unable to maintain oral hydration; switch to oral antibiotics guided by culture after 48 hours; total 10-14 day course; repeat MSU 5 days after completion.
red_flags: Deteriorating despite IV antibiotics suggesting perinephric abscess requiring drainage
Ureteric stone causing obstructed infected kidney requiring emergency decompression
Septic shock with hypotension requiring ICU

user_symptom_description: I'm 79 and I've fallen three times in the last month. Each time I got dizzy and my legs felt weak. I'm on a lot of medications including blood pressure pills. My blood pressure when sitting is 140/90 but my daughter checked it standing and it dropped to 100/65.
extracted_symptoms: postural BP drop from 140 to 100 systolic
urgency_reason: Documented orthostatic hypotension with recurrent falls in an elderly man on antihypertensives requires urgent medication review and falls risk assessment to prevent hip fracture.
recommended_action: Full medication review; reduce or stop alpha-blockers, diuretics, and tricyclic antidepressants as main causes; lying and standing BP daily monitoring; increase fluid and salt intake; compression stockings; raise head of bed 30 degrees; fludrocortisone or midodrine if non-pharmacological measures fail; falls clinic referral; physiotherapy; home hazard assessment; bone protection review.
red_flags: Syncope causing head injury requiring CT brain
Parkinsonism signs suggesting MSA requiring neurology referral
Cardiac cause suggested by bradycardia or ECG changes requiring Holter

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهر بحس بحمى متكررة كل أسبوع تقريباً وألم في حلقي وغدد في رقبتي منتفخة. الأعراض بتيجي وبتروح. دكتوري عمل لي تحليل بيطلع الثقافة سلبية في كل مرة.
urgency_reason: Regular cycling fever with pharyngitis and lymphadenopathy on a predictable pattern with complete resolution between episodes suggests PFAPA or adult periodic fever syndrome requiring immunology evaluation.
recommended_action: Full blood count during and between attacks especially neutrophil count for cyclic neutropenia; ferritin and inflammatory markers during attack; trial single dose prednisolone 1mg/kg at fever onset; if dramatic response supports PFAPA; cimetidine or colchicine for prophylaxis; tonsillectomy curative in 60-70% of typical PFAPA; genetics for hereditary periodic fevers if suspicion raised.
red_flags: Ferritin above 10,000 with systemic features suggesting Adult Still's disease requiring DMARD therapy
Neutrophil nadir below 0.5 during febrile episode suggesting cyclic neutropenia requiring GCSF
Serositis suggesting FMF or hereditary periodic fever syndrome

user_symptom_description: I'm 58 and I've had a chronic cough for three years that brings up small amounts of blood occasionally. I've lost about 6kg and my voice has become progressively hoarser. I've smoked 25 cigarettes a day for 30 years. My cough isn't getting better.
possible_conditions: Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease with Hemoptysis
urgency_reason: Haemoptysis with weight loss and voice hoarsening in a heavy smoker over 50 is lung cancer until proven otherwise requiring urgent CT thorax and bronchoscopy.
recommended_action: Urgent CT chest with contrast; sputum cytology and AFB smear to exclude TB; flexible bronchoscopy for central lesions; PET-CT for staging; MDT involving thoracic surgery, oncology, and respiratory medicine; surgical resection if Stage I-II and fit; chemoimmunotherapy for Stage III-IV; molecular testing EGFR, ALK, PD-L1 for targeted therapy; palliative care integration; urgent smoking cessation.
red_flags: Superior vena cava syndrome from mediastinal involvement
Pancoast syndrome with shoulder pain and Horner syndrome
Malignant pleural effusion requiring drainage

user_symptom_description: عندي 66 سنة وبقالي شهر بلاحظ إن تبولي بقى متكرر جداً حتى بالليل، وأحياناً مش قادرة أمسك البول لما بيجيني فجأة. مش عندي حرقان ولا ألم. بعد انقطاع الطمث بقالي 16 سنة.
urgency_reason: Overactive bladder causing urgency incontinence in a postmenopausal woman requires urine culture to exclude infection and then bladder training and anticholinergic therapy as first-line.
recommended_action: MSU culture to exclude UTI; urine dipstick for haematuria requiring cystoscopy; 3-day bladder diary; pelvic floor and vaginal examination for atrophy; topical vaginal estrogen for urogenital atrophy as first-line; bladder training programme; mirabegron 50mg preferred over antimuscarinics in elderly to avoid cognitive side effects; flexible cystoscopy if any haematuria.
red_flags: Haematuria requiring urgent cystoscopy to exclude bladder cancer
Neurological symptoms suggesting neurogenic bladder from cord lesion
Acute urinary retention from severe prolapse

user_symptom_description: I'm 41 and I've had very dry, cracked, and painful skin on my hands and feet for years. My nails are thickened and yellowish and I can't cut them myself. I've tried many creams but nothing works. My feet also smell bad and the skin between my toes is white and peeling.
