possible_conditions: Acute Paracetamol Overdose with Hepatotoxicity Risk
primary_condition: Acute Paracetamol Overdose with Hepatotoxicity Risk
urgency_reason: 30 paracetamol tablets at 4 hours is within the N-acetylcysteine treatment window — delayed treatment causes fulminant hepatic failure and death within days.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; go to ER now; serum paracetamol level at 4 hours; plot on Rumack-Matthew nomogram; start IV N-acetylcysteine immediately; psychiatric assessment after medical stabilization.
red_flags: Paracetamol level above treatment line
RUQ pain and jaundice suggesting hepatic injury
INR rising above 2 indicating hepatic failure

user_symptom_description: أنا عندي 23 سنة وبقالي شهر وأنا حاسسة بنفسي متعبة جداً وبحس بتسارع في ضربات قلبي حتى وأنا مرتاحة. وعندي ألم في مفاصل كتيرة وطفح بني على ساقيا مش بيبهت.
urgency_reason: Non-blanching rash with tachycardia and arthralgia in a young woman may represent TTP — a pentad condition with 90% mortality without plasma exchange.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately; CBC with blood film for schistocytes; ADAMTS13 activity; LDH; creatinine; plasma exchange if TTP confirmed; do NOT transfuse platelets without hematology guidance.
red_flags: Neurological symptoms from cerebral microthrombi
Acute kidney injury
Platelet count below 30 with microangiopathic hemolysis

user_symptom_description: I was working on a construction site and inhaled a large amount of dust from cutting old pipes. That was 2 hours ago. I now have severe chest tightness, wheezing, and can barely breathe. I've never had asthma.
urgency_reason: Acute respiratory distress after high-concentration dust inhalation with new bronchospasm requires emergency bronchodilators and lung assessment for chemical injury.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; move to fresh air; oxygen; nebulized salbutamol; IV corticosteroids; chest X-ray and ABG in ER; occupational health notification; asbestos exposure register.
red_flags: Oxygen saturation below 90%
Progressive respiratory failure requiring intubation
Pulmonary edema on chest X-ray

user_symptom_description: بقالي 3 أيام وأنا بحس بألم شديد في بطني حوالين السرة وبيشع لكل الاتجاهات. وعندي قيء وما بقدرتش أكل. عندي عملية قيصرية من 10 سنين. ما فيش براز أو ريح من يومين.
urgency_reason: Complete bowel obstruction with absent flatus and vomiting following prior abdominal surgery is adhesion-related SBO — bowel necrosis occurs without emergency decompression.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately; nothing by mouth; IV fluids and NG tube decompression; abdominal X-ray and CT abdomen; surgical consultation urgently; IV antibiotics if strangulation suspected.
red_flags: Fever with peritoneal signs suggesting strangulation
Sudden pain worsening then improving suggesting perforation
Hemodynamic compromise from third-space fluid loss

user_symptom_description: I've been having a fever, rigors, and confusion for 2 days. I returned from Nigeria 10 days ago. I didn't take malaria tablets. My urine is very dark and I look yellow.
possible_conditions: Severe Falciparum Malaria with Cerebral Involvement
primary_condition: Severe Falciparum Malaria with Cerebral Involvement
urgency_reason: Cerebral malaria with confusion and blackwater fever (hemoglobinuria) has 20-30% mortality — IV artesunate must be started within the hour.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; ICU-level admission; IV artesunate (superior to quinine); thick and thin blood films and RDT; blood glucose, renal function, LFTs; exchange transfusion for high parasitemia.
red_flags: Glasgow Coma Scale below 11 from cerebral malaria
Respiratory distress from pulmonary edema
Parasitemia above 5% requiring exchange transfusion

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهرين بيجيلي طفح أحمر بيظهر ويروح على جلدي في أماكن كتيرة، ومرات بيكون فقاعات كبيرة. وعندي قروح في بقي. كنت بآخد مضاد حيوي قبل ظهور الطفح بأسبوع.
urgency_reason: Recurrent bullous eruption with mucosal involvement requires dermatological biopsy to differentiate EM from pemphigus and SJS, as treatments differ critically.
recommended_action: See dermatologist urgently; skin biopsy with direct immunofluorescence; stop any ongoing antibiotic; wound care for blisters; ophthalmology if ocular involvement; immunosuppression if pemphigus confirmed.
red_flags: Rapid spread covering more than 30% body surface suggesting TEN
Mucosal sloughing in multiple sites simultaneously
Sepsis from denuded skin

user_symptom_description: My right knee has been persistently painful, warm, and swollen for 3 weeks. I had a tooth extraction 6 weeks ago. The pain came on gradually and I have a low-grade fever. My knee has never been injured.
urgency_reason: Hot swollen joint with fever after a recent dental procedure is septic arthritis from bacteremia — joint destruction occurs within days without joint washout and IV antibiotics.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately; urgent joint aspiration for WBC, culture, gram stain, crystals; blood cultures; IV flucloxacillin empirically; orthopedic surgical washout if confirmed.
red_flags: Systemic sepsis with hypotension
Rapid functional loss within 24 hours
Multiple joint involvement suggesting disseminated infection

user_symptom_description: عندي 78 سنة وبقالي أسبوعين بحس بألم شديد في عظمة الساق اليسار ومتورمة وحمرا وساخنة. ما فيش إصابة. عندي سرطان بروستاتا بدأت علاجه من 6 شهور.
urgency_reason: Acute severe tibial pain in a cancer patient may represent pathological fracture through a metastatic deposit requiring emergency orthopedic and oncological management.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately; X-ray and MRI tibia; bone scan; oncology consultation; orthopedic fixation may be required before further weight-bearing; bisphosphonate review; pain management.
red_flags: Complete fracture through lytic lesion
Spinal cord compression from vertebral metastasis
Hypercalcemia of malignancy

user_symptom_description: I've been trying to get pregnant for 2 years with no success. My periods are regular and my husband's sperm analysis was normal. I had a pelvic infection treated 3 years ago. I'm 32.
possible_conditions: Tubal Factor Infertility from Prior PID
primary_condition: Tubal Factor Infertility from Prior PID
urgency_reason: Two-year infertility with prior PID requires hysterosalpingography to assess tubal patency; each additional year of delay reduces IVF success rates.
recommended_action: See gynecologist for HSG or laparoscopy with dye; AMH level; day 2-3 FSH and LH; baseline pelvic ultrasound; if tubal blockage confirmed, IVF is treatment of choice.
red_flags: Elevated FSH above 12 suggesting diminished ovarian reserve
AMH below 1 pmol/L suggesting poor ovarian response to IVF
Hydrosalpinx on ultrasound requiring salpingectomy before IVF

user_symptom_description: ابني عمره 9 سنين وبقاله 3 أيام بيتشكى من وجع في ركبتيه الاتنين وكاحليه وحرارة 39. كان عنده التهاب حلق من أسبوعين وأخد مضاد حيوي بس ما كملش الكورس.
urgency_reason: Migratory polyarthritis with fever 2 weeks after streptococcal pharyngitis with incomplete treatment is acute rheumatic fever — carditis may be subclinical without urgent echocardiogram.
recommended_action: See pediatrician urgently; ECG and echocardiogram; ASO titer, throat swab, CRP, ESR; complete benzathine penicillin G course; aspirin for arthritis; prophylactic penicillin for 5-10 years.
red_flags: New cardiac murmur
Sydenham's chorea movements
Erythema marginatum rash on trunk

user_symptom_description: I work as a nurse and accidentally stuck myself with a needle that was used on a known HIV-positive patient 2 hours ago. I cleaned the wound. I'm very anxious and unsure what to do.
urgency_reason: HIV post-exposure prophylaxis must be started within 72 hours — ideally within 2 hours — to maximize effectiveness; every hour of delay reduces efficacy.
recommended_action: Go to occupational health or ER immediately; start PEP (tenofovir/emtricitabine/raltegravir) within 2 hours; source patient viral load check; baseline HIV, HBV, HCV testing; psychological support; complete 28-day PEP course.
red_flags: PEP not started within 72 hours becoming ineffective
Source patient with high viral load increasing transmission risk
Deep puncture or hollow bore needle from high-risk exposure

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهرين بيجيلي فشة هواء من مهبلي بشكل غير طبيعي ومفيش ريحة. وبيجيلي أحياناً إحساس بضغط في حوضي وثقل. عمري 65 ومعاندي ولادات طبيعية 4.
urgency_reason: Pelvic organ prolapse with pressure and vaginal flatus from rectocele is non-urgent but significantly impacts quality of life requiring urogynecological evaluation.
recommended_action: See gynecologist for pelvic examination; pelvic floor physiotherapy as first-line; pessary fitting; surgical repair if severe and symptomatic; rule out fistula with examination.
red_flags: Fecal matter passing vaginally confirming rectovaginal fistula
Urinary incontinence suggesting vesicovaginal fistula
Complete uterine procidentia outside the vagina

user_symptom_description: I'm a painter and have been working indoors in a poorly ventilated room for 3 days. Today I have a terrible headache, feel confused, and nauseous. My colleague who was working with me also feels sick.
urgency_reason: Multiple people with headache and confusion in an enclosed space is carbon monoxide poisoning until proven otherwise — CO is odorless and can cause fatal arrhythmia and cerebral edema.
recommended_action: Evacuate building immediately; call emergency services; 100% high-flow oxygen via non-rebreather mask; carboxyhemoglobin level in ER; consider hyperbaric oxygen if level above 25% or neurological symptoms.
red_flags: Loss of consciousness
Carboxyhemoglobin above 25%
Cardiac arrhythmia from CO toxicity

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوع بحس بنزيف من المهبل مش في وقت الدورة وبيجيلي ألم في حوضي بعد الجنس. ومعاندي إفرازات. فحص الحمل سلبي. عمري 24.
urgency_reason: Post-coital bleeding with intermenstrual bleeding in a young woman requires urgent cervical examination to exclude cervical malignancy alongside STI screening.
recommended_action: See GP for cervical examination and smear if overdue; endocervical swab for chlamydia and gonorrhea NAAT; pelvic ultrasound; colposcopy if cervix appears abnormal; treat STI if positive.
red_flags: Friable bleeding cervix suggesting carcinoma
Cervical lesion visible to naked eye
Constitutional symptoms with abnormal cervix

user_symptom_description: I was playing football and took a direct blow to my right eye from an elbow. My vision went completely black and white for a few seconds immediately after. Now it's back but I'm seeing floaters and flashes.
urgency_reason: New floaters and flashes after blunt eye trauma indicate vitreoretinal traction with possible retinal tear or detachment — surgical repair within 24 hours saves central vision.
recommended_action: Go to ophthalmology ER immediately; dilated fundus examination; B-scan ultrasound if view is poor; retinal detachment surgery within 24 hours if macula not yet detached.
red_flags: Curtain or shadow in vision indicating macular involvement
Hyphaema (blood in anterior chamber)
IOP markedly elevated from traumatic injury

user_symptom_description: عندي 69 سنة وبقالي شهرين بيجيلي حرارة 38 وتعب وعرق ليلي. وعندي ألم في ظهري ورقبتي وبيجيلي ألم لما بضغط على الفقرات. ما فيش إصابة. عندي ضغط سكر.
urgency_reason: Vertebral tenderness with fever in a diabetic is vertebral osteomyelitis — associated epidural abscess can cause permanent paralysis within hours of cord compression.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately; MRI whole spine with gadolinium urgently; blood cultures before antibiotics; IV flucloxacillin or vancomycin empirically; neurosurgical alert if epidural collection.
red_flags: Neurological deficits in legs suggesting cord compression
Rapid progression of pain over hours
Immunocompromised state with atypical organisms

user_symptom_description: I've been having extremely painful periods since I was a teenager. I've been told I have endometriosis. Despite three surgeries, the pain is back and I also can't get pregnant after trying for 18 months. I'm 34.
urgency_reason: Recurrent endometriosis with infertility after 3 surgeries requires multidisciplinary team approach including IVF given age and diminishing ovarian reserve from repeated surgery.
recommended_action: Urgent referral to endometriosis specialist center and reproductive medicine; AMH assessment; MRI pelvis; avoid further surgery for infertility — IVF is priority given age; GnRH agonist for pain.
red_flags: AMH very low from surgical damage suggesting IVF urgency
Ureteral or bowel involvement from deep infiltrating endometriosis
Complete fallopian tube obstruction

user_symptom_description: My 2-year-old has been crying and pulling at his left ear all day. He has a fever of 39°C and has vomited twice. I notice swelling and redness behind his left ear and it looks like the ear is being pushed forward.
urgency_reason: Retroauricular swelling with ear displacement is mastoiditis — intracranial extension causing meningitis or brain abscess occurs rapidly without emergency IV antibiotics and mastoidectomy.
recommended_action: Go to pediatric ER immediately; CT temporal bones; IV ceftriaxone; ENT emergency consultation for mastoidectomy or cortical mastoidectomy if abscess confirmed.
red_flags: Meningism suggesting intracranial extension
Facial nerve palsy from mastoid involvement
High fever with altered consciousness

user_symptom_description: بقالي 3 أيام بعد ما وقعت على ركبتي اليمين الحسيت بألم شديد ومكنتش أقدر أمد رجلي خالص. الركبة اتورمت بسرعة جداً في خلال ساعة من الإصابة.
extracted_symptoms: rapid large joint effusion within 1 hour
urgency_reason: Inability to actively extend the knee after injury suggests quadriceps or patellar tendon rupture requiring emergency surgical repair within 1-2 weeks for optimal outcome.
recommended_action: Go to ER for knee X-ray; MRI knee if X-ray inconclusive; inability to straight-leg raise is diagnostic of extensor mechanism rupture; immobilize; urgent orthopedic surgery consultation.
red_flags: High-riding patella on X-ray confirming patellar tendon rupture
Neurovascular compromise of lower leg
Tibial plateau fracture requiring surgical fixation

user_symptom_description: I've been on steroids for 5 years for my rheumatoid arthritis. My skin bruises very easily, I've gained weight around my belly and face, and my blood sugar has been running high despite not being diabetic before. My bones broke easily last year.
urgency_reason: Iatrogenic Cushing's syndrome with fractures and steroid diabetes requires steroid dose minimization, bone protection, and glycemic management.
recommended_action: See endocrinologist; minimize steroid dose or switch to steroid-sparing agent with rheumatologist; bisphosphonate and calcium for osteoporosis; metformin for steroid diabetes; never stop steroids abruptly.
red_flags: Adrenal crisis if steroids stopped suddenly — carry steroid card
Opportunistic infection from immunosuppression
Avascular necrosis of femoral head from steroids

user_symptom_description: أنا عندي هيموفيليا A وبعد ما ضربت إيدي على حاجة صلبة الإيد بدأت تتورم جداً وبيجيلي ألم شديد. ما فيش جرح ظاهر. بقالي 3 ساعات وما بيتحسنش.
possible_conditions: Hemarthrosis or Muscle Hematoma in Hemophilia
primary_condition: Hemarthrosis or Muscle Hematoma in Hemophilia
urgency_reason: Expanding hematoma in hemophilia risks compartment syndrome and permanent nerve damage — factor VIII replacement must be given immediately.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately; IV factor VIII concentrate to 80-100% correction level; measure compartment pressures if tense swelling; fasciotomy if compartment syndrome confirmed; hematology consult.
red_flags: Pallor, pulselessness, or paralysis from compartment syndrome
Hematoma expanding into neck or chest
Neurological deficit in the hand

user_symptom_description: I've had a firm painless swelling in my right parotid gland area for 3 months that's been slowly growing. I'm 26. I have no pain, no facial weakness, and no infections recently.
urgency_reason: Pleomorphic adenoma is the most common parotid tumor and has malignant transformation potential — surgical excision (superficial parotidectomy) is the treatment.
recommended_action: See ENT or maxillofacial surgeon; MRI parotid with gadolinium; FNA for cytology; superficial parotidectomy with facial nerve preservation; do not delay — malignant transformation risk increases with time.
red_flags: Facial nerve weakness suggesting malignant invasion
Rapid growth over weeks
Skin fixation or cervical lymphadenopathy

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوع بحس بألم شديد جداً في جلدي في منطقة الفخذ والمؤخرة والأعضاء التناسلية. الجلد بقى أحمر وورمان وفيه حبوب سوداء. وعندي حمى عالية. عندي سكر غير متحكم فيه.
urgency_reason: Fournier's gangrene is a surgical emergency with 20-40% mortality — every hour of delay in surgical debridement increases mortality significantly.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; go to ER; broad-spectrum IV antibiotics (piperacillin-tazobactam plus metronidazole plus vancomycin); emergency surgical debridement within 1-2 hours; ICU admission.
red_flags: Crepitus on palpation from gas-forming organisms
Skin turning black from necrosis
Septic shock with hemodynamic compromise

user_symptom_description: I've been on dialysis for 3 years. Over the past month my skin has developed extremely painful dark patches that are hardening like stone on my thighs and abdomen. The wounds are turning black.
urgency_reason: Calciphylaxis has 60-80% mortality within 6 months from sepsis due to necrotic wounds — urgent multidisciplinary management including sodium thiosulfate is required.
recommended_action: Admit urgently; skin biopsy for confirmation; IV sodium thiosulfate with each dialysis session; wound debridement; stop warfarin and calcium-based phosphate binders; cinacalcet; pain management with opioids.
red_flags: Sepsis from wound infection — most common cause of death
Rapid proximal spread to trunk
Respiratory failure from chest wall calciphylaxis

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهرين بيجيلي غثيان وقيء بعد كل وجبة وبيجيلي إحساس بامتلاء بسرعة جداً. وزني نزل 7 كيلو. عملت إندوسكوبي وقالوا إنه طبيعي. عندي سكر من 15 سنة.
urgency_reason: Diabetic gastroparesis with 7 kg weight loss indicates severe gastric dysmotility causing malnutrition requiring nutritional support and motility therapy.
recommended_action: See gastroenterologist urgently; gastric emptying scintigraphy; optimize glycemic control; small frequent meals; metoclopramide or domperidone; consider NG tube feeding if weight loss worsening; nutritional assessment.
red_flags: Aspiration pneumonia from vomiting
Severe malnutrition requiring nasojejunal feeding
Hypoglycemia from erratic gastric emptying with insulin mismatch

user_symptom_description: I've been having extreme sensitivity to cold and pain in multiple teeth for 3 months after a sports injury to my jaw. My dentist found nothing wrong last time. The pain is sudden and severe but brief.
urgency_reason: Cracked tooth syndrome after trauma causes erratic pain that may eventually progress to pulp necrosis — early diagnosis prevents tooth loss.
recommended_action: See dentist specializing in restorative dentistry; transillumination and bite test for crack detection; CBCT imaging; bonded restoration or crown for cracked tooth; root canal if pulp involved.
red_flags: Spontaneous severe throbbing pain without stimulus suggesting pulp necrosis
Facial swelling suggesting periapical abscess
Pain not responding to any dental treatment suggesting trigeminal neuralgia

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوع بحس بضيق شديد في النفس بسرعة ومتعبة جداً. وعندي احمرار في وجهي ويديا بعد الأكل أو الكحول وبيجيلي إسهال مائي. ووزني نزل.
extracted_symptoms: facial and hand flushing after food or alcohol
urgency_reason: Classic carcinoid syndrome triad of flushing, diarrhea, and dyspnea indicates liver metastases from carcinoid tumor releasing serotonin; carcinoid heart disease may already be present.
recommended_action: See GP urgently for 24-hour urine 5-HIAA and serum chromogranin A; CT chest/abdomen/pelvis; echocardiogram for carcinoid heart disease; octreotide for symptom control; somatostatin receptor scintigraphy.
red_flags: Carcinoid crisis from anesthesia induction or tumor manipulation — must give octreotide prophylaxis
Right heart failure from carcinoid heart disease
Bronchospasm during flushing episode

user_symptom_description: My 6-year-old has had blood in her urine for 3 days. She doesn't have any pain or burning. She had a sore throat 2 weeks ago and got better. Her face is a bit puffy in the morning.
urgency_reason: PSGN with hematuria and facial edema 2 weeks post-strep infection may be associated with hypertension and acute kidney injury requiring urgent assessment.
recommended_action: See pediatrician urgently; blood pressure measurement; urinalysis with microscopy; ASO titer, C3 complement level, creatinine, urea; restrict salt and fluid; penicillin to eradicate residual strep.
red_flags: Hypertensive emergency with BP above 150/100
Oliguria suggesting acute kidney injury
Nephrotic-range proteinuria alongside nephritis

user_symptom_description: I took too many of my sleeping tablets last night — about 20 zopiclone — and a bottle of wine. I woke up this morning confused. My partner found me and called for help.
possible_conditions: Respiratory Depression from Combined CNS Depressants
urgency_reason: Combined CNS depressant overdose causes respiratory depression and aspiration — urgent airway protection and monitoring are required even if patient appears alert.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; go to ER; ABG and oxygen saturation; chest X-ray for aspiration; flumazenil only in specific circumstances; psychiatric assessment after medical stabilization; safe discharge plan.
red_flags: Respiratory rate below 10 requiring ventilatory support
Aspiration pneumonia on chest X-ray
GCS dropping below 13

user_symptom_description: عندي 77 سنة وبقالي شهر ألمي في جلدي في منطقة الخاصرة وهناك طفح قديم اتحسن بس الألم ما راحش. الألم حارق زي صدمة كهرباء. ما بنامش من الألم.
urgency_reason: Postherpetic neuralgia in elderly causes severe chronic pain and depression — early aggressive neuropathic pain treatment prevents long-term suffering.
recommended_action: See GP for gabapentin or pregabalin starting low dose; amitriptyline; 5% lidocaine patches; capsaicin 8% patch for refractory cases; referral to pain clinic; psychological support.
red_flags: Suicidal ideation from severe uncontrolled pain
Immunosuppression suggesting further viral complications
New weakness in distribution of rash suggesting motor involvement

user_symptom_description: I have lupus and have been well-controlled for two years. Over the past week I've developed severe leg swelling, my face is very puffy, and I'm passing very frothy urine. My last creatinine was normal 3 months ago.
urgency_reason: Acute nephrotic syndrome in SLE indicates lupus nephritis — untreated Class III/IV rapidly destroys kidneys; emergency kidney biopsy determines class and guides immunosuppression.
recommended_action: Go to ER; urgent urine protein:creatinine ratio, creatinine, C3/C4, anti-dsDNA; antiphospholipid antibodies; kidney biopsy within 48 hours; IV methylprednisolone; mycophenolate or cyclophosphamide.
red_flags: Rapidly rising creatinine over days
Antiphospholipid antibodies positive with renal thrombosis
Pulmonary hemorrhage from SLE flare

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوع بحس بألم شديد في مفصل كاحلي الأيمن وورمان وأحمر وساخن. ما فيش إصابة. وعندي إسهال من أسبوعين بعد سفرة. وبيجيلي عيط في عيني.
urgency_reason: Classic reactive arthritis triad of arthritis, urethritis/diarrhea, and conjunctivitis after enteric infection requires STI and enteric pathogen screening and anti-inflammatory treatment.
recommended_action: See rheumatologist; stool culture; chlamydia NAAT; HLA-B27; joint aspiration to exclude septic arthritis; NSAIDs; sulfasalazine for persistent arthritis; ophthalmology for uveitis.
red_flags: Septic arthritis confirmed on aspiration requiring IV antibiotics
Uveitis causing vision loss
Cardiac involvement from reactive arthritis

user_symptom_description: I've had a painless growth on my lower eyelid for 4 months. It's pearly white, has tiny blood vessels on it, and doesn't go away. I've spent years working outside in the sun as a farmer. I'm 51.
urgency_reason: Pearly telangiectatic eyelid nodule in a chronic sun-exposed individual is BCC until biopsied — eyelid BCC can invade orbit requiring exenteration if neglected.
recommended_action: See ophthalmologist urgently for eyelid examination and biopsy; Mohs micrographic surgery preserves maximum eyelid tissue; ophthalmoplastic reconstruction; regular follow-up.
red_flags: Loss of eyelashes (madarosis) suggesting infiltrating carcinoma
Epiphora from nasolacrimal involvement
Orbital invasion causing proptosis

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهرين وأنا بحس بدوار وضيق في التنفس وتعب لما بقوم بسرعة. قرأت الضغط في الصيدلية وكان 88/60 لما واقف و130/80 لما قاعد. عندي 73 سنة.
urgency_reason: 40 mmHg systolic drop on standing causing dizziness is severe orthostatic hypotension — fall risk is extremely high, and underlying cause including Parkinson's and autonomic neuropathy must be identified.
recommended_action: See neurologist for autonomic function testing; review all medications; 24-hour ambulatory BP monitoring; fludrocortisone or midodrine; compression stockings; stand slowly with head-up tilt.
red_flags: Syncope causing fall and injury
Supine hypertension with nocturnal polyuria
Rapid progression suggesting MSA

user_symptom_description: I've had a large, painful, fluctuant swelling in my armpit for a week. It has a central black core and the surrounding area is very inflamed. I work as a butcher and handle raw meat daily.
urgency_reason: A painless eschar with surrounding edema in a butcher handling raw meat is cutaneous anthrax until proven otherwise — systemic anthrax has 80% mortality without antibiotics.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately; notify public health authorities; skin swab for anthrax culture; ciprofloxacin 500mg twice daily for 60 days; do NOT incise the lesion; contact tracing of exposed colleagues.
red_flags: Rapidly expanding edema from toxin suggesting systemic spread
Inhalational anthrax from dried spores — far more lethal
Septicemia from anthrax bacteremia

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوعين بيجيلي ألم في حوضي وضهري وبيجيلي حمى خفيفة. وعندي ألم لما الدكتورة بتلمس بطني من تحت. عندي لولب حلزوني من سنة.
urgency_reason: PID in the context of an IUD requires urgent treatment as tubo-ovarian abscess risk is higher; untreated PID causes infertility and chronic pelvic pain.
recommended_action: Go to gynecology urgently; cervical swabs for STI; pelvic ultrasound to exclude TOA; IV ceftriaxone plus metronidazole plus doxycycline; IUD removal only if no improvement after 72 hours of antibiotics.
red_flags: Tubo-ovarian abscess on ultrasound requiring surgical drainage
Peritonitis from ruptured TOA
Positive pregnancy test suggesting ectopic

user_symptom_description: I've been having very severe muscle cramps, weakness, and my urine has turned dark brown after spending 2 days hiking in extreme heat with minimal water. My kidneys feel tender.
urgency_reason: Rhabdomyolysis from exertional heat stroke causes acute tubular necrosis and renal failure — massive IV fluid resuscitation must begin immediately to prevent dialysis-dependent renal failure.
recommended_action: Call emergency services; go to ER; IV normal saline 1-1.5L per hour initially; urine myoglobin and CK; urine output monitoring; cool patient; bicarbonate for urine alkalinization if CK above 5000.
red_flags: Oliguria despite IV fluids suggesting established AKI
CK above 100,000 U/L
Cardiac arrhythmia from hyperkalemia and acidosis

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهر بيجيلي ألم في منتصف صدري بيزيد لما أبلع الأكل والمياه. وبيجيلي طعم مرير في بقي. عملت إندوسكوبي وقالوا إن في التهاب شديد في المريء. عمري 70 وبآخد بيسفوسفونيت للعظام.
urgency_reason: Bisphosphonate-induced severe esophagitis can cause esophageal ulceration and stricture — the medication must be stopped and esophageal healing confirmed before restarting.
recommended_action: Stop bisphosphonate immediately; PPI twice daily for 8 weeks; repeat endoscopy to confirm healing; consider IV bisphosphonate (zoledronic acid) as alternative if oral route cannot be resumed; review intake technique.
red_flags: Esophageal ulceration or stricture on endoscopy
Hematemesis
Persistent dysphagia after stopping bisphosphonate

user_symptom_description: I've been feeling restless and unable to sit still for the past month since my doctor increased my antipsychotic medication. I pace constantly, rock back and forth, and feel extremely uncomfortable. I can't explain why.
urgency_reason: Severe akathisia is one of the most distressing side effects of antipsychotics and is a major driver of non-compliance and suicidality requiring urgent medication review.
recommended_action: See psychiatrist urgently; reduce antipsychotic dose if clinically possible; add propranolol 30-80mg daily or benztropine; consider switching to clozapine or quetiapine with lower EPS risk; screen for suicidality.
red_flags: Suicidal ideation from intolerable distress
Neuroleptic malignant syndrome with fever and rigidity
Complete inability to function from akathisia

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوع بيجيلي حمى 39 وألم خلف عيني وبيجيلي ألم في عضلاتي وعظامي. وعندي طفح أحمر على وجهي وصدري. كنت في رحلة في تايلاند الشهر اللي فات.
extracted_symptoms: macular rash on face and trunk
urgency_reason: Classic dengue triad of breakbone fever, retro-orbital pain, and rash after tropical travel requires urgent monitoring for dengue hemorrhagic fever and plasma leakage.
recommended_action: See GP urgently; dengue NS1 antigen and IgM/IgG; CBC for thrombocytopenia and hemoconcentration; avoid NSAIDs and aspirin — use only paracetamol; hospitalize if platelet below 100,000 or signs of plasma leakage.
red_flags: Platelet count below 50,000 with bleeding
Severe abdominal pain suggesting plasma leakage into peritoneum
Hemorrhagic manifestations from dengue hemorrhagic fever

user_symptom_description: I've been increasingly breathless over 6 months and have started coughing up small amounts of blood occasionally. I was exposed to asbestos heavily for 20 years as a plumber. I'm 58.
urgency_reason: Hemoptysis with progressive dyspnea and 20-year asbestos exposure is mesothelioma or asbestos-related lung cancer until proven otherwise — median survival from diagnosis is 12-18 months.
recommended_action: See pulmonologist urgently; chest CT with contrast; PET-CT for staging; pleural biopsy via VATS; register asbestos exposure for legal compensation; palliative care team involvement early.
red_flags: Massive pleural effusion causing respiratory compromise
Superior vena cava obstruction
Chest wall invasion causing severe chest pain

user_symptom_description: عندي 71 سنة وبقالي أسبوعين بيجيلي صداع في مقدمة رأسي وعيني اليسار بيوجعني ومحمر. ووزني نزل من غير سبب وعندي حمى خفيفة. وعندي آلام في مفاصلي.
possible_conditions: Giant Cell Arteritis with Ocular Involvement
primary_condition: Giant Cell Arteritis with Ocular Involvement
urgency_reason: Eye pain with GCA symptoms in elderly woman is an ophthalmological emergency — anterior ischemic optic neuropathy causes permanent blindness within hours without high-dose steroids.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately; start IV methylprednisolone 500-1000mg immediately without waiting for biopsy; ESR and CRP; ophthalmology emergency review; temporal artery biopsy within 2 weeks.
red_flags: Any sudden visual loss requiring IV steroids escalation
Bilateral vision loss from bilateral AION
Posterior circulation stroke from vertebral artery GCA involvement

user_symptom_description: I've had persistent lower back pain for 6 weeks that's worst in the morning and improves with movement. I'm 28, have had psoriasis for years, and my father had ankylosing spondylitis.
urgency_reason: Inflammatory back pain in a young man with psoriasis and family history of SpA requires early diagnosis and TNF inhibitor therapy to prevent spinal fusion.
recommended_action: See rheumatologist within 2 weeks; MRI sacroiliac joints and lumbar spine; HLA-B27; CRP and ESR; NSAID trial; TNF inhibitor if MRI active inflammation and NSAID failure.
red_flags: Uveitis episodes
Loss of lumbar flexion progressing to bamboo spine
Aortic regurgitation from SpA cardiac involvement

user_symptom_description: ابني عمره 7 سنين وبقاله شهرين بيتبوّل في فراشه كل ليلة تقريباً وكان جاف من عمر 4 سنين. مش عنده أي أعراض في النهار ومش بيشرب زيادة. مش عنده أي ضغوط.
urgency_reason: Secondary enuresis without polydipsia or stress requires examination of sleep quality and OSA as nocturnal enuresis is a classic presentation of pediatric OSA.
recommended_action: See pediatrician; urinalysis and culture; ask about snoring and witnessed apneas; adenotonsillar hypertrophy examination; sleep study if OSA suspected; desmopressin trial for primary enuresis.
red_flags: Daytime urinary symptoms suggesting bladder dysfunction
Neurological symptoms suggesting spinal cord tethering
Snoring with behavioral changes suggesting severe OSA

user_symptom_description: I was stung by a jellyfish while swimming an hour ago. I have a painful red whip-like mark across my arm. The pain is severe and radiating. I feel slightly lightheaded but can breathe fine.
urgency_reason: Jellyfish sting with systemic lightheadedness requires monitoring for Irukandji syndrome and anaphylaxis; tentacle removal and pain management are priorities.
recommended_action: Go to ER; rinse with seawater not fresh water; remove tentacles with card not bare hands; hot water immersion 45°C for 20 minutes for pain; vinegar only for box jellyfish; monitor for Irukandji syndrome for 6 hours.
red_flags: Severe chest pain and hypertension suggesting Irukandji syndrome
Throat tightening or wheezing suggesting anaphylaxis
Loss of consciousness

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهرين بحس بضيق التنفس بيزيد تدريجياً مع تورم في رجليا. وعندي ألم خفيف في صدري اليمين. وطلع معي سائل في الرئة على الصورة. عمري 76 وما عنديش فشل قلب.
urgency_reason: Exudative pleural effusion in an elderly man without heart failure requires thoracocentesis and pleural fluid analysis to exclude malignancy as primary cause.
recommended_action: Go to ER or pulmonologist urgently; diagnostic thoracocentesis for Light's criteria, cytology, and culture; CT chest with contrast; CTPA if PE suspected; pleurodesis for recurrent malignant effusion.
red_flags: Respiratory failure from massive effusion
Pleural fluid cytology positive for malignant cells
Empyema with pH below 7.2 requiring chest drain

user_symptom_description: I've been having thoughts that I'm a famous person sent on a special mission and that the television is sending me coded messages. I've been barely sleeping for 2 weeks and spending thousands of dollars online. My family is frightened.
possible_conditions: Bipolar I Disorder Manic Episode with Psychosis
primary_condition: Bipolar I Disorder Manic Episode with Psychosis
urgency_reason: Psychotic mania with reckless behavior is a psychiatric emergency — risk of self-harm from impaired judgment, financial ruin, and physical exhaustion from sleep deprivation.
recommended_action: Go to psychiatric ER immediately or call crisis team; hospital admission likely required; olanzapine or haloperidol for acute psychosis; mood stabilizer initiation; urine drug screen; metabolic workup.
red_flags: Dangerous impulsive actions putting self or others at risk
Complete absence of sleep causing medical complications
Violence or aggression toward family members

user_symptom_description: بقالي 3 أيام بيجيلي طفح أحمر على كفوف إيديا وباطن رجليا وفي بقي. وعندي حمى خفيفة. قبلها بأسبوعين كان عندي قرحة في فمي ما نبهتهاش.
urgency_reason: Palmoplantar rash with mucous membrane involvement following a painless oral ulcer is secondary syphilis until proven otherwise — highly contagious and requires immediate treatment.
recommended_action: See sexual health clinic or GP urgently; VDRL and TPHA serology; treat with benzathine penicillin G 2.4 million units IM single dose; partner notification; HIV test; repeat serology at 3 and 6 months.
red_flags: Neurological symptoms suggesting neurosyphilis requiring LP
Ocular syphilis requiring IV penicillin
High-titer VDRL above 1:32 suggesting need for extended therapy

user_symptom_description: I've been having severe episodes of abdominal cramping, diarrhea, and skin flushing for the past 3 months. The episodes happen seemingly randomly. I've also lost 8 kg. I take no medications.
urgency_reason: Watery diarrhea, hypokalemia risk, and achlorhydria from VIPoma (Verner-Morrison syndrome) causes fatal electrolyte disturbances without diagnosis and resection.
recommended_action: See gastroenterologist urgently; fasting serum VIP level; chromogranin A; serum gastrin; CT/MRI pancreas; somatostatin receptor scintigraphy; octreotide for symptom control; surgical resection if localized.
red_flags: Severe hypokalemia causing cardiac arrhythmia
Metabolic acidosis from bicarbonate loss
Pancreatic tumor with liver metastases

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهر بيجيلي فقاعات كبيرة على جلدي في بطني وصدري وفخذيا مش بتوجعني بس بتحكني. الجلد حواليهم محمر شوية. عمري 73 وما عنديش تاريخ مرضي جلدي.
urgency_reason: Bullous pemphigoid is the most common autoimmune blistering disease in elderly; widespread blistering causes fluid loss, infection, and 20% mortality without immunosuppression.
recommended_action: See dermatologist urgently; skin biopsy plus perilesional biopsy for DIF; anti-BP180 and anti-BP230 antibodies; wound care for blisters; superpotent topical clobetasol or systemic prednisolone; doxycycline has steroid-sparing effect.
red_flags: Mucosal involvement suggesting pemphigus vulgaris requiring different treatment
Widespread denuded skin causing sepsis risk
Blisters in drug-induced TEN pattern requiring ICU

user_symptom_description: I'm a 40-year-old marathon runner. I've been feeling increasingly tired, my resting heart rate has gone up to 75 from its usual 48, and my performance has dropped significantly over the past 2 months. I haven't changed my training.
extracted_symptoms: resting heart rate rise from 48 to 75
urgency_reason: Unexplained resting tachycardia with performance decline in an athlete may indicate subclinical myocarditis — exercise with undiagnosed myocarditis causes sudden cardiac death.
recommended_action: Stop all training immediately; see cardiologist urgently; ECG, troponin, echocardiogram, and cardiac MRI; CBC and ferritin; return to sport only after complete myocarditis exclusion.
red_flags: Chest pain or palpitations during exercise
ECG showing ST changes or bundle branch block
LV dysfunction on echocardiogram

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهر وأنا أعاني من حرقة شديدة وألم عند التبوّل وتبوّل متكرر جداً. جربت 3 أنواع مضادات حيوية مختلفة وما فيش فرق. وعندي ألم فوق العانة المستمر.
urgency_reason: Antibiotic-resistant bladder pain with frequency requires cystoscopy to diagnose interstitial cystitis and exclude bladder malignancy before long-term treatment.
recommended_action: See urologist for cystoscopy with hydrodistension; urine cytology; STI screen including chlamydia; pentosan polysulfate or amitriptyline for IC/BPS; pelvic floor physiotherapy; bladder training.
red_flags: Hematuria requiring urgent cystoscopy to exclude malignancy
Worsening symptoms with weight loss
Complete urinary retention

user_symptom_description: I was working in a cold store at -20°C for 3 hours without proper gear. My fingers and nose look white and waxy and I can't feel them. I've been inside for 30 minutes and they've gone blue-purple.
possible_conditions: Deep Frostbite of Fingers and Nose
primary_condition: Deep Frostbite of Fingers and Nose
urgency_reason: Deep frostbite with complete anesthesia requires emergency rapid rewarming in a hospital setting — digits can be saved within 24 hours with thrombolytic therapy.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately; do NOT rewarm in the field if refreezing is possible; hospital rewarming in 37-39°C circulating water; ibuprofen 400mg; IV rtPA thrombolytics within 24 hours; avoid amputation for at least 3 months.
red_flags: Hemorrhagic blisters indicating dermal vascular injury
Mummification of digits
Systemic hypothermia requiring core temperature rewarming first

user_symptom_description: عندي 80 سنة وبيجيلي ضيق تنفس لما بحاول أنام مستوي. ورجليا ورمانة جداً. وبقيت أضيف وسادة تانية كل أسبوع — دلوقتي بنام على 5 وسايد. وكنت عندي نوبة قلبية من سنة.
urgency_reason: Progressive orthopnea requiring 5 pillows with bilateral edema post-MI is severely decompensated heart failure requiring emergency IV diuresis.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; sit upright; go to ER for IV furosemide, BNP, echocardiogram, and renal function; intensify heart failure medications; palliative care discussion if end-stage.
red_flags: Pink frothy sputum from pulmonary edema
Oxygen saturation below 88%
Cardiogenic shock with systolic BP below 90

user_symptom_description: I've had red, watering eyes and a thick yellow discharge from both eyes for 5 days. It's so bad that my eyelids are glued shut in the morning. I wear contact lenses and my vision has gone blurry in the right eye.
urgency_reason: Contact lens-related corneal infection with vision blurring is bacterial keratitis — permanent corneal scarring and vision loss occur within days without immediate topical antibiotic treatment.
recommended_action: Go to ophthalmology ER immediately; stop all contact lens use; corneal scraping for culture; intensive topical fluoroquinolone drops hourly; never patch an infected eye.
red_flags: White corneal infiltrate visible without equipment
Loss of visual acuity to counting fingers
Perforation risk if ulcer reaches stroma depth

user_symptom_description: بقالي يومين بحس بألم شديد ومستمر في معدتي وبيجيلي قيء. وبلاقي براز لونه أسود زفت. عمري 26 وبآخد مسكنات بكميات كبيرة لألم ظهري من شهر.
possible_conditions: NSAID-Induced Peptic Ulcer with Upper GI Bleeding
primary_condition: NSAID-Induced Peptic Ulcer with Upper GI Bleeding
urgency_reason: Melena with epigastric pain and NSAID use is a major upper GI bleed requiring urgent endoscopy and resuscitation — mortality risk is 5-10% per episode.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately; IV PPI infusion; large-bore IV access and fluid resuscitation; urgent upper endoscopy within 24 hours; stop all NSAIDs; H. pylori testing; blood transfusion if Hb below 7.
red_flags: Hematemesis in addition to melena
Hypotension with tachycardia indicating major hemorrhage
Coffee-ground vomiting with hemodynamic instability

user_symptom_description: I've been having recurrent episodes where my blood pressure drops very low and I feel faint, followed by an intense pounding headache and profuse sweating. I also feel my heart racing during these spells. I'm 38 and healthy.
urgency_reason: Episodic hypertensive surges with headache and sweating are classic pheo presentation — undiagnosed pheo causes fatal hypertensive crisis during surgery, labor, or stress.
recommended_action: See endocrinologist urgently; 24-hour urine metanephrines; plasma free metanephrines; CT adrenals; phenoxybenzamine alpha-blockade before any surgery; refer to adrenal surgery center.
red_flags: Hypertensive crisis above 220/120 during spell
Multiple endocrine neoplasia workup if young or family history
Bilateral tumors suggesting hereditary syndrome

user_symptom_description: بنتي عمرها 3 سنين وبقالها يومين حرارة عالية 40 وبكاء شديد ومش مرتاحة. لاحظت إن رقبتها صعبة تتحرك وبحسس إنها تتحاشى الضوء. وبيجيلها قيء.
urgency_reason: Meningeal signs with high fever and photophobia in a toddler is bacterial meningitis until proven otherwise — death occurs within hours without IV ceftriaxone.
recommended_action: Call emergency services immediately; go to pediatric ER; IV ceftriaxone without waiting for LP if child is deteriorating; dexamethasone to reduce deafness risk; LP once stable; blood cultures and meningococcal PCR.
red_flags: Non-blanching petechial or purpuric rash from meningococcemia
Rapid deterioration to coma within hours
Bulging fontanelle in infants

user_symptom_description: I've had persistent pain and swelling in my right wrist for 8 months after a fall where I landed on an outstretched hand. X-rays at the time were reported as normal but the pain never went away.
urgency_reason: Scaphoid non-union progresses to avascular necrosis and wrist arthritis (SNAC) — surgical fixation and bone grafting are required before further collapse occurs.
recommended_action: See orthopedist urgently; CT wrist for fracture detail; MRI for avascular necrosis; bone grafting with internal fixation for non-union; physiotherapy after surgical healing.
red_flags: Collapse of scaphoid proximal pole on MRI indicating AVN
Carpal instability pattern on dynamic X-ray
SNAC wrist with arthritic changes requiring fusion

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهر بيجيلي ضيق في التنفس بالليل وبصحى مبهورة. وعندي سعال جاف. وبتورم رجليا. قالوا عندي سائل حول قلبي على الإيكو. عمري 68 وعندي سرطان الرئة.
urgency_reason: Pericardial effusion with dyspnea in a cancer patient indicates cardiac tamponade — without pericardiocentesis, obstructive shock and cardiac arrest follow within hours.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately; urgent echocardiogram for tamponade physiology (RV collapse, respiratory variation in flows); emergency pericardiocentesis; send fluid for cytology; oncology palliative care discussion.
red_flags: Beck's triad: hypotension, raised JVP, muffled heart sounds
Pulsus paradoxus above 10 mmHg
Electrical alternans on ECG

user_symptom_description: I work night shifts and have been for 3 years. I can't sleep during the day and when I work nights I feel exhausted and unable to concentrate. On my days off I also can't normalize my sleep. I've had two near-miss accidents at work.
urgency_reason: Shift work sleep disorder with near-miss accidents poses immediate occupational safety risk; driving or operating machinery while severely sleep-deprived is life-threatening.
recommended_action: See GP; light therapy upon night shift start; melatonin 0.5-3mg before daytime sleep; strategic caffeine timing; occupational health consultation; consider shift rotation change.
red_flags: Falling asleep while driving after night shifts
Severe cognitive impairment at work
Depression developing from chronic sleep deprivation

user_symptom_description: ابني عمره 10 سنين وبقاله أسبوعين بيشكي من ألم في رقبته وعندي تيبس فيها. ولاحظت إن رأسه بيميل لجنب. ما فيش إصابة وما عنديش حمى.
urgency_reason: Torticollis with neck stiffness in a child lasting 2 weeks may indicate C1-C2 rotatory subluxation — manipulation without imaging can cause catastrophic spinal cord injury.
recommended_action: Go to ER for CT cervical spine without manipulation; dynamic CT in neutral and rotated positions; traction may be needed; absolutely no chiropractic manipulation before imaging.
red_flags: Neurological symptoms in arms or legs
Very high or low fever suggesting retropharyngeal abscess
Rapid worsening suggesting posterior fossa lesion

user_symptom_description: I've had a recurring rash on my face after spending time in the sun for the past year. It looks like little bumps and blisters that crust over, and it takes about 2 weeks to heal. Sunscreen doesn't help much.
urgency_reason: Polymorphous light eruption is benign but impacts quality of life; SLE must be excluded before confirming the diagnosis.
recommended_action: See dermatologist; ANA and anti-Ro/La to exclude lupus; phototesting to confirm PMLE; broad-spectrum SPF 50 sunscreen; hydroxychloroquine for refractory cases; desensitization phototherapy in spring.
red_flags: Scarring from severe blistering suggesting hydroa vacciniforme
Positive ANA with systemic symptoms
Year-round symptoms without UV trigger suggesting other diagnosis

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهرين بيجيلي وجع عند البلع وحرقة في حلقي مع طعم مرير. ووزني نزل. الدكتور وجد عندي مريء باريت في الإندوسكوبي السابق من سنتين وما عملتش فحص من بعده.
urgency_reason: Weight loss with dysphagia in a patient with unmonitored Barrett's esophagus is esophageal adenocarcinoma until proven otherwise — 2-year gap in surveillance is a critical delay.
recommended_action: Go to gastroenterology urgently; upper endoscopy with multiple biopsies from Barrett's segment; CT chest and abdomen for staging; PET-CT; multidisciplinary team for surgery, radiotherapy, or palliative intent.
red_flags: Complete dysphagia to liquids
Hematemesis
Cervical lymphadenopathy from nodal metastases

user_symptom_description: I've been having terrible pain in my right hip that's been waking me from sleep. I was on high-dose steroids for 6 months after an organ transplant 2 years ago. The pain is worst when I lie on my right side.
urgency_reason: AVN of the femoral head from steroid-induced vascular occlusion requires urgent MRI — early core decompression prevents collapse and total hip replacement.
recommended_action: See orthopedist urgently; MRI hip is gold standard for early AVN; core decompression if pre-collapse ARCO Stage I-II; total hip arthroplasty if collapse has occurred; bilateral screening as AVN is often bilateral.
red_flags: Sudden severe pain suggesting acute femoral head collapse
Bilateral hip pain requiring bilateral MRI
Inability to bear weight

user_symptom_description: بقالي أسبوع بيجيلي تنميل وخدران في الجانب الأيسر من جسمي من الكتف للقدم. وبيجيلي ضعف خفيف في رجلي الشمال. وحسيت بألم ووخز عند التبوّل لأيام. عمري 29.
urgency_reason: Hemibody sensory and motor deficit in a young man with prior urinary symptoms suggests MS with multiple demyelinating plaques — early DMT changes prognosis dramatically.
recommended_action: See neurologist urgently; brain and whole spine MRI with gadolinium; CSF for oligoclonal bands; VEPs; bladder assessment; IV methylprednisolone for acute relapse; start disease-modifying therapy.
red_flags: Complete leg paralysis developing
Bladder retention requiring catheterization
Rapid progression within days suggesting neuromyelitis optica

user_symptom_description: I've been having right-sided flank and back pain for 3 weeks that comes in waves. I feel nauseated and have vomited several times. I passed a very small stone once a year ago. My urine looks normal.
urgency_reason: Recurrent ureteric colic with 3-week duration suggests a stone that has not passed spontaneously and may require intervention to prevent renal damage.
recommended_action: See urologist; non-contrast CT KUB; alpha-blocker to facilitate stone passage; stone metabolic workup to prevent recurrence; ESWL or ureteroscopy if stone above 6mm or obstructing.
red_flags: Fever developing suggesting infected obstructed kidney — surgical emergency
Stone in solitary kidney
Bilateral obstruction with rising creatinine

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهر بحس بتعب وإرهاق وبيجيلي نزيف من اللثة عند التسنين وكدمات تيجي بسهولة جداً. وعندي بقع حمرا صغيرة على ساقيا. عمري 70 وما عنديش تاريخ نزيف من قبل.
urgency_reason: New thrombocytopenia with fatigue in an elderly woman requires bone marrow examination to exclude MDS and acute leukemia transformation.
recommended_action: See GP urgently for CBC with differential and blood film; coagulation screen; LFTs; urgent hematology referral; bone marrow biopsy for diagnosis; avoid aspirin and NSAIDs.
red_flags: Platelet count below 10,000 causing spontaneous internal bleeding
Transformation to AML with blast cells on blood film
Intracranial hemorrhage from severe thrombocytopenia

user_symptom_description: I have a chronic skin condition and my dermatologist prescribed a biologic injection 3 months ago. In the past 2 weeks I've developed a fever, cough, and my breathing has become labored. I feel very unwell.
possible_conditions: Opportunistic Pneumonia on Biologic Therapy (PCP or Fungal)
primary_condition: Opportunistic Pneumonia on Biologic Therapy (PCP or Fungal)
urgency_reason: New respiratory illness in a patient on biologic immunotherapy is opportunistic infection until proven otherwise — PCP pneumonia is fatal without urgent TMP-SMX and steroids.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately; stop biologic therapy; chest X-ray and HRCT; bronchoalveolar lavage for PCP, fungal, and mycobacterial cultures; empirical TMP-SMX and TB testing urgently.
red_flags: Oxygen saturation below 92% despite oxygen
Bilateral ground-glass opacity on CT suggesting PCP
AFB-positive sputum suggesting TB reactivation

user_symptom_description: بنتي عمرها 13 سنة وبقالها شهرين بتتبوّل كتير وبتشرب كتير. ووزنها نزل 4 كيلو. ودكتور الأسنان قاللي عندها التهابات متكررة في لثتها. الفحص العشوائي للسكر كان 15.2.
urgency_reason: Random glucose of 15.2 in an adolescent with osmotic symptoms and weight loss requires urgent full diabetes workup to differentiate T1 from T2 and exclude DKA.
recommended_action: Go to pediatrician urgently today; HbA1c, C-peptide, GAD and islet cell antibodies, urine ketones, blood gas; if T1DM with ketones, go to ER for DKA protocol; if T2DM, metformin and lifestyle.
red_flags: Ketones in urine suggesting T1DM and DKA risk
Rapid deep breathing indicating metabolic acidosis
Altered consciousness requiring emergency treatment

user_symptom_description: I was diagnosed with antiphospholipid syndrome after two miscarriages. I'm now 10 weeks pregnant and on aspirin. I've been having left leg pain and swelling since yesterday.
extracted_symptoms: new left leg swelling and pain
urgency_reason: DVT in a pregnant woman with APS is a high-risk thrombotic emergency — therapeutic LMWH must replace prophylactic aspirin immediately to prevent PE and placental thrombosis.
recommended_action: Go to obstetric ER immediately; Doppler ultrasound leg; start therapeutic dose LMWH enoxaparin; obstetric and hematology joint review; intensify APS monitoring throughout pregnancy.
red_flags: Pulmonary embolism symptoms
Placental insufficiency with reduced fetal growth
Catastrophic APS with multi-organ thrombosis

user_symptom_description: عندي 76 سنة وبقالي أسبوع بيجيلي ألم حارق في باطن قدمي الاتنين وبحس بدبابيس. ورجليا متورمة. عندي فشل كلوي مزمن وبشرب أدوية كتير للسكر والضغط.
urgency_reason: Uremic neuropathy indicates inadequate dialysis or progression of CKD requiring dialysis adequacy assessment and Kt/V measurement.
recommended_action: See nephrologist to assess dialysis adequacy (Kt/V); increase dialysis frequency or duration if under-dialysed; gabapentin with renal dose adjustment; review all nephrotoxic and neurotoxic medications.
red_flags: Progressive motor weakness from uremic neuropathy
Dialysis encephalopathy signs
Rapidly falling GFR requiring urgent dialysis initiation

user_symptom_description: I had a surgical procedure 10 days ago under general anesthesia. Since then I've had a persistent fever that won't go away and pain in my right calf. My wound looks fine. I've been on bed rest since.
urgency_reason: Post-surgical fever with calf pain after 10 days of bed rest is DVT and PE until proven otherwise — PE is the leading preventable cause of post-operative mortality.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately; Wells PE score assessment; D-dimer and CTPA; lower limb Doppler; start anticoagulation if pre-test probability high; blood cultures for fever source.
red_flags: Breathlessness or oxygen desaturation confirming PE
Hemodynamic instability from massive PE
Bilateral leg swelling with pleuritic chest pain

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهرين بحس بضعف شديد في عضلاتي وتعب من أبسط الحركات. وعندي ألم في عضلاتي وبيجيلي بصاق صعب وبلع. عندي أجسام مضادة anti-MuSK إيجابية في الفحص.
urgency_reason: Anti-MuSK MG with bulbar symptoms has high myasthenic crisis risk — respiratory monitoring and rituximab (preferred over pyridostigmine in MuSK-MG) must be urgently initiated.
recommended_action: See neurologist urgently; respiratory function monitoring; avoid pyridostigmine in high doses for MuSK-MG (can worsen); prednisolone plus rituximab or mycophenolate; CT chest for thymoma.
red_flags: Respiratory rate increasing with decreasing FVC
Inability to swallow saliva
Nasal regurgitation of liquids

user_symptom_description: I've had a sharp pain in my right heel for the past month that is worst when I first get up in the morning. After walking around for a few minutes it eases. I'm 44, recently started a new jogging routine.
urgency_reason: Classic plantar fasciitis from new running load responds well to stretching, load modification, and orthotic support; no immediate danger.
recommended_action: See physiotherapist for plantar fascia and calf stretching programme; supportive running shoes with cushioning; reduce running load; night splint; corticosteroid injection if no improvement in 6 weeks.
red_flags: Severe point tenderness directly on calcaneus suggesting stress fracture requiring MRI
Neurological symptoms in foot
Failure of conservative treatment at 6 months

user_symptom_description: بقالي 3 أيام بيجيلي ألم وتورم وحرارة في وسط إيدي اليسار. وبيجيلي ألم شديد لما بحاول أمد إيدي. ما فيش إصابة ظاهرة. عندي سكر سيء التحكم.
urgency_reason: Kanavel's signs in a diabetic hand are flexor tenosynovitis — a surgical emergency where 6-hour delay causes tendon necrosis and permanent loss of hand function.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately; IV flucloxacillin plus co-amoxiclav; urgent hand surgery consultation for tenosynovial washout; X-ray to exclude foreign body; blood glucose optimization.
red_flags: All four Kanavel signs: flexed posture, fusiform swelling, tenderness along sheath, pain on passive extension
Spreading infection to palm or forearm
Gas on X-ray suggesting necrotizing infection

user_symptom_description: I've been having crushing fatigue, weight gain, hair thinning, and feeling cold for a year. My GP checked my thyroid and said it was within normal range. But I also have dry skin, constipation, and a slightly swollen face.
possible_conditions: Hypothyroidism Missed due to Lab Variation
urgency_reason: Classic hypothyroid symptoms despite normal TSH may indicate Hashimoto's thyroiditis with anti-TPO antibodies or a TSH in high-normal range requiring specific threshold evaluation.
recommended_action: See endocrinologist; check TSH with reference range, free T4, anti-TPO, and anti-thyroglobulin antibodies; thyroid ultrasound; morning cortisol to exclude adrenal insufficiency; consider levothyroxine trial.
red_flags: Periorbital edema with bradycardia suggesting frank hypothyroidism
TSH above 10 even if asymptomatic requiring treatment
Adrenal crisis risk from undiagnosed Addison's coexisting with Hashimoto's

user_symptom_description: ابني عمره 5 سنين وبقاله يومين بيصرخ من ألم في بطنه وبيرفض ياكل. ألمه حول السرة بس أحياناً بيقول إنه في الجنب الأيمن. وعنده حرارة 38.2 وتقيأ مرة.
urgency_reason: Migrating periumbilical pain to RLQ with fever in a 5-year-old is appendicitis until surgically excluded — pediatric appendicitis has high perforation rate due to under-recognition.
recommended_action: Go to pediatric ER immediately; nothing by mouth; IV access; CBC, CRP; abdominal ultrasound; CT scan if ultrasound inconclusive; IV antibiotics; urgent surgical consultation.
red_flags: Rebound tenderness and guarding suggesting peritonitis
High fever above 39.5°C with rigidity
Sudden pain improvement then deterioration suggesting perforation

user_symptom_description: I've been having intense, cramping lower abdominal pain for 3 days with bloody mucus in my stool. I also have urgency and have to rush to the toilet many times a day. I was diagnosed with Crohn's disease 5 years ago and was well-controlled.
urgency_reason: Severe Crohn's flare requires assessment for complications including abscess, fistula, and stricture; C. diff superinfection must be excluded before starting steroids.
recommended_action: See gastroenterologist urgently; stool C. diff test before steroids; CRP, CBC, albumin; CT abdomen for abscess; IV hydrocortisone if Harvey-Bradshaw score severe; biologics review.
red_flags: Fever with RIF mass suggesting abscess requiring drainage
Toxic megacolon with distension
Bowel obstruction from stricture requiring surgery

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهرين بيجيلي حرقان في فمي طول اليوم خصوصاً في لساني والشفايف. الفحص بالفم طبيعي. وعندي جفاف في الفم وتغيير في التذوق. عمري 68 وبآخد أدوية كتير.
urgency_reason: Burning mouth syndrome is a chronic neuropathic pain condition; nutritional deficiencies and drug causes must be excluded first.
recommended_action: See GP for B12, folate, iron, zinc levels; review xerostomia-causing medications; oral antifungal if candida not excluded; clonazepam topical rinse or alpha-lipoic acid for BMS; referral to oral medicine specialist.
red_flags: White patches or ulcer in mouth suggesting malignancy
B12 below 150 causing glossitis
Persistent burning only on one side suggesting nerve injury

user_symptom_description: I work as a sheep farmer and have developed a slowly growing cystic swelling in my right lobe of my liver that was found incidentally on ultrasound. The ultrasound report says it has a double wall appearance. I feel fine.
urgency_reason: Hydatid cyst in a sheep farmer requires careful management — aspiration without treatment causes fatal anaphylaxis and peritoneal seeding; medical plus surgical management is required.
recommended_action: See gastroenterologist; Echinococcus serology; CT abdomen for staging; start albendazole before any procedure; PAIR procedure (Puncture-Aspiration-Injection-Re-aspiration) or surgical resection; public health notification.
red_flags: Cyst rupture causing anaphylaxis requiring emergency epinephrine
Biliary communication causing cholangitis
Secondary bacterial infection of cyst causing abscess

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهر بيجيلي وجع في ركبتي اليمين لما أقعد على الأرض أو أطلع سلم. وبيجيلي طقطقة في الركبة أحياناً. ما فيش إصابة. أشتغل موصفة وبقف كتير.
extracted_symptoms: pain with sitting and stair climbing
urgency_reason: Patellofemoral pain syndrome is a common overuse condition in young women with prolonged standing; VMO strengthening and activity modification are highly effective.
recommended_action: See physiotherapist for VMO strengthening and hip abductor exercises; patellar taping; anti-pronation insoles; avoid deep squatting; NSAIDs for acute pain; avoid prolonged sitting with knee flexed.
red_flags: Locking of knee suggesting loose body or meniscal tear
Significant effusion
Night pain waking from sleep

user_symptom_description: I accidentally ingested some rat poison pellets that I mistook for food. It happened about 2 hours ago and I feel fine now. The packet says it contains brodifacoum.
urgency_reason: Brodifacoum has 100-fold longer half-life than warfarin — symptoms are delayed 1-3 days but cause fatal uncontrolled hemorrhage; immediate ER evaluation and activated charcoal if within 1 hour are critical.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately even though asymptomatic; coagulation studies at presentation and 48 hours; oral vitamin K1 25-50mg daily for weeks to months; contact Poison Control; monitor INR closely.
red_flags: INR rising above 3 at 48 hours
Any bleeding including hematuria, hemoptysis, or GI bleeding
Need for vitamin K treatment for weeks to months due to prolonged half-life

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهرين بيجيلي تورم في وجهي وإيديا الصبح. وعندي بول رغوي. وضغطي ارتفع من غير سبب. وعندي تعب. عمري 67 وعندي سكر من 20 سنة.
extracted_symptoms: facial and hand puffiness in morning
urgency_reason: Nephrotic-range proteinuria with new hypertension in a 20-year diabetic indicates advanced diabetic nephropathy requiring urgent nephrology evaluation to slow progression.
recommended_action: See nephrologist urgently; urine albumin:creatinine ratio; eGFR; HbA1c optimization; start SGLT2 inhibitor (if eGFR allows) and ACE inhibitor; dietary protein restriction; dialysis access planning if eGFR below 20.
red_flags: Rapidly falling eGFR over weeks suggesting crescentic GN
Acute thrombotic event from nephrotic hypercoagulability
Hyperkalemia from ACE inhibitor in low eGFR

user_symptom_description: I've had chronic back pain for years and my doctor prescribed opioids. Over the past year I've been needing more and more tablets to get the same effect and now I panic if I'm about to run out. I take 20 tablets a day.
urgency_reason: Opioid use disorder with 20 tablets daily places the patient at high risk of respiratory depression and accidental overdose requiring immediate addiction medicine support.
recommended_action: See addiction medicine specialist urgently; supervised opioid tapering; offer buprenorphine-naloxone as opioid agonist therapy; never abruptly stop; address underlying pain with multimodal approach; naloxone kit for patient and family.
red_flags: Respiratory rate below 12 from opioid toxicity
Combining with benzodiazepines or alcohol
Signs of opioid withdrawal requiring medical management

user_symptom_description: بقالي شهرين عندي ألم شديد في بطني الأيسر لما بتبوّل وبعدين. وعندي تكيسات على مبيضيا من سنين. وكمان بيجيلي غثيان بعد الأكل. الأطباء مش عارفين إيه السبب.
extracted_symptoms: left lower quadrant pain with urination
urgency_reason: Complex pelvic pain with urinary symptoms and known endometriosis requires specialist endometriosis center evaluation for deep infiltrating endometriosis involving the bladder.
recommended_action: Refer to endometriosis specialist center; MRI pelvis with bladder protocol; cystoscopy to assess bladder involvement; laparoscopy for definitive diagnosis; GnRH agonist for medical suppression.
red_flags: Cyclical hematuria suggesting bladder endometriosis
Complete urinary obstruction from ureteral endometriosis
Rising CA-125 suggesting malignant transformation of endometrioma

user_symptom_description: I've had a fever of 39°C, severe right-sided chest pain when breathing, and coughed up some rust-colored sputum. I feel very unwell and my GP said my oxygen is 91% on room air.
urgency_reason: Oxygen saturation of 91% with severe pneumonia meets hospitalization criteria — rust-colored sputum suggests pneumococcal lobar pneumonia requiring IV antibiotics.
recommended_action: Go to ER immediately; CURB-65 severity score; IV co-amoxiclav plus clarithromycin; blood cultures and pneumococcal urinary antigen; chest X-ray; supplemental oxygen to maintain SpO2 above 94%.
red_flags: Oxygen requirement increasing despite antibiotics
Empyema on ultrasound with pH below 7.2 requiring chest drain
Septic shock requiring ICU admission

user_symptom_description: عندي 74 سنة وعيني اليمين بقت بتشوف ضبابي فجأة في الصبح. وبيجيلي ألم خلف العين أحياناً. دكتور العيون قاللي إن ضغط العين طبيعي. الضباب مش بيتحسن من أسبوعين.
possible_conditions: Giant Cell Arteritis with Ocular Involvement
urgency_reason: Painless monocular vision loss in elderly with retrobulbar pain requires urgent exclusion of GCA, as arteritic AION causes bilateral permanent blindness without same-day steroids.
recommended_action: Go to ophthalmology or ER urgently; ESR and CRP immediately; if GCA suspected start IV methylprednisolone before biopsy; fundoscopy for disc swelling; visual fields; fluorescein angiography.
red_flags: ESR above 70 suggesting arteritic cause requiring immediate steroids
Fellow eye involvement
Jaw pain or scalp tenderness pointing to GCA

user_symptom_description: I've been having severe, sharp abdominal pain in waves for the past 4 hours. I'm vomiting bile and the pain is unlike anything I've had before. My abdomen is distended. I had a bowel resection for cancer 2 years ago.
urgency_reason: Complete small bowel obstruction with bilious vomiting after prior cancer surgery may represent adhesions or cancer recurrence — both require emergency surgical management.
recommended_action: Call emergency services; go to ER; IV fluids and NG decompression; CT abdomen with contrast urgently; surgical consultation; oncology review if recurrence suspected; blood cultures if signs of strangulation.
red_flags: Peritoneal signs suggesting strangulation or perforation
Sepsis with fever and tachycardia
Free air on X-ray indicating perforation

user_symptom_description: ابني عمره 3 سنين وبقاله يوم بيمشي بصعوبة وبيرفع ركبته عالي وهو بيمشي وما بيقدرش يحرك قدمه لفوق. ما فيش إصابة ولا وجع. كنت عنده زكام الأسبوع اللي فات.
urgency_reason: Acute painless foot drop with flaccid weakness in a toddler after a viral illness is acute flaccid myelitis — spinal cord MRI and respiratory monitoring are immediately required.
recommended_action: Go to pediatric ER immediately; urgent MRI brain and spinal cord with gadolinium; respiratory function monitoring; CSF analysis; report to public health for enterovirus surveillance; IVIG and steroids controversial but may be tried.
red_flags: Weakness spreading to other limbs suggesting GBS
Respiratory muscle involvement
Bulbar symptoms indicating brainstem involvement
